I woke Penacony from its eternal slumber!
让我猜猜，接下来你是不是要说，你被邀请去参加了谐乐大典？还在匹诺康尼成了盛会巨星？
Let me guess, next you'll say you were invited to the Charmony Festival? And became the Festive Superstar?
Did you peek at the script?
我还成了那里的股东呢！
I even became a shareholder there!
I... I don't know what to say...
哎呀，我早该猜到的！最近应物科进口了一批梦泡，有不少没见过世面的年轻科员都整天沉迷在里面，连工作都甩到一边去了。

Haha. Oh, I know what's happening now! The Department of Implement Arts imported a batch of dream bubbles. Loads of young naïve researchers have been wasting entire days in them, ignoring even their paid work.
想必你也是忆质入脑，幻觉缠身吧？不然怎么会觉得自己成了列车上的无名客呢？
You probably ate too much of that memoria too and thought those illusions were real. Why else would you believe you're a Nameless aboard the Express?
不过…我也不是不能理解。我听说列车本来邀请你和他们一起上路的，可是你拒绝了。怎么，现在后悔啦？
Well... I can't say I blame you. I heard the Express did invite you to join them, but you turned them down. Are you regretting that choice now?
But I DID board the Express!
你试着向眼前的科员呐喊，但你的声音却颤抖着给出了截然不同的回答。
You try to yell at the researcher before you, but your wavering voice gives a different response.
这句回答是你的心中所想吗？还是某种虚假的操弄？你试着回想过去发生的一切，但它们变得愈发不真实。
But, was that answer truly what you thought? Or was it some sort of illusive manipulation? You try to piece together what has happened, but your memories feel more distant with every passing second.
关于星穹列车，关于那些无名客，记忆正像海水冲刷下的沙塔，四处溃散。你理解了Saber想要停留片刻的感受。
About the Astral Express and the Nameless. Like sand under the waves, your memories crumble and fade. And suddenly, you understand — why Saber chose to stay, even just for a moment.
为什么当时一念之差你没有登上星穹列车呢？这不重要了。眼前的地概科员看着你，也许是在组织安慰的措辞，也许是在咂摸几句玩笑带过这尴尬的凝重气氛。到最后，他开口了——

Why didn't you step aboard the Astral Express back then, on that split-second impulse? It no longer matters. The researcher in the Department of Cosmic Geography standing before you watches you closely, perhaps searching for words of comfort, or maybe looking for the right joke to shatter the heavy silence. Eventually, he speaks.
看你的简历似乎没什么特长，我先给你安排点轻松的工作好了……
Well, your resume doesn't show any particular skills, so I'll start you off with some light tasks...
整理地概科过去半年的经费报表，预约未来一个月的研究会议，收集各级科员的课题申请…够你干上一段时间了。

Sort the Department of Cosmic Geography's expenditure report from the past six months. Schedule research meetings for the upcoming month. Collect project proposals from all levels of researchers. Yeah, that should keep you busy for a while.
要不然呢？你总不可能是黑塔吧？
What else would you be? Madam Herta?
Isn't this the Department of Cosmic Geography?
别大惊小怪，在空间站，我们地概科是食物链的底端，这种事情都是家常便饭啦。
Don't be so surprised. Our department is at the bottom of the food chain on the station... this work happens all the time.
我走了，{NICKNAME}，派给你的活儿好好干啊。
I'm off, {NICKNAME}. Be sure to do your job well.
他打算离开，又突然不忍心地转身看向你。
He turns to leave... yet could not help himself from looking back at you.
我偶尔也会后悔自己十四岁那年没去进修「量子历史」而选择了「寰宇地概」，我当时觉得…数学太难了。我常常问自己，如果我做了别的选择，还会是今天这幅衰样吗？

Yeah, sometimes I regret picking the Geography of the Universe course when I was fourteen and walking away from Quantum History... I felt math was just too tough for me back then. But now, I ask myself... Would I still be stuck in this dead-end job if I made a different choice?
嗐，都是瞎想。新来的，别为已经做出的决定后悔。你看我，这样不挺好？
No no no. C'mon. Don't worry about the what-ifs. Why waste time regretting a choice you've already made? Look at me, things aren't so bad here, are they?
一点也不好！你内心发出嘶吼，但愤怒稍纵即逝。
This is all wrong! You scream internally, but the fury is fleeting.
男人满脸无奈地看着你，努力把嘴边的吐槽憋了回去。
The man looks at you with exasperation written all over his face, visibly biting back a snarky remark.
你迟到了，新人。再晚来几个系统日，报销时限都要过了。
You're late, newcomer. A few more system days of delay and we'll miss the reimbursement deadline.
看在你初来乍到的份上，就不为难你，赶紧干活吧。
I'll cut you some slack given that you're new. Now get to work.
（好乱的桌子，是要我把这些全都整理干净吗？该从哪儿开始呢？）
(What a messy desk. Am I supposed to organize all this stuff? Where do I even start?)
太慢了，像你这样搞，等到琥珀王敲下一锤都弄不完。
You're too slow. Keep going like this and you'll still be here when the Amber Lord makes THEIR next hammer swing.
I see you're itching for a fight!
Why don't you do it yourself?
你正欲破口大骂，但内心却不由地生出一丝怀疑。
You're on the verge of shouting, but just then, a sliver of doubt creeps inside you.
这真是你想做的吗？放轻松，不要那么粗暴，想想你真正应该做的是什么？
Is this really what you want? Take a breath. Don't lash out. Focus on what you truly need to do.
Take out the baseball bat and give her a good beating.
你发现自己总能随手掏出的球棒早已不在手边。话说回来，你真的曾拥有过那根球棒吗？
The bat you always have at your side... is no longer there. Then again, did you ever really have it in the first place?
那么，你要去哪里？你又能去哪里？像你这样并无特长的年轻人不正该找个十六险一金的稳定工作，舒坦地干到世界末日？
But where would you go? Is there anywhere you can go? You're young, with no special talents. Isn't your best bet a cushy job with full benefits, clocking in every day until the world ends?
还愣着做什么？以为会有太空仿生田螺替你干活吗？
What are you standing around for? You think space bionic snails are going to do the work for you?
没错，就是这样，平静，且美好地放下双手。现在，你已经对工作轻车熟路了，把剩下的文件也整理干净吧。
Yes. That's it. Calmly and nicely, drop the fight. By now, the job feels like second nature. Might as well tidy up the last of the files.
如果你想说「我们是不是在哪儿见过」，那我可以回答你，「没有」。
If you're going to ask me "Have we met before," my answer is gonna be "no."
But I really feel like we've...
你读了读他的工牌，上面除了一个言简意赅的「A」字别无其他。所属科是「家政科」…话说回来，空间站有这一科吗？
You glance at his work tag. On it, just a single letter — A. Department: Domestic Services. Wait... since when does the space station have a Domestic Services Department?
说起来，A叔，你难道不觉得，自己不属于这里吗？
C'mon, Uncle A, don't you ever feel like you don't belong here?
我梦见自己参与了圣杯战争。
I dreamt that I was part of the Holy Grail War.
你应该是被召唤的英灵。
You should've been one of the summoned Heroic Spirits.
我明白，我明白的。每天都有一打科员跑来和我聊天，他们都宣布自己不属于这里。
I get it. I really do. Dozens of researchers come up to me every day, all claiming they don't belong here.
因为现在的生活不称心如意，就觉得自己应该属于其他地方，这不过是另一种美化了的逃避现实的借口罢了。
They think they should be somewhere else because life isn't going their way. It's just another dressed-up excuse to escape reality.
即使逃去其他地方，只要后退的本性不改变，迟早有一天会无处可去的。
As long as your instinct is just to back down and run, you'll run out of places to go even if you manage to get out of this place.
依我看，这里不挺好的嘛。没有世界危机，没有想要毁灭人类的怪胎。厨房也很方便，除了食材有点古怪。
Personally? I think this place isn't so bad. No world-threatening crises, no freaks trying to end humanity. The kitchen's convenient, too... though the ingredients are a bit odd.
虽然照样有个「挥宝石如土」的小姑娘，对绝大多数人也算是理想乡了。
We've still got a little girl who throws around gemstones like dirt, but it's pretty much a utopia for most people.
平凡的人生……等离开了再后悔，就来不及了。
There's no turning back once you leave your ordinary life behind.
You glance at him, wanting to say something, but decided not to.
打消念头了？我就说嘛，你没那么想离开这儿，对吧？
Changed your mind, huh? I knew it. You don't really want to leave, do you?
花了好几天的时间，你终于完成了漫长的整理工作。
Days pass. After long hours of sorting, you're finally done with the work.
虽然违和感仍然在你的心中徘徊，但在解决它之前，还是先休息一会儿吧。
Although an uncanny feeling lingers in your chest, before it's resolved, you should take a break.
飘浮，静静地在梦的表面，维持在沉没前的瞬间。
Drifting quietly over the surface of a dream, suspended in the moment before you sink.
嗯，让我们来说说王的故事吧，一位名为尤瑟的王。
Let me tell you a story about a king... a king named Uther.
在我到来之前，他曾统领不列颠的子民。而在我到来之后，为了捍卫不列颠的子民，他向摧毁一切的白龙发起进攻，以败北告终。
He ruled the people of Britain before I showed up. And after my appearance, he launched an attack against the White Dragon to protect his people, a battle that ended in defeat.
可即便如此，人们仍称他为最伟大的国王。在你看来，是什么令他成为了英雄？
Even so, people still called him the greatest king. What do you think made him a hero?
The innate glory of being a king.
不，和他相同的各个部族的王，他们的名字都没能流传下去。
No. The names of kings from other tribes, kings equal to his stature, have all been forgotten.
The deeds he achieved as a knight.
不，王的身边有比他更英勇的骑士，他们的名字都没能流传下去。
No. There were knights more courageous than him by his side, but their names didn't survive in time.
The courage he exhibited as a human.
举剑挑战自己绝对无法战胜的龙，剑折弓断，身首异处，他身为人类的一切注定是失败的……
He raised his sword to challenge a dragon he knew he could never defeat. The sword shattered, the bow snapped, and he was beheaded. As a human, everything about him was destined to fail...
但他为了拯救什么而举起剑的模样，却在不列颠的至黑之夜里留下了一颗星星。
But the way he raised his sword to bring deliverance left a shining star in Britain's darkest nights.
我们所目睹的星星虽然并非它们本来的样子，但光却不是谎言，它会照耀很久很久，直到照亮下一位英雄的道路。
The stars we see may not be their original forms, but their light isn't a lie. It will shine for ages, lighting the way for the next hero.
舞台，那位{RUBY_B#音符小姐}失去名字的英灵{RUBY_E#}如此称呼我们的人生，她用宝具抹去了星星的辉光。
That {RUBY_B#Miss Note}Heroic Spirit who lost her name{RUBY_E#} referred to our lives as "a stage," and she used her Noble Phantasm to erase the star's radiance.
但…御主，如果你仍然保有勇气…如果你愿意成为星星，所有目视你的观众也都将登上舞台，成为英雄。
But Master... if you still have courage... if you're still willing to become that star, then all the spectators who have seen you will also step onto the stage, becoming heroes themselves.
不知不觉间说了些大道理，虽然只是对梅林的蹩脚模仿。
Look at me. Talking big all of a sudden and doing a bad imitation of Merlin.
我在等待一个即将登台演出的人，也在骑马穿越荒野。梦就要结束了，御主，无论是对我，还是对你。
I'm waiting for someone who's about to take the stage. I'm also riding through the wilderness. The dream is nearing its end, Master, for me and you.
呦，{F#姐们儿}{M#小哥}，如果你也是来这里偷懒的，这儿已经满员了。
Hey, {M#buddy.}{F#lass.} If you're here to slack off, you're a bit too late. This place is already at full capacity.
哈哈哈哈，那我就是模范钓客了。
Hahaha, then I guess I'm the model fisherman.
科长那小子，正忙着和逃跑的阮•梅造物斗智斗勇呢，可没时间管我。
The chief is too busy chasing those Ruan Mei Creations that ran away. He won't have time to read your report.
没事儿，你在这儿干活，我在这儿摸鱼，咱们各取所需。
Well, no worries. You work here, and I'll slack off. We each get what we need.
暂且无视这位吊儿郎当的防卫科科员，你低下头开始工作。加油，不要输给这种无所事事的大人！
For now, you ignore the Security Department staff's careless attitude and lower your head to resume your task. You've got this! You're not losing to some grown-up who's slacking all day!
首先，《关于噬硅菌群对行星磁场干涉的定量分析》会议。参会人数<unbreak>15</unbreak>人，会议时间在未来两天内即可。
First on the list: A Quantitative Analysis of Mycophage Cluster Interference on Planetary Magnetic Fields. Fifteen attendees. Must be scheduled within the next two days.
抱歉，您所预约的时间已无会议室。
Sorry, there are no conference rooms available at your requested time.
抱歉，您所预约的时间已无会议室。
Sorry, there are no conference rooms available at your requested time.
The night after the next day.
抱歉，你所预约的时间已无会议室。
Sorry, there are no conference rooms available at your requested time.
哎，居然连晚上的会议室都预约空了，这里的人可真是勤勉。
Ugh, the conference rooms are fully booked even at night. People here really are workaholics.
我想起来了！你就是他们说的星核精？话说，你睡觉的时候，会像萤火虫一样发光吗？
Ah! Wait! You're the Stellaron they were talking about, huh? Tell me... when you sleep, do you glow like a firefly?
要我说，像你这样的年轻人，就该找个师傅学上一身本事，闯出自己的天地，像个英雄那样，无拘无束。
Young ones like you should really find a mentor, learn some skills, and carve your own path. Live like a true hero, no strings attached.
别在意耳边的干扰，看看下一场会议的需求。《星震现象对科员艺术创作的影响》，参会人数2人，会议时间不限。
Ignore the distractions around you. Let's look at the next meeting's details: The Effects of Starquake Phenomena on the Artistic Expression of Researchers. Two attendees, no time constraints.
你似乎想起了什么，在空间站外划过的引擎火花，列车跃迁开始前的轻微失重…等等，这些全都是不存在的空想，科员，你应该把精力放到现在的工作上。

Something stirs in your memory, sparks from an engine streaking past the space station, the faint weightlessness before the Express conducts a warp jump... Wait, no. None of that is real. Researcher, you should be focusing on your task at hand.
还有<unbreak>899</unbreak>个需要进行预约的会议，在把事情搞砸前，最好快一点完成它们。
You've still got <unbreak>899</unbreak> more meetings to schedule. You'd better hurry up and finish before things spiral out of control.
很好，算上系统新增的两个会议需求，再完成<unbreak>897</unbreak>个会议的预约就能结束了。
Alright. Including the two new system-generated meetings, just <unbreak>897</unbreak> more to go, and the list is done.
你已经对眼前的工作得心应手。
You're in the zone now, handling the work before you with practiced ease.
说起来，{F#姐们儿}{M#小哥}，你对钓鱼有兴趣吗？别看外面都是一片真空，能钓起来的玩意儿可不少。
You ever tried fishing, {M#buddy?}{F#lass?} Don't be fooled by the vacuum outside. There's still plenty to catch.
迁徙的无形鲢，会和钓客搏斗的硅基软骨鱼，上次我甚至还钓到过一只扑满。
There's the migrating invisible carp, the silicon-based soft-boned fish that put up a fight. I even caught a Trotter last time.
虽然你的精神已十分疲惫，但男人的神采仍打动了你。忙里偷闲的娱乐，一根钓竿，空间站的生活也没你想象中的那么不堪。

Although you are exhausted beyond measure, the man's expression moves you. Your entertainment during a momentary respite from work, a fishing rod. Life at the space station isn't as bleak as you thought.
也许，这里就是你的理想乡。
对了，听说星穹列车又来了，会在空间站停靠一段时间。要不要过去看看？就当是凑热闹。
By the way, I heard the Astral Express is coming back and will be stopping at the space station for a while. Want to go check it out? Just for fun.
好久不见，{NICKNAME}，在空间站过得还好吗？
Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. How's life been on the space station?
看到你能适应这里的生活，我也就放心了。
I'm glad to see you've settled in here.
这样啊，有困难的话，找艾丝妲聊聊吧，相信她会帮你解决的。
Oh, I see... If things are tough, you could always talk to Asta. She's sure to help you out.
这样啊，有困难的话，找艾丝妲聊聊吧，相信她会帮你解决的。
Oh, I see... If things are tough, you could always talk to Asta. She's sure to help you out.
上次告别之后，我们又去了很多地方，贝洛伯格，仙舟罗浮，匹诺康尼…一路上，也算是有好有坏吧。
We traveled to many places after we parted ways: Belobog, the Xianzhou Luofu, Penacony... There were both good and bad moments along the way.
丹恒？虽然中间有不少波折，但他还是回到了罗浮，毕竟，那里本来就是他的故乡。
Dan Heng? It wasn't an easy journey, but he's back on the Luofu now. After all, that's where he's from.
你知道地球吗？在丹恒离开后不久，瓦尔特如愿以偿找到了回家的路，但愿他能平安抵达那里。
Have you ever heard of the planet called Earth? Soon after Dan Heng left us, Welt found the way back home just as he had hoped. Let's pray he makes it there safely.
姬子皱了皱眉，似乎你的问题让她感到意外。一阵违和感掠过心头，你从未登上列车，那么你提到的帕姆…是谁？
Himeko frowns, as if your question has caught her off guard. An unsettling sensation flickers through your mind. You've never boarded the Express. So who is this... "Pom-Pom" you speak of?
…你是从哪儿打听到了列车长的名字？是丹恒告诉你的吗？
...Where did you hear the conductor's name? Did Dan Heng tell you?
帕姆还是老样子，但看着列车上的人越来越少，总归会有些寂寞吧。
Pom-Pom's still the same. But with fewer and fewer people on the Express, it must be getting lonely for them.
我有时也会想，如果你跟我们一起离开，会发生什么变化。可惜，开拓之旅从来不存在「后悔」和「如果」。
I sometimes wonder what might have changed if you had come with us. Sadly, the trailblazing expedition doesn't leave room for regrets and what-ifs.
小三月…我不知道该怎么…哎，希望忆庭的朋友能治好她。
March... I'm not sure how to put it... *heavy sigh* I hope that friend from the Garden can cure her.
Is the Express still in need of passengers?
无名客的生活并不轻松，在离开这里后，有些乘客曾和我们短暂同行，但如今都各自散去了。
Life as a Nameless isn't easy. After we left the space station, we did have some passengers traveling with us for a short time, but they've all gone their separate ways now.
最近，星际和平公司的朋友建议我们去卡美洛一趟，那里应该早就被反物质军团摧毁了，但最近却传出了复数的求救信号。

Our friends from the Interastral Peace Corporation recently suggested we make a stop at Camelot. That planet should've been destroyed by the Antimatter Legion long ago, but we've been picking up multiple distress signals from there.
我们顺道在空间站停靠一段时间，也来见见一些老朋友——{NICKNAME}，如果你愿意，这回也可以和我们一起离开。
So we're stopping by the space station for a while to meet some old friends. You can join us and leave with us this time if you want, {NICKNAME}.
I'll pack my bags right away!
你真的是这样想的吗？如果登上星穹列车没能让你的生活变得更好……你该怎么办？
Is that really how you feel? If joining the Astral Express doesn't change your life for the better... What then?
如果迎接你的不是奇妙的冒险，而是无休止的清洁和修理，是不能愈合的创伤和绝望的死亡……你该怎么办？
What if what awaits you isn't a grand adventure, but endless cleaning, constant repairs, wounds that never heal, and death steeped in despair... What will you do then?
如果你没能给他们带来什么帮助，如果你成了列车的累赘，如果有一位无名客为了救你而牺牲，如果所有人都希望你离开……你该怎么办？
What if you can't help anyone? What if you become a dead weight on the Express? What if a Nameless gives their life to save you, yet everyone silently wishes you'd just leave... What will you do?
好好想想，你应该给出怎样的回答？
Think about it. What answer should you give?
我考虑一下…在列车离开前，我一定会给你答复的。
I'll think about it... I'll make sure to give you my answer before the Express leaves.
好啊，无论你想要留在哪里，我都会尊重你的选择。
Alright. I'll respect your choice no matter what you pick.
恬静的梦乡，因窗外的鸟鸣而动摇，可是，真空中也会有知更鸟在唱歌吗？
A peaceful dream, stirred by birdsong beyond the window. However, can a robin really sing in the vacuum of space?
让我们来说说一只鸟儿的故事吧，一只蒙冤入狱的鸟儿。她曾是一位歌手，因为谱写不受权贵们喜爱的歌谣而被投入铁牢。
Let me tell you the story of a bird who was imprisoned wrongfully. She was once a singer, thrown into a dark cell for composing songs that the powerful didn't like.
在囚笼中，鸟儿听到了许多悲叹的声音。于是，她为同在笼中的人们歌唱，抚慰他们的思乡愁绪，鼓舞他们起义的壮志。
The bird heard many voices of sorrow. So, she sang for the others trapped inside, soothing their homesick hearts and inspiring them to rise up.
最终，鸟儿和一块怀表、一头狼还有无数同伴一起冲破了牢笼。
In the end, the bird broke free, with a pocket watch, a wolf, and countless companions by her side.
鸟儿以为，赢得自由后她能开始全新的生活。她能在舞台上和银幕中展示自己美丽的羽毛与歌喉，像过去那样为一无所有的人们带去希望。

The bird believed that she would begin a new life after gaining freedom. She would shine on the stage and the silver screen, displaying her beautiful feathers and voice, just as she had once brought hope to the hopeless.
但…她错了。匹诺康尼很快变得面目全非。鸟儿所唱的歌曲，出演的电影，还有她自己的生活，全被关进了名为金钱的笼子里，成了商品。

But... she was wrong. Penacony soon became unrecognizable. The songs she sang, the films she starred in, and even her own life were all locked away in a cage called money, turned into mere commodities.
电影公司想将鸟儿打造成美丽的符号，鸟儿却想要飞离这片令它窒息的臭水沟……
The movie studio wanted to turn the bird into a symbol of beauty, but the bird longed to escape from this suffocating, filthy gutter...
于是他们夺走了它的艺名，找来一只全新的雏鸟替代银幕上的她，又用污浊的流言和臆想将她扼死在不名誉的结局里。
They stripped away her stage name, replaced her with a fresh-faced chick, and smothered her with slander and rumors, leading her to a disgraceful end.
…所以，你想报复那些令你蒙受污名的人？
...So, you seek revenge on those who tarnished your name?
恰恰相反…再次回到这个世界时，我发现自己已经没有可以报复的对象了。
No. The exact opposite, in fact. When I returned to this world, I realized there was no one left to take revenge on.
所以我要索回我被夺走的名字，抹消所有属于我的作品……让身为███时存在过的一切痕迹不复存在。
Instead, I will reclaim the name they took from me and erase every single work I've ever produced... I'll destroy every trace of my existence as ████.
既然曾经被囚禁，被夺取…那么如今您更不应该将所有为终结这场圣杯战争而来的御主与英灵困锁在宝具中。

You know how it feels to be locked in a cage and have everything taken from you, so why do you still trap the Masters and Heroic Spirits in your Noble Phantasm? When they wish to end this Holy Grail War?
老奥帝先生或许能实现你的愿望，但他索要的却是更高昂的利益。这一点，和他曾同处于一个时代的你比我更清楚。
Old Oti may be able to fulfill your wish, but the cost he demands is far greater. As someone born in the same era as him, you should know this better than I do.
奥帝是只啃噬匹诺康尼的虫子，他当然不可信。但御主，他是只对圣杯有所求的虫子…而你，圣杯无法收买你的心智。

Oti is nothing more than a parasite feeding on Penacony... Of course I won't trust him. But you're different, Master. He's a worm who has a wish for the Holy Grail, yet there's nothing the Holy Grail can do to sway you.
想让我解除宝具？那就用令咒命令我吧！御主，像那些人用合同与法律夺走我的名字、事业一样，来吧！

If you want to stop my Noble Phantasm, you'll have to force me with a Command Spell! Come, Master! Take away my free will, just like how they took away my name and career with their contracts and laws!
你知道我不会这么做的，音符小姐！…我们来打个赌吧，虽然我这辈子从未和别人赌过什么。
You know I won't do that, Miss Note! ...Let's make a wager, though I've never once gambled in my life.
我打赌那些被你剥夺「英雄」妆容的御主与从者，绝不会被你的宝具困住——我对他们有信心！
I bet that those Masters and Servants will not yield to your Noble Phantasm, even though you've stripped their identity as heroes — I trust them.
{NICKNAME}，这是你在空间站工作的第几天？第三十天？第九十天？还是更久？
{NICKNAME}, how many days has it been since you started working at the space station? Thirty? Ninety? Even longer?
还记得你现在要做什么吗？收集各级科员的课题申请，对现在的你来说，这简直是闭上眼都能完成的工作。
Do you still remember what you need to do now? Compiling project proposals from all levels of researchers. By now, it's second nature — something you could do with your eyes closed.
还在想星穹列车的事吗？你已经为这事纠结了很久，但仍没能做出决定。
Still thinking about the Astral Express? You've been wrestling with that choice for ages, and still haven't made up your mind.
他们很快就要启程了，你祝愿他们能邂逅美好的旅程。
They'll be departing soon. You wish them a journey full of wondrous encounters.
I don't know where to go.
如果登上列车，等待你的，只会是可怕的未知和危险。你的功绩终会被遗忘，你的旅程也终会迎来终点。
If you board the Express, what waits for you may be nothing but danger and the terrifying unknown. Your deeds will be forgotten in time, and your journey will eventually come to an end.
I long for a quiet, ordinary life.
所以，你很高兴自己留在了这里，没有车票，没有球棒，没有危险，平静而安逸的生活。
So you are glad you stayed. No ticket. No bat. No danger. Just a quiet, peaceful, and undisturbed life.
手头的工作耽误了你太多时间，<color=#dbc291ff>一天，两天，十天……</color>
The work you had piled up took far too much of your time, <color=#dbc291ff>one day, two days, ten days...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>或许你再也追不上星穹列车了</color>。
<color=#dbc291ff>Maybe you'll never catch up to the Astral Express again</color>.
这不是我们的星核{F#小姐}{M#小哥}嘛，原本打算给你调一杯酒的，看在你未成年的份上，还是算了。
Isn't that our Stellaron {M#boy?}{F#girl?} I was about to mix you a drink, but since you're still underage, I'll hold off for now.
我觉得现在的生活是假的。
I feel like my current life is a lie.
我曾经是列车的开拓者。
I was once a Trailblazer on the Express.
我不应该是地概科科员。
I shouldn't be a member of the Department of Cosmic Geography.
巧了不是？我有时也觉得，自己不该是个空间站保安。
Funny, isn't it? Sometimes I think I shouldn't be working as a space station security guard either.
所以，你想登上星穹列车？
So, do you want to board the Astral Express?
像你这种想要登上列车的科员，每年都会出来几个，可事到临头，他们毫无例外都退缩了。
Every year there are researchers who want to go with the Express, but when it's time to leave, they all back down without fail.
他们明白，自己只是想要逃避沉重的生活，而非一场随时会交代掉小命的冒险。
They know they are just seeking an escape from their stressful lives, instead of actually wanting an adventure that could cost them their life.
So, what do you really want?
我想要离开现在的生活。
I want to leave my current life behind.
我向往一场未知的冒险。
I want to go on an adventure into the unknown.
「保持现状就好」、「反正会有更适合的人」、「我只是微不足道的凡人」。
"Staying where I am is fine." "Someone better will come along." "I'm just an ordinary person."
后悔？这世上哪有不会后悔的人？
Why speak of regrets when everyone who has ever lived has regretted something?
可如果人人都因它们而踌躇不前，我想，世上就不会有英雄了。
Yet, had everyone turned back because of their fear of regrets, humanity would never have produced any heroes.
即使不知道前路如何，仍旧有人出发了，为了追逐某个愿望。这固然愚蠢，但正是这种愚蠢，催生了无名客、开拓者，催生了英雄。

Even if the road ahead is unclear, some still set off, driven by the desire to chase a wish. It may seem foolish, but that's what gave birth to the Nameless, to Trailblazers, and to humanity's heroes.
你身上的那个玩偶，就是某位英雄存在过的证明。
The doll you carry is proof of a certain hero's existence.
Do you know what it is?
一个蹩脚的工艺品罢了。却因为某人天真的愿望，最终在历史中留下的{RUBY_B#星星}记录{RUBY_E#}。
A shabby little trinket that left a {RUBY_B#star}trace{RUBY_E#} in history because of one person's silly wish.
列车或许已经出发了，又或许没有，但只要你真的想要踏上这条道路，即使没有列车又如何？
The Express may have already left, or it may not have, but if you truly want to walk this path, what does it matter if there's no Express?
如果你真觉得自己是无名客，那你要做的只有一件事情。
If you truly believe you are a Nameless, then there is only one thing left for you to do.
不要再前进了，无名客的未来只有一片虚无和绝望。
Stop. The future of a Nameless is nothing but emptiness and despair.
你以为自己很特别吗？那些比你更优秀的无名客…铁尔南也好，凯勒贝克也罢，他们全都被黑暗的深空吞没，再也没有回来！
Do you think you're special? Think of Tiernan and Kelbeck... The Nameless who were better than you... they were all consumed by the lightless outer space, never to return!
所以，你终于承认，我是一个无名客了？
So you'll finally admit... that I'm a Nameless?
所有向你说话的声音在瞬间沉默了，他们不再开口。
The voices that once spoke to you fell silent in an instant. They never spoke again.
球棒，平平无奇，却如此熟悉。
A bat — plain, unimpressive, yet strangely familiar.
你一度以为自己此生再也不会有握起它的机会。
You once believed you'd never hold it again in this lifetime.
即便拔起它意味着不幸的结局…你们这些人也会照做不误吗？
Would you still pull this weapon out, even if it'll bring about a tragic end?
梅林也曾这么警告过我。
That's what Merlin told me, too.
所以，我为你们编织了一个个温柔平和的梦境。这不正是你们内心渴求的东西吗？
Which is why I've crafted such gentle dreams for you all. Isn't that what you've been looking for all this time?
我确实想过，如果有另一个人拔出了选王之剑，也许他会比我做得更好。
I did wonder whether someone else might have done a better job as king if they pulled out the Sword of Selection.
但对于那个曾经拔起石中剑的女孩来说，我无法责难她不自量力的心。她只是想像那位挑战白龙的王一样，试图去拯救些什么。
But I can't blame the girl who drew the Sword in the Stone for overestimating herself. She just wanted to deliver something from disaster... just like the king who challenged the White Dragon.
如果还有下一次选择的机会，我会告诉她：希望这一回你能比过去的自己，做得更好一些。
If I was given another chance to make my choice, I would tell her, "I hope you can do better this time."
御主，在平和幸福的梦境中想必已经休息够了吧？现在，让我们一起离开这里了！
Master, you've had enough rest in your happy dream, haven't you? Now, let's leave this place together!
（这报表怎么好像无穷无尽的…而且，它们记录的东西也很奇怪。）
(These reports are endless... and the stuff written in there is really weird.)
（等等，那边的人，总感觉很熟悉。）
(Hold on. I think I've seen that person over there before.)
(I'm exhausted... I feel like I can't even think anymore.)
（可我还是觉得，自己不应该属于这里。）
(But deep down? I still feel like I don't belong here.)
（好古怪的梦…该去做今天的工作了。）
(What a strange dream... I should get to work.)
（预约未来一个月的地概科会议，应该比昨天轻松一些吧。）
(Scheduling Department of Cosmic Geography meetings for the next month... this should be easier than yesterday, right?)
（星穹列车，我拒绝了他们的邀请……）
(The Astral Express... I turned down their invitation back then...)
（我那时的选择，真的是正确的吗？）
(Did I really make the right choice?)
（好累，还是先回去吧，星穹列车……）
(I'm so tired... maybe I should head back first. The Astral Express...)
（似乎做了个奇怪的梦，但细节怎么也想不起来……）
(I feel like I had a strange dream, but the details keep slipping away...)
（身体好沉，不行，还有今天的工作要做。）
(My body feels so heavy... But I can't rest. There's still today's work to get through.)
你累了，找个房间休息一会儿吧。
You're tired. Find a room and take a break.
列车已经离开了，过去只会扑一场空。
The Express's already left. Going there will be pointless.
我们哪儿有拦着你？{NICKNAME}，有空聚个餐吗？
We're not holding you back, {NICKNAME}. Let's have lunch together!
到研究室去！到餐厅去！去钓鱼，去看电影吧！
Let's go to the lab! Hit the cafeteria! Let's go fishing together! Let's go watch a movie!
（有什么在阻止我离开这里，我得躲开他们。）
(Something's stopping me from leaving this place. I need to avoid them.)
在空间站的生活不好吗？有多少人会羡慕你在这里的生活？
Isn't life on the space station wonderful? People would kill just to live the life you have here!
这里没有反物质军团，没有丰饶孽物，这里是宇宙最安稳的乐土。
There's no Antimatter Legion, no Abominations of Abundance... This place is the most peaceful paradise in the universe.
为什么…你们会有如此盲目的勇气？
Why... do you have such blind courage?
难道你们从不会感到后悔吗？
我…无法成为像你们一样的愚者…
I... can't become a fool like you...
我也不会认同你们的选择！
And I won't agree with your choices!
和活着时一样，我失败了。身为背叛者，这倒是个…恰如其分的结局。
I failed, just like how I failed in life. This is... a fitting end for a traitor.
音符小姐，既然舞台曾让你如此痛苦，为什么在离开囚牢后，你又一次选择留在了匹诺康尼的舞台上？
The performing arts had given you so much pain, Miss Note... Why did you choose to remain on Penacony's stage after leaving your prison?
我还记得每当我唱歌时，粗鲁的囚犯就会安静下来，哭闹的孩子们停止啜泣开始微笑。因为这些微不足道的事情，即便在铁牢里，我仍然感觉自己是自由的。
Because... I still remember how the rough prisoners fell silent, and the crying children smiled whenever I started to sing. Those small moments made me feel free even in that iron cage.
但匹诺康尼变了，这么多琥珀纪过去后，它变得更陌生了。而我被这个新生的牢笼锁住了。
But Penacony has changed. After so many Amber Eras, it's become almost unrecognizable. And now, I am locked in this newly-forged prison.
够了，现在是时候结束这一切了，背叛御主的从者没有存在的资格！
Anyway, it's time to end this. A Servant who betrayed their Master has no right to exist!
既然如此，我会如你所愿……
<color=#dbc291ff>我以第一划令咒下令，阿斯娜，我代表匹诺康尼归还你的名字。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>With the first Command Spell, I return your name to you on behalf of Penacony, Asna.</color>
即使他们将你的名字注册成了商标，夺走了你的一切，你也绝非一文不名的失败者。
Even if they have trademarked your name and stripped you of everything, that does not make you an unknown failure.
抬起头来，鸢尾花之母！<color=#dbc291ff>我以第二划令咒下令，归还你身为英灵的证明。</color>
Hold your head high, Mother of Iris! <color=#dbc291ff>With the second Command Spell, I return to you the testament of your existence as a Heroic Spirit.</color>
因为你的逝去，歌者和艺人们开始懂得为自己从商人手中争取自由和尊严。你绝不是什么寂寂无名的影子，你是匹诺康尼五大家系中鸢尾花一支的创始者！

Your death was what made singers and artists realize the need to reclaim their freedom and dignity from merchants. You are not some forgotten shadow, you are the founder of the Iris family, one of the five major lineages of Penacony!
正因如此，你才会借用那个名字，不是吗？由你的学生和朋友，梅芙恩和钟表匠共同创造的形象——在美梦小镇中自在歌唱的「音符小姐」。
That's why you chose to borrow that name, isn't it? A figure shaped by your students and friends, by Maeven and the Watchmaker — "Miss Note," the one who sang freely in Dreamville.
Please no more... I don't want to hear anymore...
<color=#dbc291ff>我以第三划令咒下令，作为舞台上的后辈，我归还您身为人的自由。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>With the third Command Spell, as your junior on the stage, I return to you your freedom as a person.</color>
从今往后，鸢尾花之母，您不再受任何人的摆布，只为自己起舞。
Mother of Iris, you will no longer be controlled by anyone from this moment on. You will now only dance for yourself.
这场闹剧就要结束了，但在那之前——我希望您能走出大剧院，亲眼看看那些艺者，无论曾有多少诋毁，在他们眼中，您是一位「英雄」。

This farce is nearing its end, but I hope you can step out of the Grand Theater before you disappear, and meet Penacony's artists. You are still a "hero" to them — No matter the slanders your name bears.
与此同时，脱离梦境的御主与从者们走进了大剧院的中心……
Meanwhile, the Master and their Servants, freed from the dreamscape, stepped into the heart of the Grand Theater...
我感到了一股类似魔力的强大力量，看来，圣杯的持有者已接近完成仪式了。
I sense a powerful force similar to magical energy... It seems the Holy Grail's holder is about to complete the ritual.
余下的两骑，Rider和Berserker，迎接我们的会是谁？还是二者皆有？在对方已占据圣杯的情况下，看来会是一场恶战。
The last two Servants left are Rider and Berserker. Which one will face us? Or will it be both? With the enemy already in possession of the Holy Grail, it looks like we're in for a brutal fight.
Three against two. The advantage is mine.
I'll once again select "Too Easy" in the next survey.
御主，我向这把剑起誓，会保护你的安全。
Master, I swear on this sword that I will protect you, no matter the cost.
「另一种人生」…匹诺康尼的梦泡确实有害健康。那场谐乐大典要走了我半条命……刚才那个从者所编织的幻境又拿走了剩下一半。
"A different life"...? Penacony's dream bubbles are pure cancer. The Charmony Festival nearly killed me... and that Servant's fantasy almost finished the job.
所以，你被她关到哪儿去了？
So, where did she put you?
一个不管赌上什么也永远赢不了的梦…在那里我成了一个老老实实的侍者，戒掉了所有押注的念头。
I had a dream where I could never win... I got to live as an obedient serf and gave up on even the thought of gambling.
他宝贝的，戒赌…还真是富有教育意义。
Darn right. Quit gambling... that's quite the educational dream you had there.
你呢？你又被送去了哪里？
And you? Where did she send you?
我嘛…只是经历了一次久违的重逢罢了。
Me? I had... a long-awaited reunion.
呦，这不是第一个被关进固有结界的英灵吗？没好好活用你那两条骄傲的腿吗？
Yo. If it isn't the first Heroic Spirit to get trapped in her Reality Marble. Didn't you use those long legs of yours well enough?
刚一回来就要听你说这些屁话。诶呀我去，头好疼啊！简直像经历了一场漫长又惊心动魄的冒险！
This is the first thing I hear after I got out? Darn it, my head's killing me! Feels like I've been through a long and thrilling adventure!
不知道为什么，记忆里对方似乎长着鱼的脑袋。
Not sure why, but I think my enemies all had fish heads on their necks.
嚯嗬嗬嗬！看来阿斯娜女士也失败了。可惜，只差一步，她就能将各位从者和梦的火焰剥离下来，作为燃料投入圣杯。
Ohohoho! Looks like Lady Asna has failed. What a shame. She was just one step away from tearing the flame of dreams off the Servants, and tossing them into the Holy Grail as fuel.
这就是商业合作，不管你的合作者有多么出色，最重要的环节还得自己来解决。
But that's the business world for you. No matter how capable your collaborator is, you've gotta handle the most critical parts yourself.
所以，你这老可爱搞的这「圣杯战争」，到底是想整什么呜呜伯？
Old fudgehead. It's time to tell us what kind of stinkin' pie you're cooking up with this "Holy Grail War."
看你这老不死的样子…啊我明白了，你是为了不老不死吧？
You practically have one foot in the grave... Don't tell me you're going to wish for immortality.
我已经活过了十个琥珀纪，只要我愿意，我的医疗团队努努力甚至可以让我再多活一阵……
Oh, I've lived for ten Amber Eras already. As long as I give the word, my medical team can squeeze a few more years out of these old bones.
难不成是为了消灭自己的对手？听说，你和我的御主之间可是有些芥蒂。
Then are you trying to crush your business rivals? I heard there's some bad blood between you and my Master.
嚯嗬嗬嗬！这可是天大的误会，商场之中从来不存在什么绝对的敌人！
Ohohoho! What a great misunderstanding! There are no enemies that can't be made into friends in the world of business!
这话说的倒也不错，只是，我对老奥帝先生的盘算也很感兴趣。
Good point, but I'm still very curious about your little scheme.
所以，老奥帝先生，你该不会像我所知的那些魔术师一样，为了追寻一个抵达万物根源的可能，连生命和人性都可以放弃。
Mr. Oti, surely you wouldn't be like the mages I know, willing to forsake both life and humanity just to reach the root of all things?
…这位小姐，你所说的事情，只有天才俱乐部的家伙才会追逐不休。
...Miss, what you're talking about is something only the Genius Society would obsessively chase after.
It couldn't possibly be for money, could it?
我从一开始就说得明明白白。谐乐大典草草落幕，而匹诺康尼需要全新的经济增长点，我们得打造一个足够引人注目的商业项目！

I've been very clear about this from the start. The Charmony Festival met a hasty wrap, and Penacony needs a fresh economic boost. We need to create a business venture that will grab everyone's attention!
而「能够实现愿望的圣杯」就是这只会下金蛋的鹅！一旦它举办成功，匹诺康尼将会拥有一项足以令其再兴盛十个琥珀纪的伟大庆典，连谐乐大典也无法与之媲美！

A Holy Grail that grants wishes is just the golden goose we need! If this ritual works, then Penacony will own a glorious show to keep the money rolling in for ten more Amber Eras, a carnival that even the Charmony Festival can't compete with!
当然，在这前无古人的匹诺康尼第一届圣杯战争下，我也有一些属于自己的私人小目标…但这就和诸位没有关系了。
Even if I do have some personal objectives in this first-ever Penacony Holy Grail War... that's none of your concern.
Why don't you just ask the Holy Grail for cash?
凭空出现的财富只会引起通货膨胀！金融的秘密可不是靠空口许愿就能实现的！那需要精妙的平衡与操作。我喜欢钱，但我不喜欢一味增长的数字游戏！

Wealth that pops out of thin air will only lead to inflation! Financial growth can't be achieved by miracles. It requires precise balance and expert handling. I like money, but I don't like to play a numbers game.
我喜欢看人们蜂拥挤入匹诺康尼，用自己的全部家财去换一个加入圣杯战争的机会！我喜欢苜蓿币从「烫金的时刻」流淌出去，注入银河的市场买入卖出！

What I like is watching people swarm into Penacony, spending their entire fortunes just to buy a chance to enter the Holy Grail War! I like having Alfalfa credits pour out of the Gilded Hour, entering the Cosmic Exchange!
我喜欢看见敌人被各种手段揉扁搓圆，最后血本无归！我喜欢将那些连名字都没听过的企业大笔一挥收购，成为我巨大商业版图的一部分！

I like seeing my business rivals being crushed and manipulated, and then lose everything in the end! I like to acquire companies that I've never heard of, fusing them into my empire with a mere wave of my pen!
「黄金的时刻」要看我的脸色给商品定价，「蓝调的时刻」为我制定匹诺康尼的时尚潮流。
The Golden Hour will set the prices for goods based on my desires, and the Blue Hour will craft Penaconian fashion based on my whims.
梦想？愿望？你们真以为匹诺康尼建立在这些虚无缥缈的东西上？不！支撑它的，恰恰是你们眼中最庸俗的东西，是源源不断的货币！金钱，才是这盛会之星最坚固的基石！

Do you honestly believe Penacony was built on empty ideas like "dreams" and "wishes"? No! What truly underpins and supports this city is what you deem "crude." It's the unending flow of money! On this rock called money, we have built the Planet of Festivities!
不管你作何打算，「圣杯战争」也只会决出一位胜者。而你在这场闹剧中的所作所为，已经让所有从者都站在了自己的对立面。
No matter what your plans may be, there can only be one victor in the Holy Grail War. Your actions in this farce have already placed every Servant squarely against you.
现在，我们已经站到你的面前了，精明的商人。
Now, we stand together before you, shrewd merchant.
我只想把几小时前没办到的事继续做下去——鱼头我已经看厌了，这愿望落空的、不甘心的、老不死的头，那才叫上等的战利品呢！
I just wanna finish what I didn't get to do a few hours ago. I'm sick and tired of fish heads — The head of this old desperate fogey with broken dreams is what I'd call a real trophy!
Lancer，你把这位老先生满脑子坏水的脑袋当战利品，标准实在太低了些。
You see this evil man's old head as a trophy? I thought you had better taste than that, Lancer.
嚯嗬嗬嗬！看来各位急着为我安排后事了。不过，既然这场游戏只能有一位赢家，即使我败退了，你们又要如何决出胜负呢？
Ohohoho! It seems you're all eager to prepare for my demise. But since there can only be one winner in this game, how do you plan to decide the victor after I bow out?
所以来谈谈合作如何？无论是谁，只要能将其他人排除，我就把向圣杯许愿的资格让渡给他。
Why don't we discuss... a collaboration instead? Whoever can eliminate the others shall have the chance to make their wish to the Holy Grail. I will give you that right.
我们甚至可以签订一张合同，用定义精确、逻辑干净的语言许愿，让圣杯满足所有人的愿望——各位御主和从者，你们为之战斗的不就是这一刻吗？

We can even formalize it with a contract — using precise, logical language to word our wishes, ensuring the Holy Grail fulfills everyone's desires... After all, isn't this the very moment you've all been fighting for, Masters and Servants?
This far into the show? Are you trying to make me laugh?
以玷污所有人愿望为代价的圣杯，不过是个该被打碎的假货。我说的没错吧，御主？
A Holy Grail that sullies everyone's wishes is just a counterfeit for us to smash to pieces. Isn't that right, Master?
是先大闹一场，再将这假货打得粉碎才对啊。
Nah. We need to whip this fella's hind-end, THEN smash it to pieces.
难得我们意见一致，我挺喜欢这方案的。你怎么说，砂金先生？偶尔当一次正义的伙伴也不错吧？
Our opinions rarely align, but I'm fond of this idea. What do you think, Mr. Aventurine? It's nice to play as the hero of justice now and then, isn't it?
我今天已经充当过一次众矢之的了啊…这一次，机会就留给老奥帝先生好了。
I've already been the scapegoat once today... So I'll pass this opportunity to Mr. Oti.
御主，看来我没法为你夺得圣杯了。
My Master, it seems I won't be able to claim the Holy Grail for you.
要多谢音符小姐那场梦境，让我看得更清楚了…<color=#dbc291ff>重要的是为了拯救什么、追逐什么而行走至今的过程</color>。

I must thank Miss Note's dream for showing me the truth... <color=#dbc291ff>What truly matters is not the ending, but the journey we've taken to chase something and to deliver it from destruction</color>.
我不需要圣杯，我没有实现的愿望也将在此作结。
I don't need the Holy Grail. The wishes I did not fulfill will end here.
嚯嗬嗬嗬…各位执意要将矛头对准我，那我只好勉为其难充当这场节目的关底考验了。
Ohohoho... If you are all so keen to make me your enemy, I suppose I'll have to become the final challenge on this variety show.
在加入圣杯战争时，御主应当召唤一位历史名人作为从者…这是定例。但我该召唤谁呢？这个问题让我为难了许久……
The rules said a Master is supposed to summon a historical figure as their Servant to enter the Holy Grail War, but... who should I summon? This question has haunted me for quite some time...
是被我资助的落魄导演？还是被我买走了名字的传奇明星？不不，这些统统都不够格……
Should I get the washed-up director I sponsored? Or the legendary star whose name I purchased? No. No. No. They are not worthy of being my Servant...
有个念头一闪而过…为什么我不召唤我自己呢？一个历经十个琥珀纪的争斗，如今依然屹立不倒的传奇人物，不就在镜子里吗？

That's when a thought crossed my mind... Why not summon myself? A person who's still standing strong after ten Amber Eras of business intrigue... Isn't this living legend staring back at me in the mirror?
所以，我以自己为召唤触媒…想看看投射在匹诺康尼历史中的商业巨头奥帝，会以怎样一番从者的形象回应我的召唤？在历史中人们到底是如何看待我的？

I used myself as the catalyst... I wanted to see how the business magnate Oti, reflected in the history of Penacony, would respond to my call as a Servant. I wanted to see how people truly view me in history.
And have you got your answer?
答案伤人啊。在他们眼里，我不过是一只，趴在匹诺康尼的橡树顶端——
The answer really hurts. To them, I'm nothing but a parasite, sucking out the sap of Penacony's oak from the top —
<size=36><color=#dbc291ff>为了金钱而疯狂啃噬的蛀虫</color></size>。
（波提欧他们也出来了，要不去看看他们的状况？）
(Boothill and the others got out too. Should I go check on them?)
夺取圣杯也好，碾碎圣杯也罢！能办到的话，就来吧！
Do you want to take the Holy Grail, or crush it!? You'll have to get through me first.
所以打一开始在这儿迎击我们的，就是老奥帝所召唤的从者吗？
So the person we've been talking to was Old Oti's Servant all along?
让从者面对我们，自己却居身幕后，真是稳健的战略……
Letting his Servant meet us, while he stays safely behind the scenes... What a calculating strategy...
必须把圣杯解体，否则，所有人都会被这群虫子拖垮。
We must break the Holy Grail, or we'll lose in this war of attrition against these pests.
那好，清理虫子就交给你了。一骑当千可算是王者的特长吧？
I'll leave the bug extermination to you then. Kings are good at facing down entire armies on their own, aren't they?
多灾多难的大剧院，我都有些心疼匹诺康尼的猎犬和筑梦师了。
Is this Grand Theater ever gonna see a day of peace...? I'm starting to feel bad for the Bloodhounds and the Dreamweavers.
不必为了一栋被保上了几百种保险的古老建筑物操心…老奥帝这家伙从来不会在钱的问题上让自己吃亏。
No need to feel bad for a heritage building insured with hundreds of different policies. Old Oti would never allow himself to lose a single coin over that.
哼，把所有人都卷进了这场「圣杯战争」里，自己却躲在幕后，难道没人打算去找他讨个说法？
So he dragged everyone into this Holy Grail War while hiding in the shadows, and none of you are gonna make him pay for it?
We should give him a good thrashing!
Make him pay for our emotional damage!
很遗憾，没有任何一位御主在这次事件中受伤，就算是向他问责，怕是也只会被他用他最熟悉的两样手段——最顶尖的律师团队，还有天价的赔偿给糊弄过去。

Unfortunately, no Master was harmed in the making of this show. Even if we tried to hold him accountable, he'd probably just brush it off with his usual tricks — the best legal team money can buy and sky-high compensation.
而「圣杯战争」的举行，显然已经让他得到了远超这些成本的收益。
And... I fear the Holy Grail War has already given him returns far beyond what he's put into it.
不过在谈判场上，这场闹剧会是个好用的借口，为翡翠女士在匹诺康尼撬开更大的入口。
The silver lining is that this little spectacle will serve as the perfect excuse during negotiations for Madam Jade to pry open an even bigger opportunity in Penacony.
斯科特先生的麻烦当然该由公司同僚来操心才是。
Mr. Skott's issues will be handled by the IPC.
很遗憾，我们确实不受人类法律的保护。
Unfortunately, we are indeed not protected by human law.
Tch, so the IPC is still the final winner of it all.
可别这么说，这对匹诺康尼的股东来说可是一桩好事啊。
Don't say it like that. This is a good thing for Penacony's shareholders.
哼，匹诺康尼这块铜臭之地的规矩管不了我。Lancer，我们去收拾收拾那个老可爱。
Hmph. These Penaconian rules stinkin' of money won't keep me down. Lancer, let's go take care of that old fudger.
御主，虽然我双手双脚赞成你的观点，但时间似乎已经不够了。圣杯解体后，我们也该回到原来的地方了。
Master, while I'm all in on that suggestion, time's running out. Without the Holy Grail holding us up, us Servants need to go back to where we belong.
有些遗憾啊，哥们儿…如果还有机会见面，我一定请你去银河里最好的酒吧来两杯。
Such a shame, brother... If we ever cross paths again, I'll take you to the finest honky-tonk in the cosmos for a drink.
银河最好的酒吧吗？那可真令人期待。行啦，咱俩就不说什么告别的话了，别让这场难得的相聚染上悲伤的颜色。下次见，兄弟。
Finest in the cosmos, huh? That's something to look forward to. Alright, no need for a tearful farewell for us bros, let's not ruin the good run we've had together. Till we meet again, buddy.
还有你们两个，哎，真是的，每次都不能和你们痛痛快快地打上一场。
And you two... Seriously, why can I never get a proper fight with you?
是吗？明明我记得某人曾是我的手下败将来着？
Is that so? I distinctly remember beating you.
你知道的，我就是个普通的弓兵，就当这回我又输给你了吧。
You know me, just a humble archer. Let's call this one another loss on me.
切，懒得和你们争了——在消失之前，我想再去看看匹诺康尼的风景。
Tch, I'm done arguing with you lot. I'm gonna take another peek at Penacony's views before leaving for good.
那么也该是告别的时候了。御主，不得不说，虽然你的着装品味有待提升，但…作为从者，很高兴这一次圣杯战争能有你同行。
And so, it's time to say goodbye. Master, I have to admit that your fashion sense could use a little work, but... as a Servant, I'm genuinely glad to have fought by your side in this Holy Grail War.
夸夸其谈和华丽的装饰下，我能看见一个内心执着的孩子…偶尔做一回正义的伙伴，感觉还不错。
I can still see the determined heart of the child you once were underneath all your grand speeches and extravagant flair. You know, it would feel pretty good to be a hero of justice once in a while.
咳咳，告别的时候，精神分析什么的就免了吧。还有，论及衣品，咱们两个彼此彼此啊，「人类的守护者」！
Ahem, let's skip the last-minute psychoanalysis, alright? And when it comes to fashion... You're not much better than me, "Guardian of Humanity."
说来我也很好奇，作为「人类守护者」的我为什么会被召唤到这样一个没有抑止力的世界来——
That brings up a good point. Why would I, a "Guardian of Humanity," get summoned to a world without the Counter Force?
Archer，你应该清楚自己被召唤来这里的原因。
Archer, you should know why you were summoned here.
你以英灵的身份被召唤。
You were summoned as a Heroic Spirit.
英雄啊…就当是无端做了一场美梦吧。
A hero, huh? ...I'll chalk it up as a beautiful dream.
男人冰冷的面孔上露出一丝浅笑，消失在众人眼前。很快，这里只剩下了最后的一对主从。
A faint smile tugged at the man's cold face, before he vanished from sight. Soon, only the final pair of Master and Servant remained.
…很高兴能应你的召唤，来到这个奇妙的世界游历一番。
...I'm glad I was summoned to this strange world and got to experience it with you.
还有什么想叮嘱我的话吗？
Anything else you want to say to me?
在你的梦境里，我看到了你的畏惧…但，御主，请不要在意自己身为人类应有的那些情感：对未知的惶惑，对失去的恐惧，还有对自己做不到某事的悔恨。
I saw your fears in your dream... but Master, don't be burdened by the emotions that come with being human: the fear of the unknown, the dread of loss, or the regret of what you couldn't achieve.
在成为英雄前，赫拉克勒斯也曾是个孩子。
Even Heracles was just a child before becoming a hero.
即使现在的你还不够强大，我相信总有一天，你会成为照亮银河的星辰。
You may not be strong enough now, but I have faith that you'll eventually become a star that illuminates the entire cosmos.
如果我的存在能偶尔为你照亮前路…那真是再好不过了。
If my existence can occasionally light the way forward for you... that would be more than I could hope for.
御主，替我向未来的你问好。
Master, please send my regards to the person you will become in the future.
流光散去，英武的少女骑士随之消失，一如她的降临。
As the Luminflux dimmed, the valiant girl knight faded, vanishing just as she had arrived.
此时此刻，在流梦礁，圣杯战争的举办者正饶有兴致地欣赏风景……
At the same time, in the Dreamflux Reef, the host of the Holy Grail War is sitting elsewhere watching the scenery with interest...
The Holy Grail... broke. What a shame.
人们追逐它，为它战斗，为它奉献，为它生死，就像是…我们的匹诺康尼。
People have pursued it, fought for it, made sacrifices for it, and died for it, much like they did for our own Penacony.
他们将自己的梦注入其中，让匹诺康尼成为了如今的模样。那么，匹诺康尼有没有回应他们的愿望呢？
They poured their dreams into Penacony to shape the planet into what it is today. But the question is... has Penacony ever answered their dreams?
看看这个忆质黑洞吧，十个琥珀纪过去了，曾经坐在这里，从零开始建造匹诺康尼的人们，如今就只剩下一个卑鄙无耻的老头。他的朋友也好，他的敌人也罢，全都不在了。

Look at this Memoria Singularity. Ten Amber Eras have passed, and out of those who once came here to build Penacony from the ground up, only one despicable old man is left. His friends, his enemies... they're all gone.
我必须向两位坦白，我的愿望实现了：无论你们如何看我，无论我们曾如何憎恨对方，圣杯承认了各位的功绩，也让你们以英灵的面貌现身……

I must confess to both of you, my wish has been granted. No matter how you see me, no matter how deeply we hated each other in the past, the Holy Grail has recognized your achievements and brought you forth as Heroic Spirits...
两位难道不觉得，这也是一种别开生面的故友重逢吗？可惜，米哈伊尔这老小子却没能在场。
Don't you think this is a rather unique reunion of old friends? It's unfortunate that Mikhail, that old rascal, couldn't be here to join us.
奥帝先生，您的愿望真是让我感动。
Mr. Oti, your wish truly moves me.
要不是我认识你，就要被你这鬼话唬住了。故友重逢？不过是你生意的一些添头罢了。
If I didn't know you better, I'd almost be swayed by your sweet words. A reunion of old friends? No. It's just another part of your business deal.
葛瑞迪…呃，不，也许此刻我该称呼你为芮克先生才对？作品剪辑完成了吗？…这么重要的工作，还得看你啊。
Grady, or perhaps I should now address you as Mr. Reca, is the editing of the footage complete? ...That is such an important task, after all.
我剪去了涉及参赛者隐私的内容，保留了这场「圣杯战争」最精彩的部分。也许它在艺术性上谈不上是什么优秀的作品…但在商业性上，它应当不会令您失望的。

I've cut out everything related to the participants' privacy and kept only the most thrilling parts of the Holy Grail War. It may not be an artistic masterpiece, but it should meet your commercial expectations.
那就够了，你们这些艺术家，总想着在自己信奉的艺术丰碑上不惜一切代价凿下自己的名字…嚯嗬嗬嗬，可惜啊，如愿以偿者就像圣杯战争的胜利者一样少之又少吧？
That'd be enough for me. You artists always aim to carve your names into art's annals no matter the cost... Too bad those who actually succeed are as rare as the winners of the Holy Grail War.
我就不一样了，除开金钱回报，世上还有什么能更好地度量你为一件事所做的努力呢？
I'm not like that. What else can truly measure the effort you've put in apart from cold hard cash?
…属于往昔「英灵」的记忆，也是一桩令我满意的报酬。
...The memories of former Heroic Spirits are also worthy compensation.
喔？葛瑞迪那样的烂片导演的记忆？你倒是说说，那东西有什么价值？
Memories of a flop director like Grady? Do enlighten me, what worth do those hold?
若论电影人的记忆…其价值确实贱如尘埃。但若论人的记忆，那真是…一件无与伦比的珍物。
His memories are indeed positively worthless as a filmmaker, but when it comes to him as a person... those memories are treasures beyond compare.
挣扎、失意、抗争…最终又沦为无名的过客，这位前辈是那个匹诺康尼时代的缩影，是令人捧腹绝倒的小丑，也是货真价实的英雄。

He has had his struggles, disappointments, and defiance... only to be reduced to another nameless nobody. That man is a symbol of the Penacony of his times, a most ridiculous clown... And a most genuine hero.
这样如宝石般有着众多切面的记忆，我岂能错失？
How could I ever miss out on a memory with as many facets as a veritable diamond?
不过，我更好奇的倒是您，所费不赀，却铺陈出这么大一出闹剧，就不怕像葛瑞迪那般落得个不体面的下场？
But now I'm more curious about you, sir. You've spent so much money, only to create such an unsightly mess. Aren't you worried you'll end up in disgrace like Grady?
一个商人，如果活到我这个岁数还在乎体面，那他也太失败了。
A merchant at my age who still cares about dignity would be an absolute failure.
那么，这笔生意两清了，容我告退。
In that case, my business here is settled. I'll take my leave.
好了，该你了，阿斯娜小姐。我会签署声明，放弃你的名字注册而成的商标，还有对你一切创作成果的所有权的…这样，你满意了吗？
Alright. It's your turn, Miss Asna. I'll sign the declaration to renounce the trademark on your name and all rights to your creative works... Are you happy with that?
谈不上什么满意。但如果你敢说个不字，我会在消失前用尽全力掐住你那短到看不见的脖子，看着你咽气…虽然我明白，这样做根本杀不死你。

Happy? Never. But if you don't carry it through, I'll squeeze your puny neck with every ounce of my strength until I disappear... I'll watch you take your last breath, even if I know it won't actually kill you!
再见了，匹诺康尼最成功的商人。我有句真心话一直想对你说——
Goodbye, Penacony's most successful merchant. There's something I've always wanted to say to you —
I wish you were already dead.
嚯嗬嗬嗬！真是感人的告白哟！阿斯娜，希望你的愿望能有实现的那天。
Hahaha! Now that's a heartfelt confession! Asna, I do hope your wish comes true one day.
At the same time, aboard the Express.
在远离「战场」的一角，以Rider职阶被召唤的从者，似乎从一开始就没有加入战斗的想法。
Far from the heat of battle, a Servant summoned under the Rider class stays on the sidelines. From the very beginning, it seems he had no intention of fighting.
作为Rider，他曾亲手创作了一条永不沉没的小船，名唤「罗盘号」。作为Rider，他曾是个搭乘列车遨游星间的无名客。
As a Rider, he once built an unsinkable little ship named The Compass. As a Rider, he was once a Nameless who rode the stars aboard an interstellar Express.
时隔数百年的时光，少年以英灵之身终于回到了他曾辛勤工作过的地方。在这儿，有位老朋友等着他。
Centuries have passed. Now, as a Heroic Spirit, the young man finally returns to the place where he once worked tirelessly. An old friend awaits him here.
…三月七乘客总爱带些稀奇古怪的东西回来，有次甚至还拿了把叫做「定分枪」的奇物，结果只给帕姆打了一分！
...March 7th is always bringing back bizarre and curious things. One time, she even brought back something called a "Rating Pistol," and it only gave Pom-Pom a single point!
还有，要小心姬子乘客的咖啡，那是帕姆见过最可怕的饮料——但这事绝对不要当面告诉她。
Also, watch out for Himeko's coffee. It's the most terrifying beverage Pom-Pom's ever encountered — but please don't ever tell her that to her face.
比格兰霍姆家乡的茶还难喝？
Is it worse than the tea from Granholm's hometown?
噗，哈哈哈。真想品尝一口啊！
Pfft, hahaha. I'd love to have a try!
还有还有，{NICKNAME}总是拉着三月七乘客一起胡闹，现在，就连帕姆最看好的丹恒乘客，都快被带坏了。
And! And! {NICKNAME} is always dragging March 7th into trouble. Pom-Pom had such high hopes for Dan Heng, but even he's started to follow along now.
哎，你们这些乘客，简直都一个样——米哈伊尔乘客，你又在发呆了，你在想什么？
You passengers are all the same — Mikhail, you're spacing out again. What's going through that head of yours?
列车长，看来，又到了该告别的时刻了。
Conductor, looks like it's time to say our goodbyes again.
Will you... be returning to the Express?
大概吧。听帕姆说起这些年来，许多像我一样的人登上列车，真是…太好了。
Maybe... I'm just happy to hear that so many people like me have boarded the Express over the years.
无名客们来来去去，有些人找到了他们的归宿，而有些人继续前行，就像银轨永远向前…这就是星穹列车。我相信，列车长的未来是不会寂寞的。

The Nameless come and go. Some find a place they want to stay while others keep moving forward, just like the silver rails that never stop... That's the Astral Express. I'm sure the conductor's future will never be lonely.
「圣杯战争」要结束了，漂泊的灵魂也该回到休憩中了。米沙…要回匹诺康尼了。
The Holy Grail War is coming to an end, and wandering souls must return to their rest. I... need to go back to Penacony.
米哈伊尔乘客，要记得喔，无论你们是否离开，星穹列车是无名客永远的家。帕姆…会一直留在这儿，欢迎你们回来！
Mikhail, remember: whether you leave or stay, the Astral Express will always be the home of the Nameless. Pom-Pom will always be here... waiting for your return!
那就约好了，列车长。下一次停靠匹诺康尼时，请为我、为拉扎莉娜、为铁尔南…请为我们鸣笛。我们要是能听见，一定会回来见您。
It's a deal then, Conductor. The next time the Express stops at Penacony... please sound the horn for me, Razalina, and Tiernan. If we can hear it... then we'll definitely come visit you.
把思绪收回到现在，如果能有一个实现愿望的机会，{NICKNAME}，你想实现什么愿望？
Gather your thoughts to the present. If there really is a chance to fulfill a wish, what would yours be, {NICKNAME}?
毕竟，愿望这种东西，如果说出来就不灵了。
You see, wishes lose their power once spoken aloud.
That does sound like something you'd say.
总之，老奥帝先生兴师动众的第一届「圣杯战争」也成了最后一届。
Anyway, the first Holy Grail War orchestrated by Old Oti ended up being the last one.
不过，由芮克先生和爱德华医生协助制作的梦泡电影，不仅在艾普瑟隆大卖特卖，甚至再度在群星间掀起了逐梦热潮。奥帝先生和匹诺康尼的公司分部借着这趟热潮大赚了一笔。

But the dream bubble movie co-produced by Mr. Reca and Dr. Edward became a huge hit. Not only did it fill up movie theaters in Epsilon, it even created a new dream-chasing trend throughout the stars. Mr. Oti and the IPC's Penacony branch made quite the fortune from it.
That old fox didn't lose a thing.
关于将家主和股东们牵扯进来一事，正如砂金先生料到的，绝大部分的事情，他都以「娱乐节目」的名义搪塞了过去。
As Mr. Aventurine guessed, Oti simply brushed everything off as "entertainment" when questioned about placing Family heads and shareholders in danger.
天价的赔偿与官司自然是少不了的，但我怀疑，在圣杯启动前，他早就已经猜到会发生什么了。
While compensation and lawsuits are inevitable, I suspect he already knew exactly what was coming even before the Holy Grail was activated.
老奥帝先生说，他原本打算单独付给你一笔赔偿金，但即使是他，也觉得这太庸俗了。
Now, Old Oti did say he planned to give you some money, but even he thought that was too crude.
所以，他把这场「圣杯战争」中最有价值的东西送给了我们。
So instead, he gave us the most valuable thing from this Holy Grail War.
Too crude? No no no. Crude's good!
That old fox, always managing to get the most out of everything.
嗯？圣杯里有什么东西——致{NICKNAME}，这张纸条好像是给你的。
Hmm? There's something inside the Holy Grail — I think this is a note for you, {NICKNAME}.
{F#姐们}{M#兄弟}，看你们都挺忙的，我就带着虎克先走了。还得感谢老奥帝先生啊，他愿意买下我搞到手的这个稀罕货，咱们这才能有钱来一趟说走就走的旅行。

Hey {M#brother.}{F#sister.} Since you all looked pretty busy, I've headed out with Hook. Big thanks to Mr. Oti for buying this rare trinket I got my hands on. That's how I could afford this spontaneous trip.
说起来，你难道不好奇，老桑博想对圣杯许下的愿望是什么吗？
By the way, aren't you curious what old Sampo's wish to the Holy Grail was?
我猜，你的回答肯定是「不好奇」。嗐，{F#姐们}{M#兄弟}，你不好奇，观众们还期待着呢。
I'm thinking you'll probably say "no." Owww, come on, {M#bro!}{F#sis!} You might not be curious, but the audience is still on the edge of their seats!
我就知道，{F#姐们}{M#兄弟}你还惦记着咱老桑博，不瞒你说，观众也都期待着呢。
I knew it, {M#bro}{F#sis}! You're still thinking about old Sampo. And, I won't lie, the audience is waiting for it too.
各位，节目已经完结了，但如果有什么能实现我的愿望——
Alright, folks! The show's over! But if there's anything still out there that can hear and fulfill my wish —
「我希望世上人人都幸福、快乐、自由，得偿所愿。」
"I wish for everyone in the world to be happy, joyful, free, and have their every desire fulfilled."
以令咒下令，荡除一切邪恶之物吧，Saber！
By the Command Spell, I order you, Saber! Destroy all that is evil!
交谈之余，波提欧手枪也已上膛。在这之后，就该和幕后黑手决一死战了。
As they talked, Boothill had already loaded his gun. Next up: the final battle with the mastermind.
面对即将出现的敌人，两位从者已跃跃欲试。
With enemies on the way, the two Servants were more than ready to fight.
随着谐乐大典的余波平息，星际和平公司如愿入驻美梦之星，星穹列车的无名客也成为股东之一。

As the echoes of the Charmony Festival fade, the Interastral Peace Corporation successfully establishes itself on the planet of dreams, with the Nameless of the Astral Express becoming one of the planet's shareholders.
如今，这座银河著名的度假胜地中，一场好戏又将上演——
Now, a grand spectacle is about to unfold yet again in this holiday resort famed throughout the cosmos —
艾普瑟隆的影视巨星、橡木家系的话事人，知更鸟女士领衔主演！
Starring the superstar of Epsilon and the head of the Oak Family, the Lead Actor is... Miss Robin!
酷炫幽默的无名客，星穹列车的开拓者友情加盟！
Featuring a special appearance from the stylish and witty Nameless, the Trailblazer of the Astral Express!
风度翩翩的霸道总裁，战略投资部的石心十人之一，砂金总监强势客串！
With a powerful guest appearance from the charismatic and commanding director, Aventurine, one of the Ten Stonehearts of the Strategic Investment Department!
知名的导演芮克与友人联手打造！更有苜蓿草家主、匹诺康尼商业大亨老奥帝先生独家赞助！
Directed by the renowned Mr. Reca and his trusted companions! Lastly, exclusively sponsored by Old Oti, the head of the Alfalfa Family and a business tycoon of Penacony!
还有斯科特，他谁来着？擅长模仿动物的公司专员？总之，市场开拓部也干了！
And then there's Skott... Wait, who? That IPC Specialist who's good at mimicking animals? Well, anyway, the Marketing Development Department is in on this too!
《美梦与圣杯战争》，寰宇各大娱乐频道火热上映中！
Sweet Dreams and the Holy Grail War, now airing across entertainment channels throughout the universe!
啧，说好来这儿碰面…{NICKNAME}这家伙，跑哪儿去了？
Tsk, aren't we supposed to meet up here? {NICKNAME}... where did they go?
…不对劲，难道说有人捷足先登，趁我们来之前把{F#她}{M#他}和从者都干掉了？
...Something's off. Maybe someone got the jump on them and took {M#him}{F#her} and {M#his}{F#her} Servant out before we got here.
恕我直言，如果有谁能轻而易举地击败那位Saber，那站在这里的我们，都不会有还手之力。
With all due respect, if that hypothetical enemy could easily defeat your friend's Saber, then none of us here would be walking away alive.
莫非，我们这位老朋友对{RUBY_B#我}公司成员{RUBY_E#}的出现有了警惕心，打算躲在暗处观察我们的来意？
Or maybe our old friend is concerned about {RUBY_B#my}an IPC employee{RUBY_E#} showing up, so they're lurking in the shadows to assess us?
曾经的敌人，未必不能是现在的朋友啊。我说的对吧，牛仔？
Past enemies can still become present-day allies. Am I right, cowboy?
且不谈公司的人，{F#她}{M#他}至少该相信我这个一同出生入死的老伙计吧！喂，{NICKNAME}，我可以担保现在一切安全，该出来谈谈合作的事了！
Even with the IPC, {F#s}he should at least trust me after we went through so much together. Hey, {NICKNAME}! Come on out! Let's chat about joining forces as a team! You ain't gonna get hurt!
别喊了，在见面之前我盘算过许多可能，不过没想到，现场的情况却是最离谱的那个……
They aren't coming. I went through a lot of possibilities in my head before we got here, but I never expected to face the most ridiculous of them all...
有小可爱诈骗到了巡海游侠的头上。
...A shirtbag pulled off a scam on a Galaxy Ranger.
听好了！欠爱的小可爱们，不管你们是谁，打算做什么，你们已经被我包围了！立刻现身，别等投胎时再后悔自己的反应慢了半拍！

Listen up, forkin' shirtbags! Ain't no matter who you are and what you wanna do, I've got you surrounded! Pop out now, or don't say I didn't warn ya when you stub your toe on the way to the underworld!
听到了没？不投降，就得等着投胎。真不愧是被公司重金通缉的罪犯，一开口就匪气十足，把我吓得肝颤肺抖呐……
Did you hear that? He's gonna kill us if we don't give ourselves up. Oh, he's every inch a serious criminal with a huge bounty on his head. I'm positively shaking in my boots with how he talks...
等等！你身边这位…不是，「石心十人」的砂金先生吗？！为什么公司通缉的重犯却和公司高管走在一块儿？
Wait! Isn't that... Isn't that Mr. Aventurine of the Ten Stonehearts!? Why is a criminal wanted by the IPC walking around with an IPC executive?
您要是被这该死的牛仔绑架了，就冲我眨眨眼！难道说…啧，你们是老相识了啊。
Sir! If that blasted cowboy's got you kidnapped at gunpoint, just gimme a blink! Or... or maybe... you two are actually friends?
「公司高管吃里扒外，和银河通缉犯暗通款曲」——Assassin，你可一定要把这美妙的一幕拍下来。
"An IPC Executive Secretly in Cahoots With a Cosmic Fugitive" — Assassin, you've got to grab this awesome scene on film.
你的从者是…芮克先生？不，仔细一看，气质上始终有些差异……
Your Servant is... Mr. Reca? No... Now that I'm looking at him, there's something off...
喂，芮克边上那人穿着公司的制服…你认识吗？
Hey. You know him? The guy in the IPC uniform next to Reca?
认得我这张脸蛋的公司成员比茨冈尼亚沙漠里的沙子都多…我哪儿能费心记得他们每一个？
There are more IPC employees who know my face than there are grains of sand in Sigonia's desert. You think I can remember them all?
混蛋！别以为顶着「石心十人」的名头我就怕你！战略投资部的手再长，也伸不到咱们这边来！
Wretched brat! You think I'm scared of you just cos you're a Stoneheart? The Strategic Investment Department's reach may be long, but it will never reach my neck of the woods!
等到我赢下圣杯，所有人都要看我的脸色行事！我要让你们跪在地上向我求饶，然后学狗叫，学猪叫，不！学蛤蟆叫！
After I win the Holy Grail, I will make everyone do as I say! I'll make you all kneel before me and beg for mercy, then have you bark like dogs, oink like pigs... no! Croak like frogs!
真是浪费啊，竟然用圣杯让人学动物叫唤……
What a waste. Using the Holy Grail to make people do animal noises.
所以，老奥帝居然向贵部门的人也寄出了请柬吗？可我记得他们往匹诺康尼派驻的成员寥寥无几，莫非你就是……
So Old Oti even sent invitations to your department? But I thought you folks barely stationed anyone at Penacony. Unless... unless your name is...
噫！难道您听说过我的名字？
Huh!? H—Have you actually heard of me?
算了，我怎么可能记得无名小卒的名字。
Hmm. Never mind. There's no way I'd ever remember the name of some nobody.
呵，你们这群高高在上的干部，从来不把咱们这些底层员工当回事。一句话把我派去仙舟那样的蛮荒之地，又一句话调来匹诺康尼！我本来还以为这会是个美差……

Ha! You high and mighty executives have never treated us basic workers as people! You would send me to a primitive post like the Xianzhou with one word, and switch me over to Penacony with the next! I thought Penacony might be a juicy gig...
谁知道…天天低着头和一群皮皮西谈业务，我的颈椎病都快恶化了！
...But all I've done every day is talk business to a bunch of Pepeshi! It's making my neck crank even worse!
不过这些都将成为过去！砂金？呵，就让我代替你，成为新的石心十人！
But hey, all of that will soon be a thing of the past. Aventurine? Heh, I'll replace you and become the new Stoneheart of that name!
用你的宝具为我带来胜利吧，Assassin！
Assassin! Use your Noble Phantasm to bring me victory!!!
终于可以见识见识这家伙的从者了吗？Archer，准备战斗！
Ho? Do I finally get to see this shrimp's Servant in action? Archer, get ready for a fight.
你这乐在其中的样子是怎么回事？
拍摄已经开始，请演员们各就各位。
The filming has begun, actors. Take your positions!
就让相机启动，胶卷旋转，回到那<size=36><color=#dbc291ff>「永不腐朽的默片恐怖秀！」</color></size>
Let the camera roll, let the film spin, and let us return to <size=36><color=#dbc291ff>"The Silent Horror Picture Show"!</color></size>
等等，这不是什么灵体化，而是凭空从我们的眼前消失了。这位从者的气息遮断，比我想象的还要诡异。等等——
Wait, this isn't spirit form. He just vanished, right before our eyes. This Servant's Presence Concealment is more disturbing than I imagined. Wait—
我声音呢？<size=36>他宝贝的，他宝贝的！他宝贝的！</size>
Where's my voice? <size=36>Forkin' hell, forkin' hell! Son of a fork!</size>
别费劲了，我试着解析了下这个结界。在封禁声音的同时，似乎还有更危险的东西正在向我们靠近。
It's no use. I've tried analyzing this Bounded Field. It doesn't just mute sound, something far more dangerous is closing in.
如果没有声音，你又怎么知道我刚刚说了什么？
If there's no sound, then how'd you know what I just said?
哈哈哈，我一直想看你们露出这副表情，这副像傻瓜一样被我玩弄于股掌的表情！
Hahahahaha! I've always wanted to see you people like this! A bunch of idiots subjected to my every whim!
不公平！为什么你有声音！
That's not fair! Why do you get to have a voice?
那当然是因为——我是主角！你们这些臭跑龙套的待遇能和我比？我已经等不及听这些家伙在这场恐怖展映会里发出震耳欲聋的尖叫了——

And why have you been reduced to this, may you ask? Because now I am the protagonist! You extras will never be treated in the same way as me! I can't wait to hear what kind of petrified screams you'd be making in this horror show...
哦豁，抱歉，我忘了，在Assassin的宝具中，没人能听到自己的尖叫。
Oh. Wait. Oops, I forgot. No one can hear their own screams in Assassin's Noble Phantasm.
片刻过后，牛仔的朋友们也一无所知地来到此处
A moment later, the cowboy's friends arrived, equally clueless.
总感觉好安静啊，既没看到波提欧先生，也没看到邀请我们过来的敌人。
It's unusually quiet. No sign of Mr. Boothill or the enemy who lured us here.
Be on guard for any black luxury speedster.
Saber's a knight who gives her all too.
我会尽己所能保护各位，请不要离我太远。不过敌暗我明，再谨慎也无法保证万无一失。
I'll protect everyone to the best of my ability. Please don't stray too far from me. But with the enemy in the shadows and us out in the open, even the greatest caution can't guarantee our safety.
如此空旷的环境，如果对方派出Archer在远处发动袭击，我们会陷入相当被动的境地。
In a wide-open area like this, if the enemy sends Archer to attack from range, we'll lose the initiative and be at a serious disadvantage.
以我对老奥帝的了解，他会雇佣最卑鄙的家伙充当自己的马前卒，召来最邪恶的从者替他扫清障碍。
From what I know of Old Oti, he's the type to hire the lowest scum as his pawn, summoning the most wicked Servant to eliminate anything in his way.
你们难道没有发现，从刚才开始，我们开口说话时的声音不见了吗？
Haven't you noticed? Since earlier, our voices vanish when we speak.
确实是这样…是敌人所谓的「宝具」导致的吗？
That's true... Could it be the enemy's so-called Noble Phantasm?
比起这些，各位，我有个问题——这个世界的历史中，有可能诞生非灵长类的英灵吗？比如，广告牌，或者电视机什么的。
More importantly, everyone, I have a question. In this world's history, is it possible for a non-primate to become a Heroic Spirit? Say, a billboard? Or maybe a TV?
若是智械的话…倒也不是不可能。但广告牌和电视机……？
If it were an Intellitron... that's at least plausible. But a billboard? A TV...?
Then what's that thing up ahead...?
一台毫无预兆出现的电视机，此刻正以它光滑的后脑勺背对众生。
A TV, appearing out of nowhere, turns its polished rear to the crowd.
Let's stay back and observe for now.
Scan the surroundings and look for anything unusual.
如果这是他们的障眼法，真正的敌人多半就藏在这附近等我们上钩，还是先远离这个是非之地吧。
If this is a decoy, the real enemy's probably lurking nearby, waiting for us to take the bait. We should steer clear of this trap.
一股冰冷的力量将你们强行拽回了原地，而后，耳畔传来熟悉的声音。
A frigid force drags you violently back to where you started. And then, a voice you know all too well murmurs by your ear.
踏进了斯科特大人的地盘还想走？没门儿！
You want to leave after entering Boss Skott's turf? In your dreams!
Why does it sound like a dog barking?
斯科特？是那位擅长仿生口技表演的公司专员吗？
Skott? The IPC Specialist who does those bionic voice impressions?
天哪，斯科特也是发达了，居然连知更鸟这种大明星都知道你的名字。
Unbelievable. Skott's really made a name for himself, even the acclaimed Robin knows who he is.
……好啦，是我告诉她的，我偶尔也要跟朋友聊聊旅途中的奇人异事嘛！
...Alright, I'm the one who told her. Can't a {M#guy}{F#gal} share a few wild travel stories with {M#his}{F#her} friends every now and then?
横亘在你们之间的短暂沉默，足以表达这位老熟人所有的无奈和愤怒。
The brief silence that lingers between you was enough to convey every ounce of fury and exasperation from this old acquaintance.
破旧的电视机摇摇晃晃地发出噪音，但可惜，这是默片，你无法听到雪花噪点的沙沙声。
The battered TV wobbles, buzzing with static noise. But alas, this is a silent film. You can't hear a single crackle of the snowflakes.
都什么时候了，你还关心这个？
Seriously? It's not the time for this!
当心他的从者！那小子把这里改造成了——
Watch out for his Servant! That guy turned this whole place into—
没有配音的配角，就别说这么多台词浪费观众的时间了。
Supporting characters with no voice dubbing shouldn't waste the audience's time with your lines.
你们在一个密闭的房间里醒来，沙沙作响的电视机是死亡的背景音乐。
You all wake in a sealed chamber, the TV's static crackle singing death's lullaby.
和各自从者失散的你们，偶然邂逅了另一对熟悉的敌人。至于你们的牛仔和歌星朋友，更是不见人影。
Separated from your Servants, you run into another pair of familiar enemies. As for your cowboy and songstress companions? Vanished without a trace.
斯科特以你的名义，给波提欧先生发了封诈骗短信。然后就没有然后了。
Skott sent a scam text to Mr. Boothill in your name, and you know how that goes.
这孙子连招都不带变的。
That punk doesn't even bother switching up his tricks.
Don't tell me he's got a crush on me.
我想想这次让他学什么叫。
Let me think... how will he bark this time?
比起那种无名小卒，我更关心另一个问题——我们的从者被他弄到哪儿去了？在恐怖片里分头行动，可是大忌，先弄清现在的状况吧。
Forget that third-rate nobody, what I really want to know is: Where did he send our Servants? Splitting up in a horror movie? That's a death flag. Let's figure out what we're dealing with here.
我看房间里这怪物就挺扎眼的。
That monster in the room sure is an eyesore.
一具没有身份的尸体，先别管它为什么还能动。总之，你并未从它的身上找到线索，但我可以给你们一些小提示。
A nameless corpse lies before you, don't ask why it's still twitching. More importantly, you find no clues on it, but I've got a little hint for you all.
「你们是一群星际和平公司的员工，为了表彰你们本年度的杰出业绩，公司特地为你们组织了一场酒店度假。」
"You are employees of the Interastral Peace Corporation. To reward your outstanding performance this year, the IPC has organized a special vacation at a hotel."
「你们来到酒店，却发现这里除了自己以外空无一人。随着午夜降临，酒店也露出原本的模样。此地——」
"But when you arrive, the hotel is completely empty. As midnight strikes, its true nature is revealed. This place—"
已经是第五个房间了，<size=28>喂！能听到吗？</size>——啧，真是群不省事的家伙。
This is already the fifth room. <size=28>Hey! Can you hear me?</size> Tsk. What a bunch of troublesome fools.
竟然连Archer你也有被人骗到的时候。
I can't believe that even you fell for it, Archer.
事先声明，我是持反对意见的。耐不住有两个傻子要来探个究竟。
Just so we're clear, I was against this from the start. But those two blockheads insisted on investigating.
现在，是三个傻子了。异世界圣杯战争的御主们如此缺乏警惕心…真是令人眉头上的皱纹都变多了。
Now it's three blockheads. Masters of an otherworldly Holy Grail War, and not a hint of caution among them... That's how I end up with frown lines.
现在说这个是不是有点晚了？给我听好了，「此地——」
Isn't it a little late to say all that? Listen carefully, "This place—"
这场圣杯战争确实充斥着古怪。是我疏失了，未能尽从者的职责，让御主远离敌人的陷阱。
This Holy Grail War is strange indeed. It's my fault, I have failed as a Servant. I should've kept my Master away from this trap.
御主？我看到你的字幕了，我这就想办法救你出来！
Master? I saw your subtitles! I'll find a way to get you out!
未必，如果我是敌人，就会伪装成御主，藏在门背后偷袭我们。
Hold on. If I were the enemy, I'd disguise myself as a Master and wait just behind that door for the perfect ambush.
Archer，你听听我这声音，可是货真价实的吧？
Archer, listen to my voice! It's obviously me, right?
抱歉，这可是默片，在我的面前，只有门下面一串挂着「砂金」名字的字幕。想要证明自己，除非自曝十件只有我御主知道的糗事。

Sorry, this is a silent film. All I see is a line of subtitles under the door, with the name "Aventurine" slapped on it. If you want to prove you're really my Master, you'll have to spill ten humiliating secrets that only my real Master would know.
你这不完全清楚我是谁吗？
You really don't know who I am?
还有完没完了？！这是恐怖片，龙套们，给我保持恐惧！
Will this ever end!? This is a horror film, people! Background characters, start acting scared!
「此地本是公司流放犯人的监狱，布满了阻止出逃的致命机关。而监狱中的犯人早已消失殆尽，只剩一群前来索命的怨灵。」
"This place was once an IPC prison, where criminals were banished. Its deadly traps ensured none escaped. Now, the inmates have passed, leaving only bloodthirsty, vengeful spirits."
我从你讲第一句的时候就想问了，为什么要针对公司员工？
I've wanted to ask this since your first line. Why target the IPC Workers?
在这里还是监狱的年代，公司狗们将这里变成了人间地狱。而观众最爱看的，正是他们遭难的戏码。
Back when this was still a prison, the IPC scoundrels turned it into a living hell. What do audiences love most? Watching those criminals suffer.
只要锯掉任意一个人的腿，大门就会自动打开。但如果一个系统时后什么也没有发生——
Saw off someone's leg, and the door unlocks automatically. But, if nothing happens after a system hour—
这个房间就会原地爆炸！而身为住客们的你们也将在烈焰中粉身碎骨。
BOOM! The room explodes. You, the guests, will also go up in flames.
我知道这个！「不干某事就无法离开的房间」！这可是匹诺康尼古早恐怖片里最经典的元素！
I know this one! "The room you can't leave unless you do a particular thing!" It's one of the classic tropes from Penacony's vintage horror flicks!
希佩在上！看不出来，你年纪轻轻竟然对匹诺康尼早期的梦泡电影有所了解，真是后生可畏。
By Xipe! I did not expect someone your age to know that much about Penacony's early dream bubble cinema. You have a bright future ahead.
没错，正是本人在匹诺康尼草创时期拍摄的第一部电影为后世留下了如此宝贵的天才创意。
That's right! I was the one who gave the world my genius vision with my first film in Penacony's early days!
这个所谓的「宝具」便是以此为原型么？这家伙开始得意忘形、胡言乱语起来了啊…干得好啊，御主。
So this "Noble Phantasm" is based on that? This guy's really getting carried away and started babbling... Nice work, Master.
难怪这段情节如此生搬硬套，那就可以理解了。将古老的恐怖片元素随意拼接在一起，实在是没什么新鲜感。
No wonder the scene feels so awkwardly shoved in. Now it all makes sense. Randomly cobbling together old-school horror tropes? Yeah, not exactly groundbreaking.
比如锯腿这个梗，原本是主角被磁流体脚链锁住了，必须锯掉自己的腿。但放在眼下，就纯粹是照猫画虎了。
Take that "sawing off someone's leg" bit. Originally, the protagonist was restrained by ferrofluid shackles, and had no choice but to cut their own leg off. But here? It's just a lazy copy-paste.
年轻人，我收回刚才对你的赞美，我会把你的尖叫放在<color=#dbc291ff>葛瑞迪影业</color>最显眼的位置循环播放。
Kid, I take back every compliment I said about you. Your screams will be played on loop in the most conspicuous spot at <color=#dbc291ff>Grady Films</color>.
主动真名解放，难道这也是你的戏剧效果的一环？
Revealing your True Name on purpose. Let me guess, just part of your dramatic flair, huh?
Assassin你这个白痴！怎么把真名给暴露了？说好了真名对英灵来说意味着弱点呢？
Y—You fool! How did you let your True Name slip like that? Isn't that supposed to be a Heroic Spirit's greatest weakness? Assassin!?
呃…不必惊慌，制片人。我不是什么了不得的传奇英雄，你大可问问他们，葛瑞迪这个名字在匹诺康尼意味着什么？
Uh... don't panic, Producer. I'm not some legendary hero or anything like that. Just ask them. What does "Grady" even mean in Penacony?
I've only heard of Clock Studios...
不出所料的回答。但你们很快就会知道，谁才是匹诺康尼最伟大的电影导演，而现在——请容我暂且退居幕后。
As expected. Soon, you'll see who Penacony's greatest director is. For now, I'll slip behind the scenes.
是要牺牲自己？还是在我的面前刀剑相向？你们大可利用最后的时间商量一番。不过，再纠结的话，炸弹可就要爆炸喽？

So, what will it be? Self-sacrifice? Or will you turn your blades at each other right before my eyes? Take what little time you have left and talk it over. But keep stalling, and well — tick, tock... BOOM.
哎，好不容易遇到个同好，就没点粉丝福利吗？
Oh, you finally meet a kindred spirit, and I don't get any fan benefits?
御主，你也听到了。选一个吧，是锯掉你的左腿呢？还是右腿呢？说实话，如果能买一送一，我比较想锯掉有令咒的那条胳膊。
Master, you heard him. Pick a leg, left or right? Honestly, if I could get a bonus, I'd rather go for the arm with the Command Spells.
喂！你好歹是我的从者，再怎么也考虑下锯掉{NICKNAME}的腿好不好？
Hey! You're my Servant, remember? At least consider cutting off {NICKNAME}'s leg instead!
等等，老朋友，别用这种眼神盯着我，我只是说着玩的。
Wait, old pal. Don't give me that look! I was kidding.
各位，不要进入敌人的节奏，被他牵着鼻子走。越是慌乱的时刻，越是要保持冷静。
Everyone, don't dance to his tune. Don't let him pull us along. The more chaos he sows, the calmer we have to be.
还不开始自相残杀吗？房间，要爆炸了喔？
Still not turning on each other yet? Room's about to blow!
I'll have to saw off my leg.
干脆我们投票决定吧，我投我那位花枝招展的御主一票。
Let's vote. I vote for my flamboyant Master.
哎，你就别落井下石了，真正的答案，你早就意识到了吧？
Hey, no need to egg things on. You already figured out the real answer, didn't you?
不能离开的房间和马上就要爆炸的炸弹——说得确实煞有介事，但是……
A sealed room. A bomb about to go off. It sounds dramatic, but...
以常情而论，作为从者把区区房门直接劈开不就好了？御主，请往后退两步。
Rationally speaking, as a Servant, wouldn't it be easier to just cut the door down? Master, please take two steps back.
持剑的少女怒喝一声，门锁「咔嚓」应声断裂，大门「滋扭」一声随之洞开。
The sword-wielding girl unleashes a fierce shout. Crack! The lock splits, and the door creaks open.
御主，请站到我身边来，我并不清楚那位Assassin要做什么…但这里依旧很危险。
Master, stay close to me. I don't know what that Assassin plans to do next... But it's still dangerous here.
竟然在恐怖片里悍然选择暴力对抗，异界的英灵真是毫无艺术素养！
Using brute force in a horror film? Heroic Spirits from another world clearly have no sense of art!
身为金发美少女，你难道不该主动承担起制造尖叫和等待英雄救美的角色？
A blonde beauty like you. Shouldn't you be screaming for help and waiting for the hero to save the day?
藏头露尾的Assassin，一旦让我走到你的面前，你想要发出多大的尖叫，让谁来救你都可以。
Skulking Assassin, once I reach you, scream all you want, call for anyone to save you.
那你得走到我的面前才行！由于你们的鲁莽，「酒店的电锯恶灵已经被响声唤醒了」。主角，轮到你登场了！
Then you'd better reach me first! Thanks to your recklessness, "the hotel's chainsaw spirit has been awakened by the noise." Protagonist, take the stage!
桀桀桀桀桀，想跑，有问过主角我的意见吗？
Kekekeke... Trying to run? Did I, the protagonist, ever gave you permission to run!?
你是贴我身上的狗皮膏药吗？
What are you? A piece of gum stuck to my shoe?
作为这部恐怖片的主演，当然要亲手，把你们一个一个撕碎！
As the star of this film, I'll be the one to personally tear you all apart, limb by limb!
这…哪有恶灵在恐怖片被受害者打得满地打滚的…算了，制片人，你先退场吧，之后还有用得着你的时候。
This... What kind of evil spirit gets beaten to a pulp by its victims? ...Ugh, forget it. Producer, take five. We'll be needing you again later.
这就是异界英灵的实力吗…哼，也是，匹诺康尼不过是只有十个琥珀纪的弹丸之地，论创造传奇和历史的积累，自然比不上真正的英雄。

So this is the power of Heroic Spirits from another world? ...Hmph. Figures. Penacony's just a backwater speck with ten Amber Eras. With no real legend or history, of course we pale in comparison to true heroes.
但这恰恰会成为你们失败的理由。我会把你们这些逃亡者一个个地收下，变成听话的群演。
But that's also why you're going to lose. I'll take each of you runaways, one by one, and turn you into obedient extras for my film.
你到底哪只眼睛看到我们在逃跑？
Pray tell, does anyone look like they're running from you?
请稍安勿躁，电影的第二幕即将开始。
Don't get ahead of yourselves. Act Two is about to begin.
在短暂的休憩后，你们互相交流了情报。
After a brief pause, you exchange the information you've gathered with one another.
波提欧、知更鸟和音符小姐下落不明，而斯科特和他的从者随时准备卷土重来。
Boothill, Robin, and Miss Note are all still missing. Skott and his Servant could strike again at any time.
竟然还留给我们喘息的时间，看来，敌人对自己的大本营很自信嘛。
So they're giving us time to breathe, huh? Guess they're pretty confident about their trump card.
Archer的御主，我看你对电影很熟悉。关于那个<color=#dbc291ff>葛瑞迪</color>，你有什么头绪吗？
Archer's Master, you seem very familiar with films. What do you know about this <color=#dbc291ff>Grady</color>?
我只是听说过这个名字，这家伙是个活跃在匹诺康尼早期时代的烂片导演，拍摄过数量惊人、低成本的恐怖默片，特别擅于玩弄一些有趣的商业噱头。

I've only heard the name before. The guy was some terrible director back in Penacony's early days. He cranked out a ton of cheap horror silent films and was a master of interesting commercial gimmicks.
不过他的名字早就被匹诺康尼人遗忘了。他用来关住我们的这部电影，是我偶然在星际旧货市场淘到的。
But people in Penacony forgot about his name ages ago. I only found the film he used to trap us through sheer luck — picked it up at an interstellar junk market.
竟然是个没什么名气的家伙吗？这可麻烦了。
So... we're dealing with a total nobody? That's not good.
作为留名历史的存在，英灵的传说中往往潜藏着他们的弱点：像是某位战士沐浴冥河水刀枪不入，但偏偏伤害他的脚踵却会一击致命。

As Heroic Spirits who left a mark in history, our legends usually hint at our greatest weaknesses — like that one warrior who bathed in the river of the underworld and became invincible except for his heel.
我本以为能从你们口中打听到关于这家伙过去的事迹。没想到竟然是个你们也闻所未闻的无名小卒。
I was hoping you'd know something about that person's past. But turns out he's just some washed-up no-name that even you folks have not heard about.
倒是和斯科特先生很配啊，无名小卒，手段还挺阴险。
Fits right in with Mr. Skott, doesn't it? A pair of nobodies with shady tricks up their sleeves.
不过我有种直觉，就算他们此刻占据上风，也对我们无可奈何。
Still, I've got this feeling... even if they've got the upper hand now, they've got no real way to finish us.
We're all just fine for the time being.
耍弄诡计的人没什么力量…
Tricksters never pack much of a punch anyway...
没错。生前是电影导演，显然成为英灵后也不会是什么擅长战斗的类型……
Right. He was a film director in life. That means he's not gonna suddenly become a powerhouse after turning into a Heroic Spirit.
这一点从他的宝具就能看出来，以生前曾拍摄过的恐怖片为原型，化作固有结界。虽然能力很稀有，但更像是个陷阱，只能困住受害者。
His Noble Phantasm proves it. He built it off one of his old horror flicks — basically a Reality Marble. Though it's a rare ability, it feels more like a trap, one that only ensnares its victims.
…但陷阱中的尖刺要是伤不了猎物，那倒霉的就该是猎手了。
...But if the trap can't hurt the prey, then it's the hunter who'll be in trouble.
现在，这家伙肚子里装了三位从者，而最坚固的城堡，往往都是从内部被打破的。
Now he's got three Servants in his stomach, while the strongest fortresses always fall from the inside.
…不愧是真正的领袖，总能准确地判断局势。
...You really do have the mind of a leader, always so sharp on reading the situation.
我也得再加把劲了，虽然这家伙没什么明确的弱点，但如果能<color=#dbc291ff>找到Assassin的本体</color>，用弓箭好好地给他理个发。他创造的固有结界也就不复存在了吧。

I'd better pull my weight too. He might not have an obvious weak spot, but if we can <color=#dbc291ff>find Assassin's true body</color> and let my arrows give him a proper haircut, that Reality Marble of his would no longer exist.
*鼓掌*看来大家已经有了明确的目标了。
*clap hands* Sounds like everyone's got their sights set.
{NICKNAME}，虽然过去我曾和列车诸位交过手，但这都是各为其志——这一回，我对圣杯并没有什么兴趣。我的上司对老奥帝先生打算做什么更好奇。

{NICKNAME}, I know I've butted heads with the Express Crew before, but that was just a difference in perspective. As for this time, I've got no interest in the Holy Grail. My boss is more concerned about what Old Oti has up his sleeve.
如果可以，希望这一次咱们能有好好合作的机会？
If you're willing... maybe we can actually work together this time?
It all comes down to how you perform.
你瞧，御主，知更鸟小姐想要建立的同盟，已经慢慢有雏形了。军队有了目标，接下来就该行动了。
You see that, Master? Looks like Miss Robin's alliance is starting to come together. This army has a goal, and now it's time to move.
我们来的时候看到出口就在那边，趁现在离开这里吧。
We saw the exit on the way in. Let's head that way while we still can.
似乎我们几个又回到了原地……
Feels like we've just looped back to where we started...
如果没什么对应的法子，恐怕转到地老天荒也出不去。我说，御主，你要不要试试看把手上的筹码和骰子之类的东西留下来当路标？
If we don't find some kind of countermeasure, we could be stuck running in circles forever. Master, why not leave some of your chips and dice behind as markers?
不用你说，刚才我已经试过了…只是没想到，葛瑞迪还挺贪财。
You don't need to remind me of that. I've already tried it... But didn't expect Grady to be such a greedy money-grubber.
这位龙套先生，可不要污人清白！我只是按惯例打扫片场，免得无关紧要的道具出现破坏了场景。
Hey, hey! Don't go throwing shade, extra boy! I was just cleaning up the set as usual. Gotta make sure random props don't ruin the scene.
接下来这场戏，讲的就是公司员工被困在怨灵的回廊里，受永恒折磨的故事。
The next scene is all about IPC employees trapped in a haunted hallway and cursed to suffer forever.
没有出逃的方向，没有谁会伸出援手，在此，你们的任何挣扎都是无意义的。
Nowhere to escape, and no one will ever come to help. In here, any struggle is just wasted effort.
这是…知更鸟小姐的歌声吗？
葛瑞迪，看来你已经忘了，被你困在宝具里的可不只有我们几个。
Grady, looks like you forgot that you didn't only trap US in your Noble Phantasm.
这就是经费不足的悲哀，葛瑞迪，在你因自编自导自演而应接不暇的时候，片场的另一边，知更鸟小姐已经找到打破僵局的办法了。
That's what you get for cutting the budget, Grady. While you're busy writing, directing, and starring as yourself, Miss Robin already found the way out on the other side of the set.
一股温和的同谐之力飘荡在狭窄的空间内，在它的中心，两位歌者正在为迷失者指引方向。
A gentle force of Harmony floats through the tight space. At its heart, two singers light the way for the lost.
与此同时，邪恶的怨灵也找上了她们，誓要将这些天外来客撕碎，吞没！
But at the same time, evil spirits approach them, determined to shred and consume these visitors from beyond the sky!
You coward, pick on someone your own size!
不管你打算做什么，都已经来不及了。
Whatever you have in mind, it's already too late.
以肉眼难以捕捉的速度，音符小姐抓住袭击的怪物，残暴地将它们的脑袋砸向地板。
In a blur too fast to track, Miss Note grabs the attacking monsters and viciously smashes their head into the floor.
「哦！我的显像管！啊！别用话筒砸我屏幕！嗷！」哐哐哐，砰砰砰。
"Oh no! My cathode ray tubes! Ahh! Don't hit my screen with your microphone! Ow!" Clunk clunk clunk, bang bang bang.
客观来讲，这是你在这部电影里看到的第一场少儿不宜的内容，你一度怀疑，知更鸟召唤的其实是Berserker。
