Nothing complicated. All distortions have their roots. We'll be able to trace them to the source once they manifest. Breaking a few rules will do. We just need to make sure that the corrective measures that will be implemented aren't too much for us to handle.
当浮现的余音试图将你我纠正时，我就能寻获它的所在。
When a distorted Afterecho manifests to correct us, I'll be able to pinpoint its whereabouts.
然后，就用「调律」抚平梦境吧。
Then I'll use the power of tuning to heal the Dreamscape.
看来也有些规则并未扭曲，这是我当时的原话。
Looks like some rules weren't distorted. That's a word-for-word account of what I said back then.
Did you make this rule because your sister is named Robin?
是因为歌斐木先生。他常常在公园里停留，观察众生百态。于先生而言，这也是疲惫时休憩的方式。
No, it was for Mr. Gopher Wood. He used to stop by the park to people-watch and appreciate the vibrancy of life. This was his way of recharging whenever things wore him out.
我希望他不要受到惊扰。
I wanted him to rest undisturbed.
太不讲道理了吧，这也是你订下的规矩？
This is absurd! Did you make this rule too?
我还是孩子时，也会对这种悖论感到好奇，想一探究竟。
Children tend to be fascinated by such paradoxes. I was no exception.
算了，我都不知道从什么角度笑话你。有什么适合丢进去的东西吗？
Forget it, I don't even know how to joke about this. Well, what do you suggest we throw in?
这是什么樵夫的垃圾桶吗？
What is this, a woodcutter's trashcan!?
I don't have anything we can use for now.
你尝试投入了一些东西，但它完全没有任何反应——小垃圾桶真有个性，成功引起了你的注意力。
You attempt to insert some things, but no reaction is observed — This little trashcan has quite the personality, successfully grabbing your attention.
你将好看的垃圾放入了桶内以示重视，一转眼，桶中多出了更多好看的垃圾——真是聚宝盆原理的一种错误应用。

You insert Pleasant-Looking Trash into the bin as a sign of consideration, and in the blink of an eye, more Pleasant-Looking Trashes emerge — what an inappropriate application of the Horn of Plenty concept.
你放入了更多好看的垃圾，垃圾桶很高兴，向你默默致意，离开前，你莫名感到很有尊严。
You insert more Pleasant-Looking Trash. The trashcan is overjoyed and silently pays its respects to you. Before you leave, you suddenly feel a sense of dignity.
<color=#eb4d3dff>「体验游乐设施时，请勿使用惊梦剧团售卖的苏乐达瓶盖。」</color>
<color=#eb4d3dff>"Please do not use SoulGlad bottle caps sold by the Dreamjolt Troupe while experiencing the attractions."</color>
哪有惊梦剧团，躲起来了？
The Dreamjolt Troupe? Where? Are they hiding or something?
在这呢，还挺会藏的。来吧，第一步是从它手里买瓶盖。
Oh, there it is! Found a good hiding spot, didn't ya? Come on, let's buy some bottle caps from it.
星期日将一些苜蓿币放在了气泡锂犬面前。
Sunday places some Alfalfa credits in front of Bubble Hound.
哎，我倒是听懂了，给你翻译翻译：「这点钱糊弄谁呢？」
Ahaha, let me translate that for you: "Who are you trying to pay with your spare change?"
星期日放上了更多的苜蓿币。
Sunday has placed even more Alfalfa credits.
如果这些还不够，就得劳烦你出手了。
I'm afraid you're going to have to handle this if it isn't enough.
...Wait, is that really all you've got on you!?
May I remind you that I'm currently on the run?
惊梦剧团发出了短促的叫声，它向前凑了凑，将挂在身前的汽水瓶朝向两人。
The Dreamjolt Troupe lets out terse shouts. It moves closer, pointing the soda bottle hanging in front of it towards the two.
Whew, luck's on our side. Looks like we scraped together just enough.
那我们试试看？就用这台扭蛋机。
Shall we give this capsule machine a try and see what happens?
好像也没什么奇怪的。要不打开扭蛋看看。
Nothing's off so far. Maybe we should open the capsule?
呃，应该不会这么蛮不讲理吧？
Uh, they can't be seriously going that far, right?
No, no, no! Hey, look out!
这根本不合理吧，它把扭蛋收回去不就行了？
Did they have to do that!? They could've just recalled the capsule!
也许让游乐设施不再是游乐设施，也是一种纠正的方式。
Perhaps making the attractions no longer just attractions is another corrective measure?
这规矩怎么还玩文字游戏的……
Ugh, aren't the rules being too finicky with words?
先不论猎犬是怎么发现这个事实的，感觉后果顶多也就是被翻回正面，要不你试试？我想看你倒立的样子。

Let's not worry about how the Bloodhounds figured this one out. Hm, I reckon the worst that can happen for this one is that they'll flip you back onto your feet. Say, why don't you test it out this time? I'd love to see you do a handstand!
这就算了吧。都赖你，我再也不想吃冰淇淋了。
Uh, I say we pass on this. Thanks to you, I never want to eat ice cream again.
哦，出现了。该怎么说，和你还有几分像。
Oh, there it is. Huh, it does look somewhat like you.
Time for it to disappear for good.
「为我示现，一如往常——凡具瞳孔之物，皆有均等的魂灵。」
"Reveal thyself unto me, as is customary — All creatures endowed with eyes bear souls of equal worth."
还真有效果。公司该找个人盯着你的，就不怕你在匹诺康尼从头来过，再长出一双翅膀？
Whoa, it worked! The IPC totally should've sent someone to keep an eye on you. Aren't they worried that you might make a comeback in Penacony and grow a new pair of wings?
只要我不能抛头露面，就没有产生威胁的可能。
So long as there remains a need for me to keep a low profile, I'm no threat to them.
也对，你扮演的从来都是聚光灯下的角色，受人敬仰的精英、领袖。你上一次摔倒在泥地里是什么时候，是不是要追溯到童年了？

That's true. Come to think of it, you had always been in the spotlight, be it as a respected member of the elite or a leader. When was the last time you fell into the mud? All the way back during your childhood days?
是六岁前的事了。我像个普通男孩一样尝试用耳羽飞翔，却摔倒在土坑里，险些折断了天环。
Sometime before I turned six. Like most boys would, I tried to fly with my ear feathers, only to fall into a pit. I almost broke my halo.
我只想讽刺几句，你还真记得？
That was sarcasm, in case you didn't realize. But whoa, you actually remember something like that?
失败的瞬间总是难忘，人之常情。
You never forget times of failure. It's only human nature.
会把这种事当作失败，恐怕也独你一人了。
Bah, you're probably the only one who'd consider something like that a failure.
这正是故地重游的意义。在我眼中，一切都历历在目。
That's the whole point of revisiting a place. When I look at everything here, the memories are so fresh it's as if it all only happened yesterday.
年少的我在此处经历失败，为收拾残局疲于奔命。我本以为自己改变了许多，但现在看来仍是在原地打转。
When the younger me tasted failure here, I ran myself ragged to fix the mess. I'd thought myself no longer the same person as before... But it looks like I was just going round in circles.
很高兴能以这种形式重温过去。走吧，这场告别还很漫长。
I'm glad for this chance to look back on my past in this way. Come now, we should go. This will be a long farewell.
So, where are we heading next?
奥帝购物中心。不过那条路上也有猎犬，还是避开人流吧……
Oti Mall. There are Bloodhounds stationed along the way, though. It might be better to take a quieter route...
我无意冒犯，但二位最好不要接近那边。
I don't mean to meddle, but I'd advise you to stay away from that place.
事态还不明朗，只是附近出现了一些异状，家族正在排查。
There isn't any concrete information yet, but anomalies have been reported around the area. The Family is currently investigating.
虽然「星核」风波已经平息，但别有用心之人未必就不存在了。
The Stellaron incident may have been quelled, but who is to say that nobody has another agenda?
先生提醒得对，我们这就绕行。也请您多加小心。
Thanks for the tip, sir. We'll make a detour. May you stay safe, too.
虽说美梦是安全的，但也请注意往来的车辆。
Sweet dreams are technically safe, but it would be wise to look out for oncoming vehicles.
那男的不是一般人啊，刚才没被发现真是奇迹。
Whew, that was no ordinary passerby. It's a miracle that he didn't see through your disguise.
星穹列车应该早就启程了，他为什么还在匹诺康尼？
The Astral Express should've departed a long time ago. Why is he still in Penacony...?
…我们不必为此调整行程，但务必要多加留心。
...We needn't change our plans because of him, but be sure to keep your guard up.
希望在我成为囚徒的这几天，匹诺康尼没有遇上新的麻烦。
I hope nothing terrible has fallen upon Penacony while I was in captivity the last few days.
是我心怀侥幸了。能允许我解释几句吗？
Seems I let my wishful thinking get the best of me. Will you at least give me a chance to explain?
I will. But before I do...
将双手放在背后，用短句回答我的问题。
Put your hands behind your back and answer my questions in short sentences.
我得确保你的言语中没有暗含某种危险的吟诵。
I need to make sure your words aren't concealing any dangerous incantations.
我竟给各位留下了如此奇怪的印象么……
I can't believe I've left everyone with such a peculiar impression of me...
请相信，我并非带着恶意重返故地，「秩序」也不可能再临匹诺康尼了。
Please believe me when I say that I didn't come back here with ill intent. Penacony will never experience the Order again either.
在你使用过「同谐」的力量后，恐怕我很难轻信这番说辞。
I'm afraid I won't be taking your words at face value. Not after how you wielded the power of Harmony.
回答我的问题，你为何会出现在这里？
Answer me. What are you doing here?
要得到你的信任，想来我也只有一种选择。
It looks like there's only one way to gain your trust.
万维克，请出来吧。我们能仰赖的人多了一位。
Come on out, Wonweek. We've found ourselves an ally.
星期日向瓦尔特讲述了自己的经历，毫无保留……
Sunday unreservedly shares his story with Welt...
所以，是公司的人救了你？
So, it was the IPC that freed you?
应当是家妹与他们达成了某种约定。而我能在匹诺康尼行动自如，则多亏了这位万维克的帮助。
My sister has likely made an agreement of some sort with them. As for how I'm able to move around freely in Penacony, I have Wonweek to thank for that.
如您所见，我重返故乡只是为了和它道别。您是否愿意高抬贵手，给我一个不留遗憾的机会？
As you can see, I've only returned to my home to bid it farewell. Would you be kind enough to give me a chance to say goodbye so that I may leave without regrets?
保险起见，直到彻底离开匹诺康尼为止，你必须与我同行。
Agreed, but until you leave Penacony for good, you are to stay by my side.
我离开故乡时也同样匆忙，并非不能理解这种心情。
...I left my home in a hurry, too... I know how it feels.
但这只是我的个人意见。对于此事，我的伙伴们同样有知情的必要。
That said, I can't make this call by myself. My companions need to know about this too.
星穹列车的其他成员也在匹诺康尼？
The Astral Express crew is in Penacony, too?
跟我去见他们吧。你也一起。
Come with me — we'll go find them. You come along too.
知道知道，这下热闹死了。
Okay, okay. Boy, this is gonna be a party!
我们到了。他们应该就在附近。
We're here. They should be somewhere nearby.
瓦尔特先生，我有一事感到不解。
Mr. Yang. If you don't mind, there's something that puzzles me.
盛会之星的风波已经平息，星穹列车本该再度踏上「开拓」之行。是什么让各位依旧在匹诺康尼停留？

Now that the crisis on the Planet of Festivities has been averted, shouldn't the Astral Express have departed to continue on its trailblazing journey? Why have you and your companions stayed behind in Penacony?
莫非在我之后，又有人掀起了风波？
Could it be that someone stirred up trouble after I left?
And if that were indeed the case?
我似乎也没有提议的立场。愿听从各位无名客的判断。
I doubt I'm in any position to be proposing ideas, but I'm happy to defer to the Nameless and aid with any plans you may have.
不用担心，匹诺康尼并无危险。我们仍未启程，只是因为一位特殊的「旅客」。
There's no need to worry, all is well in Penacony. Our reason for lingering here is a certain unusual passenger.
列车受人所托，要送一位搭车客返回故乡，我们只是在匹诺康尼短暂歇脚……
The Express has been commissioned to send a passenger back home. We're just resting up in Penacony for a while before we depart.
您说的客人，莫非就是这位女士？
By "passenger," do you mean this lady here?
杨叔，你总算来了——大事不妙啦！
You're finally here, Mr. Yang! We have a huge problem!
可艾迪恩公园跟你有什么关系？创始人是你乔装打扮的？
But what has Aideen Park got to do with you? Don't tell me that the founder's one of your disguises?
Oh, come on. Take a joke, will you?
来看看笔记上都写了什么……
Let's see what we have on these notes...
呃——「除汉堡外的食物均不可食用」？
"No consumption of food except for burgers." ...What?
Next on the list is the stage. Let's go and check it out.
简单来说——现在，规则就是用来打破的？
So... Can I take it that rules are meant to be broken now?
似乎还不够，再去别处看看吧。
We're not breaking enough rules. We should look elsewhere too.
足够了，扭曲之处就在附近。
Enough. The location of the distortion is nearby.
动身吧。我们分开些走，保持几米距离。
Come now, it's time we set off. Let's not stick too close to each other, just in case. A few feet or so between us will do.
有机生命的历程总是充满变数，我常为此感到着迷。
Isn't it fascinating how variables never fail to find their way into the lives of organic lifeforms?
我也没想到会在匹诺康尼遇见螺丝咕姆先生，还以为天才俱乐部没有收到盛会的邀请函呢。
Neither did I expect to see you here in Penacony, Mr. Screwllum. I had assumed the Genius Society wasn't invited to the festivities.
我对「同谐」的庆典并无兴趣，谢绝邀请也是理所当然。但也因此错过了各位的精彩冒险，结论：追求合理也有坏处。

I have no interest in the Harmony's celebration, so it's only natural for me to turn down the invitation. But it looks like my decision also cost me the front-row seat to all of your exciting adventures. Conclusion: There is likewise a downside to pursuing reason.
如果各位天才莅临谐乐大典，故事的走向恐怕就截然不同了。
I'm sure if all of you geniuses showed up to the Charmony Festival, things would've been very much different.
听闻下一站，星穹列车与流光忆庭达成了合作？
Mm, I hear that the Astral Express has established a collaboration with the Garden of Recollection for your next destination?
他们只是提供了一个选项。是黑塔女士告诉您的吗？
They did suggest a destination, but that was all. Did you hear this from Madam Herta?
那毕竟是个无名客认知外的世界，所以我发信给她，希望包罗万象的「智识」能提供更多信息。
It's a world beyond the knowledge of the Nameless, after all. I wrote to her hoping that the all-encompassing Erudition could provide us with some information.
Could there be more to it?
的确还有另一个原因：黑天鹅小姐提到翁法罗斯是个受三重命途影响的世界，而其中一条就是「智识」。
Yes, there is something else. Miss Black Swan said Amphoreus is a world influenced by three Paths, and the Erudition is one such Path.
逻辑：普通的命途行者不会在忆庭之镜留下痕迹。
Logic: The average Pathstrider wouldn't leave any trace behind in the Garden of Recollection's mirror.
不错。所以此事多半和令使，甚至和星神有关，我才好奇天才是否会有线索。
You're right, so this has to be related to the Emanators, or perhaps even the Aeons. That's why I wanted to know if the geniuses had any clue about it.
可惜俱乐部的会员往来甚少，大部分人也已死在寂静领主手上。我从未听说过「翁法罗斯」这个名字。
It's a pity we do not communicate much within the society, not to mention we've lost most of our members to the Lord of Silence. I have never heard of Amphoreus, however.
黑塔女士也一样。不过她倒是来了兴致，说要调查一番，大概是因为背后是流光忆庭吧，她一直对「记忆」的技术很感兴趣。

Madam Herta said the same, but it did pique her interest, and she agreed to do a little digging. My guess is that there's a chance the Garden of Recollection is behind it. She's always had a keen interest in the Remembrance's technology, after all.
这期间，列车也经她引荐结识了阮•梅女士，并为后者从「金伦加深域」带回了一具古兽遗骸。不过嘛……
It's also thanks to her that we got to make Miss Ruan Mei's acquaintance a while back. We even went into the Calenga Abyss to bring a Leviathan's carcass back for our new friend. Speaking of her...
谁也没想到，在阮•梅女士那儿，我们还会再遇见一位「故人」。
This is far too much an understatement, but none of us ever expected to see an old friend at Miss Ruan Mei's.
那位狐人少女的经历也堪称一段奇遇，也许这就是有机生命的缘分吧。
That foxian girl has indeed been through an unimaginable turn of events. I suppose that's the fate you organic lifeforms are bound by.
那可真是段不解之缘啊。
Yeah, a bond that truly runs deep.
所以星穹列车主动担起送她还乡的职责，是出于道义？
So, is it out of goodwill that the Astral Express volunteered to send her back home?
对无名客而言，正事与闲事真的存在一条界线么？
Would the Nameless see a point in keeping work and favors apart?
这也是她本人的请求，希望能在回仙舟前找个站点稍作停泊，整顿心思，毕竟对联盟来说…她的身份有些特别。
It's her request. She hopes to make a brief stop somewhere to reframe her mindset before returning to the Xianzhou... considering her unique position with the Alliance.
既然这位客人如此特殊，姬子小姐不用陪同吗？
Looks like this is one exceptional passenger. Don't you have to accompany her then, Miss Himeko?
交给我的同伴了，毕竟他们更了解「停云小姐」，旅游度假的事也是年轻人更在行。
My companions are with her. They know Miss Tingyun better anyway. Plus, those youngsters will definitely do a better job than me when it comes to vacations.
想必…他们玩得正开心吧？
They're probably... having a wonderful time now.
所以，有谁能为我解释一下吗？
So, is anyone going to tell me what's going on?
啊，这个…那个…{NICKNAME}来吧！{M#他}{F#她}说话有条理。
Oh, uh... About that... Why don't you ask {NICKNAME} instead! {M#He}{F#She} knows how to present things logically!
Apparently, there are many Tingyuns here with us.
这点不用你强调啦，都看得出来！
Bah, you don't have to tell him that! He can see for himself!
我要打破你的刻板印象。
I'm gonna have to break that stereotype you have of me.
唉，还是我来吧…刚才分开后，我们就带着停云小姐四处逛逛，结果遇上了怪事。
Forget it. I'll tell you... We walked around with Miss Tingyun for a while after separating from the rest, but then we ran into something... weird.
Did something happen in the Dreamscape?
应该说是人祸…我们遇见一位皮皮西人，说自己在录不要笑挑战——请我们尝一种吃了就会大笑的糖。

Actually it's more like it was someone's fault... We met a Pepeshi filming a try-not-to-laugh challenge, and he gave us some of his candy. A type of candy that's supposed to make you fall over laughing.
合着是这种「不要笑挑战」啊。
Oh, so that sort of try-not-to-laugh challenge.
我说别瞎掺和，{M#他}{F#她}非要试试，结果试试就出事了呗。
I didn't really wanna do it, but {M#he}{F#she} insisted on us giving it a shot. That's how we got into this problem.
哎呀——别打岔了。总之我俩吃了糖乐得不行，在地上滚了好几圈才站起来，起来就发现停云小姐……
Oh, come on—stop interrupting. So, we had some candy and were so happy we rolled around on the ground for a bit before standing up... But once we did, we realized Miss Tingyun...
停云小姐吃下糖，却开始不断打喷嚏！阿嚏！阿嚏——就像这样，然后她就在我们眼前稀里哐啷地变成了好几个停云！
Miss Tingyun ate the candy too, but she only sneezed non-stop! A-choo, a-choo! Sneeze after sneeze! And before we knew it, she multiplied into several Tingyuns right in front of us!
梦境是忆质的世界，这种状况多半是她的大脑比较敏感，受到刺激后零散的记忆片段脱离，变成了个体。
The Dreamscape is a memoria world. It is likely the candy triggered her hypersensitive mind, causing scattered memory fragments to dissociate and become entities themselves.
不用担心，类似的事在美梦中不算少见。
There is no cause for concern. We've experienced similar incidents from time to time in the sweet dream.
It's okay, you can reveal yourself now.
只是出于保险，否则这一路上，我们已经被猎犬拦下好几次了。
I was only being careful, or we would've been stopped by the Bloodhounds more than once on our way here.
万维克，为我揭下面具吧。
Help me remove my disguise, Wonweek.
Mr. Yang! Have you turned on us!?
稍安勿躁，这次换我来说明吧。
瓦尔特为两人讲述了此前的经历……
Welt fills them in on what he's been through...
事到如今，我认为星期日没有说谎的理由。为避免节外生枝，在他离开匹诺康尼前，我会一直同行。
I believe that at this point, Sunday has no reason to be dishonest. But to prevent any unforeseen complications, I'll be accompanying him everywhere he goes, until he leaves Penacony.
这位万维克先生则是星期日的旧识。
Mr. Wonweek here is an old acquaintance of Sunday's.
你好，美丽的女士。至于这位…更是重量级，就是你把这控制狂狠狠修理了一顿？
Pleased to meet you, fair lady. And you, of course... you're the heavyweight who pummeled this control freak?
I'm not one to boast about past feats.
Nah, it was a team effort.
今天可真是惊喜连连…上次是停云小姐，上上次是黄泉小姐，怎么感觉杨叔每次出门都会带些不得了的人回来啊？
The surprises just keep pouring in... First, there was Miss Acheron, and then Miss Tingyun. Why does it seem like Mr. Yang always comes back with some extraordinary guests?
咳咳，他的事先放一边，得赶紧让停云小姐恢复原状才行。
Ahem, let's leave this discussion for later. For now, we should be focusing on returning Miss Tingyun to her normal self.
这个…可能没那么简单。杨叔看看就知道了，这些停云小姐怕是有点难以沟通。
That's... not gonna be easy. You'll see what I mean, Mr. Yang. These Tingyuns aren't exactly easy to communicate with.
三月七小姐！此前的提议您考虑得如何了？
Miss March 7th! Have you taken the time to consider my suggestion?
提议？那个…您是哪一位停云小姐？
Your suggestion? Wait, which Miss Tingyun are you again...?
是我呀！准备与所有停云联手，成立「停云商团」的那位。
It's me! I'm the one who wants every Tingyun to come together to form the Tingyun Merchant Guild!
能与自己共事，机会实在难得，能有这般一心同体的默契，生意定可顺风顺水！
How often do you get the chance to work with yourself? Just imagine how in sync we'll be with one another... We're bound to thrive and prosper!
但我们没法离开梦境，做不了外贸，这不是见三月七小姐聪敏过人，想拉您来做对外接洽嘛！

I know we can't leave the Dreamscape to trade with the outside worlds, so that's where you come in, Miss March 7th! Your wits surpass many others, making you the perfect person to handle liaison negotiations on our behalf!
啊哈哈，我会考虑的…先祝你们一切顺利啦。
Ahaha, I guess I can consider it... I hope everything goes smoothly for your guild!
There. Now do you see what I mean, Mr. Yang?
There does appear to be an element of her talking to herself.
我也想变成好几个自己。
I want to clone copies of myself, too.
算了吧你，球棒都没法分。
Forget about it, how are you gonna clone your bat?
Hah, Miss Tingyun's got a sense of humor these days.
你最好不是说「聪敏过人」那句。
Hey! You'd better not be referring to the part about my wits surpassing many others!
如此说来，瓦尔特先生曾提起过，列车此行是送一位旅客重返故土，这位女士的故乡可是仙舟联盟？
Mr. Yang mentioned the Express' next voyage is to send a passenger back home. Could this lady be from the Xianzhou Alliance?
Yes, more specifically the Xianzhou Luofu.
「罗浮」？那里前不久刚遭遇反物质军团的袭击，她有幸逃过一劫吗？
The Luofu? Didn't the Antimatter Legion launch an ambush on the Luofu some time ago? Was she one of the few survivors?
恰恰相反，她或许是距离风暴中心最近的人。
Quite the contrary. She might've been the person closest to the eye of the storm.
看来是段漫长的故事啊。
Looks like there's a lot more to this story.
先不提这个，身为梦境的东道主，你有什么办法吗？
A story for another time. As host of the Dreamscape, do you have any suggestions for fixing this problem?
一时还难以判断，再和附近的停云女士谈谈吧。
I don't have much to go on now. Perhaps we should talk to the other Miss Tingyuns here.
几位又来啦？考虑得如何？
Oh, you're here again! So, what's your decision?
呃…还在琢磨。我太抢手了，这种事得慢慢考虑。
Uhh... I'm still deliberating. I—I'm so highly sought after that it's only right I give it careful consideration.
哎呀——我眼光果然从不出错。您慢慢考虑，倒也不急。
Aha—! I knew it, I always have an eye for talented people. No problem, take your time.
不错，亲自烹上一席好菜，总能使人念念不忘。
That sounds nice. People never forget a personally prepared home-cooked meal.
但既然是赠礼，总要讲究个细水长流，案上粲花连日不重，不是更能给人添上好兴致？
But then again, gifts should be lasting. What about a delightful new bouquet of flowers on the table each day? Wouldn't they do a better job at brightening up someone's day?
Hmm, that sounds like a good idea.
可真要细究，心思是最不可忽视的，越是繁复，越能让人感到情谊呢。
If we really want to do this right though, it's the thought behind the gift that truly matters. The more thought goes into the gift, the better the recipient feels it.
哎呀，这位的观点也相当有见地。
Oh, she makes a valid point, too.
You sure have a way of not offending anyone...
看来这三位停云小姐还要争论一会儿，咱们插不上话。
These three Tingyun's don't look like they'll be reaching a conclusion anytime soon. We won't be able to get a word in.
So, what do you think, Sunny?
Let's try a different name, my dear friend.
显得亲切点呗，就跟这位狐人小姐的习惯一样。
Don't we sound chummier that way? I took a leaf out of this foxian girl's book.
停云女士的麻烦，和我此前的猜测一样。在经受了那场作弄后，她零落成了自身的每一个音符。
The problem with Miss Tingyun is just as I suspected before. That prank shattered her into notes that are each a part of her.
换言之，散落在这里的是「停云」的一道道面相。
In other words, it means the Tingyuns we see here are all different aspects of her psyche.
感觉你的解释反而把事情变复杂了哎……
Okaaay, you just made it sound a whole lot more complicated...
总之，在梦中这并非个例，使用「调律」或许能解决各位的困扰。
At any rate, this is a known occurrence across the Dreamscape. Tuning could be the way to fix it.
只是，这些停云女士都太我行我素了些，有哪位是能够沟通的吗？
The only problem is that these Miss Tingyuns are too caught up in their own world. Is there one we can properly speak with?
One that we can speak with...? Oh, I think there is one!
呃，不过我得试试，还能不能认出来。
But... It may take me a while to identify her.
好像还是没商量出什么来啊……
Tsk, looks like they still haven't decided on anything yet...
要我说，把那位打圆场的带走，很快就能看到结果了。
Well, if you ask me... Take the people pleaser out of the picture, and they'll arrive at a conclusion in no time at all.
你是想看她们打起来吧……
You're hoping for them to get into a fight, aren't you?
唔…啧…呼……这倒真是怪梦啊…梦着自己在大街上走了……
Nngh... Tsk... Phew... I'm... walking on the street...? What a weird dream...
这位停云小姐好像在梦游，应该不行。
This Miss Tingyun looks like she's sleepwalking. Nope, not her.
好吓人的气势！和她聊不来……
Yikes, she's scary! No, I won't be able to talk to her...
她似乎完全无法感知到其他事，只是站在那里，不断地操作着喷钞机，偶尔发出兴奋的笑声。
She seems completely oblivious to everything else, and is just standing there, continuously operating the Cash-Spewer, occasionally letting out an excited laugh.
总觉得打扰她会很危险……
Why do I feel like it's not gonna be a wise move to interrupt her...?
我就会哦？很久以前，有一个大姐姐…就带我飞到过很高很高的地方呢。
I can, I can fly! A long, long time ago, a big girl flew with me really high into the sky!
下一次，也带上你一起去，好不好？
I'll take you next time. Pinky promise?
呃…是不是该找个人陪着她？
Uh... Should we get someone to watch over her?
我反倒觉得她很安全——成年人心中的童真，往往都坚硬得很！
Nah, I think she's perfectly fine on her own. The childlike innocence that adults have is a lot more resilient than you can imagine!
就算你说得有道理，也不能套用在这里吧。
Even if that's true, it doesn't apply to her!
呀，几位莫不是来找小女子的？
Oh, were you all looking for me?
找到啦！如果我没记错，这位停云小姐的特点是……
Found her! If I remember correctly, this Miss Tingyun's trait is...
这也是停云小姐的一个侧面。
So this is also a side of Miss Tingyun.
这应该符合你口中「能够沟通」的标准吧？
She ought to meet your "one we can properly speak with" requirement, right?
这位女士，我希望能对您进行「调律」。
My lady, if I may, I wish to perform a tuning on you.
事先说好，咱们可都看着你呢，如果想拿停云小姐当人质——
Before you start, you should know we're keeping our eyes on you. If you even think about taking Miss Tingyun hostage—
得请你做好被引力撕裂的准备了。
这里三人可长着四对眼睛。
Know that there are four pairs of eyes between the three of us.
匹诺康尼最不容小觑的都在这了。
Remember, we're the most formidable people in all of Penacony.
我无意挑战各位。保险起见，由我这位朋友代劳吧——就「同谐」而言，万维克的造诣比我更为精深。
It is not my intention to provoke you. Perhaps as assurance, we can have my friend here perform the task in my stead. Wonweek has a higher mastery of the Harmony than I do.
若再不放心，在他进行「调律」时，各位也尽可对我加以控制。
If you still have concerns, you are also free to restrain me while he performs the tuning.
呃，这倒也不必…你这么坦诚，反倒给我整不会了。
Um, there's no need for that. You're acting so sincere. I'm actually surprised.
Are you alright with this, Miss Tingyun?
小女子随波逐流，哪有什么意见呢，列位决定便好。
I go as the wind blows, so you may decide for me.
失礼了。万维克，请尽你所能吧。
Then kindly forgive our intrusion. Please do your best, Wonweek.
刚才那声音，你们听到了吗？
Did any of you hear a voice just now?
停云小姐，你可算回来了！
看你个子小小的，人倒是挺厉害嘛……
You may be small, but you're pretty amazing!
It's nothing. Just a trivial matter...
真该让你自己来的。这姑娘根本没看起来那么简单……
I should have let you handle it yourself. This girl is not as ordinary as she appears...
我刚才…差点就死了一次……
黑暗在眼前沉降，如同宇宙诞生前的混沌。在一片混沌中，一个声音像造物者那般响起……
Darkness descends before the eyes, reminiscent of the chaos before the birth of the universe. Amidst this chaos, a voice emerged, resonating like that of the creator...
「无论看见什么，你只需记得一件事。」
"No matter what you see, you only need to remember one thing."
Is that... where I came from?
And where does this path lead?
维生舱搞定了，都是小问题。
The life support pod is ready. There were only minor issues.
太好了。不然，那仙舟人怕是要撑不住了。
That's great. Otherwise, that person from the Xianzhou might not be able to hold on much longer.
你们还在尝试？根本没有成功的先例，被绝灭大君「毁灭」的人真的还有救吗？
You're still trying? There's no precedent for saving someone who was destroyed by a Lord Ravager. Will it even work?
我不是她，不理解背后的逻辑，但那位天才说可以…就一定能做到。
I'm not a genius, so I don't understand the logic behind it, but if she says it's possible, then it must be.
Excuse me, could you tell me where I am?
「停云」…好熟悉的名字，是我认识的人吗？
"Tingyun"... What a familiar name. Do I know her?
「这是『毁灭』留下的伤口，已经在你体内生根，挥之不去。」
"These are wounds left by the Destruction. They have taken root within your body and cannot be removed."
请问您是谁？为何一直不愿现身？
Please, who are you? And why won't you show yourself?
「我无法来到你的面前，能做的只有等待你走完这段路。」
"I can't go to you. All I can do is wait for you to finish walking this path."
您是要我通过这里？我…要和它对抗吗？
You want me to go through here? Do I have to... fight it?
「没有必要，那太危险，你也做不到。」
"There's no need for that. It's too dangerous, and you can't do it anyway."
「不用抗争，去接纳它，试着和它共处，就像抚摸自己的疤痕。」
"Don't fight it, embrace it. Try to coexist with it. Think of it as feeling your own scars."
怎么会…为何还有这么多？
How can it be... Why are there still so many of them?
The ones from before weren't defeated either?
「我说过你消灭不了它们，没有人能做到。」
"As I said before, you can't defeat them. No one can."
「要么与『毁灭』的伤痕一同死去，坠入黑暗。」
"You can fall into the darkness and die alongside these scars of the Destruction."
「要么到这边来，重新回到世上，带着它们一起。这是二选一。」
"Or bring them with you when you return to the world here. These are your two choices."
重新回到世上？您在说什么……
Return to the world? What are you saying...?
啊…难怪那两个人对我视而不见。
Aah... No wonder those two ignored me.
我…已沦作孤魂野鬼了么？
Am I just a wandering spirit now?
那就是徘徊在生死边缘，犹如中阴之身？
So, I'm trapped between life and death, existing in a limbo?
"You can think of it that way."
…照您的意思，即便我能够醒来，这些置我于死地的创伤，也会存留此身，永不愈合？
...Based on what you said, even if I should wake up, these wounds that caused my death will remain on my body and never heal?
小女子不明白，这位恩人似乎是想救我，可为何又要告知这些？
I don't understand. You appear to be trying to save me, benefactor, but why are you telling me all this?
「算是我的习惯。对于是否要来到这个世界，我想每个人都有选择的权利。」
"It's a habit of mine. I believe everyone should have the right to choose whether they wish to return to this world or not."
就算您这么说，小女子也想不起任何事。似乎没什么能支持我作出决定。
Be that as it may, I don't remember anything. There's nothing to help me make a choice.
「无妨。我相信对『生命』的渴望，本就诞生于一无所有中。」
"That doesn't matter. I believe the desire to live was born from nothing to begin with."
「你也可以证明自己是个例外。那同样是我乐见的结果。」
"You may also prove yourself to be the exception. I would also be pleased with that result."
...How troublesome, but I suppose that's part of living.
「生存和毁灭，于你而言不再是选择，它们生长在同一条路上。」
"Survival or Destruction is no longer a choice for you. They both now grow along the same path."
「你才能够穿破黑暗，来到我的身边。」
"Will you break through the darkness and arrive at my side."
恭喜你。在一场拉锯中获得了最初的胜利，这是个好的开始。
Congratulations. You attained your very first victory in this tug of war. It's a good start.
你遭受了绝灭大君的袭击，依照常理，绝不可能活下来。
You were attacked by a Lord Ravager. By all rights, you should not have survived.
但有人不这么认为，而我恰好能满足他的要求。
But someone didn't agree with that assessment, and it just so happens I was able to fulfill his request.
因为你最为不幸，偏偏落入{RUBY_B#幻胧}那位大君{RUBY_E#}手中，肉体和精神都遭受了毁灭。
Because you were the most unfortunate. You fell into the hands of {RUBY_B#Phantylia}that Lord Ravager{RUBY_E#} who destroyed your body and spirit.
但你又是幸运的，她要将你的一切据为己有，这需要时间，你才免于在一瞬间灰飞烟灭。
Yet you were also the most fortunate. Her desire to claim everything about you for herself meant she needed time, so you were spared instant annihilation.
「死而复生」和「死里逃生」，二者只有一线之隔，却天差地别。如果你彻底死亡，我也无能为力。
There is only a fine line between resurrection and escaping death, yet they couldn't be more different. If you had truly died, I would have been powerless to do anything for you.
抱歉，现在还不能让你恢复知觉。你会因此痛不欲生。
I'm sorry. I can't let you regain your ability to feel just yet. You'd be in excruciating pain.
这副身躯被「毁灭」浸染，遭受了最严重的破坏，我说过，这种创伤会一直跟随着你。
Your body was contaminated by the Destruction and suffered severe damage. As I said before, these wounds will stay with you for the rest of your life.
为避免死灰复燃，我对你的身体——准确地说，尾巴——进行了一些微小的优化。
To prevent its resurgence, I made some minor modifications to your body — or more specifically, your tail.
学会适应它吧。幸存者的代价往往是「不幸」，这也无可奈何。
You'll have to learn to adapt to it. Unfortunately, the inescapable price of survival is often more adversity.
…无论如何，多谢您的救命之恩。
...Regardless, I'm grateful to you for saving my life.
不必道谢，这只是一场交易。
There's no need for that. This was merely a transaction.
如此一来，我和那位行商便两清了。
With this, the debt between the traveling merchant and me is clear.
不用在意。接着睡一会儿吧，等你醒来便会忘记这些细节。
Don't worry about it. You should sleep for a little longer. By the time you wake up, you won't remember any of these details.
我会委托别人送你回去…这么说来，倒是有群可靠的朋友，和你颇有渊源。
I'll arrange for someone to send you home... which reminds me, you seem to have some dependable friends with close ties to you.
不妨就跟着他们走吧。多听些过去的事，对康复也有好处。
You should go with them. It can only help with your recovery to hear more about your past.
莫非…这已不是第一次了吗？
Could it be that... this isn't the first time?
她…想带我去什么地方吗？
Does she want to lead me somewhere...?
It's you again. Who's talking to me?
「别担心，我说过你并非独自一人。」
"Don't worry. As I said before, you're not alone."
这条路好暗。可不知为何，越往前走，心里就越平静……
This path is so dark, yet it's strange, the farther I walk... the more at peace I feel...
It's okay. You didn't end up in Dreamflux Reef.
We were just about to make a memorial portrait of you.
A little quick to the draw, aren't you?
「调律」竟反过来影响了万维克，这位女士不简单啊。
The tuning rebounded and affected Wonweek instead. This is no ordinary woman.
事到如今，也不必向你隐瞒。
I suppose there's no point in hiding it from you anymore.
停云小姐本是仙舟人，此前不幸遭遇绝灭大君，被对方窃夺了身份，濒临死境。虽然逃得生天，却身受重伤，依照常理不可能恢复。

Miss Tingyun is originally from the Xianzhou. She had an unfortunate encounter with a Lord Ravager, who robbed her of her identity and left her on the verge of death. While she miraculously escaped with her life, her body suffered terrible injuries, beyond all power to heal.
但在此时却出现了变量吗？
But something happened to change that outcome?
嗯，一位天才介入了此事。她在生命领域颇有建树，为停云小姐换得了一线生机。
Yes, a genius got involved. She's very accomplished in the field of life sciences and managed to grant Miss Tingyun a shot at survival.
后来，列车受她委托，护送停云小姐回乡。途中在匹诺康尼停泊，也有部分静养的意图。
After that, she asked the Express to escort Miss Tingyun back home. We made a stop at Penacony along the way, partly to allow her some time to convalesce.
实在抱歉，小女子本以为躲进梦里便不会波及他人，不曾想意外是一桩接着一桩。
I'm so sorry. I thought no one would be affected if I hid inside a dream. I didn't expect so many mishaps to happen.
波及没事，别是伤及就行。喂，能不能给我口喝的？感觉自己像是睡了十年。
That's alright, so long as nobody was hurt. Can I get something to drink? I feel like I've been asleep for ten years.
也好，方才的骚乱引起了不少注意。我们换个地方说话吧。
That's fine. We should find another place to talk anyway. We drew some attention with that commotion earlier.
商业模式倒是颇有意思……
The business model is quite interesting...
回了仙舟，商团也寻个代言可好？
Perhaps a merchant guild representative can be found upon returning to the Xianzhou?
这当真是我自己支的摊子…？
Did I really make this stall?
Who can I sell this to?
人还当真是到了也不自知……
Didn't even truly realize that one was here...
若是自幼习武，莫非便能……
If you have been refined since birth, perhaps you could...
Take this apart piece by piece...
恩公为何偏偏对此情有独钟……
Why do you have such a fondness for this, benefactor...?
除却那位将军或许喜欢……
Aside from the fact that the general might like it...
放在仙舟怕是没什么销路……
Placing this on the Xianzhou won't net any sales...
They say this item can peer into dreams...
Not sure if I have the right person or not?
果然，调律自身是最为棘手的事。
As expected, the trickiest thing is tuning yourself.
这道不协和音，实在太刺耳了。
These dissonant sounds are much too harsh.
旧日的回声，你们不必消去。
Echoes of the past, you need not fade away.
The time has come. Let it be revealed...
又是苏乐达，我可是本地人啊……
SoulGlad again... I'm a local, you know.
总之，感谢二位出手相助。
In any case, I must thank the both of you for your assistance.
只是举手之劳。既然停云女士的问题已经解决，接下来是随你们去见另两位同伴么？
It was nothing. Now that the matter with Miss Tingyun is resolved, are we meeting your other two companions next?
不用了。万维克先生状况不佳，我们先去完成你的告别之行。
There's no need for that. Mr. Wonweek is in poor condition, so let's wrap up your farewells first.
停云小姐的事就拜托你们了。
I'll leave Miss Tingyun in your hands.
啊？杨叔…仙舟使者就快到了，你不去吗？
Huh? But Mr. Yang, the messenger from the Xianzhou is almost here. You're not coming with us?
交给你们，我放心。而且姬子也在，任何拿不准的她来定夺就好。
I trust that you can handle it. Besides, Himeko will be there. She'll be able to handle any decisions should you run into any difficulties.
好吧。那咱们得抓紧时间啦。
Where are you planning to go next?
可否给我一些思考的时间？
Could you give me some time to think about it?
What are we doing here again?
怎么这就忘了呀！停云小姐要回联盟了，咱们是来替她挑伴手礼的。
Did you forget already? Miss Tingyun is going back to the Alliance, so we're here to help her pick out souvenirs.
小女子人生地不熟，担心被黑心商贾下了套，恰好送礼对象都是各位熟悉的仙舟朋友。得劳烦二位大股东多提点意见啦。

I'm not too familiar with this planet. I'm worried an unscrupulous cutthroat merchant will try to take advantage of me. Luckily, the people I want to buy these gifts for are friends you already know on the Xianzhou, so I'll be counting on both your stakeholder intuitions for recommendations!
哪有商人能给你下套啊……
As if a merchant could seriously take advantage of you...
Welcome! How can I help you?
这位老板好，小女子初来乍到，想为故乡的朋友带点梦境特产，两位本地通点名推荐了这儿，咱就来看看。

Hello there! It's my first time visiting the Dreamscape, so I wanted to buy some local specialties as souvenirs for my friends back home. My two friends here are more familiar with the Dreamscape and recommended your shop, so I'm here to take a look.
哎呀，客人您真会说话，来——随便瞧。
Why, you really know how to flatter! Go ahead — browse all you like.
第一位是太卜司的符玄大人，您看挑些什么合适？
First, we have Lady Fu Xuan of the Divination Commission. What do you think best suits her?
符玄大人还有这种雅兴？看来小女子睡去的这段时日，仙舟真是变了。
Lady Fu Xuan has such refined taste? The Xianzhou really has changed a lot in the time I've been asleep.
呃…是因为能给第三只眼睛用吗？
Uhm, did you pick that because of her third eye?
细致入微，妙趣横生，想来是件周到又新奇的礼物，就依您的主意。
A meticulously thought out and interesting suggestion. It'll make for a novel gift. Let's go with that.
呃…你能想象她开车的样子吗？
Um, can you picture her driving?
It looks cool, but it's probably not a good idea.
That's not your decision to make!
这倒是小女子梦寐以求的珍宝，但将军毕竟身居高位，收不得这个。
That's the kind of treasure I've always yearned for, but the general's position won't allow him to accept such a gift.
「想了解盛会之星的历史，就去克劳克影视乐园」——嗯，将军会喜欢这份礼物的。
"Come to Clock Studios Theme Park to learn more about the history of the Planet of Festivities!" I think the general will like this gift.
Send him a division of elite fighters.
如今联盟有列位相助，胜过五十支奇兵，再送就边际效应啦。
Now that the Alliance has all of you there to help them, sending any elite fighters more would just be overkill.
最后一位…丹鼎司的白露大人，她喜好热闹。
Finally, we have Lady Bailu of the Alchemy Commission. She loves excitement.
好主意。虽然随处可见，但终归是匹诺康尼的名产，带些回去正合适。
That's a good idea. It might be commonplace, but it's still the specialty of Penacony. It would make for an ideal gift to bring home.
看您仪表堂堂，内心倒可爱得像个孩子。是白露大人会喜欢的装饰，就依您的主意啦。
You carry yourself with such dignity and grace, but you still have the heart of a child. Lady Bailu loves these types of accessories. Let's go with your suggestion.
又是角又是翅膀…要素太多了吧。
Both wings and horns? That's a little much, don't you think?
这便齐啦，劳烦您为我装起来吧。
That's all of them. Please wrap them up for me.
有二位相助，比预想中更顺利呢，算算时间，竟还剩下了些。
Thanks to both your help, everything went smoother than I expected. And it looks like we still have some time to spare.
要不咱们再去梦境贩售店看看？虽然外头也有忆泡，但匹诺康尼的梦泡可不一般，就算不送人，拿来留作纪念也很合适。

Why don't we pay another visit to the Dreamscape Sales Store? You can find memory bubbles pretty much anywhere, but Penacony's dream bubbles are extraordinary. Even if we don't get them as gifts, we can keep them as souvenirs for ourselves.
留给自己的纪念物么…的确有必要呢。
A souvenir for myself? That's definitely an idea I can get behind.
不过停云还有一事心愿未了。既然已是最后一站，可否借一步说话，找个僻静的角落和二位谈些私事？
But there's one more thing I wish to do. Since this is our last stop, could I have a word with you two in private? Perhaps somewhere more secluded. I'd like to discuss a personal matter.
小女子与各位同行多日，倍受关照，感激不尽。
You've looked out for me during our travels together these past few days. I'm truly grateful and can't thank you enough.
只是有些事仍难以忘怀，觉得分别前，心里话还是说开了为好。
But there are some things I find difficult to forget. I feel it's only right that I tell you what's on my mind before we part ways.
二位可还记得最初遇见小女子的情境？
Do you two still remember what it was like when you first saw me?
怎么可能忘得了？{NICKNAME}被吓得定在原地，直喊着什么——
How could we forget? {NICKNAME} was so shocked, {M#he}{F#she} was frozen in place when {M#he}{F#she} shouted...
也正因如此，与列位同行的日子，小女子心头总有种别样的滋味。
And that's precisely why I haven't been able to shake off this strange feeling in the days since I started traveling with you.
虽然嘴上说着「敢请教二位尊姓大名」，可心里总忍不住想，这「初次见面」的景象，对于各位恐怕是「久别重逢」。
When I asked for your names, I couldn't help but think that this "first encounter" was actually a "long-awaited reunion" for you.
列位的仙舟之行，小女子也听了七七八八，不得不感叹那幻胧伪装之精妙，恰如世上的另一个我，骗过了所有人。
I've heard about what happened to you on the Xianzhou, and I've got to admit, that Phantylia's disguise was so perfect, it was like another me tricking everyone.
是啊，我们甚至都分不清停云小姐是何时被幻胧取代的。
Yeah, we couldn't even tell when you were replaced by Phantylia.
还以为是追捕卡芙卡那会儿，停云小姐消失了一阵，再出现时被掉包的。
I figured it happened when we were after Kafka. You vanished for a while, I thought you must have come back as a double.
But it was much earlier than that.
每每想到这里，便会感到些许落寞，仿佛小女子的人生被切走了一部分，偏偏自己还被排除在外。
That thought has filled me with sorrow, as if a piece of my life had been stolen away, and I had no part in it.
这同样也是我的困惑之处。幻胧是如何扮作停云的模样，我毕竟未曾亲见。
That's what I've been puzzled about too. I never actually saw how Phantylia managed to disguise herself as me.
依二位的意思，那时的「停云」看上去是哪般模样？
What was your impression of that "Tingyun," if you recall?
这怕是狐人天性，谁都知道神秘是吸引人的窍门喔。
That's just the nature of the foxians. It's widely known that mystery is the key to our allure.
小女子明明手无缚鸡之力，莫非说的是心思活络？
But I'm not very strong physically. Are you referring to my quick wits?
这点倒没错呢，但小女子向来只算计事，从不算计人。
That part is true. I'm always calculating when it comes to business, but never with people.
那看上去，又像是何许人？
So, what did she seem like to you?
哎呀，小女子就当这是夸赞吧，下回您不妨说是「八面玲珑」。
I'll just assume that's a compliment! Maybe next time, you could just say "silver-tongued."
A potential Emanator of the Destruction.
这…算是恭维？怕是有些担待不起啊。
Is that... a compliment? I'm not sure if I'm deserving of that title.
这是大实话，连我都很想学呢。
That's true! I'd love to learn how you do it!
现在不是开这种玩笑的时候啦……
Now's not the time for those kinds of jokes...
三月七说你好会差遣人。
在两位看来，小女子与记忆中的那人…称得上别无二致吗？
In your eyes, am I just like the Tingyun you remember?
等等——这说法是不是有点怪？明明停云小姐才是本尊，为什么要和冒牌货比较？
Wait — don't you find that question a bit weird? You're the real Tingyun. Why compare yourself to an imposter?
三月小姐怕是误会了，小女子只是觉着有些惋惜，又有些庆幸。
Miss March, you might have the wrong idea. I'm just feeling a mix of regret and relief.
做生意的总要消息灵通些，小女子在返航前，必然会知晓罗浮近况。
As a merchant, staying well-informed is crucial. It's only natural for me to stay updated on the events of the Luofu before I return.
若回到当初，仓促来去，想必也帮不上什么忙。我应当会暂缓行程，在外寻求盟友的帮助，可如此一来……
If I had rushed in and out back then, I wouldn't have been much help. Instead, I would've postponed the trip and sought assistance from allies, but in that case...
我们岂不是根本就不会相见？
听二位描述，那绝灭大君果真本领非凡，所作所为都和小女子本人如出一辙。说是伪装，更像是代我活过了几日。
Based on your description, that Lord Ravager was indeed cunning. Her demeanor mirrored mine so closely that it felt like she was living my life for a few days rather than merely disguising herself.
各位的仙舟之旅，小女子遗憾错失。可后续种种展开，除却阴谋的部分，却又与我本人在场不差分毫。停云因此看见了一种可能……

I regret missing out on your Xianzhou journey, but everything that unfolded afterward, aside from the scheming, played out exactly as if I'd been there. This leads me to consider another possibility...
那幻胧夺走了我的人生，狐人睚眦必报，绝不吃亏，小女子一定得从她手里拿回些什么才是。
Phantylia had stolen a piece of my life, and a foxian always gets even. I will not be taken advantage of. I must take something back from her as well.
但思来想去，可称得上等价之物的…也只有「和各位的缘分」了。
But after thinking it over, the only thing that could be considered equal value... is the bond I have with all of you.
想到这里，小女子才释然了许多，也总算明白了该如何向二位开口。
That thought has brought me great comfort, and now I know how to speak to you properly.
各位恩人与我素未谋面，却助我于水火之中，此情此景，与那时有何不同？小女子本该以礼相待，却因忌惮那幻胧，反变得不像自己了。
We've never even met before, yet here you are, offering your help, just as before. I should've treated you with respect, but fear of Phantylia made me act like somebody else.
而现在，停云便要将失去的都拿回来，就从一个理所应当的称呼开始——
And now, I will reclaim everything I have lost. And it should begin with a proper acknowledgment—
各位恩公，停云向你们郑重道谢。
Dear benefactors, I extend my heartfelt gratitude to you.
It's time to rethink how you see yourself.
看来是个不错的开头嘛。今后，小女子还会做出更多类似的尝试。
Looks like we're off to a good start! Moving forward, I'll definitely be trying more things like this from now on.
届时，列位恩公便是停云心间的勇气呢。
And you, my dear benefactors, will be my source of courage.
太夸张啦，停云小姐可千万别做危险的决定，{M#他}{F#她}担不起！
Miss Tingyun, that's way too over the top. Just don't make any risky decisions. It might overwhelm {M#him}{F#her}!
这些都是后话了。只愿从今以后，留在恩公们记忆里的是「停云」，而不再是「幻胧」啦。
Haha, we'll see. I just hope the Tingyun in your memories won't be tainted by Phantylia anymore.
小女子说完了，希望没有耽误太多时间，我们接着上路吧。
Alright. No more questions. I hope I didn't take up too much of your time. Let's continue on our way.
欢迎光临梦境贩售店，爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
Welcome to the Dreamscape Sales Store! Dr. Edward at your service!
我们来买几个梦送人。要有异域风情，最好还能让人意犹未尽。
We're looking for some dreams to give as gifts — something exotic and, preferably, captivating.
我有必要提醒一下——过多的要求不能帮您筛选作品，只会提前破坏您的心情。
Just a friendly reminder: Being too picky won't help you find the best dreams. It'll just dampen your spirits ahead of time.
不过，总有运气特别好的顾客。前不久，我刚收到一枚完美符合条件的梦泡。
That being said, there are always some lucky exceptions. Not long ago, I procured a dream bubble that sounds perfect for you.
故事发生在仙舟联盟，一位年少成名的剑客欲摘得剑首之名，而他刚满百岁的狐人师妹却在此时令他陷入了两难之境……
The story unfolds in the Xianzhou Alliance, where a young sword master strives to become the Sword Champion. However, his junior foxian soror who's just turned a hundred, puts him in a tough spot...
怎么有点耳熟又有点陌生……
Why does that sound oddly familiar...
毕竟是要带回仙舟，还是挑些和联盟无关的吧。您随意选几个便好。
Since I'm returning to the Xianzhou, I think it's better to choose something unrelated to the Alliance. Feel free to pick a few for me.
爱德华医生最喜欢您这种…嗯，淡然自若的客人。
I love customers like you... So easy to work with.
So easy to take advantage of, you mean?
可不许挑那种很奇怪的啊。
Just don't pick anything weird, okay?
对啦，提及梦境，我也有一份薄礼想赠予恩公。
Oh, speaking of dreamscapes, I have a gift for you, my benefactors.
连日叨扰，眼看着将要分别，总不能毫无表示。小女子为列位恩公留下一枚梦泡，希望能拿得出手。
After troubling you all this time, I couldn't leave without properly expressing my thanks. Here's a dream bubble for you — I hope you enjoy it.
Wow, that's really nice of you!
这是为您准备的梦泡，请收好。期待您下次光临。
Here are the dream bubbles I've prepared for you. Thank you for your business!
那么，事情总算办妥了。算算时间，也该回去了？
Well, it looks like everything's finally in order. I suppose it's time to head back?
欢迎，您想体验一个什么滋味的梦境？
Welcome! What kind of dreamscape would you like to experience today?
Look at the dream gifted by Tingyun.
你将停云赠予的梦泡交给了对方。
You handed over the dream bubble gifted by Tingyun.
喔…这可真是场精彩的梦，波澜起伏，要素齐全。这位客人，我愿意高价回收，您可以考虑下。
Oh... this is quite the dream—full of twists and turns, with all the right elements. I'd be willing to buy it back at a high price. Think about it.
I'll let you know after I've seen it.
如往常那般，梦泡顺畅地向你让渡着纷繁的情境——
As usual, the dream bubble smoothly presents you with a myriad of scenes—
然而，这场梦你却非常熟悉，那几乎就是你曾经历过的罗浮之行。
However, you're very familiar with this dream. It's almost the same as your travels on the Luofu.
唯一的区别是，与你同行的狐人女子停云，从未遭遇绝灭大君，而是以自己的意志，协助你解决了那场危机。
The only difference is that the foxian lady, Tingyun, who was travelling with you, never encountered the Lord Ravager. Instead, she helped you solve that crisis of her own free will.
你拥有一份类似的记忆。
但你还是决定留下这场梦。
But you decide to keep this dream.
先前已经看了一批礼物，只剩下三位没有着落。不过方才耽搁了不少时间，怕是不能再慢悠悠地晃荡啦……
I already picked up a few gifts earlier, so that means there's only three more left to go. But we've already lost a lot of time, so we'd better not drag our feet...
要送停云小姐回去了…有点舍不得啊。
I can't believe it's time for Miss Tingyun to leave. I'm not ready to say goodbye just yet.
嗯，遇上点事，耽搁了一会儿。具体…还是等杨叔回来解释吧。
Yeah, we got delayed on the way. Mr. Yang will explain in detail when he gets back.
Has the messenger from the Xianzhou arrived yet?
嗯，已经聊过一会儿了，正巧是你们的熟人。
Yes, we've been chatting for a while. Turns out, she's an old acquaintance of yours.
其实我反复设想过现在的情景。
I've imagined this moment many times.
担心自己会在众目睽睽下失态，甚至想清楚了要说的每一句话。
I was worried I might embarrass myself in front of you. I even rehearsed every word beforehand.
But now it seems it was unnecessary.
Tingyun, I'm here to take you home.
我们应当暂且回避下。两位久别重逢，先好好聊聊吧。
You two must have a lot to catch up on after being apart for so long. We'll give you some space.
没想到来的是驭空大人，真叫人又惊又喜……
Madam Yukong, I wasn't expecting it to be you. What a wonderful surprise!
是我主动要求的，毕竟…回来的人是你。
I wanted to come because... after all, it's you who's coming home.
你的身体…往后的日子会很辛苦吧？
Your body... It's going to be tough from now on, isn't it?
都在鬼门关走过一遭了，还有什么可挑剔的呢？
I've already escaped death once. What more could I ask for?
也不全是坏处，现在和驭空大人掰掰腕子，兴许赢的会是我？
Also, it's not all bad. I might even beat you at arm wrestling now.
你还是和过去一样坦然。
You're still the same — carefree as always.
我想说的话有很多，但都留到路上吧。回罗浮路途遥远，我们有的是时间。
I have a lot I'd like to tell you, but I'll save it for the road. It's a long journey back to the Luofu.
就算无法根除，缓解病症的法子…仙舟一定拿得出手。
Even if we can't completely rid you of the pain, there must be ways to alleviate it on the Xianzhou.
这我从不怀疑，只是…既无旁人，停云便多问一句。
I have no doubt. But... since we're alone here, may I ask you one more thing?
...Do I really have to go back to the Luofu?
幻胧处事心狠手辣，可最该被除掉的我却活了下来，阮•梅大人与仙舟素无干系，又为何要对小女子出手相救？
Despite Phantylia's ruthlessness, she spared me when I should have been eliminated. And why did Miss Ruan Mei, who has no ties to the Xianzhou, go out of her way to save me?
想来是停云在不知不觉间成了他人对弈的棋子吧。
It seems as if I've become a pawn in someone else's game.
…联盟内部也有人这么认为，嫌疑人如今正在「玉阙」。
...There are people within the Alliance who also believe that the suspect is now on the Yuque.
如此这般，停云实在不该重返罗浮，为局势平添混乱。不妨顺水推舟，物尽其用？
If that's the case, it's all the more reason for me not to return to the Luofu and complicate things. I might as well take advantage of this situation.
Take advantage of the situation? What do you mean?
如今{RUBY_B#毁灭}烬灭{RUBY_E#}的烙印在我体内维持着微妙的平衡，并且…它们是由幻胧亲手所造。
Right now, the marks of {RUBY_B#Destruction}Ruin{RUBY_E#} inside me maintain a delicate balance. Moreover... they were created by Phantylia herself.
如果可以，希望驭空大人将此事上呈将军，送我觐见元帅——这副身躯，也许能帮助联盟向着仙舟的敌人更近一步。
If possible, please inform the general and arrange for me to meet with the marshal. Maybe this body of mine can help the Alliance get one step closer to the Xianzhou's enemies.
此前阮•梅只身造访罗浮，也提到了你的事，与星穹列车发来消息几乎是同一时间。
When Ruan Mei visited the Luofu earlier, she mentioned what happened to you. This coincided with when the message sent by the Astral Express arrived.
天将们判断，你的生还不在幻胧计划之内，若运用得当，必能作为一支奇兵，帮联盟取回先机。
The Arbiter-Generals concluded that Phantylia did not intend for you to survive. If utilized strategically, this could give the Alliance an element of surprise.
但如此一来，必须对内隐瞒你「死而复生」的消息。我实在希望做决定前，能听听你自己的想法。若你想要回家……
If we follow this plan, we must keep your "resurrection" hidden. But before making any decisions, I want to know what you think. If you wish to go home...
I'll support you, no matter what others may say.
还好，停云也算替您省了些力排众议的口舌。
Then I'm glad. I shall save you the trouble of hearing what those people may say.
前路凶险，你若打定主意要走，我自然没道理阻止。但…许是我私心过甚吧，我仍希望能清楚地知道，你的选择是否出于本心？
The road ahead is perilous. If you decide to take it, I won't stop you. Maybe I'm being selfish, but I still want to know — are you choosing this because it's what you really want?
俗话说因祸得福，恰恰是这趟美梦之旅让停云看清了自己。
I've come to see myself clearly in this dream journey. Perhaps it's what people call a blessing in disguise.
而此时此刻，也有一桩旁证能为驭空大人展现我的本心。
There is someone who can attest to my true intentions.
请跟我来，想必就在这附近。
Please follow me. She should be around here somewhere.
此前，因为一场奇遇，我在梦中碎成了许多个「停云」。她们都是我的一部分，专注于不同的记忆。
After a strange encounter, I was fragmented into multiple "Tingyuns," each embodying a different aspect of my memories.
而其中一位，当时她走得太过遥远，以致未能回顾此身，直到现在。
And one of them hasn't returned to me because she ventured too far. Until now.
她正沉醉于某件令我无比迷恋的事物。
She is captivated by something that has deeply mesmerized me.
作为一道心绪，她和新生的孩子没有区别。登上这艘船，仅仅是出于内心的悸动。
As a fleeting emotion, she's no different from a newborn. Her boarding this ship was solely down to her inner impulse.
驭空大人，还记得么？也许对您而言，那只是一次平平无奇的飞行。可对于某个孩子……
Madam Yukong, do you remember? Perhaps that was just an ordinary flight for you. But for a certain child...
那是她与「天空」的初次邂逅。
That was her first experience with the "sky."
那时，你还是能被我抱在怀里的年纪。
Back then, you were still young enough for me to carry.
现在也未尝不可，您试试无妨。
You probably still can! Want to give it a try?
I'm afraid you'd be too heavy for me now.
回想起来，那会儿你总缠着我要上一次星槎看看，还把飞行士当作自己毕生的理想。可真正飞上高空后，却又惊慌失措，紧紧抓着旁人的衣角不放。
I remember you kept begging me to take you to the starskiff and even dreamed of becoming a pilot. But once you were airborne, you were so nervous that you clung to others for dear life.
可正是那次飞行，撬动了我的一生。
This flight was a turning point in my life.
彼时，眼见天地铺开，不见边际，我深深为此着迷，不是因为站在高处，而是意识到了一件事——
The boundless cosmos unfolded before me. I was completely mesmerized, not just by the view, but by a realization—
在这世上，我们还能走得更远。
In this world, there are paths beyond waiting for us to explore.
因此，即便没有驾驶星槎的天分，性格也不好争斗，小女子仍选择随商团四处奔走。
Even though I lacked the talent to pilot the starskiff and wasn't much of a warrior, I still chose to travel around with the merchant guild.
时至今日，这份雀跃也依然在心中鼓动。
Even to this day, this thrill still courses through me.
如今，停云也能再次启程，以一介「忘归之人」的身份，行向更远的天际了。
Now, I can embark once more on my journey as a "Traveler of No Return," exploring the paths that lie beyond.
话虽如此，「鸣火」那边还好吗？
Speaking of which, how are things with the Whistling Flames?
我暂交给岩明代为打理了。你也了解他的为人，不必担心。只是此人办事作风总有些激进，恐怕不太符合你一贯的行商原则。
I've left Yanming in charge for now. He's reliable, but he can be a bit extreme, and might not always follow your principles as a traveling merchant.
「舍其所争、取其所弃，方能交流天下、得我所欲」——八面玲珑这点，我今后也不会改变。
"Forsake what others fight for and take what others abandon. That's the way to navigate the world and achieve my goals." I will continue to uphold my principles.
但如今，停云同样明白，行商的法则能与人博弈，却难与神相争。
But now, I've also learned that while these merchant principles may apply to humans, they falter in the face of the gods.
这原本就不是你该承担的责任。你只是这场战争里一个无辜的幸存者。
But this shouldn't fall on your shoulders to begin with. You are simply an innocent survivor in this war.
驭空大人…不也当过战争的「幸存者」吗？
Madam Yukong, you were once a "survivor" in the war too, weren't you?
朦胧的梦中，好似有人对我说过：幸存者的名字往往是「不幸」，可是……
In a hazy dream, I vaguely remember someone telling me that the inescapable price of survival is often more adversity, but...
驭空大人，天上煌煌众神以人为弈，博戏群星，留下一地冤魂孤冢、白骨累累…您可曾想过，要让祂们付出代价？
Madam Yukong, the gods use humans as pawns in their cosmic game, sacrificing countless innocent souls... Have you ever thought about making THEM pay?
…每时每刻。可如我们这样的微尘又怎么逃得开成为代价的棋局呢？
...Every moment of every day. But as inconsequential as we are, how can we escape the fate of being mere pawns?
如果可以选择，我真不愿你做什么棋子。我只愿你仍是那快活的小狐狸，不必掺和进这场战争中……
If I could choose, I would never want you to become a pawn. I just wish you could still be that carefree little fox, not caught up in this war...
别那么悲观嘛，驭空大人。
承蒙大君「厚爱」，这回停云做得了局中人。
Thanks to the "favor" of the Lord Ravager, I've become a player in this game.
要知道，策杖独行、蚯蚓降龙…能让将帅无计可施的，总是些无名的小卒子。
Remember, it's often the unassuming pawns — the lone traveler or the worm that subdues the dragon — that leave even the best strategists helpless.
所以如今，停云也要当一粒狡猾的灰尘，让那些幕后大手……
So now, I'll become a cunning speck of dust and make those masterminds behind the curtains...
同一时间 筑梦边境
Is this place also affected by the Order?
不，这一站只是为了告别。我中途改变了某个决定，此行变数太多……
No, I'm just here to bid farewell. I changed my mind along the way. This journey has too many variables...
So it shouldn't matter if we add another.
How did you know she would be here?
我不知道，只是心里有几个猜想，碰碰运气。看来我也有交好运的时候。
I didn't. I had a hunch and decided to try my luck. It seems I can be lucky sometimes.
把这种事交给运气，不像你的作为。
It's not like you to leave things to luck.
我想旁人应该回避这种场合。去吧。
I don't think you need a bystander in this scenario. Go on ahead.
You're not worried I'll take the opportunity to escape?
我相信你是个有能力，也有意愿利用一切的人，但那其中绝不包含知更鸟小姐。
I believe you're the kind of person that has the ability and desire to use everything to your advantage... but that "everything" does not include Miss Robin.
让他留下吧，不会碍事的。
Let him stay. He won't be in the way.
况且，我也需要万维克在场。无论如何，她都不应该和一名逃犯有接触。
I actually need Wonweek to be there. She shouldn't be seen talking to a fugitive no matter the circumstances.
你…不打算在她面前亮明真身？
You... don't intend to reveal your true identity to her?
一场道别未必需要双方都知晓。
Both parties don't have to be aware that this is a farewell.
…她不该为我的私心承担任何风险。
...I shouldn't put her at risk for my selfishness.
走吧。如果我不能迈出这一步…启程也无从谈起。
Let's go. Our journey can't begin if I can't take this first step.
没想到会在这儿遇见您，知更鸟…女士。
I didn't expect to see you here, Miss Robin.
您好啊，女士。请问怎么称呼？
It's nice to meet you, Miss. May I know your name?
我叫…万维克，是隐夜鸫家系的成员。
My name is... Wonweek. I'm a member of the Nightingale Family.
原来是一位筑梦师，感谢你们的辛苦付出，梦境才能从危机中恢复过来。
Oh, you're a Dreamweaver. Thank you for all your hard work. You all are the reason the Dreamscape has been able to recover from this crisis.
知更鸟女士才是，这阵子一定很忙吧，怎么会来筑梦边境呢？
You're too kind, Miss Robin. You must be very busy. What brings you here to Dream's Edge?
忙里偷闲，想找个安静的地方散心，最好能看见星星。走着走着就到了这里。
I'm taking a break. I wanted to find a quiet place to relax, ideally somewhere where I could see the stars. Before I knew it, I'd walked all the way here.
虽然只是梦中的星空呢。
I know these stars only exist in the dream but...
关于这一点，也许梦境和现实没有区别。
Well, perhaps the dreamscape is not so different from reality.
「我们抬头看向夜空，但星星不在那里。我们看到的每一束光，都是它们很久以前的模样。」
"When we look up into the night sky, the stars aren't really there. The glimmering lights we see are merely the images of stars from long ago."
我们何曾见过真实的星空？
So, have we ever truly seen a real sky full of stars?
万维克小姐说话很有哲理呢，像是我认识的一个人。
You're very philosophical, Miss Wonweek. You remind me of someone I know.
没有没有。今天是休息日，待会儿有场演出，我提前来找个好位置。
No, no. Today is my rest day. There's going to be a show later, so I came early to find a good seat.
在更远的地方，据说是一出谢幕剧，比起现场观看，更适合在远处聆听。
It's somewhere farther away. They say it's a farewell performance, the kind that's better to listen to from afar than watch it performed live.
这样啊，那瞭望台是个不错的选择。从这儿望去，能看见整个匹诺康尼。
I see. In that case, the observation deck is a good choice. You can see all of Penacony from here.
距离会让一些事物变得更美丽。
Distance can make some things appear more beautiful.
知更鸟女士，演出开场前，我能留下来和您一同看星星吗？
Miss Robin, may I stay here with you to gaze at the stars, before the show begins?
当然啦。您太客气了，该请求的是我才对。这里是筑梦边境，造梦者才是它的主人。
Of course! You don't have to be so courteous. I should be the one asking. This is Dream's Edge, after all, and the Dreamweavers are its true masters.
话虽如此，这些星星有些陌生，没有一颗是熟悉的。让人感到不安。
Still, these stars are unfamiliar to me. I don't recognize any of them, and it makes me feel uneasy.
是什么让您不安呢？是天空的高远吗，还是未知？
What makes you feel this way? Is it because the sky is so far away, or because it's the unknown?
尽管星核之灾没有造成实际影响，但还是有许多住客选择退房，酒店冷清了许多。不知匹诺康尼的明天会如何，希望不会影响知更鸟女士的生活。

The Stellaron Disaster may not have had any real consequences, but many guests still chose to check out. Now, the hotel feels quieter than before. It makes me wonder what Penacony's future will be like. I just hope it will not negatively affect you, Miss Robin.
谢谢，我没事啦。阴差阳错，在这场灾难中看见了许多过去，也想清了很多未来。
You're too kind. I'll be fine. The disaster was unexpected, but because of it, I was able to witness many pasts and think about many futures.
唯一称得上遗憾的，只是有些话没来得及说出口。
My only real regret is that I left some things unsaid.
是谈话的对象离去了么？
Did the person you wanted to say them to leave?
嗯，他走得匆忙，甚至没来得及说声再见。
Yes. He left in such a hurry that I didn't even get the chance to say goodbye.
真心不需要太多修饰，也许你的心意已经传达到了。
Sometimes what's in your heart doesn't need to be dressed up in words. Maybe he already knows what you wanted to say.
但想要鼓励一个人的时候，还是得多花些心思才对吧？
But don't you think we should put in some effort when we want to encourage someone?
冒昧问一句，您想要鼓励的人…是谁呢？
If you don't mind me asking, who is it that you wish to encourage?
是一位刚刚经历失败，将要踏上远行的人。
It's someone who experienced failure recently and is about to embark on a long journey.
这样的人在匹诺康尼有许多。对逐梦客而言，失败就像是夕阳，每天都会到来。
There are many such people on Penacony. Failure is like the setting sun to a Dreamchaser. It's something that happens every day.
相信以他们的毅力，只需要知更鸟女士一个微笑，就能重新来过吧。
I believe they all have the willpower to start anew, especially after receiving a smile from you, Miss Robin.
但那个人不一样，他比普通人坚强许多，人们因此产生了一种错觉：即便他倒下了，也会比别人更快站起来。
But he's different. He's stronger than most ordinary people, but because of it, people have this misconception: They think that when he falls, he will stand back up faster than anyone else.
你想说，事实并非如此吗？
Are you saying that's not true?
他不会。在站起来前…他会犹豫这是否正确，并为此苦恼很久。
It's not. Because before he stands up again, he will hesitate and agonize for ages over whether that is the right course of action.
对于这类人，也许失败不失为一桩好事。反省是种可贵的品质。
Failure may be a good thing for someone like that. Being able to reflect on one's actions is a valuable quality to have.
可能是这样没错，但我还是希望那个人不要变。
You may be right, but I still hope that he'll never change.
因为我相信自己记忆中的他。
Because I have faith in the person I remember him to be.
在那场失败中，他或许采用了错误的手段，但我不觉得他抱有错误的初衷。我们曾站在同一个起点，现在轮到他飞向群星了。我相信他能找到正确的路，即便孤身一人。

He may have taken the wrong approach when he failed, but I don't think he had the wrong intentions. We once stood together at the same starting line, but now it's his turn to fly for the stars. I believe he'll find the right path, even if he has to do it alone.
我们不必一起飞上天际。
We don't have to soar into the sky together.
因为重逢一定会到来，就在那高高的云端上。
Because I know we'll reunite one day, up there in the clouds.
万维克女士，能请您帮个忙吗？这里有一幅画，在离开前，我想完成它。
Miss Wonweek, may I ask a favor? There's a jigsaw here I'd like to finish before I leave.
如果有筑梦师帮忙，也许就能补上空缺的部分了。
If I have a Dreamweaver's help, maybe I'll be able to fill in the missing pieces.
筑梦拼图么？我尽力而为。
A Dream Jigsaw? I see. I'll do my best.
没关系，找不到的话，就当是一起散步吧。
Don't worry if you can't find them. Just think of it as us taking a walk together.
看来今天，我们都受好运眷顾。
It seems we've been blessed with good fortune today.
一张字迹潦草的纸条被留在这里。
A scrawled note was left here.
或许是其他筑梦师留下的吧。是这个行业的一种习惯，他们希望用祝福来为梦境奠基。
Another Dreamweaver probably left this behind. It's a habit for this profession. They hope to use these blessings as a foundation for the Dreamscape.
啊！知更鸟女士！我是您的粉丝啊！
Oh, Miss Robin! I'm a big fan!
虽然不是每场演唱会都能到场，但至少也会把录像看一遍。我喜欢您的每一首歌——真想把这件事告诉全世界！
I don't get to attend every single one of your concerts, but I watch the recordings of each of them at least once. I love all of your songs! Gosh, I wish I could tell the whole world about this!
谢谢你的支持，我会继续加油的。
Thank you for your support. I'll keep doing my best.
第二块拼图。这是一双翅膀，还是用羽毛做成的装饰？
The second jigsaw piece. Is this a pair of wings, or a decoration made of feathers?
也许介于两者之间，这是一对折断的羽翼。
Maybe it's somewhere in between the two. It's a pair of broken wings.
It's okay. Let's use this one.
「另外，身材管理是很重要，但要记得好好吃饭。」
"One more thing, staying fit is important, but don't forget to eat well, too."
那幅画像是一种祝福，也像是某个人的决意：即便折断的羽翼不再属于天际，它将坠落的方向也是群星——

That painting feels like a blessing, and also seems to mirror someone's resolve: Even when the broken wings no longer belong to the sky, the direction in which they fall will still be towards the stars—
「我将要前往的那些星星，太陌生了，没有一颗是熟悉的。」
"Soon, I shall travel to those unfamiliar stars, none of which I recognize."
「但只要你仍在这里遥望它们——」
"But as long as you continue to gaze upon them from here—"
「那陌生的群星也会成为我们重逢的故乡。」
"Then those unfamiliar stars will one day be the place of our reunion."
最后也不舍得说声再见么？也许我比你想的要更坚强些呢……
You still couldn't bear to say goodbye in the end? Maybe I'm stronger than you think...
远行的路上，一定要试着让自己轻松些啊……
You must try to relax on your long journey...
That didn't seem like a perfect goodbye.
已经足够了。我本来只想在她身边静静待会儿。
It's enough. I only meant to stay quietly by her side for a bit.
但你为什么要做多余的事？
But why did you do those unnecessary things?
那两张字条，如果被人发现，会变成对她不利的证据。
Those two notes. If someone finds them, they can be used as evidence against her.
哼，你都擅作主张多少次了，我就不行？
Hmph, so you can do whatever you want as many times as you want, but I can't?
I don't want to live with regret for the rest of my life either.
这场告别该结束了，对吧？
We're almost done saying our goodbyes, right?
Yes, we only have one last stop.
但在出发前，瓦尔特先生，我还想请教您一个问题。
But before we leave, I have a question I'd like to ask you, Mr. Yang.
我好奇，您为何会成为一位无名客？
I'm curious. Why did you become a Nameless?
我始终有种感觉，您似乎不会放弃任何一位需要帮助的人。这一路同行下来，我更确信了这点。
I always had a feeling that you would never give up on someone who needed help. After spending time with you, I'm even more convinced of this assessment.
此时此刻，天上还有无数世界在等待星穹列车到访。可您和同伴停留在这里，只是为了一位素未谋面的故人，和一位声名狼藉的逃犯。

At this very moment, there are countless worlds above the skies still waiting for the arrival of the Astral Express, yet you and your companions have chosen to stay here. All for an "old friend" you never knew and a notorious fugitive.
「开拓」的本义是前进，而非驻足，但您却将时间倾注在一众过客身上，并认为这是…理所应当？
To Trailblaze means to forge ahead, yet you stop and spend precious time on people just passing by. All the while you believe this is... the natural course of action?
我从不这么认为，「钟表匠」也做出了相同的选择。
That's not what I think at all. Besides, the Watchmaker also made a similar choice.
但他也因此和列车告别，一生都再没有走向群星。
And because of that, he bid farewell to the Express and never walked among the stars again in his lifetime.
「不是所有旅途都要通向星辰大海」，就算离开了列车，有些「开拓」也不会结束。
"Not all journeys lead to the stars." Even if we leave the Express, some Trailblazing paths will still continue.
你可以这么认为，无名客从来不是一个人的称呼。对于这条道路，每个人也有不同的看法，只要条件允许，我们都会尽己所能。

You can think of it this way: The title of Nameless doesn't belong to any one person. Each individual will have their own view of what it means to walk this path, and will always try their best, no matter the situation.
而我开拓的对象并非未知的世界，而是这片星空下，每一个活生生的人。
The goal of my Trailblazing is not the unknown world, but every living being who exists under the stars.
「瓦尔特」这个名字，在我的故乡代表「世界」。它喻示每个人都自成天地，其可能性和远方的群星无异。与人们产生的联结，才是我在旅途中最宝贵的收获。

In my homeland, the name "Welt" means "world." It suggests that each person is a world unto themselves, and that we harbor as many possibilities as the distant stars. The connections I gain on my journey are what is most precious to me.
这就是我的「开拓」之道，也是我停留于此的原因。
This is my way of the Trailblaze and the reason why I decided to stay here.
我说过自己离开故乡的时候同样匆忙，能理解你如今的心情。
Like I said before, I left my home in a hurry, too. I know how you feel right now.
我也深知，只有当一个人决意告别过去的时候，他才会坦然面对全部的自我。就像此时此刻，你所做的一样……
I also know that a person will only be able to truly face themselves once they've decided to say goodbye to their past... the same way you're doing right here, right now...
你我身边，何曾有过第三个人？
There was never a third person with us, was there?
I told you he'd find out.
果然什么都瞒不过您的慧眼。
I should have known nothing could escape your keen eyes.
既然您已看穿万维克的秘密，我也无需铺垫了。走吧——
Since you already know Wonweek's secret, there's no need for me to build up suspense.
我们直奔主题，为这场告别画上最后的句点。
Let's go. We'll head straight for the finale and take our final bow in this farewell performance.
我还资历尚浅，只能看运气了。
I'm still inexperienced, so let's just hope we get lucky.
麻烦您了。第一块拼图，我希望它是星空的一部分。
Thank you anyway. I expect the first jigsaw piece will be a part of the starry sky.
而另一块，我希望它能象征羽翼。
As for the other piece, I hope it will symbolize wings.
We have enough. Let's go back.
就算你能隐藏面貌，擅闯家族禁地也未免大胆了些。
I know you can hide your appearance, but trespassing on restricted Family grounds is still a bold move.
放心，不会花太多时间的。
Don't worry. I won't take too much time.
我第一次来大剧院时还是个孩子。从这里望去，我被幕布后边的光芒吸引，深信那就是指引梦想之地的启明。
I was a child when I first visited the Grand Theater. I remember seeing the light behind the curtains from here and believing it to be the Morning Star guiding me toward the Land of the Dreams.
但多年以后，当我成为橡木家主再临此地，才知道那道光芒的背后是「星核」。
When I returned here many years later as the head of the Oak Family, I finally learned that the light was actually a Stellaron.
这次重返舞台，你准备做些什么？
Now that you've returned to the stage, what are you planning to do?
为了启程。我向来认为，一个人的起点应当是他的终点。
Prepare for my departure. I've always believed that a person's starting point should also be his last stop.
您是否见过寿终正寝的老人？当生命迎来终结，他们往往会抬起双手，尽力伸向虚空，恰如婴儿呱呱坠地，最初的姿态也是高举双臂。

Have you ever seen the elderly at the end of their lives? As they welcome their final moments, they invariably raise their hands, stretching their arms into the emptiness. Much like how babies also stretch their arms into the air when they are first born.
于诞生之时，于归去之刻，人类两度振翅，行于旅途始末。为了能够再次振翅飞翔……
Humanity flaps their wings twice as they complete their journey: Once when they are born, and once when they die. In order to flap my own wings and soar again...
我将在这里，告别「昨日的自己」。
I will say goodbye here to the me of yesterday.
唉，真讨厌这副面孔啊，感觉表情都生动不起来。
I really hate this face. My expressions feel so dull and lifeless.
原来如此，这就是你的仪容始终有些微妙的原因。
I see. That explains why something always felt off about your appearance.
自我们重逢起，那象征「同谐」的天环就从未在你头顶显现。
The halo above your head that symbolizes the Harmony — it's been missing since the moment we reunited.
诚然，那圆环是种群的天赐，但它未必不可毁弃。
It's true that this ring was bestowed upon our people by the heavens, but that doesn't mean it can't be thrown away.
在入梦的起点，那条思绪的长廊上，我选择将自身的天环彻底剥离。
While I was in the Gallery of Thoughts, at the entrance of the dream, I chose to completely sever the halo from myself.
我毕竟是一介逃犯，理应断绝所有被家族感知的可能。
I am a fugitive, after all. I must remove any chance of being detected by The Family.
另一个原因，则是为了苦痛…如同折翼坠地般，必能令我清醒的疼痛。
Another reason is to feel pain... A pain like falling from the sky with broken wings that can keep me awake.
如此一来，我才能将「同谐」与「秩序」的祝福尽数舍弃，生平初次，以凡人的身份踏入这美梦之中。
This is how I can cast aside all the blessings of the Harmony and the Order and, for the first time in my life, enter the sweet dream as an ordinary person.
所以万维克先生也是因此而生？
Is that also how Mr. Wonweek came into this world?
哼，他说出来你可能都不信。
Hmph, no, you wouldn't believe the real story even if he told you.
他的诞生源自一场意外，而且您无比熟悉……
He was born from an accident, one that you're actually quite familiar with...
说来有些尴尬，是那「不要笑挑战」。
It was that try-not-to-laugh challenge. Quite embarrassing, to be honest.
我以普通人的姿态四处漫游，不幸落入了皮皮西人的陷阱。那道令停云女士四分五裂的恶作剧，也同样将虚弱的我一分为二。
I was roaming around as an ordinary person when I unfortunately fell into that Pepeshi's trap. The prank that fragmented Miss Tingyun also divided my fragile self into two.
你的意思是，他是你的一部分？这倒是出人意料，你们看起来截然不同。
Are you saying that he's a part of you? That's quite surprising, given that you two looked nothing alike.
又或者，是另一种可能吧。
You could say he's another possibility of me.
我也曾是个孩子，有过深埋在心底的种种念想。那些童年的声音伴随我长大，逐渐被时光磨平，几不可闻。
I, too, was once a child, with aspirations buried deep within. Over time, those childhood voices grew increasingly faint.
也许儿时的我做出一个微小的改变，就会变得与他别无二致。
Maybe if I had made a small change in my childhood, I would have turned out to be exactly like him.
那你是挺倒霉的，没能成为更好的自己。
What a pity, failing to become a better version of yourself.
所以，我的最后一场告别，也和那位停云女士一样：我会对自身进行调律，重归于完整的自我。
So, my final farewell will be like that of Miss Tingyun: I will perform a tuning on myself and return to my complete form.
而这也意味着万维克会彻底消失。所以我才说，这是最后一站。
And this also means that Wonweek will vanish for good. That's why I said this was the last stop.
有没有一种可能，消失的会是你？
Is there a possibility that you will be the one who disappears?
没有可能，对此我们早有定论。
No, this is a foregone conclusion.
但事到如今，谁又能保证绝不会出现变数呢？也许内心深处，我也期待着这种可能吧。
But who's to say there won't be any changes? Maybe deep down, I'm also anticipating this possibility.
无论结果如何，会有人替你见证。
Regardless of the outcome, you will have a witness.
I'll be waiting for you in the audience.
「期待这种可能」…你的确是变了。换作从前，你根本不可能忍受得了杂音。
"Anticipating this possibility..." You've really changed. In the past, you wouldn't have tolerated any noise at all.
我毕竟要踏上一段未知的旅程，不可能再维持井然有序的生活。就像今天这样，我将不得不和意外同行。
I'm about to embark on an unknown journey, where it will be impossible to maintain my orderly life. I will have to navigate unexpected surprises, much like today.
其实你压根没做好准备，对吧？
You're not ready at all, are you?
是的。我感到不安，甚至惶恐。离开匹诺康尼后，我不再能控制一切。
I feel unsettled, maybe even scared. Ever since I left Penacony, I could no longer control everything.
你想多了，是一切都不能控制。
Don't flatter yourself. You can't control anything.
可大多数人不都是这么过日子的？
But isn't that how it is for most people?
对未知过分恐惧，也许就是我的不足。但你的出现证明了意外不全是坏事。
My fear of the unknown may be a weakness, but your presence has shown me that surprises aren't always bad.
与你相遇令我受益良多，我很高兴能以这种形式邂逅自己的另一面，也很庆幸能有机会亲口对你说出……
Meeting you has been a great help to me, and I'm glad to have discovered this side of myself. I also feel grateful for the opportunity to tell you this in person...
什么情况，你确定没说反？
What? Are you sure you didn't mean the opposite?
你拥有的诸多品性，确实潜藏在我心中。在许多场合，我也想说上几句俏皮话，直截了当地表达心中所想，或是毫无顾虑地展露对一个人的厌恶……
I must admit, many of your qualities strike a chord with me. There are times when I want to joke around, freely express my thoughts, or openly share my dislike of a person...
或者喜爱。我也想告诉她，我喜欢她的每一首歌。
Or my fondness. I want to tell her that I love all her songs.
那你就去做啊，老日。你总说要把小鸟关在笼子里，结果你自己才是被囚禁的那个。
Then go for it, Sunny. You always talk about locking the bird in the cage, but you're the one who's trapped.
照照镜子吧，自律、纠结——你的生活除了这俩还剩什么？活得像块大理石，摔下来的时候也只能粉粉碎。
Look at yourself. Besides discipline and hesitation, there's nothing else in your life. If you continue living like a slab of marble, you'll break into pieces when you fall.
但我不会成为你。我做不到。
But I won't become like you. I simply can't.
我讨厌轻佻的人，就连模仿他们的样子也会感到不适。即便经历失败，我也不会轻易放下某些坚持，比如「得体」，比如「高洁」。
I dislike people who are frivolous. It makes me uncomfortable to even emulate them. If I fail, I will still uphold my principles, such as decorum and stateliness.
而对于「同谐」，我的态度大体相同。你也好，命途也罢，如果我曾经质疑乃至抗拒的事物，偏偏是我今后要倚仗的力量……
As for the Harmony, my stance remains the same. Whether it's you or the Paths, if what I once doubted — or even opposed — becomes the force I must rely on in the future...
那么这一次，我会将「调律」交予本心。
Then this time, my true heart will guide the tuning.
这算什么？朝天上丢出一枚硬币，然后把命交给它来决定？
What is this? Leaving your fate entirely up to a coin flip?
你根本不是这种人，脑子被列车撞傻了？还是被公司的赌徒夺舍了？
This isn't like you at all. Did you lose your mind after being run over by the Express, or were you possessed by that IPC gambler?
失败总是最好的老师。要拯救更多的人，你必须先理解他们是为何而生，为何而死，最好的方法就是亲身践行。
Failure is always the best teacher. To save more lives, you must first understand what they live for and what they die for. The best way to achieve this is through personal experience.
你看，我已经在试着做出改变了。
You see? I'm already starting to make changes.
合二为一也好，一方消失也罢，我将这场调律的结果交由命运，并以此验明——我能否敞开怀抱，接纳一切自己厌憎的事物。
Whether it's us merging or one of us disappearing, I'll leave the tuning to fate, and see if I can embrace all that I detest.
唯有如此，我才能真正迈向人世，与众生一同行走大地。
Only then will I truly be able to walk among the living in their world.
But what if you can't do it?
那也无可奈何，说明我和过去一样……
Well, that's out of my hands. It will just prove that I'm still the same person...
不过是个只会让妹妹失望的人。
The person who always disappoints his sister...
直至最后，我将和弱者一同…将双手伸向天际。
And with my last breath, I'll join the weak... in reaching my hands toward the sky.
在这盛会之星，无论我有过怎样的身份，它们都已不再重要。
On the Planet of Festivities, whatever identities I once had, they no longer matter.
回应我们的不会是神明，而是属于明天的自己。
It's not the Gods who answer us, but ourselves from the future.
我似乎也没什么好说的。但既然要说再见了，给你最后一个建议吧。
I don't have much to say. But as it's time to part ways, here's one last piece of advice.
讲俏皮话要用心，别用技巧——更不要每次都解释。
When telling jokes, be sincere. Don't sweat the details, and above all, don't explain them every time.
不过算了，对你而言，还是别讲更好。
Ah, never mind. Maybe it's better for you not to joke at all.
就是这点最让人恼火，我怎么会变成这么无聊的人啊。
This is so annoying. How did I become so dull?
但就算是这样，也别让自己太辛苦啊。总有人会伤心难过的。
Well, despite everything, try not to be too hard on yourself. There will always be people who are sad.
现在，我该怎么称呼你？星期日先生，还是万维克先生？
Well, how should I address you now? Mr. Sunday or Mr. Wonweek?
按照您的意愿就好。也许，他正在我心间冷嘲热讽吧。
Whichever you prefer. He's probably mocking me from inside right now.
感谢您一路同行，瓦尔特先生。这段告别之旅到此为止了。
Thank you for accompanying me through all this, Mr. Yang. This farewell journey has come to an end.
离开匹诺康尼后，你有什么打算？
What are your plans after leaving Penacony?
事到如今，也无需再向您隐瞒。我认为匹诺康尼星核一事，背后另有隐情。
At this point, there is no need to hide things from you. I believe there's more to the incident involving the Stellaron on Penacony.
你的意思是，操纵星核的人并非梦主？
Are you suggesting that the Dreammaster wasn't the one controlling the Stellaron?
请勿担心。篡夺星核，假借谐乐大典复活已死的星神，这场动乱的主谋确实是橡木家系，各位已经战胜了幕后黑手。
Don't worry. The Oak Family was indeed behind seizing the Stellaron and resurrecting the fallen Aeon during the Charmony Festival, and you've already defeated them.
但歌斐木先生曾对我说，如今「秩序」所做的一切，都是为了不再重蹈「同谐」的覆辙……
But Mr. Gopher Wood once told me that all the Order's efforts were aimed at avoiding the same mistakes that the Harmony made.
想来蒙托尔星系的家族一定脱不了干系。
My guess is that The Family from the Montour System must be involved.
可惜数百年过去，此事早已无从查证。匹诺康尼毕竟只是一片小小的属地，家主们贵为管理者，也无权踏足「同谐」圣地，探问神主真意。

Unfortunately, too much time has passed to verify that. Penacony is just a small territory, and even the family heads with their authority cannot enter the sacred site of the Harmony and inquire about the true will of the Great One.
甚至最坏的情况，如果希佩对此也听之任之，「以强援弱」又从何谈起？
In the worst-case scenario, if Xipe turned a blind eye, how could "the strong defending the weak" hold up?
瓦尔特先生，我只想告诉您一件事：「同谐」绝不止有一种面相，祂可以是星穹列车最坚实的盟友，也可以是最可怕的敌人。
Mr. Yang, I just want to tell you this: The Harmony has more than one side. THEY can be the most steadfast ally of the Astral Express or the most fearsome enemy.
谢谢你的坦诚。列车组尽力促成如今的局面，也是出于相同的顾虑。
Thank you for being honest with me. The efforts of the Crew on Penacony were driven by the same concern.
经此一役，盛会之星的形势将由「同谐」、「存护」彼此制衡，共同监管，而在「开拓」的助力下，会有更多势力来到这里，匹诺康尼会逐步变为银河中的公共地带。

After all this, the Harmony and the Preservation will keep the situation on the Planet of Festivities in balance. With the momentum from the Trailblaze, more forces will arrive, and Penacony will become a public space in the Cosmos.
「自由」——这是无名客能给出的唯一答案，很高兴匹诺康尼正需要它。
Freedom is the only answer the Nameless can offer. I'm glad that Penacony needs it.
即使动因不同，各位也同样走在济世安民的路上，且比我走得更远。
You and I both strive for a peaceful society, even if our reasons are different, and you've gone even further than I have.
若非命途使然，也许你我不至于走向对立的结局。
If not for our Paths, perhaps you and I wouldn't be in opposition.
不必妄自菲薄，我们并非水火不容的关系。否则，你也不会在梦主面前对我手下留情。
Don't sell yourself short. We're not fundamentally opposed. Otherwise, you wouldn't have shown me mercy in front of the Dreammaster.
这段同行算是我个人的回礼，无论如何——
This shared journey is my way of repaying you. After all—
你也是我「开拓」的对象之一。
You are one of my Trailblazing goals.
关于这点，您同样给了我很多启发。人类才是万物的尺度，没有人是唯一的救世主。
About that, you've given me many insights as well. Humans are the measure of everything, and no one is the sole savior.
创造乐园仍是我毕生的夙愿，但在今后的旅程中，我必须一砖一瓦地构建它。所以，我有一个难以启齿的请求……
Creating a paradise remains one of my lifelong ambitions. As I move forward, I realize I must build it brick by brick. Therefore, I have a request that I hope you'll consider...
我固然不具备「开拓」的意志，也无法成为一位真正的无名客。
While I lack the will to Trailblaze, nor can I become a true Nameless...
但我敬佩各位的信念，比起苦修，或许我更需要的是求学。
I admire your convictions. Perhaps, what I need, more than asceticism, is knowledge.
所以，在离开匹诺康尼后，您能否允许我……
Therefore, after leaving Penacony, would you consider letting me...
登上星穹列车，暂且与各位同行？
Come aboard the Astral Express and travel with you for now?
Falling is just another name for flying.
正因如此，我庆幸于自身的折翼。
That's why I rejoice at my broken wings.
到人间去，为了看那尘世。
Step into the mortal world to see how it truly is.
而后如人般生，如人般死。
Then, be born as a human and die as one.
这就是他前来这里的原因。
So, this is why I brought him here.
星期日先生希望能与列车同行。显然，我不该自行决定此事。
Mr. Sunday wants to join us on the Express. Of course, I can't make that decision alone.
但如果你不支持，就不会带他回来。
But if you didn't support this idea, you wouldn't have brought him back.
瓦尔特，我相信你的判断。只要人愿意共赴前程，列车的车门理应为他敞开。
Welt, I trust your judgment. If someone is willing to join us on our journey, the Express will be open to them.
不过这次情况特殊，在做出决定前，{NICKNAME}，我想先听听你的意见。
But this time is a bit different. Before making any decision, {NICKNAME}, I want to hear what you think.
嗯，在这场交锋中，你和他是最直接的对手。你的想法尤为重要。
In this battle, you were the one who directly confronted him. Your opinion holds the most weight.
I want to hear everyone's opinion.
可是在这场交锋中，你和他是最直接的对手。你的想法尤为重要。
But in this battle, you were the one who directly confronted him. Your opinion holds the most weight.
I don't have anything to say.
是么？可你脸上明明写着许多心思啊，都说出来吧，你的想法尤为重要。
Oh, really? But your face tells me otherwise. Come on, spill it. Your opinion holds the most weight.
从过去的对手那里，我才能习得最宝贵的经验。请畅所欲言。
I learn the most valuable lessons from my past opponents. Please say whatever's on your mind.
无论如何，我认可你是个高尚的人。你心中常怀怜悯，即使立场相对，我也无法否认这点。
You're a noble person. I can't deny that you always have compassion in your heart, even though we may view things differently.
You always want to be in control.
你是个完美主义者，总想控制一切，包括自己。但离开匹诺康尼后，前方就只剩下「未知」了，换种生活方式，对大家都好。

You're a perfectionist, always trying to control everything — even when it comes to yourself. Although, we're going to be traveling further into the unknown once we leave Penacony. I guess a change of pace could do everyone some good.
你辜负了许多人的信任。
你知道我要说什么，你辜负了许多人的信任，甚至包括最重要的家人。别忘记这件事。
You know what I'm going to say. Tons of people trusted you, but you let them all down — even your closest family. Don't you forget that.
I agree with what you stand for.
至于你的理想，我相信它能以另一种更正确的形式实现。七休日…虽然只是个比喻，但我很期待那一天。
I believe there is a way — a better way — to achieve your ideal. Seven rest days may be just a metaphor... But I look forward to the day when it comes true.
也许你对人性的看法是悲观的，但「开拓」不一样，我们踏上这条路，首先得学会「相信」。你也得做到。
Maybe you're too pessimistic about humanity, but the Trailblaze isn't like that. We had to learn to have faith before embarking on this path. You must do the same.
有梦想是件好事，但飞得太高，脱离了实际，就不会有好结果。我无法接受你为了一个缥缈的愿望，就把所有人拉进自己的世界里。
