Ideals are good to have, but nothing good comes from getting carried away in fantasies. I can never agree with how you dragged everyone into that world of yours just to fulfill an illusory dream.
总之，世事无常，昨天的敌人也可以是今天的朋友……
Nothing is for certain, anyway. An enemy yesterday may be a friend today.
总之，在我并不漫长的「开拓」中，你称得上是一位令人难忘的对手……
Anyhow, you've been an unforgettable adversary to me, even though I haven't been trailblazing for long...
I don't agree with Mr. Yang...
总之，我的观点和杨叔不同……
In any case, I'm gonna have to disagree with Mr. Yang...
He can join the Astral Express Crew.
都说洗白弱三分，应该没问题吧！
Well, you did get nerfed after turning into a good guy... So, I guess I'm okay, too!
谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
Thank you all for your forgiveness.
也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.
但在那之前，我定会履行同伴的职责，尽心尽力。
Until then, rest assured that I will do my best to fulfill my duty as your companion.
Finally, I'm no longer the newbie.
来吧，这样你就是新的老幺了。
Come on, you're taking over as newbie.
他还没正式加入啦！只是搭个车，没人能撼动你的地位。
He's just traveling with us, not an actual member of the Express crew yet! Your newbie status is untouchable.
谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
Thank you all for your forgiveness.
也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.
但在那之前，我定会履行同伴的职责，尽心尽力。
Until then, rest assured that I will do my best to fulfill my duty as your companion.
Maybe we should hear everyone else's opinion.
我没有别的话想说了，交给大家定夺吧。
I have nothing more to add. I'll let you all decide, then.
都说洗白弱三分，应该没问题吧！
Well, you did get nerfed after turning into a good guy... So, I guess I'm okay, too!
谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
Thank you all for your forgiveness.
也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.
但在那之前，我同样会履行乘客的职责，尽心尽力。
Until then, I will do my best to fulfill my duty as a passenger.
I'll have my eye on you at all times.
做好准备，我会一直盯着你。
You should know that I'll be watching your every move.
应该没问题吧，都说洗白弱三分嘛。
I guess it shouldn't be a problem. After all, he did get nerfed after turning into a good guy.
谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
Thank you all for your forgiveness.
也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.
但在那之前，我同样会履行乘客的职责，尽心尽力。
Until then, I will do my best to fulfill my duty as a passenger.
I won't accept this, no matter what is said.
我没法欺骗自己，也许我们更适合做萍水相逢的过客，而不是同道。
I won't pretend I'm okay with it. You can be our passenger, but you're not joining us.
这也是理所当然。既然如此，我会在列车离开阿斯德纳后，自行寻找一处合适的站点离去，不给各位添麻烦。
Of course, you have every reason to feel that way. In that case, I won't inconvenience you all any more than necessary. I'll find a stop to disembark at once the Express departs Asdana.
而在那之前，我同样会履行乘客的职责，愿尽绵薄之力。
Until then, rest assured that I will behave as expected of a passenger.
Uh... I guess that'll have to do, then.
I'll keep a close eye on him in the meantime.
...Looks like we've come to a decision.
稍后，也把这件事告诉列车长吧。
Remember to keep the conductor in the loop, too.
既然我们在匹诺康尼的事了结了，按原计划，差不多该准备跃迁了？
Now that our business on Penacony is settled, it's about time we get back on track and prepare for our next warp jump?
嗯，但在出发前，我还想尝试联络下黑塔女士。此前请她帮忙调查翁法罗斯，即便没有结果，也不能不打招呼就一走了之。
Yeah, but let me try contacting Madam Herta again before we set off. She helped us look into Amphoreus, even though nothing new came up... I should at least let her know we're leaving.
可能是星际网络出了点问题，我刚才联络了几次空间站，都没有回应。
I tried contacting the space station several times, but I never got any response. Maybe there's a problem with the Interastral Network.
先别担心，那毕竟是天才的地盘，反物质军团都拿它没办法……
It shouldn't be anything to worry about. What could happen on the geniuses' home turf? Even the Antimatter Legion wouldn't stand a chance...
也许只是黑塔女士又有了什么动作吧。
For all we know, Madam Herta could be making a move again.
No, we're still not quite there.
此后一时无言。「启程」往往与「离别」难分难解，但她们是如此幸运，不必在二者之间犹疑。
A moment of silence lingers after that. "Departure" is often indistinguishable from "Parting," yet they are fortunate enough not to have to waver between the two.
但幸运似乎绝不会垂青于每一个人——
But luck never seems to favor everyone...
你尝试投入了一些东西，但它完全没有任何反应——小垃圾桶真有个性，成功引起了你的注意力。
You attempt to insert some things, but no reaction is observed — This little trashcan has quite the personality, successfully grabbing your attention.
你将好看的垃圾放入了桶内以示重视，一转眼，桶中多出了更多好看的垃圾——真是聚宝盆原理的一种错误应用。

You insert Pleasant-Looking Trash into the bin as a sign of consideration, and in the blink of an eye, more Pleasant-Looking Trashes emerge — what an inappropriate application of the Horn of Plenty concept.
你放入了更多好看的垃圾，垃圾桶很高兴，向你默默致意，离开前，你莫名感到很有尊严。
You insert more Pleasant-Looking Trash. The trashcan is overjoyed and silently pays its respects to you. Before you leave, you suddenly feel a sense of dignity.
此刻，人们还没料想到这个假期将会多么「充实」，他们将共同见证仙舟的演武盛事，甚至忙里偷闲，完成了与一位天才的约定——

At this moment, people still haven't expected this vacation to be so fulfilling. They will witness the grand Xianzhou wardance and, during this moment of leisure, also complete arts promise made by a genius...
而他们将会再度相见的人…除了朋友，也有敌手。
And those they will meet again... include not only friends, but also foes.
只一眨眼的工夫，面前的冰激凌就进了万维克的肚子。
In the blink of an eye, the ice cream vanished into Wonweek's stomach.
至此，由调律意外揭示的往事再度沉睡，黯淡下去……
At this point, past events revealed by the tuning recede to the darkness once more...
如此前那样，一张字条被小心地放在了这块拼图旁边，似是有人始终领先一步——
Just as before, a note was placed carefully next to the puzzle, like someone got here a step earlier...
...{NICKNAME}? Miss March 7th is looking for you everywhere.
I think she wants to develop photos...
我也不知内情，不过，她告诉我：如果见到你，提醒你看看短信。
I don't know the details either, but she told me that if I see you, I should remind you to check your messages.
<color=#dbc291ff>她还说：一些你遗漏的东西，事实上极为重要。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>She also said that some things you missed are actually extremely important.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>她还说：一些你遗漏的东西，事实上极为重要。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>She also said that some things you missed are actually extremely important.</color>
…嘿嘿，当然喜欢啦，花姐老是猜中我的心思。
...Hehe, of course I like it! Big Sis Dahlia always knows what's on my mind.
如此说来，下一趟「开拓」之旅，我们又能同行了？
So that means we'll be companions again on the next Trailblaze mission?
当然，我特意加快了脚步呢。可惜，还是错过了一些事。
Of course. I deliberately picked up my pace for that. Though sadly, I still missed out on some things.
嗯，如果你也参与了翁法罗斯之行，许多事会变得简单。
Indeed. Had you joined the Amphorean expedition, it would've made a lot of things easier.
{NICKNAME}——你可算来了，花姐都念叨了你好几次了！
{NICKNAME}! You're finally here! Big Sis Dahlia has been asking about you nonstop!
Is this a senior member I haven't met before?
喂喂！不要命啦！「老」是花姐的禁忌词！
Whoa whoa! Have you gone mad? Did you forget that we should never mention words like "old" or "senior" in front of Big Sis Dahlia?
{NICKNAME}'s just been on a roll with these kinds of jokes lately.
没关系，忘记了也不奇怪。喜新厌旧的习惯，说不准…{F#她}{M#他}就是从我这里学去的呢。
No worries. It's okay if {F#s}he forgot. {M#He's}{F#She's} always preferred the latest new thing... Maybe {F#s}he picked up that bad habit from me.
好久不见，{NICKNAME}——现在，回想起什么了吗？
Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. Now, does anything ring a bell?
<color=#6f7cda><s>Something's not right... What did you do?</s></color>
可是什么？莫非…你*忘记*了什么？
"But" what? Don't tell me... you forgot something?
你到底怎么啦，在翁法罗斯留下后遗症了不成？连花姐都忘了？
What's gotten into you? Did Amphoreus give you amnesia? How could you forget about Big Sis Dahlia?
在空间站的时候，是她帮你压制了暴走的星核哎。
She was the one who helped you suppress the rampaging Stellaron back at the space station.
{NICKNAME}... I didn't leave the Express at that stop.
还有还有，第一次去仙舟，是花姐给了那绝灭大君最后一击，这么大的事情你总不会忘吧？
Totally! It was Big Sis Dahlia who dealt the final blow to that Lord Ravager the first time we went to the Xianzhou. You haven't forgotten something that big, have you?
就因为这个，花姐才不得不回忆庭养伤，没能和我们一起去匹诺康尼。
That was why Big Sis Dahlia had to go back to the Garden to recover and couldn't join us in Penacony.
没错，大丽花女士同我们「开拓」至今。她是最具野心，也最优秀的无名客。
Correct. Lady Dahlia has been "trailblazing" with us for a while now. She's the most ambitious and talented of the Nameless.
哪用得着我们提醒，{NICKNAME}和大丽花同行的时间，比任何人都要多。
No need for reminders from us. {NICKNAME} has spent more time with The Dahlia than anyone else.
不妨让她给你诊断一下——与「记忆」相关的问题，她本就是列车上最拿手的那一位。
Why don't you let her diagnose you? She's the Express's resident expert when it comes to matters regarding "memories."
事不宜迟，欢迎派对稍晚再说吧。大丽花女士，有劳了。
This is a pressing concern. We'll save the welcome party for later. Lady Dahlia, if you would.
哎呀——别愣着啦，快来，以前不是也发生过嘛，交给花姐吧，没问题的。
Oh come on! Don't just stand there! Hurry up and get over here. It's not like this hasn't happened before. Leave it to Big Sis Dahlia. It'll be fine!
嗯，如果是「记忆」出了问题，最好别耽误时间。
I concur. If there's an issue with "memories," then we'd better not waste any time.
你会经历背叛，陷入迷茫，需要…答案。
You'll face betrayal, lose your way... and seek answers.
<color=#dbc291ff>你是为了银河的愿望而启程的。在以你为主角的故事里，宇宙会逃离「终末」的命运。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>It was a wish of the cosmos that set you in motion. And in the tale where you are the protagonist, the stars themselves will defy the destiny of "Finality."</color>
What did you do to them?
还真是…与众不同。你的「记忆」有点棘手呢。是谁在保护它们吗？
Well, this is... quite unusual. Your "memories" are quite tricky. Is someone protecting those memories?
命运有时也和记忆类似。正因它如迷宫一般曲折，对于有缘人，银河的尺度也称不上多么广大。
Destiny is much like memory. Since it twists and turns like a maze, even the vastness of the cosmos isn't too great for those fated to meet.
或许，我们很快就会再度相逢。
啊，{NICKNAME}——你可算来了！黑天鹅女士有急事，你差点都赶不上了。
Ah, {NICKNAME}! You're finally here! Lady Black Swan has something urgent, and you almost missed her!
What did you do to them?
这一切，发生过多少次了？
How many times has all this happened already?
现在不是开玩笑的时候啦……
Now's not the time for jokes...
唉…我们原本不必这么「直接」的。
看来没必要再白费力气了，对吧？
Guess there's no point in wasting any more effort, right?
你的「记忆」…的确非常特殊，仿佛超脱于时间之外。
Your "memories" are... truly extraordinary. It's as if they exist beyond the bounds of time itself.
可是，何必把回忆太当真呢？
But why take memories so seriously?
欢迎，想让光线再暗些吗？
Welcome. Would you like me to dim the lights more?
别着急，我没有伤害你的同伴，你看见的一切，只在你我之间。
Don't worry. I haven't harmed your companions. What you've seen stays between us.
如果一点印象都没留下，我倒是会有些受伤呢。
I'd feel a bit hurt if I didn't leave any impression on you at all.
我的名字是康士坦丝，一名寻常忆者。你若愿意，不妨先委屈一下，和别人一样称呼我为「大丽花」吧。
My name is Constance. An ordinary Memokeeper. If you'd like, you can do what everyone else does and call me "The Dahlia" for now.
解释起来有些复杂——借助某些方法，我带你走入了自己的「心房」。
It's a bit complicated to explain. Through certain methods, I've brought you into my own "heart."
任何地方都有可能受人窥视。唯独在这里，我才能放心说一些…只能你知我知的秘密。
We could be watched if we met anywhere else. This is the only place... where I can feel safe sharing secrets that should stay between us.
容我说声抱歉。我原以为，变成你认知中熟悉的人，可以让许多事更顺利。
Let me apologize. I thought that becoming someone you are familiar with would make things easier... Or simpler.
你似乎很了解我的过去…
You seem to know a lot about my past...
别着急，这就是我来找你的原因。你所有的疑问，都会得到解答。
Take it easy. That's exactly why I came to find you. All your questions will be answered.
就从「第一问」开始吧。现在，请你慢慢回过头……
Let's start with the "First Question." Now, slowly turn around...
以这种方式看到自己的尸体，感觉如何？
How does it feel to see your own corpse like this?
我知道，死亡吓不倒无名客。对你而言，甚至可以说是日常。
I know death doesn't faze the Nameless. It's practically just another day at the office for you.
所以别担心，这一幕并非现实。它来自一件你无比熟悉的事物……
So don't worry. This scene isn't real. It comes from something you're all too familiar with...
<color=#dbc291ff>这是「剧本」预见的，你在「匹诺康尼」的另一种结局。但在很久以前，它已经被星核猎手阻止。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>This was foreseen by the "script." It's another possible ending for you in Penacony. But it was prevented by the Stellaron Hunters long ago.</color>
没能到来的明日，换言之，就是「不存在的记忆」。
It's a tomorrow that never came. In other words, it's a "nonexistent memory."
How do you know about the "script"?
你似乎对星核猎手很熟悉…
You seem to know quite a bit about the Stellaron Hunters...
事实上，我也是他们的一员。
难以置信的神情呢。和其他人一样，我不能透露太多。即使藏身于此，我们也逃不出无处不在的命运。
That's quite the incredulous look. Like the others, I can't reveal too much. Even if we are hidden in this place, we can't escape from omnipresent destiny.
但我相信，你不会因为一名星核猎手的突然到访而惊讶，对吧？你我本就是这样的存在——星穹列车逐光而行，在身后投下长长的阴影。

But I trust you won't be surprised by a Stellaron Hunter's sudden visit. After all, that's what our two groups are. The Astral Express travels in pursuit of the light, casting long shadows in its wake.
我来此，只为向你说明一件事：你对「匹诺康尼」的「记忆」并不完整……
I'm here to tell you only one thing: Your "memory" of Penacony is incomplete.
<color=#dbc291ff>A part of it has already been stolen.</color>
暂时还难以断言。但这件事的严重性倒是很清楚——也许，有人让你遗忘了无比重要的信息。
That's hard to say for now, but the gravity of the situation is clear. Someone might have made you forget some critically important information.
无论如何，我必须帮你找回——有关「终末」的一切。
Either way, I must help you recover... everything about the Finality.
这不足为奇，你饲养过性情温顺的宠物吗？它们总能猜到你的心思，主动地讨好你……
It's not surprising. Have you ever kept a gentle pet? They can always guess what's on your mind, always actively trying to please you...
在我看来，记忆也一样。一旦发觉哪里出现空白，它自己就会小心翼翼地进行填补，无论你是否需要。
Memories work the same way if you ask me. Once your brain discovers a void in your memories, it'll carefully fill in the gap on its own, whether you need it or not.
我会履行承诺：唤醒你的「记忆」，从而拯救银河的未来。
I will keep my promise. I will awaken your "memories" and save the cosmos's future.
或许，我也能借机走进你的过去——在我看来，这会十分有趣。
Perhaps I can also take this chance to peek into your past... which, if you ask me, should be quite interesting.
放心，我不会做什么出格的事，只是…公事公办？
Don't worry. I won't do anything inappropriate. It's just... strictly business?
就允许我稍加触碰吧，这是我摸索记忆的唯一手段。
Please, let me touch you a little bit. It's the only way I can probe through memories.
要想将遗忘的「记忆」重新找回，需要一些温和的刺激。所以，你得做好心理准备。
You'll need some gentle stimulation to recover your forgotten "memories." So, brace yourself.
现在，让我们回到一切的最初，看看究竟是哪里出了问题。
Let us now go back to where it all began and see what exactly went wrong.
慢慢来，别被记忆淹没，也别担心迷失，记住我的声音，记住此刻的触感，这会将你重新带回我的面前——
Take it slow. Don't let the memories overwhelm you, and don't worry about getting lost. Remember my voice. Remember the touch you feel at this moment... it will guide you back to me.
看来不太愉快，别怕…刚开始的时候，混乱是常态。
Seems like a rough start. Don't worry... chaos is pretty normal in the beginning.
你还能想起那段旅程的开端吗？「梦想之地」匹诺康尼，位于忆质充盈的阿斯德纳星系。
Can you still remember where this journey began? Penacony, the Land of the Dreams, located in the memoria-rich Asdana star system.
彼时，一场「同谐」的盛会即将开幕。而一封邀请函，恰好寄到了你们的手中——
At that time, a grand celebration of the Harmony was about to begin. And as fate would have it, an invitation found its way into your hands...
「诚邀*家族的贵客*莅临匹诺康尼，与其他来宾一道，参加盛大的欢宴。」
"The Family's esteemed guests are cordially invited to Penacony to participate in our grand celebration."
「将梦中的不可能之事尽收眼底，寻得匹诺康尼之父『钟表匠』的遗产，而后解答：生命因何而沉睡。」
"Witness the impossible in the realm of dreams, find the Legacy of the Watchmaker, Father of Penacony, and thus the answer to the question: Why does life slumber."
在那里，你遇见了公司干部砂金，他看似只身赴宴，实际上是为收复失地而来。
There, you encountered Aventurine, an IPC executive who appeared to be answering the invitation alone, but was actually there to reclaim lost territory.
他想方设法寻求盟友，试着以一人之力，撼动家族的天平。
He desperately sought allies, attempting to tip The Family's scales with himself alone.
以及，前橡木家主，星期日。他是「秩序」的命途行者，将在不久后，篡夺齐响诗班的伟力，与你们为敌。
And then there was Sunday, the former head of the Oak Family. A Pathstrider of the Order, who would soon usurp the power of the Harmonious Choir and become your enemy.
还有他的妹妹，无人不知的知更鸟。她本应登台献唱，却被卷入一连串的意外，直到最后，也像局外人那般不知所措。
There was also his sister, the renowned Robin. She was meant to perform on stage, but got caught up in a series of unfortunate events, and in the end, found herself as lost as any bystander.
哎呀，从一开始，你的记忆就出现「缺失」了么？这可有些麻烦，该从哪里着手呢……
Oh my. Have there been "gaps" in your memories from the very beginning? This is quite troublesome. Where should we begin...
对了，就从「她」开始吧。你一定还记得——
Ah right, let's start with "her." You must remember...
那自称艺者，被家族追捕的少女。当然，她的身份已经不再是秘密。
That girl who called herself an artist and was hunted down by The Family. Of course, her true identity is no longer a secret.
你眼中的「初遇」，却是她渴盼已久的「重逢」。不妨从这里开篇……
What you see as a "first encounter" is actually a long-awaited "reunion" for her. Let's begin our story here...
想起那无法入梦，也不愿醒来的少女……
Think of that girl who could neither enter dreams, nor wished to wake...
Why did she slumber with you?
说来，很久没和老日一起聊聊了，去看看他在干什么吧。
Come to think of it, I haven't chatted with Sunny in ages. Let's go see what he's up to.
「什么也看不见。什么也听不见。除了黑暗，一无所有。」
"I can't see anything. Can't hear anything. Nothing exists except darkness."
"Why do people long for this darkness?"
Don't move yet. It's going to hurt real bad.
是啊，和预期一样，你没法恢复「做梦」的机能。
Yeah. As expected, you can't recover the "ability to dream."
就算付出了这么多代价，机会也只有一次。
Even after paying such a heavy price, we only get one shot at this.
It's fine. One chance... is all I need.
Is there anything else I need to do?
喘口气。等调试结束，我就让你正式「入梦」。
Take a breather. Once the calibration is done, I'll let you officially "enter the dream."
然后，我就能进入那片{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼}「梦想之地」{RUBY_E#}。
And then, I'll be able to enter that {RUBY_B#Penacony}Land of the Dreams{RUBY_E#}.
别抱太大希望，那只是个外号。你的梦想不一定能实现。
Don't get your hopes up. It's just a nickname. Your dream might not come true.
人们总是这样形容它：一旦醒来，就消失得无影无踪，所以美梦才那么珍贵。
People always describe it this way: once you wake up, it vanishes without a trace. That's why sweet dreams are so precious.
Sounds like you're just trying to make yourself feel better.
「当再次邂逅的那天到来，我想…我会假装我们素未谋面，再重新认识你一次，让一切都从头开始。」
"When the day we cross paths again arrives, I think... I'll pretend we've never met, and get to know you anew, as if starting all over."
我和{F#她}{M#他}有约定。重逢就在眼前。我没有理由不尽力而为。
I made a promise with {M#him.}{F#her.} Our reunion is right before us. I have no reason not to give it my all.
无论这个故事会如何结束，我都要让它…笑着开始。
No matter how this story ends, I want it to... begin with a smile.
在艾利欧预见的「未来」里，我们不曾拥有「结局」。但我还有机会，从命运手中……
In the "future" that Elio foresaw, we never had an "ending". But I still have the chance...
To wrestle back from fate the right to have a "beginning."
Just spacing out for a while.
第一次「做梦」，还有些不习惯。感觉这里和现实没什么不同。
This is my first time "dreaming," so it still feels a little odd. Everything here seems just like the real world.
想到自己还躺在维生舱里，就觉得…很神奇。
It's mind-blowing to think that... I'm actually still lying in a life support pod.
算了，抓紧时间，星穹列车已经到了。
Never mind. Hurry up. The Astral Express has arrived.
情况如何，能绕开家族的监视吗？
How's the situation? Can we avoid The Family's surveillance?
身份早就搞定了，但有件麻烦事。边走边讲吧，去准备好的房间。
ID's already taken care of, but there's a snag. Let's walk and talk. Head to the room I prepped.
This time... I should be on the right path.
我雇了个帮手，提前混入匹诺康尼打探消息。刚才，她传回了情报——
I hired a helper to slip into Penacony ahead of time to snoop around. She just sent me some intel...
坏事，在美梦中，家族近乎全知全能。
There's bad news. The Family is borderline all-knowing and all-powerful in the sweet dream.
Is there an Emanator of the Harmony here?
未必是个人，也可能是某种现象，说不清楚。
It's not necessarily because of a person. It could be a phenomenon. Can't say for certain.
反正，跟「剧本」说的一样，不管用什么办法潜入，你一定会被发现。
Anyway, just like the "script" says: no matter how you sneak in, you'll be found out.
There's not even a single gap? Even just for a couple of seconds?
不是不能创造，但问题在于，你太强了。
It's not that we can't create one. The problem is that you're too powerful.
可不是什么小鱼小虾——在匹诺康尼，你算得上天大的威胁，即便只是尝试入梦，也会立刻被察觉。
You're no small fry. Here in Penacony, you're a colossal threat. They'll be on to you even if you just try to enter the dream.
那意味着，就算潜入成功，我也不可能摆脱家族的追捕。
That means even if I manage to sneak in, I won't be able to escape The Family's pursuit.
没错。大打出手也没用，这可是人家的地盘，跟送命没区别。
Exactly. And a brawl won't change a thing. This is their turf. You'd be throwing your life away.
虽然很冒险，但我有一个计划。
It might be risky, but I have a plan.
家族还没摸清「星核猎手萨姆」的身份，对吧？
The Family still hasn't figured out who "Stellaron Hunter: SAM" really is, right?
At least not this branch Family.
不如就利用这一点吧。我会启动「火萤IV型」，突袭「白日梦」酒店。来的路上，我仔细观察过了，常规安保无法拖住我。
Then let's use that to our advantage. I'll activate Fyrefly Type-IV and attack The Reverie hotel. I studied their defenses on the way here. Their basic security won't be able to keep me in check.
制造一场骚乱，让「萨姆」站到台前。然后，我再以最快的速度回到这里，趁着骚动尚未平息，以「流萤」的身份入梦。
Create a commotion to force SAM in the spotlight. Then, I'll rush back here at top speed, and while the chaos is still fresh, dive into the dream as Firefly.
风险太高。为了一个不确定的机会，把「萨姆」这张底牌掀开。不划算。
Too risky. It's not worth it to expose our trump card SAM just for an uncertain gamble.
可我们已经在这里了，总要试试看。
But we're already here. Might as well give it a shot.
我先推演路线，计算下安保的响应时间……
Let me extrapolate the route and calculate the security response time...
奇怪。我这里显示，安保几乎不存在。跟你说的对不上。
Weird. My readings show security is practically non-existent. That doesn't match what you told me.
以防万一，描述一下你看到的情景。
Describe to me what you see, just to be safe.
It's just your standard hotel setup.
别慌，根本没有「人」。果然，你眼里的画面，和我看到的「监控」不太一样。
Relax. There's "no one" here. I knew it. What you're seeing isn't quite the same as the "surveillance" I see.
怪了，怎么会有这种事，我来修复。
That is weird. How does that work? Let me fix it.
我就说…你怎么会觉得梦里很普通。现在呢？怎么样了？
I told you... Dreams are never as simple as they seem. How about now?
没换地方，刚才你一直都待在这儿，嘴里说着怪话。
You haven't gone anywhere. You've been here the whole time, saying weird stuff.
第一次「做梦」，还有些不习惯。感觉这里和现实没什么不同。
This is my first time "dreaming," so it still feels a little odd. Everything here seems just like the real world.
And here I thought you were just being stubborn.
抱歉，再提醒我一下吧，记忆有些模糊了。
Sorry, could you jog my memory again? It's a little fuzzy.
按照「剧本」指示，我们搞来了一台废弃的入梦池。费了点功夫，有个公司人非要跟咱们抢。
Following the "script," we secured a discarded Dreampool. Wasn't easy. Some IPC lackey decided to fight us for it.
别在意。反正没抢过咱们。
Forget it. It's not like they won.
我把它改造成了维生舱。这会儿，你我都在阿斯德纳星系边缘飘着呢。
I converted it into a life support pod. Right now, we're both drifting at the edge of the Asdana system.
原来如此，利用联觉梦境。但看起来，我没能进入真正的匹诺康尼？
I see. We're using the Synesthesia Dreamscape. But it seems I haven't made it into the real Penacony?
反正这风景怎么也和「美梦」搭不上边，可能是某种…「缓冲区」吧。
This scenery doesn't exactly scream "sweet dream" anyway. It's probably some kind of... "buffer zone" or something.
你刚才看见的景象，多半是一种海市蜃楼。
What you saw just now was probably a mirage.
那突袭酒店的计划也行不通了。
Then the plan to attack the hotel won't work either.
没错。你现在顶多能突袭我。
Exactly. The only thing you can attack right now is me.
但这也说明，我还没有暴露，并且距离「十二时刻」只有一步之遥了？
In other words, I'm still in the clear... and I'm just one step away from the Twelve Hours?
你总能在坏事堆里找出点好消息。
You always manage to find a silver lining in a pile of bad news.
至少，现状变得清晰许多了。
At least things are much clearer now.
我先去别处看看，也许能找到适合「偷渡」的入口。
Let me take a look elsewhere first. Maybe I'll stumble upon a good entrance to become a "stowaway."
嗯，你先找路。我再去联系下那临时帮手。
Mm. You scout ahead. I'll get in touch with the temp helper.
你入梦时总归会有点影响，只是掉下来个灯，已经不错了——忆质就这么不稳定，没事，等下我来搞定，不会被发现。

You entering the dream will definitely cause a ripple or two. Honestly, if all it did was knock down a light, I'd say that's a win. That's how fragile memoria is. Relax, I'll take care of it. No one's going to find out.
Just as I thought. But why...
没必要，我太了解它们了。
No need. I know them too well.
未必是真正的「繁育」。还记得么？这片星系很久以前，也遇上过虫灾，规模还不小。
It's not necessarily the real Propagation. This star system went through the Swarm Disaster long ago, remember? And it was anything but small.
你是说，这只是过去的幻影吗？
Are you saying this is just an echo from the past?
最好是。也可能类似迷因，是根植在阿斯德纳人心底的恐惧，跟噩梦似的。
Ideally, yes. But it might also be more like a meme: A fear buried in the Asdanians' hearts like a nightmare.
所以，这片梦境果然不在家族掌控中。
So, this Dreamscape really isn't under The Family's control.
没准你是对的。沿着这条路继续找下去吧。至于它们究竟是什么……
Maybe you're right. Let's keep searching down this path. As for what they really are...
Let me try it out, then we'll know.
遗骸消失了。果然只是忆质形成的幻影吗？
The remains are gone. Was it just an illusion formed by memoria after all?
没跑了，难怪报废的入梦池不值钱。没有家族保护，普通人贸然来到这里，可有够受的了。
Figures. No wonder a scrapped Dreampool isn't worth a dime. Without The Family's protection, any regular visitor here is just begging for trouble.
等下还是当心点吧，未必所有幻影都是善茬。
Better stay on guard. Not every illusion has good intentions.
还有，其实绕开它们也可以的。
Also, you can actually just go around them.
没必要非得搭理虫子，这是你的坏习惯。
No one said you have to pay attention to the bugs. That's your bad habit.
抱歉，我没办法说服自己视而不见。
Sorry. I just can't bring myself to look the other way.
算了，大家都一样。明知不会有用，却总想为过去做点什么。
Never mind. Everyone's the same. They all try to do something for the past, even when they know it's futile.
只要能好受些，都由你——动作利落点就行。
If it makes you feel better, I'll leave it to you. Just be quick about it.
喔，帮手回话了。你先去大厅，她会派人接应你。
Oh, got a response from our helper. Head to the main lobby. She'll send someone to meet you.
但多留几个心眼。那家伙是个假面愚者，指不定……
But watch your back. That one's a Masked Fool. Who knows what they might...
没有袭击我。它们…是在「逃亡」吗？
They didn't attack me. Are they... "running away"?
What lies at the end of this corridor...
（遍地都是残骸，可它们不是幻影吗？难道……）
(Debris everywhere... but weren't they just illusions? Could it be...)
(That there's someone else here besides me.)
（真蛰虫死于高热反应，而且这道伤痕……）
(The True Sting died from a high heat reaction, and this scar...)
（虫群也就算了，可就算是忆质。）
(The Swarm is one thing, but even for memoria...)
（匹诺康尼，为何会出现「格拉默铁骑」？）
(Why would Glamoth's Iron Cavalry appear in Penacony?)
「下一片战场，希望能看见星星。」
"I hope we can see stars on the next battlefield."
"Should be able to find each other."
好啦——虽然不合时宜，但初次尝试，只能先到这里了。
Alright. Not the best timing, but that's as far as this first try goes.
怎么样，有什么不舒服的地方吗？
So, how are you feeling? Any discomfort?
严格来说，是我的记忆。我不能擅自代表他人。
Strictly speaking, these are my memories. I can't presume to speak for others.
那时，你刚刚抵达匹诺康尼，正在酒店办理入住。
You had just arrived in Penacony at that time and were checking in at the hotel.
如今的你，应当知晓「记忆」珍贵又危险。我必须非常小心，才能让过去一点一滴浮出水面。
By now, you should know that "memories" are both precious and dangerous. I must be extremely careful in allowing all the details of the past to come to the surface.
如果海量回忆一同涌现，你会难以承受。
If too many memories come flooding back at once, it would be too much for you to bear.
Tell me what happened to Firefly.
恕我不能亲口告诉你。如果用言语复述，无论是否有意，都会为回忆平添不实。
I'm afraid I can't tell you directly. Whether intentional or not, putting memories into words would only distort them.
放轻松。尘埃正在被一一拂去，看——
Relax... The dust is being swept aside, speck by speck. Look...
尽管其中一部分遭人窃取，但「匹诺康尼」的记忆，已再度清晰起来。
Though part of it was stolen, the memory of Penacony has become clear again.
你刚才看见的，是属于她的「开端」。这场美梦分成两条平行的道路——你行于的，名为「开拓」；她行于的，名为「终末」。
What you just witnessed was her "beginning." This dream diverges into two parallel paths: Yours, named the Trailblaze. And hers, named the Finality.
这两条路终会相交，为了抵达那一刻，我们要找出更多…记忆的矛盾之处。
These two paths will eventually intersect, and to reach that moment, we must find more... contradictions in the memories.
还记得她吧——无人不知的知更鸟，在现实酒店，你们早早相遇。
You still remember her, don't you? Robin, known by all... You encountered her early on at the hotel in reality.
在你入梦后，也是她使用「同谐」的力量，帮助你适应美梦。只是，自那场告别后——
After you entered the dream, she was using the Harmony's powers to help you adjust to the sweet dream. It's just that... after your farewell...
再相见时，她已成了一场阴谋的受害者。
She had already become a victim of a sinister plot when you saw her again.
两点之间，她究竟发现了什么，才会遭受如此可怕的命运？
What did she discover during that time that would make her suffer such a terrible fate?
小心，这一次，我们要更加深入……
Be careful. This time, we're going to dig deeper...
与你的「记忆」…全然不符的过去。
Into a past... utterly at odds with the "memories" you hold.
银狼，你听到什么声音了吗？
Silver Wolf? Did you hear something?
没注意，忆域里有些怪动静很正常，听说，很多回忆会一直重演。
I didn't notice anything. Strange disturbances in the Memory Zone are nothing unusual. They say... many memories of the past will replay over and over again.
不对…这声音，我绝对不会认错……
No... Wait. I'd recognize that sound anywhere...
太过弱小了，和现实中完全不同。
Way too weak. Nothing like in real life.
不过，能经历过去的记忆，有时也不算坏事吧？
But reliving old memories isn't always such a bad thing, is it?
看得出来，这趟出差——你心情不错。
Looks like this "business trip" has put you in good spirits.
按照银狼所说来到了房间附近……
You follow Silver Wolf's instructions and arrive near the room...
呵呵，毕竟这里是「梦境」嘛。
Hehe, well you are in the Dreamscape, after all.
看来这位客人还不习惯从现实到梦境的变化啊。别担心，这种「失重」在初入梦境的旅客间很常见。
Seems like our guest here hasn't gotten used to the transition. Fret not, feeling a sense of weightlessness is normal for new visitors.
知更鸟，请你帮助我们的朋友更好地适应这场美梦吧。
Robin, please guide our friend in getting more comfortable with the new environment.
没事的，放轻松，很快就会过去。
Don't worry, just relax. You'll be feeling like your normal self in no time.
别担心，继续吧，我会帮你的。
Don't worry, keep going, I'll help you.
What did you do to me?
别担心。她只是利用「同谐」的共鸣对你进行了调律，以便你能更自如地在梦境中掌控自己的身体。
Relax. Just did some tuning on you with the resonance of the Harmony to allow you to control your limbs freely in the Dreamscape.
匹诺康尼的美梦本质上是由「忆质」构成的世界。只有掌握它的性质，你才能在其中自由行动。
Essentially, the dream of Penacony is a world formed by memoria. Only by fully understanding its nature can you move freely within it.
除了流光忆庭的忆者，一般人很难随心所欲地操纵忆质。但没关系，在「同谐」的调律下——基本上，你可以依赖现实的物理法则理解梦中世界。

Unless you're one of the Memokeepers of the Garden of Recollection, it can be difficult at first to manipulate the memoria as you wish. But once you've been tuned by the Harmony, you can use the same laws of physics from the real world to understand how the dream world works.
哎呀…你瞧我，职业病又犯了。我总是改不掉这好为人师的毛病。
Oops... I've fallen into my professional habits again. I just can't seem to shake off this urge to be a know-it-all.
别在意，他从来都是这样。请好好享受家族为各位打造的美梦乐园吧，我们就先失陪了。祝你玩得开心！
Don't mind him. He's always like that. Please enjoy the beautiful dreamscape The Family has built for everyone. We shall take our leave. Have a blast!
该道歉的人是我。明知道你状态不佳，还提出这种过分的要求。
I'm the one who should apologize. I knew you weren't feeling well, yet I made such an unreasonable request.
我早该料到，失声只是表象，真正的问题出在「同谐」，对吗？
I should have known. Losing your voice was just the tip of the iceberg. The real problem lies with the Harmony, doesn't it?
Just as I thought... you figured it out too.
你那封信，我一直带在身上——
Your letter... I've kept it with me all this time...
别担心，事关重大，大典开幕前，我定会查明真相。
Don't worry. This is crucial. I'll uncover the truth before the festival begins.
偶尔也让我为你分担一些吧。匹诺康尼…是不是出事了？
Let me help you shoulder some of the burden. Did something happen in Penacony?
…谐乐大典将至，宾客鱼龙混杂，{RUBY_B#「梦主」}歌斐木先生{RUBY_E#}必须全心投入筹备，无暇他顾。

...The Charmony Festival is approaching, and with all sorts of guests mingling, {RUBY_B#Dreammaster}Mr. Gopher Wood{RUBY_E#} must focus entirely on the preparations, leaving no attention for other matters.
这给了一些人可乘之机。倘若家族真有叛徒，现在就是行动的最佳时机。
This creates an opening for some people to exploit. If there really is a traitor in The Family, now would be the perfect time to make their move.
听说「梦主」抱恙在身。我回来后，还一次都没见过他……
I heard the Dreammaster has fallen ill. Since I came back, I haven't seen him even once...
不久前，发生了一场意外。他病得很重，短时间内，恐怕无法以人形现身了。
There was an accident not long ago. He's gravely ill, and I'm afraid he won't be able to appear in his humanoid form for a while.
所以，我们更要替先生分忧。追查一事就交给我，你什么都不用想，只需专注于舞台。
That's why we need to help him even more. Leave the investigation to me. You don't have to worry about anything else, just focus on the stage.
没有可是。听着，知更鸟——切勿和梦中的「死亡」扯上关系。
No buts. Listen, Robin. Never get involved with "Death" in dreams.
你要放声歌唱。我向你保证，等到开幕时，不会有任何杂音掩盖你的光芒。
You need to sing your heart out. I promise you, when the curtain rises, no noise will drown out your brilliance.
即便是「同谐」自身的影子，也不行。
Not even the shadow of Harmony itself.
也对。从小到大，没有什么事是哥哥办不到的。
That's true. Ever since we were kids, there's nothing my big brother couldn't handle.
那我就去准备啦？不占用你的时间了。
Then I'll go get ready? I won't take up any more of your time.
多加小心，哥哥。记得给自己留个好位置。
Be careful, brother. And don't forget to save a good spot for yourself.
当然。我不介意为此徇私。
Of course. Who says I can't play favorites once in a while?
哥哥，总是这样言不由衷啊。
Big brother, you're always hiding your true feelings like this.
<color=#dbc291ff>装作无事发生，但我在朝露公馆看见…你明明已经焦头烂额了。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You're acting like everything's fine, but I saw you at Dewlight Pavilion... You were clearly at your wit's end.</color>
写那封信时，我还能勉强进行「调律」，可后来，情况却越来越糟……
When I wrote that letter, I could still barely manage to "tune," but later, things just kept getting worse...
直觉告诉我，一定是*梦境*出现了什么问题。
My intuition tells me that something must be wrong with the dreamscape.
以我现在的状态，不知能否感知到异常……
In my current state, I'm wondering if I can even sense any anomalies...
尽力而为吧。但愿，这只是虚惊一场。
I'll do my best. Let's hope this is just a false alarm.
Don't even think about running away, you stowaway!
S—Sorry for bothering you! Please, I need your help...
怎么了，我来帮你。保护美少女我义不容辞！
What's wrong? I'll help you. I can't possibly ignore a beautiful lady in trouble!
Hey, look! She has an accomplice!
Good work! Now we can nab them both in one go!
看来不是偶然，猎犬也和我一样，捕捉到了那一丝杂音。
Seems it wasn't a coincidence. The Bloodhound picked up that strange noise too, just like I did.
还是…先不出面了。如果那女孩真是外来者，对我而言，这是个机会。
Better to... stay out of sight for now. If that girl really is an outsider, this could be my chance.
行了行了，小子们——到此为止。
你们是怎么办事儿的？睁大眼睛瞧瞧，这姑娘是我们要找的偷渡犯吗？
What's gotten into you all? Open your eyes and take a good look. Is this lady the stowaway we're looking for?
你不知道么？棕色头发、灰马甲——这位就是家族派来看护谐乐大典的治安官啊。
Don't you know him? Look at his brown hair and gray vest. He's the officer sent here by The Family to maintain order at the Charmony Festival.
原、原来如此…报告长官，我们正在捉拿偷渡犯——就是这个小姑娘，可疑得很，一定是她！
I—I see... Sir, the thing is, we're trying to apprehend a stowaway, and that young lady there looks very suspicious. We're sure she's the one!
放屁。你们再好好看看？目击报告说是个银色的家伙，你们给我抓银色头发的小姑娘？能是一回事儿吗？还和客人打上架了？！

That's nonsense. Take another look, will you? The witness report says that the suspect is a lad with silver hair, and you guys are going after a girl with silver hair. Does that even make sense? She's our guest!
Well, just get out of my way and I'll take care of this.
他…没有说谎。可为什么？猎犬家系的治安官，不应该察觉不到异常。
He's... not lying. But why? An officer from the Bloodhound Family shouldn't fail to sense something is amiss.
放心吧，小姐。我相信这是一场误会，这么可爱的女孩怎么会是偷渡犯呢。
Don't worry. I believe this is just a misunderstanding. How could such a lovely girl like you be a stowaway?
…谢谢。如果没有您出手相助，我真的不知道该怎么办了。
...Thanks. Without your kind help, I wouldn't know what to do.
我还有事，先告辞了。如果你们有需要，就找附近的幼犬联络我吧。祝你们享受这场美梦。
I need to get going. If you need help, you can reach out to me through the young Bloodhounds in this area. I wish you an enjoyable experience in this land of dreams.
认识我的人太多，直接跟上去恐怕不合适。
Too many people know me. It wouldn't be wise to follow them so openly.
看来，只能使用一些手段了。
Looks like I'll have to use a few methods of my own.
I hope I still have the strength to do this...
虽然被猎犬家系的人当成了偷渡犯，但我其实是本地人哦——鸢尾花家系的艺者「流萤」！尽管只是临时演员……
Although the Bloodhounds mistook me for a stowaway, I'm actually a local. My name is Firefly, and I'm from the Iris Family. I work as a stage performer, although right now I'm just an extra...
成功了！万幸，没有被发觉……
Success! Thank goodness, I wasn't discovered...
那女孩…自称鸢尾花家系的艺者？可她的声音里，我听不见共鸣……
That girl... claims to be an artist from the Iris Family? But I can't hear any resonance in her voice...
…不说这个了！我带你去游览城镇…我们走吧！
...We can talk about that another time! Right now, I wanna give you a tour of the town... Here we go!
得小心些，不能被人发现。
Be careful. Can't let anyone find me.
考虑到你是第一次来，不如就从最简单的开始吧，美梦排排乐和幸运转盘都很容易上手哦。
Since this is your first time here, I say we start with the easiest games. The Dreamy Slots and Lucky Wheel are pretty straightforward.
看来是我多虑了。抱歉，{NICKNAME}…还有流萤小姐。也许这只是一段美好的相遇，仅此而已。
I guess I was worried for nothing. Sorry, {NICKNAME}... and Miss Firefly. Maybe this was just a beautiful encounter, nothing more.
我还是离开梦境看看吧，不知回到现实中，情况会不会好转……
I should leave the dreamscape and see the sights beyond it... Maybe things will be better in the real world...
该入场的人都齐了。不是我扫兴，但提醒一句……
Everyone who needs to be here is here. Not to be a buzzkill, but just a reminder...
别忘了你的「第一次死亡」。
她在和谁说话？「死亡」又是……
Who's she talking to? And what's this about "Death"...
Shh... let's not talk about this right now.
不，我的直觉没错…那女孩果然不简单。
No, my intuition was right... That girl is definitely not what she seems.
Now, I need to be extra careful.
哟，这不是我忠实的大顾客——{NICKNAME}嘛！
Hey, well if it isn't my most loyal customer, {NICKNAME}?
真是好久不见啊，亲爱的！
It's been such a long time, old friend!
总觉得，场面越来越混乱了。
I feel like things are getting more and more chaotic.
依旧那么光芒四射啊，远远瞧见一眼，就知道是你了。
Still radiant as ever. I could spot you from a mile away.
来打个招呼，你在这做什么呢？
I came over to say hi. What brings you here?
(Drawing too much attention is never a good thing...)
喔，让我想起那句熟悉的格言：「远远看着聚光灯下的人，会觉得她魅力无穷……」
Oh, reminds me of that old saying: "From afar, anyone under the spotlight seems endlessly charming..."
「但只有走近了，才知道那颗心多么魂不守舍。」
"But only when you get close do you realize how restless that heart truly is."
让你见笑了。我只是出来散散心…谐乐大典举办在即，多少有些紧张。
Sorry you had to see that. I just came out to clear my head... The Charmony Festival is coming up soon, and I'm a bit nervous.
嗓音的事，我听说了。有空来惊梦酒吧，我帮你看看是怎么回事。
I heard about your voice issue. Drop by the Dreamjolt Hostelry when you're free, and I'll take a look at what's going on.
多谢。没想到，时至今日，我仍要麻烦舒翁女士。
Thanks. I never thought even after all this time, I'd still be troubling you, Lady Siobhan.
看来你是挺紧张的，跟我说话都这么端着了。
You must be pretty nervous if you're being this formal with me.
看来我说中了？来吧，二位——让我老桑博带你们好好体验一下大人的世界！
Looks like my analysis is spot-on. Follow me, you two. Let me give you a taste of the adult world!
(I'm afraid I'll have to take my leave...)
我会登门拜访的，只是现在……
I'll come visit you properly, it's just that right now...
需要些私人时间，我明白。那就约好了，改天见，大明星。
You need some alone time, I get it. It's a date then, catch you later, superstar.
对了，毕竟是「谐乐大典」——用人们的话说，你会为「同谐」献唱。
Right, it is the Charmony Festival after all. As people say, you'll be performing for the Harmony.
还记得么？某次巡演前，我问过你一个问题。算算时间，也过去很久了，不知道你有没有找到答案——
Remember? Before one of your tours, I asked you a question. It's been quite a while since then. I wonder if you found your answer...
知更鸟，你是为了什么而歌唱？
Robin, what do you sing for?
I think I've got my answer now.
但比起言语，我更想用歌声来回答。这样才更有说服力吧？
But instead of words, I'd rather answer with a song. That would be more convincing, no?
相比一个笃定的回答，这倒令人更加信服。期待你的演出。
That's actually more convincing than a straight answer. Looking forward to your performance.
抱歉，舒翁女士。如果有时间，我们本该好好聊聊的……
Sorry, Lady Siobhan. If there was more time, we could have had a proper chat...
Now, let's get down to business.
这…他们走过了商业中心……
Hmm... they passed through the commercial district...
And then... the voice just vanished.
难道她回到了现实？不应该，那里又没有出入口……
Did she return to reality? That can't be right. There's no entrance or exit there...
又出现了？比之前更遥远，这次是在……
Again? Further away than before. This time in...
原来如此，是地下通道啊。
Oh, I get it now. It's the underground tunnel.
也对。早该想到，那里时常会有偷渡案件。是我粗心了，当时应该问问那两位猎犬的。
Right, makes sense. I should've known. That place is a hotspot for smuggling cases. I should've pressed those two Bloodhounds for answers back then.
到这里就无法追踪了。是因为梦境施工还没完成么？
Can't navigate any further from here. Is it because the Dreamscape construction isn't complete yet?
家族仍在一刻不停地编织美梦，匹诺康尼也向来不与外界交恶……
The Family never stops weaving their sweet dreams, and Penacony has always maintained good relationships with the outside world...
为何偏偏在这个时候，有人要图谋不轨？
Why would someone choose this moment, of all times, to plot something sinister?
没想到能在这遇见您！我、我刚加入猎犬家系的日子，正是您送来了家族问候。
I never thought I'd meet you here! When I joined the Bloodhound Family, you were the one who delivered The Family's greetings.
您肯定不记得我了。不，这么说太失礼，我还没资格……
You probably don't remember me. No, that's too rude of me to say, I'm not worthy...
Of course I remember you, Mr. Loka.
我留在匹诺康尼的时间不多，能为「同谐」代劳的机会更少。只要愿意前往，我会事先熟悉每一个人——
I don't spend a lot of time in Penacony, and have even fewer chances to help out the Harmony. If I'm willing to go, I always make sure to get to know everyone beforehand...
毕竟家族的问候不能是场面话，得是真心诚意送给每一位家人的祝福。
After all, Family greetings can't be mere pleasantries. They must be heartfelt blessings for each and every family member.
知更鸟小姐…太光芒四射了……
不过，您怎么会来筑梦边境？是有什么吩咐么？
By the way, what brings you to Dream's Edge? Do you have anything you need from us?
打扰了，您见过两位游客吗？都是灰发，其中一位…是戴着发卡的少女。
Pardon me, but have you seen two tourists? They both have gray hair, and one of them... is a young lady wearing a hair clip.
您是在找人吗？还真没印象…要不，我帮您留意留意？
You're looking for someone? I don't really recall seeing them... but I can keep an eye out for you if you'd like?
星、星期日先生？您怎么也……
M—Mr. Sunday? What are you doing here...
听闻有人心术不正，我特地前来看看。
I heard someone's up to no good, so I came to check things out myself.
开个玩笑，别紧张。知更鸟久未还乡，我特意带她来这边看看，追忆些童年旧事。
Just kidding, don't be so tense. Robin hasn't been home for a while, so I brought her here specifically to look around and reminisce about her childhood days.
至于方才提到的二位，是我们遇见的客人。{F#她们}{M#他们}遗落了些物品，我已经归还了。不必再向任何人探问。
As for those two mentioned earlier, they were guests we met. They left some items behind, which I've already returned. There's no need to ask anyone else about it.
前方是施工重地，我们就不深入了。告辞。
There's a construction site ahead, so we won't go any further. Goodbye.
刚才不便直言。知更鸟，你为何要来这里？
I couldn't speak freely earlier. Robin, why did you come here?
就像你说的，是来追忆一些旧事。
Like you said, I'm here to reminisce about old times.
What about you? What brings you here?
追查要犯本就是我的职责。
Tracking down criminals is my duty.
而你，我的妹妹…你从小就这么执拗，每到这时，我都会希望你从未拥有这项品质。
And you, my dear sister... you've always been this stubborn, and in times like these, I wish you never had this trait.
你听不进我的话，仍在擅自调查？
You're still investigating on your own, ignoring what I said?
是啊。我实在放心不下「死亡」，才一路追踪到这里。
Yeah. I can't stop thinking of "death," so I followed some people all the way here.
毕竟在朝露公馆，我亲眼看见了那副*惨状*。我做不到让你独自硬撑。
After all, I witnessed that horrific scene at the Dewlight Pavilion with my own eyes. I can't let you bear this burden alone.
是吗？<color=#dbc291ff>你看见了啊，那些身处美梦，却被「死亡」带走的家人。</color>
Oh? <color=#dbc291ff>So you saw them... those Family members who were in the sweet dream, yet "Death" took them away.</color>
嗯。我只看见资料凌乱地摆放在桌面上，但凡有半分余力，哥哥都不会容忍那种杂乱无章的景象。
Hmm. I only saw documents strewn on the table-top. If my brother had even an ounce of energy left, he would never have tolerated such a disorganized sight.
就像现在，如果不是为了从你口中问出真相……
Just like now, if it weren't for getting the truth out of you...
我也绝对不会容忍，你傲慢又无礼的伪装。
I absolutely won't tolerate your arrogant and disrespectful facade.
在说什么呢，亲爱的妹妹？
What are you talking about, dear sister?
「开个玩笑，别紧张」——但哥哥他，从来不会对陌生人开玩笑。
"Just kidding, don't be so tense"... but my brother never jokes around with strangers.
我亲眼看着他一一磨去自己的棱角，把它们藏到内心的最深处。
I watched as he smoothed away the sharp corners of himself, bit by bit, hiding them in the deepest corners of his heart.
别再冒犯我的兄长，否则——除去家族公事，你要再担上一份我的私怨了。
Stop insulting my elder brother, otherwise, you won't just be dealing with The Family... You'll be dealing with me, too.
我还以为，你会喜欢我的「二次创作」呢。
And here I thought you'd enjoy my little creative spin I'd put on him.
不觉得那样的他，更讨人喜欢吗？
Don't you think he's more likeable that way?
在匹诺康尼冒充一位家主，想必你已做好了心理准备。
I trust you're mentally prepared to face the consequences of posing as a Family head on Penacony.
哎呀，我倒是没料到，会被一只小鸟套了话。
Geez, I didn't expect to get played by a little bird.
不过，你真觉得自己有能耐？想抓我的家伙多的是，鸡翅膀女孩，你又凭什么？
But do you really think you've got what it takes? There's no shortage of people trying to catch me, chicken-winged girlie. What makes you so special?
这里仍由五大家系管理，一路上，你也能看到有多少成员驻守。
This place is still governed by the Five Lineages, and along the way, you've seen how many of their members are stationed here.
更何况，在这梦境边缘，我也可以……
Besides, here at the edge of the dreamscape, I can also...
可以什么？觉得自己能拿回失去的力量？
What do you mean "can"? You think you can get your lost power back?
不得不说，你是很有天赋，才会被选中成为「谐乐大典」的调弦师。
I'll give credit where it's due. You must be quite talented to have been chosen as a Chordmaster for the Charmony Festival.
你也很聪明，几乎把一切都猜对了，唯独搞错了一件事——
You're also quite clever. You got almost everything right, except for one thing...
失声的小鸟，有没有一种可能，美梦从来都没有变。它之所以不再欢迎你，只是因为你「长大」了。
Silent little bird, have you considered that maybe your sweet dreams never changed at all? They just stopped welcoming you because you "grew up."
就像面具，一旦戴太久，就再也摘不下来。
Like a mask... Once you wear it for too long, you can never take it off again.
属于你的那一副，真的叫做「同谐」么？
As for that mask of yours... Is it really called the Harmony?
Hm? The twin of the Order?
人们都说，「知更鸟」维护领地时，总是连命都不在乎。没想到，这个名字还挺适合你。
You know what they say. Robins will fight tooth and nail to protect their territory, even at the cost of their own lives. Looks like that name suits you pretty well.
哦，算算时间，小灰毛也快完事了吧？花火大人，要赶下一场戏咯~
Oh, right on schedule. Gray Hair should be wrapping up soon! Miss Sparkle, time to head to the next scene!
…哎呀，本以为在梦境边缘，能瞒过你的眼睛的。看来主场就是主场，哪儿都躲不掉。
...Oh my, I thought I could fool your eyes at the edge of the Dreamscape. But I guess there's no hiding from you on your home turf.
怎么，动了你的人，要找我算账？要不先坐下来谈谈呢，我看你也挺有耐心的。
What, you want to settle the score with me for messing with your people? Why don't we sit down and have a chat? You seem like a patient one to me.
所以，说说吧，你想从我这里…拿走什么？
So, tell me... what exactly do you want to take from me?
I've been wondering about something from just now...
附近，似乎有一道微弱的「不协和音」。
There seems to be a faint "dissonance" nearby.
得靠近些，找个隐蔽的角落。
We need to get closer. Find a hidden spot.
如果是我误会了…事后，我会认真补偿。
If I'm wrong about this... I'll make it up to you properly afterward.
距离…好远。他们这是去哪儿了？
The distance... it's so far. Just where did they go?
无眠之夜的开端 你初次入梦的时刻
The beginning of the sleepless night, the moment you first entered the dream.
感觉如何，要稍作休息吗？
How are you feeling? Need to take a break?
那名愚者杀死了她，而你曾经见过的遇害现场，也是由她伪造。
The Fool killed her, and the crime scene you witnessed was staged by her.
当然，匹诺康尼不存在真正的死亡。对知更鸟来说，这只是一次小小的波折。
Of course, there's no such thing as true death on Penacony. For Robin, this is just a minor setback.
形势比我记忆中更复杂…
Things are more complicated than I remember...
那片舞台名为「美梦」。每个人都各怀目的，希求将其实现。而愿望在交织与碰撞时，火花总是极为纷繁，令人难以看清。

That stage is called the "sweet dream." Everyone upon it carries their own desires, striving to see them fulfilled. Yet when those desires intertwine and collide, the sparks that fly are dazzling, and clarity itself becomes obscured.
在此之前，我还有一个问题。我们也算相处了一段时间，此时此刻，你对我的感觉怎么样？
Before we continue, I have one more question. We've spent some time together, so at this moment, how do you feel about me?
I feel pretty good, why, what's wrong?
还真令人…心花怒放。可惜，我指的不是这种感觉。
How... delightful. A pity, though, because that's not the kind of feeling I was thinking about.
你愿意信任我到哪种程度？
How much are you willing to trust me?
事实上，我也曾出现在你的「记忆」里。而且，同样与匹诺康尼有关。
As a matter of fact, I've appeared in your "memories" before. And similarly, it was related to Penacony.
It depends on what you did...
正合我意，那么…我们继续吧。
That's exactly what I like to hear.... let's continue then.
以我的标准…还算不错？口说无凭，我们继续吧。到那时，如果你仍然无法信任我，我会留下足够的时间…无论何种责难，我都能够接受。

By my measure... it's not bad at all. But talk is cheap, so let's keep going. When the time comes, if you still can't trust me, I'll give you plenty of time... I can take whatever criticism comes my way.
不妨顺着方才的思绪，再次深入其中……
Let's follow that train of thought and delve deeper...
你在筑梦边境的经历，连我也无从知晓。询问流萤时，她不愿回答。
Even I don't know about your experiences in Dream's Edge. When I asked Firefly about it, she declined to give an answer.
但从她的神情来看，我相信…那是一段只属于你们两人的，美好而又难忘的时光。
But judging from her expression, I believe... it must have been a beautiful and unforgettable time that belonged to just the two of you.
而花火也不是只为取乐而来，她是星核猎手的合作者。
And Sparkle wasn't just here for fun. She's in cahoots with the Stellaron Hunters.
她伪装成你的故人，用尽各种手段，暗示梦境的真相。最后，干脆直接将你们送入了梦境深处。
She disguised herself as someone from your past, using every means possible to hint at the truth of the dreamscape. In the end, she simply sent you both deep into the dreamscape.
多么好心的愚者啊，「钟表匠」米哈伊尔的过去，也因此被你和流萤掀开了一角。
What a kind-hearted Fool she was. Thanks to her, you and Firefly managed to uncover a piece of Watchmaker Mikhail's past.
而在那之中，也潜藏着危险。
And the dangers that lurk within.
忆域迷因，「何物朝向死亡」。至少在那时，你误以为它很危险。
A Memory Zone Meme, "Something Unto Death." At least back then, you mistakenly thought it was dangerous.
在一位…姑且形容为优雅吧。这位优雅的忆者女士，帮助你们逃离了那里。但仓促间，你和流萤就此失散。而她接下来的经历，或许和你记忆中存在出入。

With the help of a... let's say "graceful" Memokeeper lady, you managed to escape from there. But in the rush, you and Firefly got separated. And her experiences afterward might differ from what you remember.
I was there at that time too.
…别怕，我接住你了。感觉还好吗？
...Don't worry, I've got you. How are you feeling?
猛然穿过忆质，总要经历一阵恍惚。那位忆者心思不太单纯呢，她有能力将你们一齐送走，却刻意将你留了下来。
Passing through memoria so suddenly always leaves you in a daze. That Memokeeper had ulterior motives. She could have sent all of you away, but deliberately kept you behind.
是忆域迷因，匹诺康尼有些传说提到过它，并把它称为「死亡」。我捕捉到了一些不同寻常之处，但没来得及看清。
It's a Memory Zone Meme. Some Penaconian legends mentioned it and called it "Death." I caught something unusual, but couldn't get a clear look at it.
但我看到了。在它准备行凶的瞬间，它的瞳孔当中，出现了「另一片梦境」的倒影。与十二时刻有些相似，气氛却完全不同。

But I saw it. In that instant before it was about to strike, a reflection of another dreamscape appeared in its pupils. It was somewhat similar to the Twelve Hours, yet the atmosphere was completely different.
美梦中不存在「死亡」——如果说，这不是一句谎言呢？所谓的死亡，只是让我们沉入更深的梦境。
What if "Death" doesn't exist in sweet dreams... or so they say. But what if that's not a lie? Perhaps death is just sinking into a deeper dreamscape.
可惜，来了位多管闲事的忆者。下次再见面，交给我就好，我得…让她享受一段刻骨铭心的时光。
Too bad, a nosy Memokeeper had to show up. Next time we meet, leave it to me. I'll... give her an experience she won't soon forget.
每次这么说，享受的人，好像都是你自己吧。这一次，还是别太过火了。
Every time you say that, it's always you who seems to be having fun. This time, try not to go overboard.
也不算什么坏事，就算我真的迎来死亡，也没机会再告诉他们真相。{F#她们}{M#他们}还在附近吗？
It's not necessarily a bad thing. If I really do meet my end, I won't have a chance to tell them the truth anyway. Are they still around?
我感知不到，恐怕返回现实了吧？
I can't sense them anymore. I'm afraid they must have gone back to reality.
还是不行，在原始梦境里，总是联络不上银狼。
Still no good. I can't get in touch with Silver Wolf in the Primordial Dreamscape.
我给她留了言，如果她能收到，会帮忙引导{NICKNAME}回到这里。
I left her a message. If she gets it, she'll help guide {NICKNAME} back here.
或者，我们也先回现实一趟，联系上银狼再说。
Or we could head back to reality first and get in touch with Silver Wolf.
别急，此时贸然穿越梦境，要比之前危险许多。
Hold on, recklessly crossing through the dreamscape now would be far more dangerous than before.
「死亡」闹出的动静太大，那位{RUBY_B#「梦主」歌斐木}在美梦中无所不能的存在{RUBY_E#}，也将视线投向这里了。
"Death" caused such a huge commotion that the {RUBY_B#"Dreammaster" Gopher Wood}omnipotent being within the sweet dream{RUBY_E#} has turned its gaze upon this place.
一时半会还不会有事，「死亡」吸引着他的注意，只要我们小心些，就不会暴露。
We should be fine for now. "Death" has his attention, as long as we are careful, we won't be exposed.
甚至…在这片梦境中，我们有机会找到反击他的手段。
In fact... within this dreamscape, we might find a way to strike back against him.
嗯，在你到来前，我先去搜集了一些情报。就我所知，他曾将自己<color=#dbc291ff>最为阴暗的罪行</color>掩埋于此。
Mm-hmm, before you arrived, I did some digging around. From what I've learned, he buried his <color=#dbc291ff>darkest crimes</color> right here.
无论那是什么，我相信，总会起到作用。在他们回来之前，不妨去找找看。
Whatever it is, I believe it'll be of some use. Let's go look for it before they come back.
看附近的痕迹，是「死亡」下的手。可它们…竟然真的死去了？
From the traces nearby, it was "Death's" doing. But they... did they really die?
不，你的猜想没错。只是，这些鸟儿不受另一片梦境欢迎。
No, your conjecture is right. It's just that these birds weren't welcome in another dreamscape.
见过，可这反倒耐人寻味，战果和我预想中全然相反。
Yes, but that's what makes this so intriguing. The outcome of the battle was the complete opposite of what I expected.
对了，有件很重要的事，我似乎还从没问过——
That reminds me, there's something important I still haven't asked you yet...
你想不想，和我死在一起？
Would you like to die together with me?
我就喜欢你猝不及防的样子，很可爱。
I just love catching you off guard like that. It's adorable.
那…稍微走开几步吧，我有一些猜想。会有些风险，如果发生了什么，不必管我。
Then... take a few steps back. I have a few conjectures. There might be some risk... If anything happens, don't worry about me.
这些乌鸫，正是<color=#dbc291ff>「梦主」歌斐木的化身，那位在美梦中无所不能的存在</color>。在他面前，「死亡」不该拥有反抗之力。
These ravens are <color=#dbc291ff>the incarnation of the Dreammaster Gopher Wood, that omnipotent being in the sweet dream</color>. In front of him, even "Death" has no strength to resist.
我刚才释放的力量，已经足以被他察觉，降下致死一击，但我们却安然无恙。
The power I just released should have been enough for him to notice and deliver a fatal blow, yet here we are, completely unharmed.
…有时候，你和刃还挺像。我是说…在可能死去的时候。
...You know, you're quite similar to Blade sometimes. I mean... when you're staring death in the face.
我可不是带着如释重负的心情，我是在享受…一生仅有一次的刺激。
It's not relief I feel. I'm savoring... a once-in-a-lifetime thrill.
我如果也只是一次就好了。
If only it was just once for me too.
不过，真的是他？我记得，很久之前的一场暴乱中，梦主的身躯已被焚毁，如今只能在美梦中延续生命。
But was it really him? If I remember correctly, the Dreammaster's body was burned to ashes in a riot long ago, and he can now only sustain his life within the sweet dream.
不仅如此，在漫长的时光中，他已将自身与匹诺康尼的每一寸土地融汇。
Not only that, over the long passage of time, he has merged himself with every inch of Penacony's land.
「梦主」二字，不是说他掌控了梦境——而是已让梦境本身，化作自己的第二副躯壳。
The title "Dreammaster" doesn't mean he merely controls the dreamscape. Rather, it means he has already turned the dreamscape itself into his second body.
极端情况下，他恐怕能将整个匹诺康尼付之一炬——但愿他不会舍得。
In extreme cases, he could probably burn all of Penacony to the ground... Though hopefully he wouldn't have the heart to do it.
别急，眼下我们安然无恙。或许他并非不想，而是暂且不能为难我们呢？
Easy now, we're safe for the time being. Maybe it's not that he doesn't want to act against us, but rather that he can't. At least not yet?
近来歌斐木自称抱恙，从未在十二时刻现身。偏偏就在最近，他又在梦境深处，掩埋了自己<color=#dbc291ff>最为阴暗的罪行</color>。
Lately, Gopher Wood has been claiming to be ill, never appearing in the Twelve Hours. Yet just recently, he buried his <color=#dbc291ff>darkest crime</color> deep within the dreamscape.
你是说，掩埋这桩罪行，让他付出了很大的代价，让全知全能出现了缺陷…倒是很有可能。会和「钟表匠的遗产」有关吗？

So you're saying that burying this crime took a heavy toll on him, leaving a flaw in his supposed omniscience and omnipotence... That does sound plausible. Could it have something to do with the Watchmaker's Legacy?
我不那么认为，毕竟，那秘密被冠上了「最为阴暗」的形容。也或许…「遗产」并非仅有一份。走吧，去亲眼看看，我们就能知道了。
I don't think so. After all, that secret was branded as "the darkest." And perhaps... the "Legacy" is not one alone. Only by seeing it for ourselves can we know.
任何人都会犯下的错误——总为秘密设下重重警戒，反倒因此露出破绽。
A mistake anyone could make... Setting up layer upon layer of security around a secret only ends up exposing its flaws.
要来试试吗，多积攒些面对迷因的经验？
Why don't we give it a shot, and build up some experience dealing with memes?
不会有什么新经验的，我会启动「火萤IV型」，速战速决。
There won't be any new experiences. I'll activate Fyrefly Type-IV and end this quickly.
真可惜——我更乐意看到你陷入窘境，然后对我更加依赖。
What a pity. I would've much preferred to see you in a pinch, so you'd have to rely on me all the more.
只是伪装成一个入口。那道裂痕并非通往别处，而是一把记忆之锁，钥匙，则是承载特定记忆的一枚光锥。
It only looks like an entrance. That crack doesn't lead anywhere. It's a lock of memories, and the key is a Light Cone carrying specific memories.
显然，歌斐木得到过忆者的帮助——那枚光锥不在我们手中，恐怕要无功而返了。
Clearly, Gopher Wood had help from a Memokeeper, and since that Light Cone isn't in our hands, I fear we'll be returning empty-handed.
Is there really no other way?
可以碰碰运气，说不定协助歌斐木的忆者，和我有类似的习惯。
We could try our luck. Perhaps the Memokeeper helping Gopher Wood shares the same habits as me.
我来找找看吧，别抱太大希望。
I'll take a look, but don't get your hopes up.
看来我们运气不错，附近果然有他们的「备用手段」。
Looks like we're in luck. We've found one of their "contingencies."
你有过类似的记忆吗？始终不愿忘却，无数次回想的一段时光。
Do you have memories like that? A moment in time you never want to forget, one that you find yourself reliving over and over again.
Of course... and more than just one.
别多心，我只是在模仿某些惹人厌烦的忆者。在他们看来，一段记忆被回想得越多，就越容易面目全非。
Don't take it to heart, I'm just imitating those annoying Memokeepers. In their view, the more a memory is recalled, the more likely it is to become distorted beyond recognition.
每次回忆，你都可能篡改它的面目。借此，他们强调着光锥的必要性。多么可悲啊，从未明白过，越是永恒的事物，越会引发毁灭的欲望。

Each time you recall a memory, you risk distorting its true face. That's how they justify the necessity of Light Cones. How tragic. They never understood the truth: The more eternal a thing, the more it stirs the desire to destroy it.
但具体到现在，他们倒是没说错。即使歌斐木亲自到来，也必须带上特定的光锥。他自己的记忆，已经不再可靠。
But they weren't wrong about the present situation. Even if Gopher Wood were to come in person, he'd need to bring a specific Light Cone. His own memories can no longer be trusted.
正是为了避免这一可能，我们眼前，才会存在「备用手段」。
That's exactly why we have a "contingency" plan right in front of us.
可从刚才开始，我就什么都没看到……
But I haven't seen anything since just now...
在这里面，想必存有某种「温和的刺激」，让他能在此时将记忆找回，以免遭到篡改。
Inside here, there must be some kind of "gentle trigger" that would help him recover his memories before they are subjected to distortion.
可这对我们来说，应该毫无意义。能让他触景生情的事物，在我们眼中，只会莫名其妙。
But for us, that's probably meaningless. Whatever triggers his memories would just seem bizarre and random to us.
不过，还是进去看看吧，总归能多获得一些线索。
Still, let's go take a look inside. We might pick up some clues at least.
没错，请吧，一切行动都将带来喜悦……
That's right. Go ahead. Every action brings joy...
你…不必勉强，我可以代劳。
You... don't have to force yourself. I can take care of it.
潜入匹诺康尼时，你见到的也是她吗？
Was it her that you saw when infiltrating Penacony?
是，她正在清剿虫群。但那只是忆质，很快就消失了。银狼说过，匹诺康尼也曾遭遇过虫灾，我一直试着告诉自己，她只是在路过时伸出了援手。

Yes, I saw her fighting off the Swarm. But it was just memoria, and it vanished quickly. Silver Wolf mentioned that Penacony had also faced a Swarm invasion before. I kept telling myself that she was just passing by and lending a helping hand.
在一切结束后，她已经安然无恙地离开了。
And after everything was over, she had already left safe and sound.
那么这一次，你还想知道答案吗？
So this time, do you still want to know the answer?
会有什么不同吗？我很想听你告诉我…这也只是忆质而已，并非真实。
Would it be any different? I really want you to tell me... that this is not real. It's just memoria.
可冷静想想，那什么也无法改变，记忆…终究是已经发生过的事。
But thinking about it calmly, nothing can change it. A memory... is ultimately something that's already happened.
I wish I wasn't like this.
我和她…应该能被称为朋友。我更希望为她大哭一场，像所有普通人那样，为她感到悲伤。
She and I... we could be called friends. I wish I could just break down and cry for her, like any normal person would, to mourn her loss.
可浮现在我脑海里的，却是那样一句话——
But what surfaced in my mind was that one sentence...
这是我们早已注定的命运，总有一天，我也要迎来相同的结局。
This is our predestined fate, and one day, I too shall meet the same end.
嗯，不是今天。虽然为时已晚，但也有其他事，我能为她去做。
Hmm, not today. Though it's already too late, there are still other things I can do for her.
也许你该先去静一静，很遗憾，这并非忆质，而是真正的格拉默铁骑。显而易见，匹诺康尼是她生命的最后一站。
Maybe you should calm down first. Unfortunately, this isn't memoria, but a real Glamoth Knight. Clearly, Penacony was her final destination.
她能够来到匹诺康尼，已经令我很惊讶了。
I'm surprised she made it to Penacony at all.
哦？是「格拉默军规」？她违背过那些禁令？
Oh? The Glamoth Regulations? She broke those prohibitions?
更严重，她是格拉默铁骑第一位，也是唯一一位「叛逃者」。那时帝国仍未覆灭，但她不想接受战死的命运，独自离开了。她说…想要自己选择如何死去。

Worse than that, she was the first and only "deserter" of the Glamoth Iron Cavalry. The Empire hadn't fallen yet, but she didn't want to accept a fate of dying in battle, so she left on her own. She said... she wanted to choose how she would die.
我们有过一次短暂的告别…但我没有阻止她，我做不到。离开格拉默帝国，本身就会让她迅速失去生命。
We had a brief farewell... but I didn't stop her, I couldn't... Leaving the Glamoth Empire itself would quickly drain her life away.
既然我们无法改变结果，我又为什么，要阻止她选择过程呢？
If we can't change the outcome, why should I stop her from making her own choice?
Quickly drain her life away... oh, Entropy Loss Syndrome?
嗯，就像我一样——「未经允许，严禁脱离驾驶舱；存活的骑士应主动归队」，这些不仅仅是军规，也是我们延续生命的条件。

Yes, just like me. "Leaving the cockpit without permission is strictly prohibited. Surviving knights must actively return to formation." These aren't just military regulations. They're the terms of our survival.
除了驾驶「火萤IV型」以外，我都必须呆在休眠舱里。否则，失熵症会进一步恶化。
When not piloting the Fyrefly Type IV, I must stay in the cryosleep pod. Otherwise, my Entropy Loss Syndrome will only get worse.
原因呢，现在你有眉目了吗？
So, have you figured out the reason yet?
卡芙卡和{NICKNAME}找到我的那会儿，我刚刚结束了作为格拉默铁骑的……
When {NICKNAME} and Kafka found me, I had just finished my duties as a Glamoth Knight...
…作为格拉默铁骑的最后一战。
...my final battle as a Glamoth Knight.
帝国就此覆灭，一切限制都不复存在，绿色的火焰第一次在我身上燃起…而我也第一次，接触到了格拉默铁骑真正的命途力量。
The Empire fell, and all restrictions vanished. For the first time, green flames ignited upon my body... and for the first time, I touched the true Path power that the Glamoth knights wield.
那时我才明白——<color=#dbc291ff>失熵症是名为{RUBY_B#繁育}「活着」{RUBY_E#}的死亡。</color>
That's when I realized... <color=#dbc291ff>Entropy Loss Syndrome is a death called {RUBY_B#Propagation}living{RUBY_E#}.</color>
繁育？那才是格拉默铁骑的力量来源？
The Propagation? That's the true source of the Glamoth Iron Cavalry's power?
是啊，我曾见过这样的情景——在归属的王虫死后，虫群会彻底失去活力，陷入沉寂。
Yes, I've seen it happen. When the Swarm King dies, the Swarm completely loses its vitality and falls into silence.
和格拉默铁骑一样，它们没有被赋予自我，「离群」的那一刻，就已经死去。失熵症，也是如此。
Just like Glamoth's Iron Cavalry, they weren't given a sense of self. The moment they stray from the "hive," they're already dead. The same goes for Entropy Loss Syndrome.
能帮我带她离开吗？我不想让她独自留下。
Could you help me take her away? I don't want to leave her here alone.
在一切结束后，我想将她好好安葬，像普通人那样。
After all this is over, I want to give her a proper burial, just like any normal person.
她想要逃离命运，最终，却还是在匹诺康尼与虫群抗争至死。命运的可憎，正因它不容抗辩。
She wanted to escape her fate, but in the end, she died fighting against the Swarm in Penacony. The detestable thing about destiny is that it brooks no defiance.
分别时，她还没有名字，就像曾经的我。但我希望…离开世界时，她已经找到了——无论名字，还是生存的理由。
When we parted, she had no name, just like me. But I hope... by the time she leaves this world, she will have found both a name and a purpose for her life.
歌斐木将她留在这里，究竟是为了什么呢？他正在筹划的一切，无论怎么想，也无法与「繁育」产生联想。
Why did Gopher Wood leave her here? No matter how much I think about it, everything he's scheming couldn't possibly be connected to the Propagation.
你的过去，又与这里产生了多深的关联？
How deeply is your past intertwined with this place?
现在还不清楚，但很明显，她身上有许多处足以致死的伤痕——她绝不是失熵而死。
It's not clear yet, but obviously, she had multiple fatal wounds on her body... she definitely didn't die from entropy loss.
出发前，卡芙卡对我说过：在她看来，梦原本就是「过去」的交汇，每个人都一样，无论你多么不想面对，也无论你想要得到什么，都无法绕开——或许她说得对。

Before we left, Kafka told me: in her view, dreams are inherently a "convergence of the past." It's the same for everyone, no matter how much you want to avoid it, no matter what you're seeking, you can't avoid it. Perhaps she was right.
不过，梦主的虚弱，也给我们带来了机会。
However, the Dreammaster's weakness has also given us an opportunity.
哦？有个好消息，这片梦境，似乎多了几位闯入者呢。看来，银狼偶尔还是能收到这里的讯息。
Oh? Good news. It seems like we've got a few intruders in this dreamscape. Looks like Silver Wolf can still pick up signals from here after all.
是那位忆者在进行指引吧，要么是忘了分寸，要么…就是心怀叵测呢。
Must be that Memokeeper's guidance. Either she's lost her sense of restraint, or... got something nasty up her sleeve.
你…应该没有隐瞒些什么吧？
You... aren't hiding anything, are you?
别着急，有位棘手的陌生人在。
Hold on, there's a troublesome stranger here.
哦？你竟然不知道？不考虑立场的话，她可比梦主更加危险。
Oh? You don't know? Setting allegiances aside, she's much more dangerous than the Dreammaster.
面对一位行于「虚无」的令使，无论何时何地，我们都应该小心翼翼。
When facing an Emanator who walks in the Nihility, we must always tread carefully, no matter when or where.
「虚无」的令使？！「剧本」中难道提起过她？
An Emanator of the Nihility!? Was she ever mentioned in the "script"?
不，若非「杀父之仇」，我也很难得知此事。
No, if it weren't for "my father's death," I wouldn't have known about this either.
两位来得正巧，这片梦境危机四伏。既然我们目的一致，不如结伴同行吧。
Your arrival is timely. This Dreamscape is fraught with danger. Since our destination is the same, how about we join forces?
我可以保护你们免受伤害，在忆域中，我也需要忆者的援助，以及…如果遇见家族，多一个人总能多一份解释。

I can protect you from harm, but in the Memory Zone, I'll need assistance from the Memokeeper as well. And... if we run into The Family, it wouldn't hurt to have one more person to explain the situation.
绝对不行，得把她和{NICKNAME}分开。
Absolutely not. We need to keep her away from {NICKNAME}.
嘘——小心些。怎么了，此时此刻，{F#她们}{M#他们}的同行，给我们省去不少麻烦。
Shh... be careful. What's wrong? Right now, their journeying together is actually saving us a lot of trouble.
我感受到了，「死亡」已经再次投下阴影，就在这附近。不出意外，他们很快就会遇上。
I can sense it. "Death" has cast its shadow once again. It's close, and unless things change, they'll cross its path before long.
那位星核{F#女士}{M#先生}，显然还不熟悉忆质，而那只自负的天鹅，一向顾及体面，不愿出尽底牌。只有黄泉在场，{F#她们}{M#他们}才能跨过死亡。

That {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron is clearly unfamiliar with memoria, and that arrogant swan, always mindful of appearances, is unwilling to show all her cards. Only with Acheron present can they cross beyond death.
那我更应该现在去找{F#她们}{M#他们}，告知真相，没必要再一次和「死亡」爆发冲突。
Then all the more reason I should find them right now and tell them the truth. There's no need for another conflict with "Death."
可黑天鹅仍然在场，不知抱有什么目的。若是她选择颠倒黑白，你不可能说服其他人。在这里，忆者的话终究更可信。
But Black Swan is still here, with unknown intentions. If she chooses to twist the truth, you won't be able to convince the others. Here, a Memokeeper's word carries more weight.
不必急于一时，之后揭开真相也不迟。
No need to rush things. There's still time to reveal the truth later.
绝对不行，难道你忘了吗？作为星核猎手，我有一项不惜一切代价的「零点任务」——
Absolutely not! Have you forgotten? As a Stellaron Hunter, I have a "Zero-Point Mission," one that must be completed at any cost—
<color=#dbc291ff>只要黄泉有半分拔刀的可能，我就不能让{NICKNAME}在场。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>If there's even the slightest chance that Acheron might draw her blade, I cannot let {NICKNAME} be there.</color>
哦，我以为你不会在意呢。为了责任而舍弃自我，你难道还没受够？
Oh, I thought you wouldn't care. Haven't you had enough of sacrificing yourself for duty?
我的梦…在开始时就注定破灭，但他们，还没到该醒来的时候。
My dream... was destined to shatter from the start, but for them, it's still not time to wake up.
可以再拜托你一件事吗？或许有一个两全其美的办法，但我必须先一步找到「死亡」。
Can I ask you for one more thing? There might be a way to have the best of both worlds, but I need to find "Death" before them.
这不难，它仍在这片区域徘徊，不过…两全其美？
That's not hard. It's still lingering in this Domain, but... a win-win solution?
现在我也拿不准，但是值得一试。也许它不是一直会抱有敌意，就算如此，启动「火萤IV型」后，我也能够迅速制服它。如果偏偏是最糟糕的情况……

I don't know for sure, but it's worth a shot. Maybe it's not always hostile, and even if it is, once I activate "Fyrefly Type IV," I can quickly subdue it. But if we're dealing with the worst-case scenario...
艾利欧曾说，我会在匹诺康尼经受三次死亡。而这「第一次死亡」…我想自己决定它如何到来。
Elio once said that I would face death three times in Penacony. And for this "first death"... I want to decide how it comes.
但愿你不是被刚才的重逢刺激到了。
I just hope that reunion a moment ago didn't rattle you.
去吧——我在忆质中烧出了一道孔洞，可以让你直接抵达迷因面前。动作可要快些，它未必会一直留在原地。
Go on ahead. I've burned a hole through the memoria that'll take you straight to the meme. Better hurry though, it might not stick around in one place for long.
不对…它就在这里，要速战速决了。
Wait... it's right here. I need to end this quickly.
...Watch out! A dangerous presence lurks nearby.
这么快？来不及了，那只能……
Already? There's no time. Then I'll...
没事的，没事的，能自己选择如何死去，已经很棒啦。
It's fine, it's fine! At least I get to choose how to die. That alone is great.
而且，我可是在做梦，不会那么疼的。
Besides, this is just a dream, so it won't hurt that much.
这只是第一次死亡，我还有很多时间，去完成我们一起立下的约定。
This is just my first death. I still have plenty of time to fulfill the promise we made together.
接下来的事，你多少能回忆起一些吧？
You should be able to recall at least some of what comes next?
她希望用自己的「死亡」，为你展示梦境的真相。而在被贯穿的瞬间，虚无的令使也会有所顾忌，在拔刀时迟疑。这就是她选择的两全其美。

She hoped to reveal the truth of the dreamscape to you through her own "Death." At the moment she was impaled, even the Emanator of the Nihility would falter, blade wavering in hesitation. That was her way of securing the best of both worlds.
可惜，命运还是和她开了一个玩笑，忆质的转变如此迅速，她甚至没机会稍加说明。
Unfortunately, fate still played a cruel trick on her. The memoria transformed so quickly that she didn't even have a chance to explain.
在那之后，她抵达了流梦礁——一片流放之地，真正的匹诺康尼。以「死亡」作为理由，家族竭力隐藏着它的存在。
After that, she arrived at Dreamflux Reef... land of the exiles, the true Penacony. The Family went to great lengths to conceal its existence, using "Death" as their justification.
然而，那时她还无法安心深入。没能说明真相，让她此前忧心的情形仍在持续。她心急如焚地想要折返，将你带离战场。

However, at that time she still couldn't venture deeper with peace of mind. Unable to reveal the truth, the situation that had worried her before continued to persist. She was burning with anxiety to return and get you away from the battlefield.
幸运的是，一位温柔且热心的女士仍在注视着她——我再一次伸出了援手。
Fortunately, a kind and caring lady was still watching over her. I reached out to help once again.
她最担心的情形并未出现。「死亡」自行退去，你们得以全身而退。
Her worst fears didn't materialize. "Death" retreated on its own, allowing you all to escape unscathed.
此后，在黑天鹅的指引下，你试着查出流萤之死的真相。可是，你应该也注意到了，无论是与同伴断开联系，还是无法启动机甲的窘迫…

After that, guided by Black Swan, you tried to uncover the truth behind Firefly's death. However, as you must have noticed, be it losing contact with her companions, or the embarrassment of being unable to activate her mech...
那些忆质的虚像，分明是她从忆域潜入匹诺康尼时留下的。但这倒也无妨，那位黑天鹅犯下的错误，让流萤拥有了充分的时间。

Those memoria illusions were clearly left behind when she infiltrated Penacony from the Memory Zone. But that hardly matters. Because of Black Swan's blunder, Firefly gained the precious time she needed.
再次来到你们面前时，她已经用上了另一个身份。那次交手，搅动了命运的涡流，让许多人的道路就此交汇。而在你离去之后——
When she appeared before you again, she was already using a different identity. That encounter stirred the whirlpool of destiny, causing many paths to converge. And after you left...
梦见那些因你而死的人？
of those slain by your hand?
我见过许多看似高明的伪装，能掩盖外表，但藏不住内心。你也不例外。
I've seen many clever disguises that can conceal appearances, but they can never cover up who a person really is. And you're no different.
{NICKNAME}，你没想杀死{M#他}{F#她}。你出手只是为了驱散我和那位忆者…为什么？
You had no desire to kill {NICKNAME}. You only did what you did to drive me and the Memokeeper away... But why?
是「命运的奴隶」让你这么做？
Did Destiny's Slave make you do it?
我以为这件事会写在你的「剧本」上。
I thought this is just the kind of thing that'd get written into your "script."
我的「剧本」向来只有几行。除此之外的，不必要，也不需要。
My "script" has always been brief. Other than that. Anything beyond that is unnecessary.
现在，该我提问了：你究竟是谁？
Now, it's my turn to ask: who exactly are you?
Why ask when you already know the answer?
我时常会忘记一些事，因此比起回忆，更习惯用「感受」去捕捉些什么。所以——
I tend to forget things, which is why, rather than memories, I'm accustomed to using my emotions to capture what I normally wouldn't otherwise. So...
——我知道那冰冷的铠甲里是谁。
...I know who is inside that cold armor.
因此，我也感受得到——你知道我是谁，也知道这把刀，知道它背后的…「意义」。
Therefore, I can sense it. You know who I am, you know this blade, and the... meaning that lies behind it.
怎么样，愿意脱下装甲谈谈了么？
How about it? Ready to take off that armor and sit down for a talk?
你不该知道那么多，迷路的自灭者。
You shouldn't know so much, lost Self-Annihilator.
我说过了…我的记性不太好，所以你不用担心。
Like I said... my memory isn't great, so you needn't worry.
接下来呢？{NICKNAME}被黑天鹅带走了，你要去找{M#他}{F#她}么？
What's next, then? {NICKNAME}'s been taken by Black Swan. Will you go look for {M#him?}{F#her?}
不必了…告诉你也无妨，在匹诺康尼，艾利欧给我的指示只有一条——「让星穹列车一同追逐『盛大的遗产』」。
No need for that... No harm in telling you. On Penacony, Elio only gave me one instruction: "Allow the Astral Express to pursue the Grand Legacy."
星穹列车不是你的敌人，如果你的目标是「钟表匠的遗产」，就去调查家族。他们不仅掩盖了「死亡」的存在，还埋藏了梦境的过去与真相。

The Astral Express is not your enemy. If your goal is the Watchmaker's Legacy, then go look into The Family. Not only are they covering up the existence of "Death," but they're burying the past and the truth about the dreamscape.
在分别前，我也送上一则忠告吧——
Before we part ways, let me give you a piece of advice...
无论你我行于怎样的道路，{RUBY_B#虚无}死亡{RUBY_E#}总是注定的终局。
No matter which path you and I walk, {RUBY_B#Nihility}death{RUBY_E#} is the inevitable finale.
即便在人世说出「永别」，在<color=#dbc291ff>「末王」再度登神之时</color>，我们仍会有最后一次重逢——在匹诺康尼，此事亦然。
Even if we say "farewell" in the mortal realm, we shall have one final reunion <color=#dbc291ff>when Terminus ascends to godhood once more</color>... and the same holds true on Penacony.
…我已经到过流梦礁了，这不是一个很难揭开的秘密。
...I've already been to the Dreamflux Reef. It's not a secret that's hard to uncover.
…那么，很可惜，你还尚未知晓，自己多么「清醒」。
...Well, I'm afraid you have yet to realize just how "awake" you truly are.
正因生命敢于沉睡，他们才能醒来。
It is precisely because life dares to slumber that they can awaken.
「再度登神」——就算{RUBY_B#黄泉}她{RUBY_E#}是一位令使，也不应该……
"Ascends to godhood once more"... even if {RUBY_B#Acheron}she{RUBY_E#}'s an Emanator, she shouldn't...
今天过后，耶佩拉的名字就会从银河历史中消失，而永火官邸将取而代之，在不远的未来收到一封邀请函……
After today, Jepella's name will disappear from cosmic history, and the Ever-Flame Mansion will take its place. In the not-too-distant future, you'll receive an invitation...
祝你在那里找到想要的答案…或者，解脱。
I hope you find whatever you seek there, be it answers... or salvation.
Huh... a phone call? At a time like this...
你可以拒绝他的，你知道我在说什么。
You can turn him down. You know what I mean.
可艾利欧说，我就是最合适的人选。
But Elio said I'm the perfect candidate.
人选？艾利欧终于得到结论了？
Candidate? So Elio finally came to a conclusion?
嗯，他说自己看清了第四种命运，不会再有其他意外。他也将我选为了「最后的幸存者」，就像{NICKNAME}那样。
Yes, he said he saw the fourth fate clearly, and there won't be any more surprises. He also chose me as the "Last Survivor," just like {NICKNAME}.
「虚无」。在它淹没一切后，我必须成为幸存的最后一人，倾尽所有，力挽狂澜。
The Nihility. After it engulfs everything, I must be the last survivor, giving my all to turn the tide.
不过，和其他三位稍有不同。在那之前，我还有其他事需要留心。
However, it's a bit different from the other three. Before that, I have other matters that need my attention.
只要做得到，我必须避免{NICKNAME}沾染「虚无」的力量，哪怕一分一毫。毕竟，{F#她}{M#他}背负着的一切，不但更沉重，也更珍贵。
If possible, I must prevent {NICKNAME} from being tainted by the power of Nihility, even the slightest trace of it. After all, everything {F#s}he carries is not only heavier, but also more precious.
I suppose, if it comes to that...
即使必须为之而死，我也不能逃开。
Even if I have to die for it, I cannot run away.
在艾利欧预见的「未来」里，我们不曾拥有「结局」。但我还有机会，从命运手中…夺回「开启」的权利。
In the "future" that Elio foresaw, we never had an "ending." But I still have a chance... to wrestle back from fate the right to have a "beginning."
此后不久 白日梦酒店
Not long after, at The Reverie Hotel...
你在现实中的客房倒是意外朴素……
Your guest room in reality is surprisingly modest...
…就像你的外在一样，黄泉小姐。
得来全不费工夫。就是这只八音盒——泯灭帮收到的「邀请函」……
It's a cinch. This music box, the "invitation" received by the Annihilation Gang... There are latent memories that linger on it yet.
有关你的记忆不只属于你——我所知甚多，亦预言更远——只要用点手段，死者也能开口说话。
You see, memories of you are not yours alone. They travel in other people... Other things. I know much, and I can predict even more. With some help, the dead can be made to speak.
泯灭帮，那群遇见你后便不知去向的亡命徒…他们究竟经历了什么？让我来揭示吧。
The Annihilation Gang, that band of desperadoes who all disappeared after meeting you... What exactly happened to them? Well, let me reveal all.
「…十二刻度██十二梦境██父亲██我把它献予你…」
"...Gradation twelve ██ Dreamscape twelve ██ Father ██ I dedicate this to you..."
「…做得好██杜布拉██无论他们逃往何处██泯灭终将造访…」
"...Well done ██ Dubra ██ wherever they go, ██ shall be met by annihilation..."
…有了，尽管很朦胧，但这是阿弗利特的声音。另一位…是他的子嗣吧。
...There it is. It's hazy, but it's Ifrit's voice. The other one... is probably his progeny.
「…火焰的子嗣们██这是你们的成人之礼…」
"Children of the flame ██ this marks your rite of passage."
「…轮不到她出场████我一人便足够…」
"She won't be necessary ████ I alone am enough."
「永火官邸」启程了，可怜的人们…他们还不知道等待在前方的是什么。
The Ever-Flame Mansion has set out on a journey. Those poor people... They have no idea what lies in wait ahead of them.
但记忆的复现很顺利，她要来了…很快就要来了…这里没有别人，不那么优雅也可以…我得不遗余力……
Memory recovery is going well, but slowly. She'll be here soon, and time is short.... There's nobody else here, so there's no need to be delicate... In fact I think I'd better go all out....
之后的记忆…是一片空白？怎么可能…这只八音盒落入黄泉之手，被她带来匹诺康尼是事实，本该这样的…可中间的过程……

The memory after that... is blank? How is that possible... This music box fell into Acheron's hands, and she brought it to Penacony. That's a fact, and that's how it should have gone... but along the way...
...It's like it's been erased? Who's done this...
「哦…一位忆者，你侍从流光忆庭…还是焚化工？」
"Oh... a Memokeeper. Do you serve the Garden of Recollection... or The Cremators?"
「我的名字是康士坦丝…很高兴认识你。我们本该在匹诺康尼相遇，共度一段…*刻骨铭心*的时光。」
"My name is Constance... A pleasure to meet you. We were supposed to meet in Penacony and spend an... unforgettable time together."
「但那似乎无法实现了。宴会之星并不欢迎大丽花，我也不需要成人礼…而你，我知道你在寻找什么……」
"But that seems unrealistic. Dahlia's not welcome on the Banquet Star, and I don't need a coming-of-age ceremony... And you, I know what you're looking for..."
「想要{RUBY_B#黄泉}『她』{RUBY_E#}的秘密？我可以给你，然后…替我享受那场盛会吧。」
"Want {RUBY_B#Acheron}'her'{RUBY_E#} secret? I can give it to you, and then... you can enjoy the banquet for me."
不必装神弄鬼了，我非常确信，你并非远在千里之外。
Cut the mystical act. I'm absolutely certain you're not thousands of miles away.
在那片原始忆域，我的感知处处受阻，原以为是家族的原因，结果，却是有位同僚在场？你是因何而来？
In that Primordial Memory Zone, my acuity was blocked at every turn. I thought it was because of The Family, but it turns out there was a colleague present. What brings you here?
还真是咄咄逼人呢。是已然进退失据，还是猜到了些什么？「永火官邸」的康士坦丝，又能是为何而来？
My, how aggressive. Are you backed into a corner, or have you figured something out? What could bring Constance of the Ever-Flame Mansion here?
那正是你的破绽，陌生的焚化工——泯灭帮习惯于抛头露面，它的成员从无神秘之处。而冥火大公，<color=#dbc291ff>从未有过名为康士坦丝的子嗣。</color>

That's your fatal flaw, mysterious Cremator. The Annihilation Gang has always operated in plain sight, with no secrets among its members. And Duke Inferno <color=#dbc291ff>has never had an offspring named Constance</color>.
哦？你确定？如果…只是我太过「善变」，忍不住会叛离任何人呢？
Oh? Are you so sure? What if... I'm just too "capricious" and can't help but betray anyone?
这不可能，反物质军团一直都在找{RUBY_B#大丽花}她{RUBY_E#}。
That's impossible, the Antimatter Legion has been after {RUBY_B#The Dahlia}her{RUBY_E#} this whole time.
你们不是也一样吗？为了将我抹去，流光忆庭进行过十四次追缉，而最后那一次，我明明死在了你的面前，对吧？
Aren't you the same? The Garden of Recollection launched fourteen pursuits trying to erase me, and in that final one, I died right in front of you, didn't I?
打断别人的叙旧，可真够没风度的。不过，请便——
To interrupt another's reunion... such a graceless act. But by all means...
在此之后，我们再来好好谈谈你的忘恩负义，亲爱的「狱友」。
After this, we'll have ourselves a nice long talk about your ingratitude, my dear "cellmate."
这是「邀请函」最初被交付时残留的记忆…片刻就中断了。那么之后是……
This is the residual memory from when the 'invitation' was first delivered... they were abruptly interrupted. Then, what happened next is...
「…他们躲入睡乡██但求安眠不被风雨搅扰…」
"...They sought refuge in the land of sleep ██, merely wishing for undisturbed rest, away from the storms..."
「…嘘████行于██毁灭██的亡命徒██什么时候怕过死亡…」
Shh—████ when have those ██ on the Path of Destruction ██ feared death?
是那只忆域迷因，当心些。
It's that Memory Zone Meme. Be careful.
那是？！流萤，我们过去看看。
What's that!? Firefly, let's go and check it out.
这方面，你才是专家呢。不过，我一直以为，使用那份力量会让你…惆怅万分。
When it comes to this, you're the expert. Yet I'd always imagined that calling upon that power would make you... profoundly melancholic.
...I'm not now, and never will be.
…还真够不小心呢，很像一位老朋友。
...Pretty careless indeed, just like an old friend of mine.
乐园终将跌入愁苦人世
Paradise shall fall into this world of sorrow
It will shatter in the light of day
什么动静都没有…难道已经离开了？
There's no sign of anything... could it have already left?
嗯？表情有些奇怪呢。在此之前，我总是对这一刻的到来，感到紧张——总担心你会认为我有些可怕。
Hm? That's a peculiar look on your face. Before this, I was always anxious about this moment, always afraid you might find me frightening.
当然，匹诺康尼的一切，比你认为的还要重要。
Of course, everything about Penacony is more important than you think.
为了避免其他糟糕的走向，星核猎手必须投入如此多的力量。
To prevent other terrible outcomes, the Stellaron Hunters were forced to use great power.
如果你愿意，也能够承受…我倒是可以一以贯之呢。还是说……
If you're willing, and if you can endure it... I can keep going. Or perhaps...
你更愿意，享受我的「双重标准」？
...you would prefer to indulge in my "double standards?"
嗯，相当「亲密」，别因为我那时的说法误会。
Yeah, we were quite "close." Don't get the wrong idea from how I phrased it back then.
