我一直认为，两个正用匕首死斗的人，互相将刀尖抵住对方脖子的那一刻，要比寻常的舞伴更加亲近。
I've always thought that when two people are locked in a knife fight, with their blades pressed to each other's throats, they become more intimate than any pair of dancers.
现在，让我们把视线，投向命运的某个交汇之处吧——
Now, let's turn our gaze to where the threads of destiny intertwine...
此后不久，你终于知道了黑天鹅的意图，她与公司进行交易，将你带到了砂金的面前。为了收复匹诺康尼，公司一直在寻找暂时的盟友。
Soon after, you finally learned Black Swan's intentions: She made a deal with the IPC to bring you before Aventurine. In order to reclaim Penacony, the IPC had been seeking temporary allies.
作为最初的诚意，他向你展示了自己的发现——那个由愚者伪造的「知更鸟遇害」现场。
As a show of initial sincerity, he revealed his discovery to you: The crime scene of "Robin's death" that was staged by the Fool.
自此，砂金展开了他的豪赌。
From that moment on, Aventurine embarked upon his great gamble.
不惜敲碎重如生命的基石，他以诡计骗过星期日，换来了押上一切的机会。
Willing to shatter the Cornerstone as precious as life itself, he deceived Sunday with his schemes, earning himself a chance to risk it all.
惊人的重注，让他如愿引动了令使的一刀。家族苦心隐瞒的秘密因此暴露，身处漩涡中心的你，也坠入其中。

With such a high-stakes gamble, he succeeded in provoking the Emanator's strike. The Family's carefully guarded secret was exposed, and you, caught in the eye of the storm, were pulled into the chaos.
但这都是生者们的故事，与此同时，「死者」的世界又会如何？
But that's all about the living. In the same moment, what became of those within the world of the "dead?"
那位知更鸟小姐，先你一步抵达了流梦礁。面对她的却非豪赌时的未知……
Miss Robin arrived at Dreamflux Reef ahead of you. But what awaited her wasn't the uncertainty of a gamble...
而是注定的生，与注定的死。
But rather a destined life, and a destined death.
哥哥的话，我不明白…对小鸟来说，飞翔…也需要问「为什么」吗？
Brother, I don't understand... For a bird, does flying... also need a "why"?
既然要由我们来决定，是否把它放归天空，那我们就得为此负责。
Since it falls to us to decide whether to release it back to the sky, we must take responsibility for that choice.
好像歌斐木先生的语气……
That really sounds like Mr. Gopher Wood...
But... I've made up my mind.
让它自由自在地飞翔吧。
Let it soar free and wild.
如果我有和它一样的羽毛和翅膀，一定会想飞翔，哪怕只是试一试。
If I had feathers and wings like it does, I'd definitely want to fly, even if just to try it once.
再说啦，哥哥会帮它的，对吧？
Besides, Big Brother will help it, right?
临别之际，能听到这样的话，真令人安心。星期日，妹妹可要走到你的前面去了。
It's truly reassuring to hear such words before parting. Come, Sunday, your little sister will be walking ahead of you now.
Mr. Gopher Wood? How did you...
<color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>15</unbreak>█神明赐予我们天火，也赐予我们神圣的磨难。便令它们存在吧，你我皆属凡人，生来便要去爱，去受痛苦。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>15</unbreak>█The gods bestowed upon us heavenly fire, and with it divine tribulations. Let them be, for we are all mortals, born to love and to suffer."</color>
今日，不止一只小鸟将要远行——在你启程的时刻，我又怎能缺席？
Today, more than one little bird will embark on their long journey. How could I miss the moment of your departure?
过来吧孩子，我为你准备了「临别之礼」。
Come here, child. I've prepared a "farewell gift" for you.
在筑梦边境，一位假面愚者袭击了您，并且留下了一份临别之礼。
In Dream's Edge, a Masked Fool attacked you and left behind a parting gift.
也很难说是礼物——愚者将我杀死时，为我戴上了一副假面。
Though it's hard to call it a gift. When the Fool killed me, they put a mask on my face.
可我在流梦礁醒来后，它不见了，也感受不到任何影响。
But when I woke up in Dreamflux Reef, it was gone, and I couldn't feel any effects from it.
「属于你的那一副，真的叫做同谐么？嗯？秩序的双子？」
"As for that mask of yours... is it really called the Harmony? The Twin of the Order?"
她或许在暗示什么，但我还猜不透她的用意。
She might be hinting at something, but I still can't figure out what she means.
如此说来，您身上的异常，现在怎么样了？
Speaking of which, how's that anomaly of yours doing now?
已经在渐渐恢复了。不可否认，流梦礁同样在传扬「同谐」，并且没有受到家族叛徒的影响。
I'm gradually getting better. There's no denying that Dreamflux Reef also spreads the Harmony, and it hasn't been affected by The Family's traitor.
至于我的失声，我仍然需要继续追查。也许，我的确一直戴着面具，而又不自知。
As for my loss of voice, I still need to keep investigating. Perhaps I've been wearing a mask all along without even realizing it.
需要什么帮助的话，请尽管开口。
If you need any help, just say the word.
多亏您伸出援手，我对这里已经熟悉起来了。
Thanks to your help. I'm starting to get familiar with this place.
不过流梦礁与世隔绝，在这里有什么方法能知道外面的情况吗？我想确认一下哥哥的状况。
But Dreamflux Reef is so isolated... Is there any way to know what's happening outside? I want to check on my brother's situation.
这不难，找个热闹的地方就行，需要我带路吗？
That's easy! Just head to where all the action is. Want me to show you the way?
就让我自己走走吧，多谢，米凯先生。
I'll take a walk around by myself, thanks, Mr. Micah.
对了，打听消息的时候，记得留心分辨，偶尔也会有些谣言。
Oh, and when you're gathering intel, remember to sort fact from fiction. Rumors do pop up from time to time.
I'll keep that in mind. Thanks for the heads-up.
果然，你早就注意到我了。抱歉，我现在不方便抛头露面，能请你借一步说话吗？
So you did notice me after all. Sorry, but I can't show myself right now. Could we talk somewhere more private?
实话说，我没有相信你的理由。
To be honest, I have no reason to trust you.
我明白，但我可以向你保证，这不是一个陷阱。如果一定需要理由……
I get it, but I can assure you this isn't a trap. If you really need a reason...
<color=#dbc291ff>十二时刻存在异常，我们怀疑「梦主」的真面目。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>There are anomalies in the Twelve Hours. We are suspicious of the Dreammaster's true identity.</color>
请带路吧，但事先说明：同意见面不代表我的任何态度。
Lead the way, but let me be clear: agreeing to meet doesn't imply anything about my stance.
理解，我的同伴会为你引路。
Understood, my companion will show you the way.
流萤小姐？你可以现身了。
Miss Firefly? You can show yourself now.
抱歉，还差一些，我的同伴马上会把你带来这边。
Sorry, just a moment. My companion will bring you this way shortly.
不愧是「同谐」的宠儿，穿过如此浓稠的忆质，却没受到半分影响。
As expected of the Harmony's favorite... Passing through such dense memoria without even being affected in the slightest.
你好，可以先称呼我为大丽花。这里是我们在美梦中的小小新居，说话时也能方便些。
Hello, you may call me the Dahlia for now. This is our cozy new home in the sweet dream, where words may flow more freely.
在美梦中焚烧出的新居吗？如果你们想要好好谈谈，不该用这种方式进行挑衅。
A new home burned out of the sweet dream? If you really wish to have a proper conversation, you shouldn't resort to provocation like this.
抱歉，但她和其他焚化工不同，没有窃取记忆的打算。我也一样，从未想过破坏美梦，选择偷渡的方式入梦，也是迫不得已。

I apologize, but she's different from other Cremators: She has no intention of stealing memories. The same goes for me. I have never wished to destroy the sweet dream. Sneaking into the dream was my only option.
我很喜欢匹诺康尼，作为游客。这是我第一次做梦，匹诺康尼甚至比我想象中还要美好。
I really like Penacony, as a tourist. This is my first time dreaming, and Penacony is more wonderful than I imagined.
谢谢。既然如此，你们又是为何而来？
Thanks. So, what brings you here?
I'm sure you've noticed it too.
「梦主」歌斐木，他与梦境完全融汇，在匹诺康尼近乎「全知全能」。而他如今却在失去对梦境的掌控。
The Dreammaster Gopher Wood completely merged with the dreamscape, becoming virtually omniscient and omnipotent in Penacony. But now, he's losing his grip on the dreamscape.
为了找到原因，我们进行了一些调查。在原始梦境，我们接触到了一桩被他掩埋起来的罪行。
To find out why, we conducted some investigations. In the Primordial Dreamscape, we uncovered a crime that he had buried away.
我们怀疑，那就是他力量不及以往的原因。也因此，他才对外声称自己抱恙在身。
We suspect that's why his powers aren't what they used to be. And that's why he's been telling everyone he's under the weather.
稍后再为你展示吧，作为他的家人，如果不是眼见为实，你不会相信的。
I'll show you later. Belonging to his family, you wouldn't believe me unless you saw it with your own eyes.
你们的确发现了很多线索，但在此之前，我必须确认两位的真正目的。
You've indeed uncovered many clues, but before we proceed, I must confirm your true intentions.
我的目的…只关乎<color=#dbc291ff>一次重逢，一次拯救，一场诀别。</color>
My purpose... is about <color=#dbc291ff>a reunion, a rescue, and a farewell.</color>
流萤小姐，你刚才的神情和口吻，我常常在一些观众身上见到。
Miss Firefly, that expression and tone of yours just now... I've seen it many times in my audience.
那是描述自己心中最为美好事物时的神情，所以我愿意相信你一次。
That's the look one has when describing what they hold most dear in their heart, so I'll trust you this time.
在我第一次离开匹诺康尼时，「梦主」为我送上过一份临别礼物——一句<color=#dbc291ff>「律令」</color>。
When I first left Penacony, the Dreammaster gave me a parting gift... a <color=#dbc291ff>"divine law"</color>, so to speak.
贵为五大家系的领导者，这未免太寒酸了吧？
For a leader of the Five Lineages, that's pretty cheap, isn't it?
自那之后，我踏上了「同谐」命途，以行者的身份，行使相应的力量。
Since then, I've walked the Path of Harmony as a Pathstrider, wielding its power.
…直到我为谐乐大典再次归来。
...Until I returned once again for the Charmony Festival.
在「梦主」融汇的十二时刻，我出现了失声的症状，「同谐」的力量也开始衰微。而在流梦礁，我却完全没有受到影响。
In the Twelve Hours converged by the Dreammaster, I developed symptoms of losing my voice, and the strength of the Harmony began to wane. Yet in Dreamflux Reef, I wasn't affected at all.
我想，那时他曾指向的「命途」，<color=#dbc291ff>未必名为「同谐」</color>。
I believe that the Path he once pointed to <color=#dbc291ff>might not have been named the Harmony</color>.
因此我和美梦逐渐无法相容。过去是「梦主」为我进行调和，在他无暇他顾之时，我才终于感到异常。
That's why I gradually became incompatible with the sweet dream. In the past, the Dreammaster would harmonize for me, but when he was too busy to tend to me, I finally noticed something was wrong.
那么，他走上了哪一条命途？
So, which Path did he choose to walk?
尚不清楚，与此有关的线索不多。但我怀疑，是「秩序」。
It's not clear yet. There aren't many clues about this, but I suspect it's the Order.
…多谢，知更鸟小姐，你帮我们解开了许多困惑。但「梦主」倒向的命途…我们有不同的猜想。
...Thank you, Miss Robin. You've helped us clear up many of our doubts. However, regarding the Dreammaster's Path... we have different conjectures.
跟我来吧，到眼见为实的时候了。
Come with me. It's time to see it with your own eyes.
这里安葬着家族试图掩藏的秘密，和一段悠久而浪漫的故事。可惜，其中的大多与我们无关。
Here lies secrets that The Family tried to conceal, and a long, romantic tale. Sadly, most of it has nothing to do with us.
博雷克林•铁尔南…我记得这个名字。一位值得敬佩的巡海游侠，历史上匹诺康尼遭受虫灾时，是他奋不顾身守护住了美梦。
Breukelen Tiernan... I remember that name. A Galaxy Ranger worthy of admiration. When Penacony was plagued by the Swarm Disaster in the past, he was the one who fearlessly protected our sweet dream.
这就是我们必须来这里的原因。<color=#dbc291ff>我们怀疑，「梦主」在背离家族之后，倒向了「繁育」。</color>
That's why we had to come here. <color=#dbc291ff>We suspect that after turning away from The Family, the Dreammaster sided with the Propagation.</color>
所谓的历史早已逝去，但人们的记忆却沉积在忆域之中……
History as we know it may be long gone, but people's memories remain preserved in the Memory Zone...
倘若能得其法，我们就能洞穿时间，将过往从混沌中打捞出来。
If we can master the technique, we'll be able to pierce through time itself and salvage the past from chaos.
虫群引发的每一场灾难，都伴随着无数的牺牲者。一些名字留下了，但还有一些人…不但被遗忘，还遭到了背叛。
Every disaster brought by the Swarm was accompanied by countless sacrifices. Some names were remembered, but others... were not only forgotten, but betrayed.
你…在干什么…我不是你的敌人……
What... are you doing... I'm not your enemy...
不错，你又或我，仇敌唯有那可憎命数。
Indeed. Our true foe is that abominable fate.
冷静些吧，孩子，挣扎徒增苦痛。
Easy, child. Your struggle only adds to the pain.
我方才施予的一击，虽不光彩却绝无错失——今时此地，你已必死无疑。
The strike I just delivered — dishonorable though it may be — did not miss. Here and now, your death is certain.
可我…我分明是在…帮这里对抗虫灾……
But I... I was clearly... helping fight against the Swarm here...
不错，虫群肆虐横行，一位格拉默铁骑行经此地，不问回报投身战场，这实在值得钦佩。
Indeed, as the Swarm ran rampant, a Glamoth Knight passing through joined the battle without asking for anything in return... Truly admirable.
可你是否想过，为何偏偏在那之后，虫灾变本加厉？
But have you ever wondered why, right after that, the infestation only grew worse?
为清剿虫群而生的铁骑，竟是行于「繁育」的命途行者。
The Glamoth Knight, born to purge the Swarm, turned out to be a Pathstrider walking the Path of Propagation.
<color=#dbc291ff>美梦从未渗入「繁育」，是你将其带来此处</color>。也唯有你的死亡，才能将其除去。
<color=#dbc291ff>The sweet dream has never been tainted by the Propagation... You brought it here</color>. And only your death can remove it.
但我…可以离开，再也…不回到这里…
I... can leave, and never... come back here...
I can't die... I don't want to die...
正因如此，我才说那一击并不光彩。探究你的秘密，是为了美梦；将你击落，却出于窥见永恒后的私心。
That's precisely why I said that strike wasn't honorable. I explored your secrets for the sake of the sweet dream, but striking you down? That came from selfish desires after glimpsing eternity.
<color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>45</unbreak>█乐园终将跌入愁苦人世，黎明一旦升起，便要坠毁于白昼。凡是金的，怎可能光华长留？」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>45</unbreak>█Paradise shall fall into this world of sorrow, and once dawn breaks, it will shatter in the light of day. How could anything golden abide in glory forever?"</color>
你将成为我最为阴暗的一桩罪行，也将成为一项伟业的起始。
You shall become my darkest crime, and the beginning of a great undertaking.
我将以你的{RUBY_B#命途}残躯{RUBY_E#}，为「永恒乐园」奠基。
Your {RUBY_B#Path}remains{RUBY_E#} shall become the foundation for "Eternal Paradise."
你对忆质相当熟悉，这段记忆是否出于捏造，你应该能够甄别。
You're quite familiar with memoria, so you should be able to tell whether this memory is fabricated or not.
Laying the foundation for "Eternal Paradise?" This...
那时她正在试图逃离自己的命运。
At that time, she was trying to escape her own destiny.
但在匹诺康尼发现虫群时，她没有袖手旁观。即便她仍在抗争虫群时死去，但那不是命运再次追上了她。
But when the Swarm was discovered on Penacony, she didn't just stand idly by. Even though she died while fighting against the Swarm, it wasn't destiny catching up with her again.
而是她自己的选择，因为她和普通人一样，拥有良知，懂得怜悯。
It was her own choice, because like any ordinary person, she had a conscience and knew compassion.
是，甚至很多时候…像是我自己。
Yes... And in many moments, looking at her is like seeing myself.
我知道这样于事无补，但…实在抱歉。无论「梦主」出于什么目的，也没有让任何人牺牲的权利。
I know it won't undo what's been done, but... I'm sorry. No matter what purpose the Dreammaster has, it doesn't give him the right to sacrifice anyone.
我向你承诺，在一切结束之后，无论结果如何，我会把她的作为告诉人们——她应当被美梦铭记。
I promise you, when all of this is over, regardless of the outcome, I'll tell everyone about her deeds. She deserves to be remembered by the sweet dream.
可有件事，我不明白。就算「梦主」意在「繁育」的力量，银河中不乏残存的虫群。为何非得痛下杀手？
But there's one thing I don't understand. Even if the Dreammaster is after the power of the Propagation, there are plenty of Swarms left in the cosmos. Why resort to killing?
这就是我们来找你的原因。
That's exactly why we came to find you.
谐乐大典开幕在即，无论「梦主」抱有什么目的，他在此时推进种种行动，不可能只是巧合，而你被他选中，将要为「同谐」献唱。无论是否知情，你都一定极为关键。

With the Charmony Festival about to begin, it can't be a mere coincidence that the Dreammaster is pushing forward with his various machinations now, and you were chosen to perform for the Harmony. Whether you're aware of it or not, you must be absolutely crucial to his plans.
你们想让我成为「引子」，从忆域中打捞「过去」？我需要为此做些什么？
You want me to become the "conduit" to retrieve the "past" from the Memory Zone? What exactly do I need to do?
我要暂时取走你的一段记忆。使它搅动忆域，我便能顺着忆质的流动，灼烧出一条通路，再次打捞出过去的情景。
I'll need to temporarily take a piece of your memory. By letting it stir up the Memory Zone, I can follow the flow of memoria and burn a path through, retrieving scenes from the past once again.
无论成功与否，你的记忆我都会妥善奉还。
Whether I succeed or not, I'll return your memories to you safe and sound.
让一名焚化工接触我的记忆？
Let a Cremator access my memories?
我也觉得强人所难——如果你认为有必要，可以借助「调律」，在我们的意识中留下保险，确保我们不会另有企图。
I also think it's too much to ask. If you deem it necessary, you can use "Tuning" to leave a safeguard in our minds, preventing any ulterior motives.
There's no need. Let's get started.
「若你受到伤害，愿那伤害不致使你堕落」——这是在家族中流传已久的祝福。我不希望所有信任，都建立于相互威胁之上。
"May the harm that befalls you never lead to your downfall." This is a blessing that has been passed down through The Family for generations. I don't want all trust to be built upon mutual threats.
这就是大明星的气度么，你让我也产生了一些向往呢。
So this is what star power looks like... you've even made me a little star-struck.
Alright. Looks like we got lucky.
哦？这是什么？<color=#dbc291ff>一节已被蛀朽的橡木？</color>
Oh? What's this? <color=#dbc291ff>A piece of worm-eaten oak?</color>
这回，我们恐怕揭开了一场「灾难」呢。亲眼去看看吧。
This time, I'm afraid we've uncovered quite a "disaster." Let's go see it with our own eyes.
凭借忆者的身份，你究竟蒙骗了她们多久？
Hiding behind the title of a Memokeeper... Tell me, how long have you been lying to them?
那段刻骨铭心的时光，你像是非要享受不可呢。识趣些，我现在没空招待你。
You really seem determined to savor those unforgettable moments, don't you? Be smart and take a hint. I don't have time to entertain you right now.
哦，因为你正忙着…<color=#dbc291ff>假装成一位「星核猎手」</color>？
Oh, because you're busy... <color=#dbc291ff>pretending to be a Stellaron Hunter</color>?
当真是好手段。流萤女士…若你愿意听听我的建议，不妨回现实一趟吧。仔细问问那位银狼女士，谁才是你真正的同伴。
Quite the clever move there. Miss Firefly... if you're willing to take my advice, why not make a trip back to reality? Ask that Silver Wolf lady carefully who your true companions really are.
好了，你呀…还是那么喜欢多管闲事。
Alright, you... still can't help sticking your nose into everything, huh.
她么…只是一个趁机摆弄记忆，假装成星核猎手同伴的焚化工。你们都被她骗过了。
She's... just a Cremator who manipulated memories and pretended to be a Stellaron Hunter's companion. She fooled all of you.
What about Miss Firefly? Is she alright?
或许会迷失在忆域的乱流中，别担心，她大有来头，只会被暂时困住而已。
She might get lost in the Memory Zone's turbulence, but don't worry, she's quite something. She'll only be stuck there temporarily.
我是来带你回到橡木家系的——星期日先生很担心你的安危，他委托我在梦境中找到你。
I'm here to bring you back to the Oak Family. Mr. Sunday is worried about your safety. He tasked me with finding you in the dreamscape.
至于这位大丽花，她绝不可信。只通过一段记忆，就从忆域中打捞出特定的历史…能做到这一点的忆者或许存在，但绝不会只是命途行者。

As for this Dahlia, she cannot be trusted. To extract specific history from the Memory Zone through just one memory... While there might be Memokeepers capable of such feats, they certainly wouldn't be mere Pathstriders.
呵，看来你窥视了很久嘛，但在我们即将取得进展时，你才「姗姗来迟」——不可信的，究竟是谁呢？
Heh, seems you've been watching for quite a while, yet you only show up "fashionably late" when we're about to make progress... Who's the untrustworthy one here, I wonder?
不必狡辩了。我带来了星期日先生的口信，足以证明我的身份。
Save your excuses. I bring a message from Mr. Sunday that will prove my identity.
…一句口信？你不觉得有些可笑吗？
...Just a message? Don't you find that a bit ridiculous?
试试看就知道了，也只有三个字而已——
Let's give it a try. It's only two words...
我不知内情，星期日先生说，你会明白的。
I don't know the details, but Mr. Sunday said you would understand.
…的确，除非是极端情况，这足以让我产生信任。
...Indeed, unless it's an extreme situation, this is enough to earn my trust.
公司，星穹列车…现在你连家族的委托也接下了？「人缘」真不错。
The IPC, Astral Express... and now you're even taking assignments from The Family? My, aren't you "popular."
...But you just had to choose the path of your own demise?
那时，我非但留下了黄泉女士的秘密，还就此离开，放了你一条生路。
Back then, I not only kept Lady Acheron's secret, but also left you with your life intact.
怎么，你就这么希望…和我「再续前缘」？
What, you're that eager to... "rekindle our past"?
谁让你是大丽花呢？我总要看看，你又要闹出什么乱子。
Well, you are The Dahlia after all. I have to keep an eye on what kind of trouble you're going to stir up next.
我为此疑问了很久…「命运的奴隶」，怎么可能会接纳你，<color=#dbc291ff>一个天性为背叛的人</color>。
I've been questioning this for a long time... How could Destiny's Slave possibly accept someone like you, <color=#dbc291ff>whose very nature is betrayal</color>?
星核猎手呢，那又是怎么回事？
And what's the deal with the Stellaron Hunter?
先回安全的地方去吧，之后再慢慢聊——她太危险了，不该掉以轻心。
Let's get somewhere safe first, then we can talk. She's too dangerous for us to let our guard down.
「稳重」了不少呢，还是你的反应变慢了？
You've gotten more "composed," or have you just gotten slower?
{RUBY_B#知更鸟}她{RUBY_E#}已经离开这片区域了，你不可能再追得上。
{RUBY_B#Robin}She's{RUBY_E#} already left this area. There's no way you can catch up to her now.
…我为什么要去追她？自负的天鹅，如果我刚才没有取走她的记忆，那我究竟对她做了些什么呢？
...Why would I chase after her? Arrogant swan... if I didn't take her memories just now, then what exactly did I do to her?
告诉你也无妨，<color=#dbc291ff>我在她的记忆中，留下了一簇焚化工的火苗</color>。
I might as well tell you. <color=#dbc291ff>I've planted a spark of the Cremators' fire in her memories</color>.
它将悄无声息地蔓延，立刻，就会将她见到我的记忆全部焚毁。她会认为自己从未来过这里。
It will spread silently, and in an instant, it will burn away all her memories of seeing me. She'll believe she was never here.
她已然生出的疑心，也将慢慢不复存在——无论她已经查到了什么，登上谐乐大典的那一刻，她将变回那个…生来行于「秩序」的好孩子。

The suspicions that have already taken root in her mind will also gradually fade away. No matter what she has discovered, the moment she attends the Charmony Festival, she'll revert back to that... good child who was born to walk on the Order.
You're the one who's run out of time.
原来如此。不是永火官邸的一员，也绝非星核猎手，你真正的盟友，是「梦主」本人？
I see. Not a member of the Ever-Flame Mansion, and definitely not a Stellaron Hunter... Your true ally is the Dreammaster?
真聪明呢，给你一点「奖励」，如何？
Aren't you clever? How about a little "reward" for that?
不必故作姿态了。就算你行事一向不顾代价，也没办法独自对付我。
Cut the act. Even with your usual reckless methods, you can't handle me alone.
说得对，独自一人，我的确做不到——可我很少会感到孤单呢。
You're right, I can't do it alone... But I rarely feel lonely anyway.
<color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>30</unbreak>█改邪归正。你虽如大鹰高飞，在星宿之间搭窝，但我必从那里拉下你来。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>30</unbreak>█Repent and return to righteousness. Though you soar like an eagle and make your nest among the stars, I will bring you down from there."</color>
现在，你还能强装镇定吗？
Now, can you still keep your cool?
他通过「律令」向你分享了力量？「梦主」竟会为盟友做到这种程度？
He actually gave you strength through the "divine law"? The Dreammaster would go this far for an ally?
谁让我是那样值得信赖呢？如果他不这么做，我对忆质的掌控，又怎能远远超过寻常忆者，更别说…能篡改{RUBY_B#流萤}一名星核猎手{RUBY_E#}的记忆了。

What can I say? I'm just that trustworthy! If he hadn't done that, how could my control over memoria far exceed that of ordinary Memokeepers, let alone... allow me to tamper with {RUBY_B#Firefly}a Stellaron Hunter's{RUBY_E#} memories?
可惜，你还是因狂喜而失态了。在梦境中，我暂且不是你的对手。但我想走，你也留不住。
Unfortunately, you lost your composure in your euphoria. In the dreamscape, I might not be your match. But if I want to leave, you can't keep me here.
这话真够绝情啊…想试试看吗？把一朵花丢掉容易，但手上的花香，可不会那么容易散去——我很缠人的。
Harsh words... Want to test that theory? It's easy to throw away a flower, but the fragrance lingering on your hands won't fade so easily. I can be quite persistent, you know.
<color=#dbc291ff>即便是再续前缘，我也从未改变。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Even if we rekindle what once was, I remain unchanged.</color>
跑快点吧，我喜欢看别人反抗，也喜欢看别人逃跑，我们得多享受一会儿，毕竟对我们来说，这会是无比重要的一刻。
Run faster, I love watching people resist, love watching them flee. Let's savor this moment a bit longer. After all, for us, this will be an incredibly crucial moment.
无论逃去哪里，我都会找到你的。
No matter where you run, I will always find you.
…要去哪儿啊？费尽心机，演了这么一出好戏，不过来聊聊吗？
...Where do you think you're going? After putting on such an elaborate show, won't you stay for a little chat?
你最值得信任的一点，就是你「永远不该被信任」，亲爱的。这一点，你也从未改变呢。
The most trustworthy thing about you is that you're "never to be trusted," darling. And that's one thing that's never changed about you.
什么时候看出来的——<color=#dbc291ff>歌斐木分享力量的「律令」，也是他施予我的禁制。</color>
When did you figure it out... <color=#dbc291ff>that the "divine law" used to share power with me was also the shackles he placed upon me?</color>
你承认自己是梦主盟友的那一刻，我就开始怀疑你真正的用意了。迄今为止，你背叛过自己加入的每一方势力，从无例外。
The moment you admitted to being the Dreammaster's ally, I began to suspect your true intentions. Until now, you've betrayed every single faction you've joined, without exception.
况且…许久不见，又在我面前有了压倒性的优势，哪怕我仅有半分逃离的机会，你也会竭力阻止。
Besides... after not seeing each other for so long, and now having such an overwhelming advantage over me, you'd do everything in your power to stop me even if I had the slightest chance to escape.
方才交手时，你刻意留下的破绽可不怎么高明。与其说是在取乐，不如说…处处给我留下「焚化忆质」的空隙。
The openings you deliberately left during our clash weren't exactly subtle. Rather than toying with me, you were... leaving gaps everywhere for me to "cremate memoria."
是吗？我倒很想假戏真做，好好折磨你一番呢。可惜，只要禁制尚存，我就身不由己。不能作出任何不利于歌斐木的举止，也无法透露他的秘密。

Oh, really? I'd love to drop the act and give you a proper taste of torment. But alas, as long as the constraints on me remain, I'm not my own master. I can't do anything that would harm Gopher Wood, nor can I reveal his secrets.
还好我们一直这么默契，始终相信对方的「反复无常」。
Good thing we've always had this kind of tacit understanding... Always trusting in each other's "capriciousness."
我更希望没这回事，我可不想因为与你的交集，引起忆庭的注意。
I wish that wasn't the case. I'd rather not draw the Garden's attention because of my association with you.
Oh? Back to your old tricks again?
…是幡然醒悟，亲爱的，你永远不会懂的。还是谈谈眼下的正事吧，你不惜受制于梦主，是想从他身上得到什么？

...It's an epiphany, dear. Something you'll never understand. Let's talk about what's really important here: what are you hoping to get from the Dreammaster that made you willing to submit to his control?
演了这样一出戏，借我之手重获自由，又是为了从美梦中，窃取哪一种记忆？
After putting on such an elaborate show, using me to regain your freedom... Which kind of memories are you trying to steal from the sweet dream?
…别再开玩笑了，你早就抛弃这条命途了。
...Stop joking around. You abandoned that Path long ago.
You're still as charming as ever.
那么，我来为你展示一段往事吧——仅此一次哦？
So, let me show you a glimpse of the past. Just this once, hmm?
对于永火官邸，你不是很感兴趣么？
Weren't you really interested in the Ever-Flame Mansion?
那只八音盒中的记忆，果然是你亲手抹去的。
So you were the one who erased the memories from that music box after all.
没错，只留下这一幕作为纪念——我想记住那一刻的心情。
That's right. I kept only this scene as a memento. I wanted to remember how I felt at that moment.
还有…看仔细些，不光是记忆——永火官邸本身也不复存在了。
And... look closer. It's not just the memories. The Ever-Flame Mansion itself has ceased to exist.
那些爪痕…早已叛离那条命途，你却仍能使用「毁灭」的力量？
Those claw marks... You've long since strayed from that Path, yet you can still wield the power of the Destruction?
此时此刻，不也一样？我也叛离过流光忆庭，却还是能为你展示记忆。
Isn't it the same right now? I've betrayed the Garden of Recollection, yet I can still show you the memories.
有时间的话，我也可以…帮你回味下我们的第一次相遇。
If you have time, I can... help you savor the memory of our first encounter.
还是自己品味吧，我只希望自己尽快忘记。
Go ahead and savor it on your own. I want to put it behind me, the sooner, the better.
不过，你就不能讲述些我不知情的往事吗？你背叛了永火官邸…这难道还值得意外？
But can't you tell me something I don't already know? You betrayed the Ever-Flame Mansion... Is that really supposed to be surprising?
毁灭是壮丽的一瞬——作为冥火大公的「女儿」，我当然要让他的遗愿尽善尽美，就算只是暂时的身份。
Destruction is a glorious moment. As Duke Inferno's "daughter," I will see his last wishes carried out to perfection, even if my role as such is only temporary.
还有…谁说我在那时就背叛了他们？我来到这里，就是为了完成冥火大公的遗愿。
And besides... who said I betrayed them back then? I came here to fulfill Duke Inferno's last wishes.
这是他向我下达的命令——「让匹诺康尼的午夜枯萎凋零，只留下记忆的坟茔。」
This was his command to me: "Make the nights of Penacony crumble and wither, leave nought but a tomb of Remembrance."
换句话说，匹诺康尼与「记忆」有关的一切，都是我应当毁灭的目标。但这本就是忆质的世界，没有帮手，我怎么可能做得到？
In other words, everything on Penacony related to the Remembrance was my target for destruction. But this was already a world of memoria. How could I possibly accomplish this without any help?
与「梦主」的合作，虽是与虎谋皮，却也没有更好的选择。
Working with the Dreammaster may be like dancing with the devil, but I have no better choice.
对了，与「记忆」有关的一切，当然也包括你。庆幸吗？多亏我的善变，你才免于一死。
Oh yes, everything tied to the Remembrance includes you, of course. Grateful? You should be. My whim is the only reason you're still alive.
我可不会承这份情，你原本就做不到。孝心也不像是你会有的品质，别兜圈子了。
I won't be grateful for that... You couldn't have done it anyway. Filial piety has never been one of your strong suits, so drop the act.
所以我才说…你只是自以为懂我。仔细想想吧，作为星核猎手时，我难道没有尽心尽力，让流萤逐步接近真相？
That's exactly why I'm saying... you only think you understand me. Think about it carefully. As a Stellaron Hunter, didn't I work my hardest to help Firefly get closer to the truth?
作为梦主的盟友时，我也协助他监视梦境，在{RUBY_B#流萤}一名猎手{RUBY_E#}潜入匹诺康尼时，借机伪装成她的同伴，将她困在了忆域当中。

As an ally of the Dreammaster, I also helped monitor the dreamscape, and when {RUBY_B#Firefly}a hunter{RUBY_E#} infiltrated Penacony, I seized the chance to pose as her companion and trapped her in the Memory Zone.
被他选为献唱者的知更鸟，我也焚去了她的疑心，确保万无一失。
As for Robin, whom he chose as his songstress, I burned away her doubts too, leaving nothing to chance.
如同毁灭那般，「背叛」也仅是一瞬。而在它到来之前，无论冥火大公、歌斐木，还是流萤…我都不是假装，而是发自真心，暂时「成为」了他们的同伴。

Like the Destruction, "betrayal" is but a fleeting moment. And before it came, whether with Duke Inferno, Gopher Wood, or Firefly... I wasn't pretending. I truly, wholeheartedly "became" their companion.
那知更鸟呢？那簇焚烧记忆的火花，你就不觉得太过吗？
What about Robin? Those sparks that burned through memories... don't you think that was a bit too much?
…哎呀，本以为在梦境边缘，能瞒过你的眼睛的。看来主场就是主场，哪儿都躲不掉。
...Oh my, I thought I could fool your eyes at the edge of the Dreamscape. But I guess there's no hiding from you on your home turf.
怎么，动了你的人，要找我算账？要不先坐下来谈谈呢，我看你也挺有耐心的。
What, you want to settle the score with me for messing with your people? Why don't we sit down and have a chat? You seem like a patient one to me.
所以，说说吧，你想从我这里…拿走什么？
So, tell me... what exactly do you want to take from me?
放心吧，我也只是顺水推舟，稍稍压制了她的力量，让你能这么容易就得手。
Don't worry, I only went with the flow... Suppressing her power a little to make it easier for you.
我相信…你一定是个知恩图报的人，对吧？
I trust... you're someone who knows how to return a favor, right?
有个叫做「剧本」的东西，我倒是很有兴致——星核猎手的合作者。
There's this thing called the "Script." Now that, I find quite intriguing... Stellaron Hunter collaborator.
很快，知更鸟就会知道那簇火花真正的用意，并因此感谢我。
Soon, Robin will understand the true purpose of those sparks, and thank me for it.
真令人迫不及待。即使并非星核猎手，这一次…我或许也有机会「叛离命运」呢。
I can hardly wait. Even though I'm not a Stellaron Hunter, this time... I might have a chance to "betray destiny," too.
所以，别再自以为了解我了——我呀，只是不想错过活着的任何一种可能。
So stop thinking you've figured me out. I don't want to miss out on any possibility life has to offer.
<color=#dbc291ff>我的天性不是背叛，而是「贪心」。</color>
亲爱的，你是受了致命伤，还是得了绝症？不是弥留之际，我不相信你会如此坦诚。
Darling, are you fatally wounded, or terminally ill? Unless you're on your deathbed, I don't believe you're actually being this honest.
对你可以网开一面——大多数人，我当然不希望他们记得。
I can make an exception for you. But most people? I certainly don't want them to remember.
我有时会憎恨记忆，本就是因为…有些人不配在回忆中，再次欣赏我绽放时的身姿。
Sometimes, I resent memories... Because some people don't deserve to witness my radiant bloom again in their memories.
况且，在贪心这方面，你也不遑多让。弥留之际？也算是没说错…我想用这份坦诚，说动你一同「寻死」。
And besides, you're no better when it comes to greed. On my deathbed? I suppose that's not entirely wrong... I was hoping a little honesty could talk you into "dying with me."
太迟啦——你已经身处秘密之中。来吧，只需要随便走几步，就算我赶你离开，你也不会愿意的。
Too late. You're already caught up in this secret. Come on, just a few steps more. Even if I tried to turn you away, you wouldn't want to.
瞧这儿的氛围，可不该热闹成这样啊。两位女士——我们哪一边才算是不速之客？
Just look at this place. It shouldn't be this lively here. Ladies, which one of us would you say is the uninvited guest?
砂金先生，你怎么会在这里？
Mr. Aventurine, what are you doing here?
赌局结束了，我赢得了一场大胜。
The game's over, and I scored a big win.
Oh? What did you get out of it?
「虚无」的令使给了我一刀，我死得无比盛大。
The Nihility Emanator cut me, and I died in the most spectacular fashion.
哦，说到这里，你应该也感同身受？这位热衷于共舞的女士？
Oh, speaking of which, you must know exactly how that feels? My dear lady who loves to dance?
总比没人邀请更好，这位热心助人的女士。
Still better than having no invites at all, my dear helpful lady.
哈，两位还真是…情深意重。
Ha, you two are... really something special.
你倒是很有意思，砂金先生，不过……
You're quite interesting, Mr. Aventurine. However...
你不该找到这来——给我一个理由，否则我要投其所好，请你再死一次了。
You weren't supposed to find your way here. Unless you can give me a reason, I'll indulge you... By letting you die once more.
你没隐藏好自己的虚弱。虽是「石心十人」，此时此刻，料理起来却不难。
You haven't hidden your weakness well. Even though you're one of the Ten Stonehearts, right now, you'll be easy enough to handle.
这可未必。既然你知道我，就别试着赌一把了。这句忠告，算是我给朋友的见面礼——
I wouldn't be so sure. Since you know who I am, you should know better than to gamble. Consider this warning a welcome gift from a friend...
<color=#dbc291ff>只要我「底牌未出」，没有一个人敢跟注到底。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>So long as my "trump card" remains unplayed, none will dare see the hand through to the end.</color>
很可惜，你今天的好运用完了。比起赢，我一直觉得输更有趣，试试又怎样？
Too bad you've used up all your luck for today. I've always found losing more interesting than winning. What's the harm in giving it a try?
先停手吧，不必急于树敌。
Hold up, no need to rush into making enemies.
砂金先生，恭喜你揭开了「死亡」的真相，但就我所知，你更应该出现在流梦礁。
Mr. Aventurine, congratulations on uncovering the truth behind "Death," but from what I know, you should be at Dreamflux Reef instead.
哈，结结实实挨了令使一刀，我可没机会享受沉眠。
Hah, after taking a solid hit from the Emanator's blade, I never got the chance to enjoy a good nap.
我因此沉入了混乱的忆域，此后，<color=#dbc291ff>我的「渴求」，将我带至此地。</color>
Thus I sank into the chaotic Memory Zone, and then, <color=#dbc291ff>my "desire" led me here.</color>
哈，两位果然没意识到——灯下黑，说得就是现在。你们穿越忆质，不需要依赖「道路」，反而没能发觉。
Hah, as I thought. You two haven't noticed. The answer was right under your noses this whole time. You can traverse through memoria without relying on "roads," which is exactly why you missed it.
两位女士不会以为，公司在入局匹诺康尼前，毫无准备吧？
Ladies, you didn't think the IPC would enter Penacony unprepared, did you?
凭借最具吸引力的酬劳，我暗中组建了一支研究忆域的团队。而我索取的成果只有一个——若我意外迷失在匹诺康尼的忆质中，该如何逃得生天。

Backed by a most attractive package, I quietly assembled a team to research the Memory Zone. And I only asked for one thing in return: How to escape alive if I accidentally got lost in Penacony's memoria.
老实说，他们没作出一点贡献，但却为我发现了一件「遗产」——
To be honest, they didn't contribute a thing, but they did help me discover a certain "legacy"...
<color=#dbc291ff>拉扎莉娜•简•艾丝黛拉</color>，这位无名客曾经的事业。
<color=#dbc291ff>Razalina Jane Estella</color>, the former undertaking once belonging to this Nameless.
她曾登上星穹列车，是位出色的测绘师。多年前，为了探明原初梦境的秘密，她只身一人进入忆域，从此不知所踪。
She once boarded the Astral Express as an outstanding Surveyor. Years ago, in pursuit of the Primordial Dreamscape's secrets, she ventured alone into the Memory Zone and was never seen again.
所有人都认为，她已然遇难，至死没能解开梦境之谜。可这并非真相。
Everyone believed she had perished, taking the mysteries of the Dreamscape to her grave. But that wasn't the truth.
在离开人世之前，她以一己之力，打造出了「忆质的航路」。
Before departing from this world, she single-handedly forged the "pathway of memoria."
砂金先生，你知道自己在说些什么吗？
Mr. Aventurine, do you even realize what you're saying?
瞧，一开始我也不相信。但这位无名客，恰好有一个特殊的出身，让她想到了个绝妙的手段。
Look, I didn't believe it at first either. But the Nameless, as it happens, had quite a unique background that led her to devise a brilliant solution.
借助卓瑞娜-乌尔德星系的技术，她将生命献给忆域，赋予了匹诺康尼的梦境一个「独有特征」。
Using the technology from the Zorina-Urd system, she gave her life to the Memory Zone, giving Penacony's Dreamscape a "unique signature."
每当有逐梦客误入忆域，他们会因此漂往能实现他们「渴求」的地方。
When Dreamchasers wander into the Memory Zone, they'll drift towards places that can fulfill their "desires."
向往自由之人，将会见到原始梦境的样貌；执念难消之人，或许会接触到某些特殊的梦泡。
Those who yearn for freedom will witness the form of the Primordial Dreamscape, those consumed by obsession might encounter certain special dream bubbles.
<color=#dbc291ff>而「满心茫然，不知去处」的人，将会重返十二时刻，于自身的过往中，寻回方向。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And those who are "lost and directionless" will return to the Twelve Hours, seeking their path within their own past.</color>
家族发现了这一特性，巧加利用，让客人初次入梦时，能被送入不同的时刻。
The Family discovered this trait and cleverly utilized it, allowing guests to be sent to different Hours upon their first dream entry.
换句话说，这位无名客，是盛会之星真正的奠基人。
In other words, this Nameless is the true founder of the Planet of Festivities.
至于我——哈，也许是碰上了个「好医生」。看这附近的风景，是他让我误打误撞闯了进来。
As for me... Ha, maybe I ran into a "good doctor." From the look of this place, he's the one who let me blunder my way in.
「梦中不可能之事并非『死亡』，而是『沉眠』。<color=#dbc291ff>活下去，祝你好运。</color>」
"The impossible in dreams is not 'Death,' but 'Dormancy.' <color=#dbc291ff>Do stay alive. I wish you the best of luck.</color>"
看来我相当好运，能在这里发现什么，我很期待。
Looks like I'm pretty lucky! I can't wait to see what I'll discover here.
还是你的运气更好，砂金先生。
It would seem luck favors you still, Mr. Aventurine.
命运真是…迷人而又残忍啊。
Fate is truly... fascinating yet cruel.
还记得知更鸟小姐的疑问吗？若是「梦主」意在「繁育」，何必非得加害格拉默铁骑？
Remember Miss Robin's question? If the Dreammaster was after the Propagation, why did he have to harm the Glamoth Knight?
多年之前，他已经完成了这个计划，只等一位格拉默铁骑闯入梦中。可惜，帝国突然覆灭，他的希望似已落空。
Years ago, he had already completed this plan, waiting for a Glamoth Knight to enter the dream. Unfortunately, with the sudden fall of his empire, his hopes seemed to have been dashed.
偏偏在谐乐大典即将开幕的时刻，一位格拉默铁骑的末裔不请自来，一切再度开始转动。
Yet just as the Charmony Festival was about to begin, a descendant of the Glamoth Knights appeared uninvited, and everything began to turn once again.
「梦主」从不害怕流萤深入调查「繁育」，那正是「梦主」希望她看到的{RUBY_B#假象}真相{RUBY_E#}。
The Dreammaster was never afraid of Firefly investigating the Propagation. That was exactly the {RUBY_B#façade}truth{RUBY_E#} he wanted her to see.
等等，你是因此才将她困入忆域？
Wait, is that why you trapped her in the Memory Zone?
没错，这里…本就是「梦主」希望她来到的地方。并且，希望她自以为掌握了些什么，在最关键的时刻，作出错误的判断。
Correct. This place... is where the Dreammaster wanted her to be. And he wanted her to think she'd figured something out, only to make the wrong decision at the most critical moment.
所以，梦主究竟在谋划些什么？
So what exactly is the Dreammaster plotting?
已经不重要了，我们错过了阻止他的机会。
It doesn't matter anymore. We've missed our chance to stop him.
...Even if we catch him in person?
从一开始，他就不存在于「任何地方」。
From the very beginning, he never existed "anywhere" at all.
自他尝试融入梦境时，他就将自身化为四条「太初律令」。
When he attempted to merge with the Dreamscape, he transformed himself into four Primordial Divine Laws.
<color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>15</unbreak>█神明赐予我们天火，也赐予我们神圣的磨难。便令它们存在吧，你我皆属凡人，生来便要去爱，去受痛苦。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>15</unbreak>█The gods bestowed upon us heavenly fire, and with it divine tribulations. Let them be, for we are all mortals, born to love and to suffer."</color>
第一条律令，他作为临别赠礼，施予知更鸟，点拨她走上「同谐」。
The First Law... As his parting gift, he bestowed it upon Robin, guiding her onto the Harmony.
<color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>30</unbreak>█改邪归正。你虽如大鹰高飞，在星宿之间搭窝，但我必从那里拉下你来。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>30</unbreak>█Repent and return to righteousness. Though you soar like an eagle and make your nest among the stars, I will bring you down from there."</color>
第二条律令，是他分予我这个合作者的力量。同时，也作为禁制，确保我不会轻举妄动。
The Second Law is the power he bestowed upon me as his collaborator. At the same time, it serves as a constraint to ensure I won't act recklessly.
<color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>45</unbreak>█乐园终将跌入愁苦人世，黎明一旦升起，便要坠毁于白昼。凡是金的，怎可能光华长留？」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>45</unbreak>█Paradise shall fall into this world of sorrow, and once dawn breaks, it will shatter in the light of day. How could anything golden abide in glory forever?"</color>
我也还未见识过。据他所说，是倾其所有，悬河注火般的一击。
I haven't seen it myself either. According to him, it was an all-out attack, like a torrent of fire pouring down from above.
没人知道。在他自称抱恙在身，不再现身后，尽管禁制仍未消去，但连我这位合作者，他也没有再联络过。
Nobody knows. After claiming to be ill and withdrawing from public view, even though the constraint remained in place, he never contacted anyone again. Not even me, his collaborator.
这只是我的猜测，但多半属实——那时他终于完成了最后的「律令」，并借此，抹除了任何计划都会存在的破绽…谋划者本人，他自己。
It's just my theory, but I'm pretty sure I'm right. By then he had finally completed the last "law" and used it to eliminate the one weakness that exists in any plan... the mastermind himself.
在计划开始转动的瞬间，歌斐木便已为了他信奉的{RUBY_B#秩序}公义{RUBY_E#}，殉道而死。
The moment the plan was set in motion, Gopher Wood died a martyr's death for the {RUBY_B#the Order}just cause{RUBY_E#} he believed in.
而「寰宇蝗灾」，也将重现于美梦之中。
And the Swarm Disaster shall reappear again in the sweet dream.
（蓝色的火焰…流萤小姐的同伴中，有一名焚化工吗？）
(Blue flames... Is there a Cremator among Miss Firefly's companions?)
原来如此，「一节已被蛀朽的橡木」…那时你并非信口胡言。
I see now... "A piece of worm-eaten oak"... You weren't just making that up.
橡木本就容易「生虫」，没什么好意外的。
Oak wood is prone to "insect infestations." Nothing surprising about that.
这一刻还是到来了，因遭到欺骗而不满，因回忆的冲突而困惑…你此刻的表情，和我预想中的是多么相似啊。
The moment has finally come. Resentful from being deceived, confused by conflicting memories... Your expression right now is so similar to what I had imagined.
Whose side are you really on?
每一边。我会试着完成冥火大公的遗愿，会去推进歌斐木的布置，也的的确确，帮助了星核猎手挖掘真相。
Every side. I'll try to fulfill Duke Inferno's last wishes, advance Gopher Wood's plans, and yes, indeed, I've helped the Stellaron Hunters uncover the truth.
别太生气，那时我的确还不是星核猎手，但匹诺康尼发生的一切，不就是加入的最好契机吗？
Don't be too mad. I wasn't a Stellaron Hunter back then, but wasn't everything that happened in Penacony the perfect opportunity to join?
What did you do to Firefly?
尽管并非初衷，但我想帮她，让她不必涉入歌斐木的阴谋，面对可憎的命运。
Though it wasn't my original intention, I wanted to help her, to keep her from getting caught up in Gopher Wood's schemes and facing such a detestable fate.
不过很可惜，我没能做到。你的前辈拉扎莉娜，她在忆质中留下的通路，将流萤推入了{RUBY_B#死地}生机{RUBY_E#}。
Alas, I couldn't make it happen. The path your predecessor Razalina left in the memoria pushed Firefly towards a {RUBY_B#dead end}new lease on life{RUBY_E#}.
也对，行于「开拓」的无名客，怎会留下教人「逃避命运」的遗产？
Indeed, how could a Nameless who walks the path of the Trailblaze leave behind a legacy built on "evading destiny"?
What's the deal with the Dreammaster?
如你所见，他以身殉道，将全数力量留在十二时刻，如同自行转动的指针，推动着他的计划。
As you can see, he became a martyr, leaving all his power in the Twelve Hours, like a self-turning hand of time, driving his plans forward.
「秩序」还真是一条苛刻的命途呢。太一，歌斐木，你更熟悉的星期日…他们全都选择了为之献身。
The Order truly is a harsh Path. Ena, Gopher Wood, and Sunday, the one you know even better... They all chose to sacrifice themselves for it.
随后，有趣的事发生了——而你正是那个「变数」。
But then, something interesting happened: You turned out to be that "variable."
如砂金所说，拉扎莉娜的遗产，会将入梦者送往他们渴求的去处。<color=#dbc291ff>对流萤来说，那竟然是「你的身边」。</color>
As Aventurine said, Razalina's legacy would send dreamers to where they truly yearned to be. <color=#dbc291ff>For Firefly, that place turned out to be by your side.</color>
她向你展示了自己的一切，以星核猎手的身份与你重逢。
She revealed her true self to you, reuniting with you as a Stellaron Hunter.
随后，在一位虚构史学家的指引下，你们见证了「钟表匠」米哈伊尔的一生。
Then, guided by a History Fictionologist, you witnessed the life of the Watchmaker Mikhail.
那真是值得铭记，也值得倾尽所有的一生。可惜这里不太方便，否则，我也很想敬他一杯「聚散有时」，就像那位有始有终的加拉赫先生。

It was truly a life worth remembering, worth giving everything for. I would've loved to raise a glass of "Hello and Goodbye" to him, just like the one who saw things through to the end, Mr. Gallagher. What a shame I can't do it properly here.
星期日同样来到了这里，他假意合作，为你们揭开匹诺康尼的真相——藏于大剧院幕布之后的美梦根基，实为「星核」；幕后的真凶，则是「梦主」歌斐木。

Sunday also came here, feigning cooperation, to reveal to you the truth about Penacony. The foundation of the sweet dream, hidden behind the Grand Theater's curtain, was actually a Stellaron, and the true mastermind behind everything was none other than the Dreammaster Gopher Wood.
但你如今已知晓，他的说法并不尽然。在那之后，则是流萤迄今为止，为数不多的美好经历——
But you know now that his words weren't entirely true. What followed was one of the few beautiful memories that Firefly has held onto to this day...
为了赢取大剧院的门票，你与流萤参与了热砂时刻的海选。你们配合得如此默契，就像是朝夕相处的同伴。

In order to win tickets to the Grand Theater, you and Firefly participated in the Moment of Scorchsand auditions. Your coordination was so perfect, like you were companions who'd long shared the same rhythm.
看吧，即使你已经忘记了曾经的一切，有些痕迹还是就此刻下，成为了本能的一部分。
See? Even though you've forgotten everything from before, some traces remain etched in this moment, becoming part of your instincts.
直到…按照「剧本」的要求，流萤将你们送往了最后的舞台，自行离去。在此前的美好经历中，她享受了生的喜悦，却又必须…奔赴死亡的恐惧。

Until... following the "script," Firefly sent you all to the final stage before departing on her own. In those beautiful moments before that, she experienced the joy of living, yet she still had to... face the terror of death.
可是，不知你是否注意到了，在此期间，存在着一个小小的空隙——你和她并非始终同行。
However, you may have noticed that during this period there was a small gap. She and you weren't together the whole time.
通过米哈伊尔留下的梦泡，你们重返了稚子的梦，见证了他的{RUBY_B#开拓}遗产{RUBY_E#}。但流萤并非行于「开拓」，无法进入其中。
You returned to a child's dream through a dream bubble left by Mikhail and witnessed his {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}legacy{RUBY_E#}. However, Firefly was not a Trailblazer, so she couldn't enter it.
在独自等待时，她迎来了自己真正的合作者——并因此知晓，在匹诺康尼，遗产不止一份，「钟表匠」也不止一位。
While waiting alone, she met her true collaborator... and thus learned that there was more than one legacy in Penacony, and more than one Watchmaker.
流梦礁 米哈伊尔的意志，于此行向未来
Dreamflux Reef, Mikhail's will hence flows into tomorrow...
他们进入了那枚梦泡吗？
Did they enter that dream bubble?
是啊，就算你们是同行的伙伴，也没办法轻易跟进去。
That's right. Unfortunately, you won't be able to follow them in so easily, even if you've traveled together as companions.
这老头，有时候还真固执——他更希望见证遗产的人，会是无名客。
That old man can be so stubborn sometimes... He'd rather have the Nameless be the ones to witness his legacy.
No, I think it's quite romantic.
一份留在「过去」的遗产，将会赋予他们勇气，继续走向「未来」。即使不能同行，我也为他们感到欣慰。
A legacy left in the past will give them the courage to continue walking towards the future. Even if I can't walk alongside them, I'm content in knowing this.
哈——你还挺像个无名客的。别扭，但又别扭得让人佩服。
Hah. You're quite like the Nameless. Awkward, but admirably so.
或许，无法走上同一条道路，也……
Maybe we can't walk the same path, but...
暗号，暗号，立刻回答——<color=#dbc291ff>生命因何而沉睡？</color>
Passphrase, passphrase, respond at once: <color=#dbc291ff>Why does life slumber?</color>
不用理会，是个迷因吧，怎么跑这儿来了？
Ignore that. Must be some meme. How did it end up here?
抱歉，我想过去看看，马上回来。
Sorry, I want to go check that out real quick. Be right back.
哦？难道你也喜欢「毛绒绒」，有品位——最好别走太远。
Oh? So you're into "fluffies" too? You've got taste! Better not wander too far though.
暗号，暗号，立刻回答——<color=#dbc291ff>生命因何而沉睡？</color>
Passphrase, passphrase, respond at once: <color=#dbc291ff>Why does life slumber?</color>
因为人们害怕从「梦」中醒来？
Because people are afraid to wake up from the dream?
很好，身份已确认——欢迎你，特工「机甲大亨」。请到下一步接头地址，我们的人会在那里等你。
Perfect, identity confirmed. Welcome, Agent Mech Tycoon. Please proceed to the next rendezvous point. Our people will be waiting for you there.
不能破坏人设！执行命令，「机甲大亨」！
Gotta stay in character! Follow the instructions, Mech Tycoon!
您好，请提交特工「超强火力必秒度星者」的身份验证。
Hello, please submit identity verification for Agent Ultra Firepower Instant Star Traveler.
所以花火大人就改掉了呀。
So Miss Sparkle went ahead and changed it!
假面愚者，你不该来这的。
Masked Fool, you shouldn't be here.
谁让某个人一直被蒙在鼓里，自己真正的好伙伴就在眼前，她竟然到现在都不知道。
Well, someone's been kept in the dark this whole time, completely oblivious to their real buddy standing right in front of them.
你不会还没发现吧？那个忆者都背刺过你一回了！
Don't tell me you still haven't noticed? That Memokeeper has already stabbed you in the back once!
不是吧…银狼一次都没提到过我？可是她主动邀请我搭伙的。<color=#dbc291ff>家族能在美梦里全知全能，还是我找到的情报。</color>想赖账？

No way... Silver Wolf never mentioned me? But she's the one who invited me to team up. <color=#dbc291ff>The Family's omnipotence in the sweet dream — that was my intel.</color> Now you all are going back on your word?
（有卡芙卡的「言灵术」，我的认知理应不可能遭到篡改。难道在入梦后，情况不同了？）
(With Kafka's Spirit Whisper, my cognition shouldn't be susceptible to distortion. Could things be different now that I'm in a dream?)
赶往匹诺康尼前，银狼的确告诉我，要留意询问「生命因何而沉睡」的人。但作为证据，这还不够。
Before heading to Penacony, Silver Wolf did tell me to keep an eye out for anyone asking "why does life slumber." But as evidence, that's not enough.
是吗？那如果…你会在美梦中，迎来三次死亡呢？
Oh really? Then what if... you were to die three times in the sweet dream?
那为什么直到现在，我们才第一次交流线索？
Then why is this the first time we're comparing notes?
不然呢？我一个愚者在梦里还能追得上忆者吗？每次都只差一点，她就带着你嗖地一下不见了。
What else could I do? As a Fool, how could I ever catch up to a Memokeeper in a dream? Every single time, just when I was about to reach you, poof, she'd vanish with you.
康士坦丝究竟是什么人？
给梦主办事的，但一看就不老实——她偷偷和我做了个交易。
She works for the Dreammaster, but she definitely has her own agendas. She secretly made a deal with me.
<color=#dbc291ff>她指向了一个噩梦，「梦主」的所有阴谋，都会在那里实行。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>She pointed to a nightmare, in which all the Dreammaster's schemes would be carried out.</color>
我到处找你，就为了给你剧透这个。
I've been looking everywhere for you just to give you this spoiler.
A nightmare... What exactly is in it?
直接告诉你？那不成，我可遭了不少罪呢。
Tell you straight up? No way. I went through hell and back for this.
最多一句话：<color=#dbc291ff>在你度过最美好的时光之后，就尽力飞向天空吧，你会在橡木的顶端听见虫鸣。</color>
Here's the short version: <color=#dbc291ff>After you've lived through the best of times, soar toward the sky with all your might. You'll hear insects chirping at the oak's crown.</color>
这太谜语了，我无法相信你。
That's way too cryptic. I can't trust you.
少来，我是你们的合伙人，又不是手下。不能因为有人先骗了你，就对我有偏见！
Please, we're working together. I'm not some lackey. Just because someone else fooled you doesn't mean you get to pin it on me!
回来得比想象中更快啊…有结果了？
You're back sooner than I thought... Any results?
嗯…现在，轮到我们开辟前路了。
Yes... And now, it's up to us to forge ahead.
不过…谢谢。至少你带来了好消息。
But... thanks. At least you brought good news.
而此时，梦主的计划，已经如钟表般开始转动…命运亦然。
And now, the Dreammaster's plan begins to turn like clockwork... and so too does destiny.
重现寰宇蝗灾…对「梦主」而言，这有什么好处？
What does the Dreammaster gain from recreating the Swarm Disaster?
倒让人想起些「神战」时的旧事啊……
Reminds me of the good old days during the War of Gods...
哦，瞧我这记性——<color=#dbc291ff>我得去找回一样{RUBY_B#「翡翠」基石}「失物」{RUBY_E#}</color>。否则，会让另一位女士不高兴的。
Oh, silly me, I almost forgot — <color=#dbc291ff>I need to retrieve a certain {RUBY_B#"Jade" Cornerstone}lost item{RUBY_E#}.</color> Otherwise, there's a lady who won't be too pleased.
Sorry, but I need to get going.
Sorry, but you're not going anywhere.
这是歌斐木选定的「降灾之地」，但他并不希望虫群真的奔涌而出，啃食世界。
This is the land chosen by Gopher Wood to "meet disaster," but he doesn't want the Swarm to truly surge forth and devour the world.
——寰宇蝗灾会被困在这里，此刻虚弱的你也一样。
...The Swarm Disaster will be trapped here, and so will you in your weakened state.
除非有位善良的忆者伸出援手，是吗？
Unless a kind Memokeeper lends a helping hand, right?
可是，我找不到理由呢。迄今为止，还没有「石心十人」遇害的先例，真让人心痒难耐呢。
But I can't find a reason. So far, there hasn't been a single case of one of the Ten Stonehearts being killed. It's driving me crazy with curiosity!
荣光在上！诸位，「恶兆」当前，我们更当勠力同心！请允许我以枪刃证明意志，冲破这片阴霾！
Glory above all! My friends, in the face of the Omen of Evil, we must stand united more than ever! Allow me to prove our resolve with my spear and pierce through this darkness!
抱歉，还未自我介绍——我名为银枝，来自「纯美骑士团」，为消弭世间丑恶之物穿梭于银河间。
Pardon my late introduction. I am Argenti of the Knights of Beauty, traversing the cosmos to eradicate all that is unsightly in this world.
「纯美」在上——「希世难得号」竟将我带来了此地。或许正是命运的指引，在这片被「繁育」污浊的梦境中，我将贯彻纯美之名，为诸位荡清前路！

In the name of Beauty, the One and Only has brought me to this place. Perhaps it is destiny's guidance that led me here. In this dreamscape tainted by the Propagation, I shall uphold the name of Beauty and clear the path for all of you!
…这位路过的骑士，你算是找对人了。我是正被困于此地的公司使节——请您伸出援手吧，纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！
...Ah, passing knight, you've found just the right person. I am an IPC envoy trapped here. Lend me your aid, for Idrila the Beauty is the most peerless beauty of them all!
不准备说点什么了？这巧合有些荒诞了。
Nothing else to say? This is far too much of a coincidence.
还能说什么呢？难道这位骑士先生，会听我们慢慢讲道理？
What else is there to say? Would this Sir Knight even listen to us try to reason with him?
这也是命运的迷人之处，有些人天生就是如此好运，由他们去吧，我们应当快点动身了。
That's the fascinating thing about destiny. Some people are just born lucky. Let them be. We should get moving now.
去找你的那位舞伴，亲爱的。阴差阳错，梦主的计划将要实现，要想对付他……
To find your dance partner, darling. By an unexpected turn of events, the Dreammaster's plan is about to come to fruition, and to deal with him...
...We'll need an Emanator to step in.
不久之后，热砂的时刻，布道告终之时
Not long after, in the Moment of Scorchsand, at the end of the sermon...
事关星核、匹诺康尼、乃至整个银河的未来。公平起见，就让我们在那里一见真章。
Since the future of the Stellaron, Penacony, and even the entire Cosmos is at stake, let's draw a conclusion there, in all fairness.
他的意思，是要我们去谐乐大典上一较高下吗？
Does that mean he wants to fight us during the Charmony Festival?
无论如何，星穹列车不能对星核坐视不理。为匹诺康尼「开拓」未来，也是米哈伊尔等前人的夙愿。
Anyway, we can't leave the Stellaron unchecked. This is about Trailblazing a bright future for Penacony and fulfilling the long-cherished wishes of Mikhail and our other predecessors.
（在你度过最美好的时光之后，就尽力飞向天空吧，你会在橡木的顶端听见虫鸣…已经结束了呀。）
(After you've lived through the best of times, soar toward the sky with all your might. You'll hear insects chirping at the oak's crown... It's all over now.)
（原来是这样啊，那么，我也该出发了。）
(So that's how it is. Well then, it's time for me to depart.)
利用一整个世界的意志，推动一位星神的降生…这场对决绝不是单纯力量的交锋。为了匹诺康尼的未来，不能只有你们在舞台上战斗。

They've harnessed the will of an entire planet to create an Aeon... This confrontation is far more complicated than a simple power struggle. To secure Penacony's future, fighting on the stage alone is not enough.
你们？什么意思，你不跟我们一起走了吗……
What do you mean? Are you not coming with us...?
我想，流萤小姐的意思是，她要赶赴另一片战场了。
I believe Firefly is trying to say that she's heading off to another battle.
…出发前，「命运的奴隶」告诉我，此行会让我得到难以忘怀的收获。他给出的剧本只有寥寥数行，却让人难以忽视。
...Before I left, Destiny's Slave told me that this journey would bring unforgettable rewards. Even though the script he gave me only had a few lines, I couldn't ignore them.
因为其中一行写着…我会在梦想之地经历三次「死亡」。
Because one of the lines said... I'll experience "death" three times in the land of the dreams.
三、三次死亡？！这一定是打引号的吧……
Three times!? This can't be serious, right...?
第一次是如同死亡般的痛苦，我的身体被「沉眠」的翼刃贯穿，才有了后来所有的故事。剧本必定会应验，但形式…只在翻开那一页时才会显露。

The first time was a painful death when I was stabbed by the blade of "Dormancy," which led to all subsequent events. The script will always come true, but in a way... that will only be revealed when that page is turned.
但{RUBY_B#约定之地}盛会之星{RUBY_E#}给予我的死亡，已经足够仁慈。
But the death granted to me by the {RUBY_B#promised place}Planet of Festivities{RUBY_E#} was merciful enough.
第一次死亡，我曾自己决定了它如何到来，又将改变什么。接下来的两次，我也想尽力得到相同的结果。
For my first death, I chose how it would come and what it would change. For the next two, I want to try my best to achieve the same outcome.
流萤小姐，你…已经做好觉悟了吗？
Have you... made up your mind, Firefly?
嗯。如果没有，我就不会来到这里。
Yes, otherwise I wouldn't be here.
再次感谢你对星穹列车提供的帮助。祝愿我们在现实中再见。
Thank you again for your assistance for the Astral Express. May we meet again in reality.
嗯，再见，各位。愿你们的「开拓」之旅——永不终结。
Yeah, farewell, everyone. May your Trailblazing expedition never end.
「在你度过最美好的时光之后，就尽力飞向天空吧，你会在橡木的顶端听见虫鸣。」
"After you've lived through the best of times, soar toward the sky with all your might. You'll hear insects chirping at the oak's crown."
橡木之梦——诞生之地 降死之地
Oak Dream — The Place of Birth, The Place of Death
...Where the Dreammaster executes all his schemes?
也或许，是他得到救赎的地方。
Or perhaps, it's the place where he'll find redemption.
别想让我掉以轻心，我知道你的真面目。无论你的目的是什么，我都会阻止你。
Don't think I'll let my guard down. I know your true nature. Whatever your goal is, I will stop you.
不必如此紧张，流萤小姐。我不过是一段记忆凝成的思绪。你大可出手攻击，确认此事。
No need to be so tense, Miss Firefly. I am but a thought formed from memory. Feel free to strike me if you wish to verify this.
但他也并非无的放矢，我会存在于此，有其目的。
But his actions aren't baseless. There's a reason for my presence here.
「梦主」将行的恶毒之举，我同样一无所知，但他一直在等待你的到来。<color=#dbc291ff>那位他亲手杀死的格拉默铁骑，他希望以我的存在，还她一个「公道」，并由你，她的友人来见证。</color>

I'm equally unaware of the Dreammaster's malicious plans, but he's been waiting for your arrival. <color=#dbc291ff>That Glamoth Knight he killed with his own hands... through me, he hopes to restore "justice" for her. And you, her friend, are meant to witness it.</color>
不错，我对此处还算熟悉，足以为您引路。对你来说，这也有其意义——见证他的忏悔，也就等同于，揭晓他的罪行。
Indeed. I'm quite familiar with this place and can guide you. This has its own significance for you, too. Witnessing his confession is tantamount to unveiling his crimes.
我不需要你来引路，也能做到这件事。
I don't need your guidance to get this done.
但你需要一个人解读真相，只靠武力，无法解决任何问题。
But you need someone to decipher the truth. Force alone won't solve anything.
就算我拒绝，你也不会就此停下。请带路吧，但我会一直留心你的。
It's not like you'll stop here if I refuse. Lead the way, but I'll be keeping my eye on you.
橡木公馆原本就有这种装饰吗？
Did Oak Manor always have decor like this?
入主美梦后，{RUBY_B#歌斐木}他{RUBY_E#}从不拒绝任何有心逐梦之人，即便对方是狡诈恶徒。
After taking over the sweet dream, {RUBY_B#Gopher Wood}he{RUBY_E#} never turned away any sincere dream seekers, even if they were shady characters.
行于「同谐」，他深信恶徒也能被希佩的仁爱感化。好怜悯，行公义，谦卑行走。
Walking along the Harmony, he firmly believed that even villains could be transformed by Xipe's benevolence. To show mercy, act with justice, and walk with humility.
It seems his wishes didn't come true.
不错，恶徒从未醒悟，甚至彼此勾结，妄图成立一个家系。他们是何等狂妄，为此，竟请一位信使跨越迢迢寰宇，请求「主家」的许可。

Indeed, those villains never learned their lesson. They even conspired with one another, foolishly attempting to establish their own family lineage. Such arrogance! They went as far as sending a messenger across the vast cosmos to seek permission from the Main Family.
结果，他们只能自取其辱。
In the end, they only brought shame upon themselves.
And then there was a revolt?
好在他与橡木家系早已异体同心，侥幸生还——却再也无法脱离美梦。
Fortunately, his heart was already aligned with the Oak Family, allowing him to survive by sheer luck... though he could never leave the sweet dream again.
不久后，公馆便有了这番布置。
Soon after, the manor was decorated this way.
Was he trying to warn himself?
若你信奉之事，将你带到这般田地，何必执迷不改？
If your beliefs lead you down a path of plight, why stubbornly cling to them?
至少现在…我能够理解这种心情。
At least now... I can understand those feelings.
而我似乎也已理解，自己为何会存在于此。
And I think I've come to understand why I exist here.
那时，歌斐木正立于岔路，开始思索，「同谐」是否仍为正道。最终行向何处，我残缺的记忆并未点明……
At that moment, Gopher Wood stood at a crossroads, pondering whether the Harmony was still the right path. But my fragmented memories have not yet revealed where this would ultimately lead...
但既然他将要行下大恶，留下律令的「梦主」，恐怕是在期待我走向另一种可能。
Since he was about to commit a great evil, perhaps the Dreammaster who left behind these laws was hoping I would choose a different path.
可这来不及改变任何事了。
But it's too late to change anything now.
未必，我们不妨继续动身。善念总是恶行的最后造物，因它知晓自身应被制止。而他曾经的选择，也将为我们揭示他的阴谋。

Not necessarily. We might as well keep moving forward. Good intentions are always the final creation of evil deeds, for they know they must be stopped. And his past choices will reveal his schemes to us.
If the wicked cannot suffer disgrace
Press on, even without a path
To keep hope alive in people's hearts
Rest in peace now, old friend.
米哈伊尔…是你杀死了他？
Mikhail... Was it you who killed him?
你所知晓的梦主，是如此十恶不赦？
Is that what you think of the Dreammaster? Someone so unforgivably evil?
他曾是梦主的挚友，但出于对于美梦的分歧，最终仍是分道扬镳。米哈伊尔曾赠给梦主一只腕表，即便已经破碎，他仍珍藏至今。

He was once the Dreammaster's closest friend, but they ultimately parted ways due to their differences over the sweet dream. Mikhail once gave the Dreammaster a wristwatch, and even though it's broken now, he still treasures it to this day.
我为「告解」而来，老朋友。我多想听听，死亡给你何种感受——
I came for a "confession," old friend. I wonder... what did death feel like to you...
我曾死过一次，却又重返尘世。若你也能如此幸运，我们还是否会行向殊途？
I died once, yet returned to the mortal realm. If you were as fortunate as I was, would we still walk different paths?
——在我看来，你能够怀抱希望，正因未曾直面注定的死亡。
...In my eyes, you can still hold onto hope precisely because you've never faced inevitable death.
你会怪罪我么？米哈伊尔，你会么？
Would you blame me? Would you, Mikhail?
我试着揭开希佩的第三重面相，可我错了，那并非「繁育」。可命运如此仁慈，借此令我发觉——
I tried to unveil Xipe's third face, but I was wrong. It wasn't the Propagation. Yet destiny was so merciful, making me realize...
<color=#dbc291ff>「繁育」竟能以蝗灾造就的恐惧，不断唤起人们对「秩序」的祈求。寰宇蝗灾肆虐之时，亦是「秩序」空前鼎盛之时。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>The Propagation was able to continuously evoke people's prayers for the Order through the fear brought by the Swarm. When the Swarm Disaster ravaged the universe, that was also when the Order reached its unprecedented peak.</color>
可此后，{RUBY_B#太一}神主{RUBY_E#}却主动掀起神战，促成了自身的陨落——祂不希望「秩序」，踩上谎言的神阶。

But after that, {RUBY_B#Ena}the Great One{RUBY_E#} deliberately ignited a war among gods, leading to THEIR own downfall. THEY would rather fall than let the Order ascend upon a staircase of falsehoods.
神主欲将公义还于人世，可人们向他祈求的并非公义，而是「无需恐惧」。
The Great One wished to restore justice to the mortal world, but what people prayed for wasn't justice. It was "freedom from fear."
你会赦免我么？米哈伊尔，你会么？
Will you forgive me? Will you, Mikhail?
我将行僭越之事，修缮神明的谬误——我会将缺失的{RUBY_B#恐惧}指针{RUBY_E#}置回众星的大钟，示人以死。
I shall commit an act of transgression, mending the errors of the gods. I will restore the missing {RUBY_B#fear}hand{RUBY_E#} to the celestial clock and show mankind death.
我知我罪，我罪常在我前——但我绝不悔改。
I know my sins. They are ever before me. But I shall never repent.
用「繁育」为永恒乐园奠基…那时候他的意思是……
Using the Propagation to lay the foundation for an eternal paradise... So what he meant was...
重现寰宇蝗灾，用恐惧迫使人们…祈求「秩序」再次降临？
Recreate the Swarm Disaster, using fear to force people to... pray for the Order's return?
或许您的朋友正是因此遇害——「梦主」想要借此知晓，格拉默铁骑是如何得到「繁育」的力量。
Perhaps that's why your friend was killed. The Dreammaster wanted to find out how the Glamoth Iron Cavalry obtained the Propagation's power.
那不是能被轻易掌控的力量，我们得加快脚步了。
That's not a power that can be easily controlled. We need to pick up the pace.
通过此处，便是橡木公馆尽头的大厅。
Past this point lies the grand hall at the end of Oak Manor.
而我们面前的，是他最后的抉择——背离「同谐」后，走向何方。
And before us lies his final decision: where to go after turning away from the Harmony.
既然他希望你再选一次，你想走哪一边？
Since he wants you to choose again, which side will you take?
就按你的判断前行吧。而我会步入余下的那条。
Go ahead with whichever path you think is right. I'll take the other one.
放心，<color=#dbc291ff>我改变不了任何事</color>。即便我幡然醒悟，也只是让梦主求得心安。
Don't worry, <color=#dbc291ff>I can't change anything</color>. Even if I have a sudden awakening, it would only give the Dreammaster peace of mind.
他更应当遭受绝罚，受人制止。
He deserves absolute punishment, and must be brought to heel.
那么你还是做出了不同的选择。
So you made a different choice after all.
但愿一切顺利——我们就此告别吧。
I hope everything goes well. This is goodbye then.
只是一声悲叹，流萤女士，只是徒然。
Just a sigh of sorrow, Lady Firefly, of futility.
No doubt about it, this is the place.
My apologies for keeping you waiting, Lady Firefly.
是你，另一条路也通往此处。
Ah, it's you. It seems the other path leads here too.
是世人不愿回想的恐惧，<color=#dbc291ff>寰宇蝗灾的「死灭之蛹」</color>。
It's the terror that humanity dares not recall: <color=#dbc291ff>the Swarm Disaster's Chrysalis of Extinction</color>.
「梦主」悬河注火般的一击，也正藏于彩窗之后，只待将其戳破，再度催生寰宇蝗灾。
The Dreammaster's devastating strike, like a torrent of fire, lies hidden behind the stained glass, waiting to shatter it and unleash the Swarm Disaster once again.
…「梦主」怎么会强大到这种程度？
...How did the Dreammaster become this powerful?
我将代他了结此事——这道思绪，连同窗外的力量，才是完整的一句「律令」。
I shall end this matter on his behalf. This thought, together with the power beyond the window, completes a single, true "divine law."
途中所见的一切，不是为你准备的，而是为我——为了还你公道。
Everything you saw along the way, none of that was meant for you. It was meant for me, so that I could bring you justice.
...I don't see any justice in any of this.
流萤女士，想必您也思索过命运？
Lady Firefly, I assume you've pondered over destiny too?
我不认为它能够成为任何事的借口。
I don't think it can be used as an excuse for anything.
即使结局已经注定，但过程，我们还是可以自己决定。
Even if the ending is predetermined, we can still decide how we get there.
这不过是「自我欺骗」——就连过程，你也从未改变过。
That's just self-deception. You've never been able to change the course of events.
站在抉择前的你我，无论重来多少次，也只会作出同一个决定——彼时彼刻，我们早已被过往塑形，认为那才是唯一正确的道路。

When we stand at the crossroads of choice, no matter how many times we start over, we'll always make the same decision. By that moment in time, we've already been shaped by our past, believing that choice to be the only correct path.
<color=#dbc291ff>所有你抛在身后的过去，早已决定了你的未来</color>。
<color=#dbc291ff>All the past you've left behind has already determined your future</color>.
你的朋友，她试着逃离命运，最终只得到相同的结局。此时此刻，你也亦然。
Your friend tried to escape destiny, only to meet the same end. And now, here you are, no different.
但你今天见到的，恰恰是改写过命运的人。
But the person you met today is someone who has rewritten their destiny.
那么，我愿意奉上同情，猎手——就我所知，改写命运的方式只有一种。
Well then, I'll offer you my sympathy, Hunter. As far as I know, there's only one way to rewrite destiny.
放弃自己真正的渴求，不再按照自己的意愿前行。如此，你的命运确会不同，甚至能够左右世界的去向。
Give up your true desires and stop walking your own path. In doing so, your destiny will indeed change, and you may even sway the course of the world.
但从那一刻起，你便杀死了自己，虽生犹死。
But from that moment on, you will have killed yourself... alive in body, but dead in spirit.
为了反抗命运，这是我们愿意承受的代价——不是所有人都会选择举手投降。
This is the price we're willing to pay to defy destiny. Not everyone chooses to surrender with their hands up.
<color=#dbc291ff>「任何人都有能力认清世界，然后承担它的重量，这才是{RUBY_B#反抗}牺牲{RUBY_E#}的意义。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Everyone has the power to see the world as it is, and to bear that weight. This is the true meaning of {RUBY_B#resistance}sacrifice{RUBY_E#}."</color>
我敬佩你的觉悟，既然你不介意牺牲——
I admire your resolve. Since you don't mind sacrifice...
辩言到此为止，退去吧，猎手，你无法阻挡那一击。
That's enough talk. Stand down, Hunter. You can't stop that strike.
I won't let you get away with this.
是么？「同谐」使{RUBY_B#星核}恶癌{RUBY_E#}遍布寰宇，为何便能得逞？
Oh really? How did the Harmony succeed in spreading its {RUBY_B#Stellarons}cancer{RUBY_E#} across the universe then?
虽然她不是我真正的同伴，但那位焚化工，为我留下过一簇她的火焰。
Though she wasn't my true companion, that Cremator left me with a spark of her flame.
我从未信任过你，同行途中，我把它留在了你的身上——现在，我让它重新燃起，烧尽一道思绪轻而易举。
I never trusted you. During our journey together, I planted it on you, and now, I'll let it reignite. It can burn away a thread of thought with ease.
令人赞叹，但你当真认为，自己能快我一步？
Impressive, but do you really think you can get ahead of me?
如果不能，我也不会逃开。如果那一击必然到来，在这场噩梦里死去的，只会是我一个人。
If I can't, I still won't run away. If that strike is inevitable, I'll be the only one who dies in this nightmare.
您的勇气如真金般辉耀，然而——
Your courage shines like pure gold. Even so...
<color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>45</unbreak>█乐园终将跌入愁苦人世，黎明一旦升起，便要坠毁于白昼。凡是金的，怎可能光华长留？」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>45</unbreak>█Paradise shall fall into this world of sorrow, and once dawn breaks, it will shatter in the light of day. How could anything golden abide in glory forever?"</color>
那便上前觐见吧，帝国的末裔。我准许你，为我揭示秩序的真容——
Come forth and present yourself, last heir of the Empire. I permit you to unveil the true face of Order...
我准许你，以人之手，为我创生{RUBY_B#太一}神主{RUBY_E#}！
I permit you, with mortal hands, to bring forth {RUBY_B#Ena}the Great One{RUBY_E#}!
不久之前 距「谐乐大典」开幕3系统时 匹诺康尼大剧院
Not long ago, 3 system hours until Charmony Festival — Penacony Grand Theater
您的最后一次忏悔，令我深感意外。
Your last confession took me by surprise.
歌斐木先生，不…<color=#dbc291ff>「最后的律令」</color>。
Mr. Gopher Wood, no... <color=#dbc291ff>the Final Divine Law</color>.
自始至终，恐怕从未有过寰宇蝗灾的「死灭之蛹」吧？
I suspect there was never any Chrysalis of Extinction from the Swarm Disaster to begin with, was there?
存在于橡木公馆的不过是伪装——<color=#dbc291ff>藏于其中的，只有星核。</color>
What exists in Oak Manor is nothing but a disguise. <color=#dbc291ff>The only thing hidden within is a Stellaron.</color>
不错，我从未堪破「繁育」之秘，如今一分为四，一击之力，也无法奈何那猎手。
True, I never unraveled the secrets of the Propagation. Now split into four parts, a single strike of mine cannot harm that Hunter.
可一位与虫群同源的行者，若是被调律骗过，误以为眼前确为死地，在星核面前许下「想要活着」的愿望，那结果，便将扭曲成致人以死的灾祸，寰宇蝗灾。

But if a pathstrider of the same origin as the Swarm were to be deceived by tuning, mistaking what lies before them as certain death... If they were to make a wish "to live" before the Stellaron... The outcome would twist into a catastrophe that brings death: the Swarm Disaster.
以她的「向生而死」，予此世「向死而生」——但您为何如此确信，此事绝无错失？
Her life shall "beget death," and that death shall "beget life" unto this world. But why are you so certain that nothing will go wrong?
我早已窥得星核之秘，无需确信任何事。若她从未入局，那一击仍会适时降下，令星核就此爆裂。

I've already glimpsed the secrets of the Stellaron, and I have no need for certainty here. Even if she never entered the game, that strike would still fall at the appointed time, causing the Stellaron to shatter.
入梦者都将知晓，杀死自己的力量源于「同谐」——但那终究只是下策。
The dreamers will learn that the power to destroy their own lives comes from the Harmony, but that it is ultimately the worst option.
You should know that I won't agree with this.
为时已晚，孩子。指针已然落于子夜，抬起头来，目视群星——知道它们因何而残忍吗？
Too late, child. The hands of time have struck midnight. Look up at the stars. Do you know why they are so cruel?
其原因，将是最后一道「律令」，以此，我等将一切交于你手——
That reason shall be the final "divine law." And with this, we entrust everything into your hands...
<color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>00</unbreak>：<unbreak>00</unbreak>█因众星属于所有人，也便从未属于任何人。若你爱着所有人，便是不爱任何人。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>00</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>█Because the stars belong to everyone, they have never belonged to anyone. If you love everyone, then you love no one."</color>
我们言尽于此。动手吧，橡木家系的十万七千三百三十六道灵魂已梦见这一刻太多次了……
Well, that's where our conversation ends. Go ahead. The <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> souls of the Oak Family have dreamed of this moment too many times...
开幕的时刻近了。去吧，孩子。窃夺「同谐」的权柄，揭晓你的报应。
The opening is near. Go, my child. Seize the power of the Harmony and reveal your karma.
「秩序」的道路，我将如您所愿，行至尽头。但您的律令，我已不能认同。若我成为了天空中{RUBY_B#无缺骄阳}唯一的星{RUBY_E#}，即便从不属于任何人，也绝无残忍可言。

I shall walk the path of the Order to its end, as you wish. But I can no longer accept your divine laws. If I become {RUBY_B#the flawless sun}the only star{RUBY_E#} in the sky, even if I belonged to no one, there would still be no cruelty.
<color=#dbc291ff>众星残忍，只因他们从未将热力分予万众，只为自身熊熊燃烧。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The stars are cruel, only because they have never shared their heat with the masses, burning fiercely only for themselves.</color>
天无二日。如有必要，我会出手将太阳击落。
Well, there can't be two suns in the sky. I'll step up and take down the other sun if necessary.
又岂会容许众星，于白昼之中放光？
Moreover, how could I allow other stars to shine during the day?
乐园终将造就，不在子夜，而在「正午」。神主日最初，也是唯一的律令，由我亲启——
Paradise shall soon be created, not at midnight, but at "noon." I shall initiate the first and only divine law of the Great Septimus...
<color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>12</unbreak>：<unbreak>00</unbreak>█我将飞上高空，变作天上的太阳。万众在我的光芒中热烈生长，而一切罪恶将无所遁形。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>12</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>█I shall ascend to the heavens, becoming the scorching sun. Bathed in my light, my people shall flourish, while all evil shall be eradicated."</color>
也好，孩子…放手而为吧。或许，我也并非选无可选，而是耽于趋利避害，从未知其不可，亦要为之。
Very well, child... do what you must. Perhaps I was never without choice, merely too entangled with the fear of losing, never knowing what was possible if I chose to act.
我应当也去做个「钟表匠」，我所认定的谐乐，仅有一个音节周而复始，永不失准——
I should become a Watchmaker too. The harmony I seek has but one note repeating endlessly, never falling out of tune...
（指针转动的声效，沉重一些）滴答…滴答…滴答……
Tick tock... tick tock... tick tock...
成功了，是他先一步消散，让那道力量失去了控制。
We did it... He faded first, causing that power to lose control.
命运合上了它的先兆，应时而来。
Fate closed its premonitions, and arrived in due time.
（指针转动的声效，沉重一些）滴答…滴答…滴答……
Tick tock... tick tock... tick tock...
Death comes for us all eventually.
橡木公馆，曾是朝露公馆的一部分。成为「梦主」前，他常常在此举行家系议会，但如今已废弃多年，沉入了原始忆域。
Oak Manor, once part of the Dewlight Pavilion. Before becoming the Dreammaster, he used to hold family councils here, but it's been abandoned for years now, sinking into the Primordial Memory Zone.
在你看来，梦主会选择哪边？
In your opinion, which path would the Dreammaster choose?
或是「强权」之路吧。但流萤小姐不妨自便，今日我不作他想。
Probably the path of "force." But Miss Firefly, feel free to do as you please. I have no other thoughts today.
未走之路，不可追回。即便身处梦中，此事亦然啊……
The road not taken can never be retraced. Even in dreams, this truth remains...
看来，也只是殊途同归，人的意志，作用当真微乎其微。
In the end, all paths lead to the same destination. Human will, it seems, truly has very little impact.
纳努克亲自示现，无限夫长因之陨落…此事震动寰宇，我早已知晓。又何必劳烦一位「主家」使者亲赴边陲？

The manifestation of Nanook and the fall of the Eternal Centurion... Such news has shaken the universe, and I've long since known about it. So why would a messenger of the Main Family take the trouble to visit this frontier?
只是顺便一提，我为降罚而来——其罪在你。
Just so you know, I'm here to deliver punishment, and you're the guilty one.
此前我险些死去，至今无法示以原身，为何重回此地后，会平白获罪？
I barely escaped death, and I still can't reveal my true form. Tell me, why have I been branded a criminal upon returning to this place?
You've already confessed to your crimes.
即便只是边陲之地的分家领袖，家族也不会容忍他的无能，非但无法弹压局势，甚至遭人杀害——若非纳努克示现，「无限夫长」本将降于匹诺康尼，荡绝恶徒。

The Family doesn't tolerate incompetence, even from a branch leader on the frontier. Not only did this one fail to quell the situation, he was even murdered. If it weren't for Nanook's manifestation, the Eternal Centurion would have descended upon Penacony to eliminate these villains.
但你侥幸生还，我也因之启程。你须亲自平定此事，将丢却的敬畏取回——不是之于你，而是之于家族。
But you survived by sheer luck, and I set out for this very reason. You must settle this matter yourself and reclaim your lost respect... not for yourself, but for The Family.
...To survive, but without the power to do anything.
因此，你的罪行，将以「恩赐」来责罚——
Therefore, your crime shall be punished with a "blessing"...
<color=#dbc291ff>赐予你另一桩罪行。其恶弥天，一旦知晓，歌斐木这名字便要失去意义，你将虽生犹死</color>。

<color=#dbc291ff>I shall bestow upon you another crime. Its evil reaches even the heavens, and once known, the name Gopher Wood will lose all meaning. You will be alive in body but dead in spirit.</color>
I know my sins. Please bestow your punishment.
此时此地？这可无从施予。在引你前往那处蜜泉之前，我将为你进行调律，使你无法再作声张。
Here and now? That's not possible. Before I lead you to that honeyed fountain, I shall tune you so that you can no longer speak out.
世人皆以为，那是「毁灭」的造物，因其常与灾异同行同至。
People believe it to be a creation of the Destruction, for it always arrives coupled with calamity.
我将拨开你眼前的阴翳，使你再度直视那予取予求的伟力，敬拜三重面相降下的仁慈——
I shall clear the shadows before your eyes, so that you may once again behold that almighty force that giveth and taketh, and worship the mercy bestowed by the Triple Face...
「梦主」在那时就已经知道，星核其实是「同谐」命途的造物吗…而且，是遵从家族的命令，才被迫操纵星核？
Did the Dreammaster already know back then that the Stellaron was actually a creation of the Path of Harmony... Was he forced to manipulate the Stellaron under The Family's orders?
我倒也想为其辩解，但说是被迫，未免自欺欺人……
I'd like to defend him, but calling it "forced" would be self-deception...
他说自己「力有不逮」，而非「希佩教导我等不应如此」。无论家族是何面目，此刻的歌斐木，也早已不是「同谐」的信者。
He claimed he was "powerless," not that "Xipe taught us we shouldn't do this." Whatever The Family's true face may be, right now, Gopher Wood is no longer a follower of the Harmony.
如果站在那里的，是你呢？
What if you were the one standing there?
或许也会背弃「同谐」吧。但无论如何，那只是认定家族不值得服从，无法为梦主将行的大恶辩护。
Perhaps I too would betray the Harmony. But in any case, that would only mean I found The Family unworthy of obedience. It doesn't justify the Dreammaster's heinous acts.
…流萤小姐，您曾思索过命运吗？
...Miss Firefly, have you ever pondered over destiny?
我常在想，若我们能重新面对过去的抉择，是否真会作出不同的决定？
I often wonder, if we could face our past decisions again, would we really make different choices?
在那人偶手上，流萤女士。
It's in that puppet's hand, Lady Firefly.
Why are the stars so cruel?
便教「繁育」再度投下天火，示以「死亡」的哀鸣。
Let the Propagation rain down heavenly fire once more, heralding the mournful cry of "death."
便教「同谐」之谎顷刻败露，示以「真实」的尖刀。
Let the Harmony's lies be exposed in an instant, revealed by the piercing blade of "truth."
便教回首千次，来路亦已不复，唯余「徒然」的悲叹。
Even if you look back a thousand times, the path you've taken can't be retraced, leaving only sighs of "futility."
似曾相识…我似乎嗅到了此处的「不甘」啊。
Déjà vu... I can smell the "resentment" lingering in this place.
好了，我们就此行向殊途。你获生，我赴死——何者为佳，唯有神明知晓。
Well then, our paths diverge here. You go towards life, and I towards death. Which path is better, only the gods know.
这个数量…难道歌斐木的计划，已经开始实现了？
So many... Could Gopher Wood's plan already be in motion?
If you willfully sink to ruin
Why press so hard for the truth
这里的样子…必须抓紧时间了。
This place already looks... We need to hurry.
看不出异常之处，难道我选错了吗？
Nothing seems out of place... Did I pick the wrong one?
If I were to have no choice
我有些痛恨自己的无能了，此刻，我多希望自己能有办法，使你感到宽慰。别着急，一切早已过去。
I'm starting to hate how powerless I am. How I wish that I had some way to comfort you right at this moment. Don't worry. That was all in the past.
<color=#dbc291ff>濒临死地，但仍然幸存。</color>她的第二次死亡还未到来，却又近在眼前。
<color=#dbc291ff>She had almost reached her demise, yet she survived.</color> Her second death hadn't come yet. It would be upon her soon.
谋划多年，他将一位格拉默铁骑，引诱到了星核面前。自入梦起，虽然流萤调查到的都是真相，却都是梦主想要让她看到的真相。

He lured a Glamoth Iron Cavalry to face a Stellaron after years of plotting. Though everything Firefly had learned since entering the dream was true, they were only truths that the Dreammaster wanted her to see.
而这，往往被称作最高等的谎言。
And that... is often regarded as the highest form of deception.
星核回应了流萤想要活下去的祈祷，于美梦中，再造了寰宇蝗灾，以及…星神「太一」。
The Stellaron answered Firefly's desire to keep living. In response, it recreated within the sweet dream the Swarm Disaster... and the Aeon Ena.
只局限于梦中，即便星核也不可能真正复兴蝗灾。梦主的作为，只能唤起入梦者的恐惧。
It was confined within the dream. Even a Stellaron could not truly revive the Swarm Disaster. The Dreammaster's actions could only evoke fear in those already dreaming.
但若考虑到计划的下一步，它又开始变得无比真实——太一之梦笼罩了整个星系，由此，寰宇蝗灾将逐渐与现实无异。

Yet this Swarm was frighteningly real when you considered the next steps of his plan... Ena's Dream had enveloped the entire star system, which meant the Swarm Disaster would gradually become indistinguishable from reality.
「繁育」将会唤起所有入梦者最原始的恐惧，并以人们的呼唤，延伸「秩序」的命途——直至银河尽归一梦。
The Propagation would awaken the most primal fears in all dreamers. Through their cries, the Path of Order would be sustained... until the entire cosmos drowned in a singular dream.
而后，在匹诺康尼大剧院，你们与星期日展开了决战——在篡夺了「齐响诗班」之后，他已是毋庸置疑的令使。
You engaged in a decisive battle with Sunday at the Penacony Grand Theater afterward. He had, without question, become an Emanator at that time after usurping the Harmonious Choir.
但你们毫不畏惧，倾尽全力去对抗他，并在盟友的援助下，将其击败。
But you showed no fear and gave it your all in your fight against him, and you emerged victorious with the help of your allies.
然而，奋战，挫折，胜利——这一切都是星期日编织的幻觉。「太一之梦」已然笼罩了整个阿斯德纳星系。
Yet that battle, the setbacks, the victory... was just an illusion woven by Sunday. Ena's Dream had already enveloped the entire Asdana System.
此时的星期日，你们根本无法战胜。而太一之梦是如此可怕，即便是忆者，也无法行动自如。
It was impossible for you to beat Sunday at that time. Ena's Dream was so terrifying that even Memokeepers could not act freely in it.
但还好，我们先一步去找到了黄泉女士，她伸出援手，让我们能和自己的{RUBY_B#黑天鹅}那位冤家{RUBY_E#}展开行动，试着将人们逐一唤醒。
Fortunately, we sought out Acheron first, and she lent us a helping hand. That allowed us to take action and try waking people one by one.
是啊，别忘了，在这美梦之中，仍有许多人正在渴望，正在博取，正在奋力前行。
Indeed. Don't forget that, even within the sweet dream, there were still many people yearning, striving, and pushing forward with all their might.
此时此刻的你，也要迎来相似的死斗。<color=#dbc291ff>以黑天鹅将你唤醒作为分界，由于太一之梦的存在，你此后的记忆，都不能再以从前的视角看待。</color>

At that moment, you, too, would face a similar deathmatch. <color=#dbc291ff>Being woken up by Black Swan was a watershed moment. Due to the existence of Ena's Dream, your memories from that point onward can no longer be viewed from the same perspective as before.</color>
它们并非「不够真实」，而是事物在不同的角度下，总会呈现出不同的样貌…不妨想想，我们何曾{RUBY_B#记忆的倒影}从镜子里{RUBY_E#}看到原本的自己？

It's not that they're "not real enough." Things always look different when viewed from different angles... Ever thought about whether we've truly seen our authentic selves {RUBY_B#reflection in memory}in a mirror{RUBY_E#}?
而我，也将无法再给予你任何帮助。
And from that moment forth... I would also no longer be able to help you.
你的记忆，毕竟只属于你，命运只许我涉入到这种程度。但你一定要记得——
Your memories belong to you alone at the end of the day. Destiny only allows me to intervene this far. However, you must remember this...
回忆最终如何呈现，是由你决定的。
How your memories manifest is ultimately up to you.
人们无法梦见未曾见过的事物，他们{RUBY_B#没有勇气面对未来}不敢从梦中醒来{RUBY_E#}，是因为美梦本就是由每个人的过去织就，他们还无法释怀。

People can't dream of things they've never seen before. They're {RUBY_B#discouraged from facing the future}afraid to wake up{RUBY_E#} because the sweet dream is woven from their own past, a past they still can't let go of.
就像你此时此刻的作为一样，唯有拥抱过去，你才有力量走向未来。
It's just like your actions at this very moment... Only by embracing the past can you find the strength to walk towards the future.
流萤，我，星核猎手，这个世界…都在等待着你，跨过那一刻。
Firefly, me, the Stellaron Hunters, this entire world... We're all waiting for you to reach that moment.
我实在难以分辨，这究竟是紧张还是雀跃。{NICKNAME}，你是不同的，唯一的，值得我为之期待的——
I can hardly tell if this is nervousness or excitement. {NICKNAME}... You are different, unique, and worth waiting for.
去为回忆再度写下开场白吧！
Go, and write a prelude to memories once more!
在时间的灰烬中，你要重新点燃「命运」。
From within the ashes of time... You must reignite "destiny."
太好了。感激不尽，黑天鹅小姐。
Thank you so much, Black Swan.
这下我总算可以松一口气了。
Finally, I can breathe a sigh of relief.
The déjà vu is strong with this scene...
我知道你现在一头雾水，我们会尽力为你说明。但讲清一切的来龙去脉之前，你必须明白一件事……
I understand you must be confused, and we'll do our best to shed light on the situation. However, before that, it's essential to know that...
这里是梦境和现实的狭间，属于那些从<color=#dbc291ff>太一之梦</color>中清醒的人。
This place is the rift between dream and reality. A place reserved only for those who have awakened from <color=#dbc291ff>Ena's dream</color>.
还记得那位星期日的野心么？他计划利用星核、橡木家系十万余人的意志，和匹诺康尼众生的愿望，篡夺「同谐」权柄，令「秩序」重现世间。
