Do you remember Sunday's ambitious plan? He intended to harness the power of the Stellaron, the collective will of over <unbreak>100,000</unbreak> Oak Family members, and the desires of everyone in Penacony to usurp the Harmony and restore the Order.
遗憾的是，真相不仅如此。早在进入阿斯德纳之初，我们就已经受到了星核的影响。回想起来，你我相遇的那片陌生梦境，或许就是思绪开始游离的预兆。

Unfortunately, it didn't stop there. From the early days of our journey into Asdana, we were already affected by the Stellaron. That strange Dreamscape where we met... Maybe it was a sign that your thoughts were beginning to drift away.
All of this is just a dream?
我这是在列车里睡着了？
Did I fall asleep on the Express?
I'm now back at the beginning of the story?
我想…「秩序」的目的并不是让所有人陷入沉睡。正相反，他们利用星核，是为了催化阿斯德纳的忆质渗入物质世界，让「梦境」与「现实」交融。

I don't think... the goal of the Order was to put everyone into a deep sleep. Quite the contrary — they used the Stellaron to catalyze the leakage of Asdana's memoria into the material world, allowing the Dreamscape to blend with reality.
人们自以为清醒，精神却早已步入「秩序」的殿堂。
People think they are awake, but their spirits have long since stepped into the temple of Order.
这也正是「太一之梦」的可怕之处。在「秩序」支配的乐园里，每个人都能获得各自美满的梦境，幸福快乐地生活下去。
This is what makes Ena's Dream so powerful. In this paradise governed by the Order, everyone indulges in their delightful dreams and lives happily ever after.
我想，除了那唯一的一处破绽，你在美梦中经历的仍是真实发生过的。唯有如此，他才能让你抵达理想的终点：解救匹诺康尼的危机，踏上下一段「开拓」之旅。

I believe what you experienced in the sweet dream, except for that flaw, was real. Only in this way could you reach the destination, lifting the crisis in Penacony and embarking on your next trailblazing expedition.
若非黄泉小姐提前布局，我们或许就要永远沉沦在这场梦中了。
If it wasn't for Acheron's plan, we might have been trapped in this dream forever.
但我就没这么幸运了，即便身为忆者，也还是会受到「秩序」的影响，陷入幻觉。
Well, I'm not as fortunate as she is. Even if I'm a Memokeeper, I was still influenced by the power of the Order and fell into hallucinations.
不过，多亏了你的「记忆」，我们现在还有绝处逢生的机会。
However, thanks to your memories, now we still have a chance to turn the tide.
现在，我们还有一线生机。而要将它付诸现实…黑天鹅小姐，带我们去见见那些同样坚强的人吧。
We still have a chance, though. To make it happen... please, Black Swan, guide us to those with a strong will.
<color=#dbc291ff>梦境的真相不止于此，我们必须告知所有愿意醒来的人，才能携手终结长夜。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The truth of the Dreamscape runs deeper. We must notify anyone willing to wake up, so we can end the long night together.</color>
我敢打赌，就算我不反抗，你也……
I bet that even if I don't resist, you'd still...
Time to get down to business, cowboy.
It's so great to see you.
一位忆者正在寻找他们，我们也必须尽己所能。
A Memokeeper is looking for them. We must do everything we can as well.
我们缘分不浅啊，朋友——看来你也睡得不沉，改天送你些公司的助眠产品。
Quite the fateful encounter we have here, friend. Seems you're also a light sleeper. I'll send you some of the IPC's sleep aids one of these days.
可惜，现在我们更应该醒来，而非睡去。仅仅凭借我们，也还完全没有破除「太一之梦」的能力。
Unfortunately, we need to stay awake right now rather than sleep. We're still nowhere near capable of breaking free from Ena's Dream.
先说一个坏消息吧，我们要面对的敌人，已不再仅仅是星期日了，也不再是他篡夺的「齐响诗班」。
Let me break the bad news first. The enemy we're up against isn't just Sunday anymore, nor is it the Harmonious Choir that he's usurped.
「梦主」在美梦中唤醒了寰宇蝗灾，并随着太一之梦，在每个入梦者的内心投下了阴影。根植在人们心中的原始恐惧，使他们开始呼唤「秩序」的庇护。

The Dreammaster has awakened the Swarm Disaster within the sweet dream, and cast shadows into the hearts of all dreamers through Ena's Dream. The primal fear taking root in people's hearts had led them to call out to the Order for protection.
「秩序」的命途正在逐渐复兴，而这…<color=#dbc291ff>使星期日化身为了「太一」。</color>
The Path of Order is gradually being restored, and this... <color=#dbc291ff>has transformed Sunday into Ena.</color>
准确来说，还差一步之遥。公司的星舰恰恰在此时集结，「存护」的力量渗入美梦，让他无法彻底登神，但这只是暂时的。

Specifically, he's just one step away from becoming an Aeon. The IPC's starships converged here at an opportune moment, and the power of the Preservation seeped into the sweet dream to prevent him from completely ascending. However, that is only temporary.
有星际和平公司在，银河间不再需要第二种「秩序」。
With the IPC around, the cosmos doesn't need a second "Order".
但对我们来说，区别不大。
But it doesn't make much of a difference for us.
<color=#dbc291ff>星期日的正身已然脱离梦境，如星神般庞大，阿斯德纳星系也只是他的掌中之物。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Sunday's true form has broken free from the Dreamscape, becoming as vast as an Aeon. The Asdana system is no more than a plaything in the palm of his hand.</color>
是啊，别说阻止，我们甚至做不到重新面对他。
Indeed. Forget about stopping him. We can't even manage to face him again.
There must be a way to counter him.
He's got to have a weakness, right?
关键仍然在于「太一之梦」。恐惧和美梦…依靠两种谎言，他们才能汇集入梦者的「同愿」。归根结底，只是勉强扬升的「伪神」。
The key still lies in Ena's Dream. Fear and sweet dreams... He relies on these two lies to gather the dreamers' "shared wishes." He's still just a "false god" who barely managed to ascend.
<color=#dbc291ff>只要能够让人们醒来，将太一之梦破除，星期日的神格也将随之陨落。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>If we can wake people up and break Ena's Dream, Sunday's divinity will fall with it.</color>
但眼下的美梦极为复杂，黑天鹅女士，接下来的情况，能麻烦你来进行解释吗？我毕竟…记性不太好。
But the current sweet dream is extremely complex. Miss Black Swan, could you please explain the rest of it? My memory... isn't the best, after all.
时间紧迫，我就长话短说了——<color=#dbc291ff>困住我们的梦境，足有「三重」。</color>
Time is of the essence, so I'll cut to the chase. <color=#dbc291ff>There are "three layers" to the dreamscape trapping us.</color>
其一，是由星期日掌握的「太一之梦」，它为每一个入梦者编织了美好的幻觉，使人们沉沦其中。
First, there's Ena's Dream controlled by Sunday. It wove a beautiful illusion for every dreamer, making them flounder in it.
其二，是包括流梦礁在内的「原始梦境」，寰宇蝗灾也是在此处的「橡木之梦」中重现，正以恐惧源源不断地壮大「秩序」。

Second, there's the Primordial Dreamscape, which includes Dreamflux Reef. The Swarm Disaster is manifesting again in the "Oak Dream" within this layer and is continuously empowering the Order through an endless stream of fear.
其三，是由家族建立的「十二时刻」，这里最先与现实开始融合，本身就是一个巨大的陷阱。
Third, there's the Twelve Hours established by The Family. This layer was the first to merge with reality and is itself an enormous trap.
且先不说如何取胜，<color=#dbc291ff>只有依次将三重梦境全部跨越，我们才能再次直面星期日。</color>
Forget about winning. <color=#dbc291ff>We need to cross all three layers of the dreamscape before we can even face Sunday again.</color>
我们已经从第一重醒来了吗？
Have we woken up from the first layer yet?
很可惜，我们甚至仍在第一重，也就是「太一之梦」。虽然寻回了自我，但仍在做梦——我们只是串联起了各自的梦境，并非已然逃脱。

Unfortunately, we're still in the first layer, which is Ena's Dream. Although we've regained our sense of self, we're still dreaming... We've only managed to connect our individual dreamscapes, but have not escaped.
想要将其摧毁，我们就必须让匹诺康尼的所有人，「想要从梦中醒来」。
To destroy it, we must make everyone in Penacony "want to wake up from their dreams."
Reality sure is a force to be reckoned with...
人对美好幻觉的向往近乎偏执，这种心理会令人下意识地抗拒…残酷的真相。
Humans' yearning for sweet illusions borders on obsession, leading them to subconsciously resist... the harsh reality.
我也是费心挑选了一个{NICKNAME}全无防备的时刻，引导{M#他}{F#她}亲自揭开真相，才得以让{M#他}{F#她}取回清醒。

Therefore, I carefully selected a moment where {NICKNAME} was completely unguarded, guiding {M#him}{F#her} to uncover the truth {M#himself}{F#herself} to make {M#him}{F#her} regain {M#his}{F#her} consciousness.
但匹诺康尼的所有人…想让如此规模的人群产生相同的意志，恐怕难如登天。
However, to wake up everyone in Penacony and get them to share the same determination... that would be nearly impossible.
但无论如何，我们都无法坐视不理。
But we can't just stay here and do nothing.
这是计划的第一步。在流光忆庭的帮助下，像各位一样足够坚强的人会逐渐从梦中清醒，苏醒的自由意志会成为撼动太一之梦的「不协和音」。

This is the first step of our plan. With the assistance from the Garden of Recollection, those who possess a strong will, like you, will gradually awaken from the dream. These free wills are the "discord" that will sway Ena's Dream.
但寥寥数十人，在如此庞大的梦境面前无异于沧海一粟。我们必须寻找其他办法，在短时间内唤醒以十万、百万为单位的自由意志。

However, awakening a mere handful of individuals is insignificant compared to the vast number of people immersed in the dream. We must find other ways to awaken the free will of millions of people within a short period of time.
想来，也只有「结盟玉兆」能做到了。
Looks like the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath will be the only solution.
犯不着惊动仙舟联盟，一辈子只能用一次的宝贝你好好留着吧。成千上万的自由意志？小意思——
Keep your once-in-a-lifetime treasure. We don't need to bother the Xianzhou Alliance for such a tiny request. You want thousands of people with unwavering free will? Hah, that's easy...
Just leave it to us Galaxy Rangers.
Do you know what it is, Acheron?
It's the relic I returned to you.
对。它的主人一定告诉过你，这东西对巡海游侠以外的人一文不值，只有物归原主才能发挥作用。
Exactly. Its owner must have told you that it's meaningless to anyone other than a Galaxy Ranger, and that it can only fulfill its purpose when returned to its rightful owner.
因为这是一件随葬品，只有为巡海游侠立下赫赫战功的英雄才配拥有。当它的光芒出现在宇宙，也就意味着一颗巨星的陨落，而它落下的方向……

Because it's a burial artifact, worthy only of a hero who has served the Galaxy Rangers with honor. When its light illuminates the universe, it means the fall of a hero, and in the direction it falls...
会有无数流星划破天际，那是巡海游侠集结的火光。他们从银河四方赶来，不问缘由，不计代价，只因我们遵守一条共同的底线——

Countless meteors will streak across the sky. Those "meteors" are Galaxy Rangers coming from all corners of the Cosmos, driven by a shared purpose, without questioning the cause or counting the cost. Because we abide by a bottom line...
「巡猎」的飞星，只会坠落在最漫长的夜晚，而在它身后——将是黎明的到来。
The shooting stars of The Hunt only descend on the longest night, and with them... comes the dawn.
我们已经沉寂了太久。是时候让全宇宙的懦夫、蛀虫和压迫者重新想起巡海游侠的名字了，就由我来打响第一枪。
We've stayed silent for far too long. Now, it's time to remind all the cowards, oppressors, and villains of the universe of our presence! I'll be the one to ignite the first spark.
这足以延缓他登神的进展，至于太一之梦的根基，则需要极为强大的力量，在刹那间加以动摇。
This should be enough to delay his ascension to godhood. As for the foundation of Ena's Dream, it would take an immense power to shake it in an instant.
I think... That shouldn't be too hard.
所以，最终还是回到了你这边，是吗？
So, you're the key in the end, I assume?
即便只是赝作，也非得由一位令使出手不可。
Even if it is just a counterfeit god, we'll need an Emanator to step in.
或许与令使的身份无关…这是迥然不同的「众愿」，我将倾尽所能——<color=#dbc291ff>为你们斩落恶神。</color>
Perhaps it's not about being an Emanator... This is a different "collective wish." I will do everything in my power... <color=#dbc291ff>to strike down that evil god for you all.</color>
What about the other two dreamscape layers?
无可奈何，甚至更加危险。
There's nothing we can do about them. They're even more dangerous.
不同于此刻的集结——太一之梦的消散需要时间，足以引起{RUBY_B#太一}星期日{RUBY_E#}的注意。
Unlike our current gathering, the dissipation of Ena's Dream will take time, which will draw {RUBY_B#Ena}Sunday{RUBY_E#}'s attention.
是啊，<color=#dbc291ff>前往下一重梦境后，我们就要直面星神的力量。但在那之前，我们已经出完了全部底牌。</color>
Exactly. <color=#dbc291ff>Once we enter the next layer of the Dreamscape, we'll be facing an Aeon's strength head-on. But by then, we'll have played all our cards.</color>
Can't we wait for the others to wake up?
太一之梦也绝非等闲，我和康士坦丝倾尽全力，也只能寻得眼前的寥寥诸位，再难有其他援手。
Ena's Dream is no ordinary matter. Even with Constance and me giving it our all, we could only reach the few of you here. It's impossible to find more help.
至于美梦之外，只能指望其他星神进行干涉——而那无异于掀起一场寰宇神战。
As for beyond the sweet dream, our only hope lies in intervention from other Aeons... But that would be tantamount to igniting a cosmic war among gods.
「秩序」是希佩的一重面相，此刻，「同谐」却坐视「太一」重诞，没有更进一步的干涉——这其中必然有着极深的隐情。
The Order is one of Xipe's aspects, yet the Harmony stands idle at this moment as Ena is being reborn, without any further intervention.... There must be some deeper reason behind this.
外界不会有人注意到吗？
Won't anyone on the outside notice?
来不及了，除非有其他星神进行干涉——而那无异于掀起一场寰宇神战。
It's too late. Unless another Aeon intervenes... But that would be tantamount to igniting a cosmic war among gods.
「秩序」是希佩的一重面相，此刻，「同谐」却坐视「太一」重诞，没有更进一步的干涉——这其中必然有着极深的隐情。
The Order is one of Xipe's aspects, yet the Harmony stands idle at this moment as Ena is being reborn, without any further intervention.... There must be some deeper reason behind this.
太一之梦也绝非等闲，我和康士坦丝倾尽全力，也只能寻得眼前的寥寥诸位，再难有其他援手。
Ena's Dream is no ordinary matter. Even with Constance and me giving it our all, we could only reach the few of you here. It's impossible to find more help.
但时机稍纵即逝，我们必须自救。
But time is of the essence. We must take our fate into our own hands.
说白了，想要苟且偷生的人总会死去，敢面对死亡的人才能活下来——我喜欢。
In other words, those who only want to survive by playing it safe will die, while those who dare to face death head-on will live. I like that.
那您可以自己去死，砂金先生，我们的时候未到。
Then you can go die yourself, Mr. Aventurine. Our time hasn't come yet.
就这么几个人？哦，也够了。
Just these few people? Oh well, that'll do.
别叫，想想你自己才多大。
Quiet down. You're just a kid yourself.
不光匹诺康尼，整个阿斯德纳星系全完了。
It's not just Penacony. The entire Asdana system is done for.
她身处阿斯德纳星系边缘，但还是被卷了进来，只是找到她一个人，我几乎就要油尽灯枯了。
She was at the edge of the Asdana system, but she still got dragged into this mess. Just finding her nearly wiped me out.
豪迈的投资风格！说说看吧——这么大的风险，能带来什么收获？
Quite a bold investment strategy! Tell me, with such a huge risk, what kind of payoff are we talking about?
<color=#dbc291ff>另外两重梦境，星核猎手来搞定。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The other two layers of the dreamscape will be handled by the Stellaron Hunters.</color>
我们的一位合作者，正在十二时刻寻找另一个{RUBY_B#「秩序」之子}「同谐」神选{RUBY_E#}。
One of our associates is searching in the Twelve Hours for {RUBY_B#the child of Order}the other person chosen by the Harmony{RUBY_E#}.
她靠自己的力量挣脱了太一之梦，而且给沉睡的人们，留下了一支「歌」。
She broke free from Ena's Dream through her own strength and left behind a "song" for those in slumber.
人固然有强大与弱小之分，倘若「开拓」是英雄的使命，那么「同谐」的责任便是以强援弱，因为匹诺康尼的救世主，只能是匹诺康尼人自己。

It's true that some people are born strong, and others are born weak. If the Trailblaze is the target of heroes, then the Harmony will guarantee that the strong help the weak. Only the people of Penacony themselves can be the saviors of their homeland.
每个人的幸福和道路应当由他自己开创。虽然我不是无名客，但也愿意将飞上天空的勇气传递给每一个需要它的人。
Their path of happiness should be forged by themselves. While I may not be a Nameless, I'm willing to instill courage in all those who need it.
这其中也包括我的哥哥。太一之梦…对他、对所有人都太过残酷了。
This includes my brother as well. Ena's Dream... is too cruel for him, and everyone else.
原来如此…看来我们能够苏醒，当中也有知更鸟小姐的帮助。可是…人性的弱点绝非一朝一夕能够克服，仅凭这些努力，真的能让所有人弃暗投明么？

I see... So we were able to wake up thanks to Miss Robin's help. But... The flaws rooted in human nature can't be eradicated overnight. Do you believe that these efforts alone are enough to convince everyone to choose the right path?
诚然如此，黑天鹅小姐。所以，计划中最重要的一环不是让所有人弃暗投明……
I agree with you, Black Swan. That's why the most critical aspect of this plan is not to convince everyone to choose the right path...
...But to inspire them to save themselves.
<color=#dbc291ff>她们会搞点大动静出来，为你们破除十二时刻。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>They'll stir up something big to help break you free from the Twelve Hours.</color>
至于「原始梦境」，萨姆正在待命，就等你们挣脱太一之梦了。
As for the Primordial Dreamscape, SAM is standing by, just waiting for you to break free from Ena's Dream.
Now. I'll tell you, but don't panic.
她会死，面对所有想要逃避的东西，第二次死去。
She will die. She will die a second time, facing everything she wants to run away from.
但她的结局，会由你来决定。她会为你们破除第二重梦境，然后坠入还没彻底消散的太一之梦。
But her fate will be determined by you. She will help you break through the second layer of the dreamscape. Then she'll fall into Ena's Dream, which hasn't fully dissipated yet.
<color=#dbc291ff>如果你战胜了星期日，让她从梦中醒来，这一次死亡，也会成为一场幻梦。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>If you defeat Sunday and wake her from that dream, then her second death, too, will become nothing but an illusion.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>而如果失败了，梦境最终会与现实完全融合，她的死亡就会成为事实。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>But if you fail, the dreamscape will ultimately merge completely with reality, and her death will become a fact.</color>
她的梦值得更好的结局。
Her dream deserves a better ending.
可是，这还是没有解决最根本的问题。{RUBY_B#太一}星期日{RUBY_E#}该怎么办？在跨越三重梦境的时刻，他只需一次注视，就能抹杀我们全部的努力。

But that still doesn't solve the fundamental problem. What about {RUBY_B#Ena}Sunday{RUBY_E#}? He could wipe out all our efforts with no more than a glance the moment we cross the three dreamscape layers.
忆者女士，回忆的时候到了——在橡木之梦里，我对你们说过一句话。
Miss Memokeeper, it's time for a game of recall. I once said something to you lot back in the Oak Dream.
<color=#dbc291ff>只要我「底牌未出」，没有一个人敢跟注到底。</color>现在，是揭开那张牌的时候了。
<color=#dbc291ff>So long as my "trump card" remains unplayed, none will dare see the hand through to the end.</color> And now, it's time to reveal that ace.
我来指出两个错误吧，一个是你们的——
Let me point out two mistakes. One of them... is yours.
亲身到过梦主计划的腹地，难道我不会想办法告知公司？舰队开拔，一开始就不是为了正面冲突。
Having personally been to the heartland of the Dreammaster's plans, wouldn't I have already found a way to inform the IPC? The fleet's deployment was never meant for a direct confrontation.
<color=#dbc291ff>那是为了给梦中的「存护」之心，打下根基。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>It was to seed the Preservation's heart into the dream.</color>
另一个，则是星期日的错误，而且绝对致命——他不该收缴「基石」，而应该一开始就把我赶出去。
The other mistake was Sunday's, and it was a fatal one. He should never have confiscated my Cornerstone. He should have kicked me out right from the start.
和我进行的赌局总是如此——你坐上赌桌的那一刻，就已经输了。
That's how every gamble with me goes. The moment you sat down at my table... You've already lost.
<color=#dbc291ff>一道「翡翠」色的光芒，仍然沉于梦境的深处。而它的解放，不需要持有者在场。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>A jade-colored light still sleeps deep within the dreamscape, and it does not require the presence of its owner to unleash its powers.</color>
在此之后呢？石心十人的力量，也不可能撼动接近星神的存在。
So what? Even the power of the Ten Stonehearts can't rattle an existence already approaching Aeonhood.
所以我才会说：银河间不再需要第二种「秩序」。梦主的计划确实天衣无缝…然而，面对虫灾的恐惧，呼唤「存护」，难道有何不同吗？

That's why I said the cosmos no longer needs a second Order. The Dreammaster's plan is indeed flawless... However, when faced with the terror of the Swarm Disaster, how is calling for the Preservation any different from calling for the Order?
<color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#翡翠}基石{RUBY_E#}的解放将会汲取入梦者的「欲望」，给出「存护」的许诺，引领他们如此呼唤——一切献给，琥珀王！</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>The release of {RUBY_B#Jade}the Cornerstone{RUBY_E#}'s powers will absorb the dreamers' desires and offer them the Preservation's promise instead, guiding them to cry out these words... All for the Amber Lord!</color>
这才是公司真正的意图？从命途的层面，完全夺回匹诺康尼？
Is this the IPC's real goal? To completely take back Penacony on a conceptual Path level?
怎么，觉得我也在轻视别人的信仰吗？巧了，这就是公司的信仰——<color=#dbc291ff>别怀疑自己冷酷无情，重要的是每股收益。</color>

What, you think I'm also trampling over others' beliefs? Heh. Sorry, but that's exactly what the IPC believes in: <color=#dbc291ff>Don't question your own ruthlessness. All that matters is profit.</color>
寰宇蝗灾曾经是如何结束，现在也将如何结束。「锤音」将响彻阿斯德纳，从命途层面夺取「秩序」的力量，进行反击，让{RUBY_B#太一}星期日{RUBY_E#}无力顾及你们的行动。

The new Swarm Disaster will end the same way as it ended before. The Hammer Strike will echo throughout Asdana, seizing the Order's powers on the level of Paths to launch our counter-attack, leaving {RUBY_B#Ena}Sunday{RUBY_E#} powerless to interfere with your actions.
但琥珀纪不会因此翻开下一页——<color=#dbc291ff>今日的锤击，不是星神的怒火，而是人反击的号声。</color>
But a new Amber Era will not arrive because of that. <color=#dbc291ff>Today's Hammer Strike is not the wrath of an Aeon, but humanity's battle cry of defiance.</color>
I'll hold my breath and listen for that moment.
计划一旦成功，我们就能剥夺星期日的神格，但也无力参与此后的战斗。所以……
Once our plan succeeds, we can strip Sunday of his godhood, but we'll be too drained to join the battle afterward. So...
我会让匹诺康尼拥有明天！
I will give Penacony a tomorrow!
你可以再稍作准备。出发之前，{NICKNAME}，可以再来找我单独谈谈吗？还有件事，我有义务向你说明。
Take your time to prepare. Before you head out, may I have a moment alone with you, {NICKNAME}? There's one more thing I need to explain to you.
是你…我一直都很想见见你。我很好奇，为何她会如此地珍视你的存在？
It's you... I've been wanting to meet you. I'm curious. Why does she value your existence so much?
Not now. This is not the time.
{NICKNAME}，过去我常常感慨：命运啊，你要往何处去。
{NICKNAME}, I used to wonder about destiny, about where it's heading.
至少今天，你能亲自决定它的去向——越是最后的舞台，登上它时，越要从容自若。
But you can decide its destination at least for today. The bigger the stage, the more you need to be composed when stepping onto it.
我们一直都对星核猎手很感兴趣，等了结这一切后，要不要谈谈？
We've always been interested in the Stellaron Hunters. How about we have a chat after all this is over?
…谈谈？你是盯上赏金了吧，别来沾边。
...A chat? You're just after my bounty, aren't you? Stay in your lane.
哈哈，怎么会！你要是在意赏金，我再给多加个十亿，如何？
Haha! No way I'm just after that! If you're worried about the bounty, how about I add another billion to that number?
既然分工完毕，咱们就出发去往各自的战场吧！准备好——大干一场！
Now that our roles are assigned, let's get to our battlefields and pose a grand finale!
去吧，{NICKNAME}，我想说什么，你一定知道。
Go, {NICKNAME}. You already know what I want to say.
这场盛大的宴会快要结束了。这里便是前往最后舞台的起点…也曾是匹诺康尼所有故事的起点。
This grand festival is drawing to its close. This is the starting point for the ultimate stage of our journey... just as it marked the beginning of all the stories in Penacony.
Head to where the story began.
很好。那么，请闭上眼睛吧……
Very well. Now, please close your eyes...
一点萤火，一声惋叹——{RUBY_B#奔赴虚无至暗}正因生命敢于沉睡{RUBY_E#}，{RUBY_B#必将寻获明光}他们才能醒来{RUBY_E#}。

A glimmer of fireflies, a sigh of regret... It is because {RUBY_B#rushing towards the darkest void}life dares to slumber{RUBY_E#} that {RUBY_B#will inevitably find bright light}they can awaken{RUBY_E#}.
没关系，你还有时间细细咀嚼此刻的心情。等准备好了，就直面最后的舞台吧。
That's alright. Take your time to contemplate this moment. Once you feel ready, let's step onto the final stage.
太一之梦 永恒的正午十二时
Ena's Dream, the eternal high noon...
对不起，知更鸟，唯独你…我不想你知道这一切。可惜，事与愿违。
Sorry, Robin, it's just you... I did not wish for you to know this. It's a pity that things have turned out this way.
于律法之中，人类构建社会……
Within the foundation of law, humanity establishes civilization...
哥哥，你还是把「秩序」的美梦…带给了我们的乐园？
My brother... Did you still bring the Order's sweet dream into our paradise?
都这会了，就别攀关系啦——你的哥哥，已经不存在了哦？现在，你应该叫祂「太一」。
Oww, you're still trying to play the family card at this hour? Your brother doesn't exist anymore. As of now, you'd better call THEM... Ena.
哎呀，真了不起，你还真的自己醒过来啦？
Impressive! You really woke up on your own!
我再重申一次——如果你玩够了，那还是趁早离开为好。「同谐」的乐章不能容忍杂音。
Let me reiterate. If you've had your fill, it'd be wise to leave before it's too late. The music of the Harmony doesn't tolerate discord.
哎呀，那我也重申一次——我该做的事都做完了，接下来就只等看烟花咯。
Owwww. Then I'll reiterate as well. I've done my part, and now I'm simply waiting for the fireworks to begin.
Why don't you just cut to the chase?
时间不多，长话短说——呀，还押韵了呢，我真棒！
Time's short, so I'll condense the report. Oho! That even rhymed! I'm so talented~!
有个多管闲事的焚化工，她在你身上留了个小玩意儿，想要用它烧掉美梦给你的幻景，让你能从太一之梦里醒过来——但现在看来，你也用不上嘛。

A nosy Cremator left something on you. She wanted to use it to burn down the illusions you received from the sweet dream, allowing you to wake up from Ena's Dream... Buuut it looks like you don't need it anymore.
…那么，你又为何能出现在这里？
...Then, how were you able to reach this place?
愚者千面，能让我满意的美梦，一时半会可编不出来。
A fool has thousands of faces. It's gonna take a lot to create a sweet dream that can satisfy me.
你和我…我们都还能最后清醒一小会儿。
Both you and I... can still stay awake for just a little bit longer.
实话说，我根本用不着来找你的，但谁叫花火大人心地善良呢？我杀过你一次，想给你个机会找回场子。
Honestly, I don't even need to find you, but I am just sooo kind. I've already killed you once to give you a chance to regain your home field advantage.
匹诺康尼还醒着的「东道主」，就剩你一个啦，<color=#dbc291ff>所以，想不想来玩一场轮盘游戏——赌注是整个盛会之星</color>。
You're the last "festival host" awake in Penacony. <color=#dbc291ff>So, do you want to play a round of roulette? The wager will be the entire Planet of Festivities.</color>
最好别轻举妄动——你来到我面前，究竟想干什么？
Stay where you are! What are you trying to do by showing up in front of me?
<color=#dbc291ff>想让你看着我把整个匹诺康尼炸上天</color>。然后，其他人才能开始反击，一块儿醒过来。
<color=#dbc291ff>I want you to watch me blow up all of Penacony</color>. Only then can everyone else launch a counterattack and wake up together.
想想看，你哥哥已经是天空外的神了。不把天空撕开个口子，可是连面都见不着。
Think about it. Your brother is already a god beyond the heavens. You're not gonna even see him unless you rip open the sky.
电车难题听说过没？选一个吧——大家一起玩完，还是让匹诺康尼付出点「小小的牺牲」？
Ever heard of the trolley problem? Make your choice. Do you want everyone to go down together, or to have Penacony make a "small sacrifice"?
我为何要相信一名假面愚者的说辞？
Why should I trust the words of a Masked Fool?
别以为我在吓唬你，匹诺康尼到处是我埋下的炸弹，花了不少功夫呢。
Don't think that I'm just trolling you. My bombs are hidden all over Penacony. They took a really long time to set up, you know.
嘻嘻，要不要我先引爆几颗，让你先看看效果？我瞧瞧哪边的……
Teehee~ Maybe I should blow up a few to demonstrate how they look? Lemme see... which ones should I choose...
在你那样做之后…入梦者会怎么样？
What's gonna happen to the dreamers... once the bombs go off?
…那你应该知道，我不可能同意。
...Then you know I'd never agree to it.
该取舍的时候，现实可由不得你。难道你还想再来一遍「同谐」一视同仁的笑话？
When it's time to make a sacrifice, reality won't be giving you any choices. Or do you want to replay the old joke about the Harmony treating everyone the same?
「生命」在任何时候都不是笑话，愚者。这个世界上从不存在次要的恶行，它和道德一样，不能被丈量，也不能用来对比。
"Life" is never a joke, Fool. There is no such thing as a lesser evil in this world. Evil, just like morality, cannot be measured, nor can it be compared.
那不还是「同谐」那一套嘛，不过，这倒正合我意——我不是说了嘛，这是个轮盘游戏，不是爆破表演。
Isn't that still the Harmony's same old song and dance? But that suits me just fine. Didn't I already say this is a round of roulette, and not an ammunition showcase?
准备歌唱吧，就像一只小鸟。<color=#dbc291ff>如果你能让那位希佩听见，祂也不会看着我炸死所有人的，对吧？</color>
Get ready to sing. Be like a bird. <color=#dbc291ff>If you can make Xipe hear you, then THEY definitely won't allow me to blow everyone to pieces, right?</color>
现在你会怎么选？要不眼睁睁看着我炸飞这里，要么就试试看，至少能救他们的命。
What will you choose now? You can either watch as I blow the entire place up, or you can try to save their lives.
说不定，这就是你最后一场演出了哦？
Maybe this will be your last ever performance.
…怎么，紧张了？也是，第一次登上这么隆重的舞台，就该紧张些。
...You feeling nervous? I know the feeling. You should feel nervous when going up on such a big stage for the first time.
...I'm okay. I just remembered something, that's all.
舒翁女士，在你看来，<color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#生命因何而沉睡}鸟为什么要飞上天空{RUBY_E#}？</color>
Miss Siobhan... <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#Why does life slumber}Why do you think birds fly{RUBY_E#}?</color>
...Why're you asking that all of a sudden?
第一次听到的时候，我也这么想——离开匹诺康尼前，哥哥就是这么问我的，我总是忍不住要思考。
That was my response as well the first time I heard that question... It's what my brother asked me before I left Penacony. I keep finding myself thinking about it.
不知道，我该飞时就飞，不想飞了就下来，没有为什么。
I don't know. I fly when it's time to fly, and I stop when I don't want to fly anymore. There's no reason.
…那舒翁女士的答案，会和我的很像呢。
...It seems that your answer is really similar to mine.
您也问过我「因何而唱」，我想，这两个问题，我可以一起回答。
You've also asked me "why do I sing." I think I can answer both of these questions in one go.
最初，我的想法还不是这样，我想要歌唱，是因为一个特殊的契机——
The answer wasn't what I initially had in mind. Originally, I wanted to sing because of something specific that I experienced...
在我还小的时候，星核落入了我的故乡，眼前一切顷刻毁败，甚至没有给我们留下任何反应的空间，无论做什么，都为时已晚。
A Stellaron fell onto my homeworld when I was young. Everything I knew was instantly destroyed. We didn't even get a chance to react to it. No matter what we did, it was too late.
不知为何，母亲试着安抚我和哥哥时，却选择了哼唱一段曲调。
But for some reason, my mother chose to hum a song when she tried to comfort me and my brother.
我也记得。而且，大家都认为，你是因此才选择了歌唱。
I remember that story. Everyone thought that's why you decided to sing.
<color=#dbc291ff>不——这段经历只会让我憎恨歌唱。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>No... That experience only made me detest singing.</color>
长久以来，我都是这样认为：灾难发生时，一首歌改变不了任何事，它简直是世界上最没用的东西。
I've believed for a long time that songs can't change anything when disasters strike... That music is the most useless thing in this world.
尽管我拥有出众的音律天赋，也会发自内心，为歌唱时的每一个瞬间感到喜悦…但它的「无用」，也总是令我感到惆怅。
I might be extraordinarily talented in singing, and I might feel super happy whenever I sang... But its futility had always made me depressed.
我渐渐长大，有时会发现，哥哥也会时不时哼唱同一段曲调，那时，我以为他在想念妈妈，却又不好意思直说，想要去安慰他。

I grew up, and I realized that my brother would sometimes hum the same tune as my mother did. And I thought maybe he missed her, but I was too embarrassed to point that out. I tried to comfort him instead.
而他的回答，让我知道了，自己该因何而唱——
However, his answer to me made me realize what I should be singing for...
当然，他并没有直接给我答案，但却开始让我思考…有些事，是否根本不需要理由和意义？
Obviously, he didn't give me an answer directly, but it got me to think... Maybe some things don't need a reason or meaning at all?
为了匹诺康尼的未来，放手去做吧，愚者——但我不会让任何人受到伤害。
Go and do what must be done, Fool. It's for the sake of Penacony's future... But I won't let anyone get hurt.
…呀，你刚才是不是突然回忆杀了？更期待了呢。
...Ooh, did you just have a flashback? Now I'm even more excited!
最后一次了，万一你死掉，想让人们怎么回忆你的结局？
Lemme check one last time. If you were to die, how would you want people to remember your ending?
「她一生如鸟，优雅从容，此刻微启唇喙，一声惋叹，轻如羽落」——喜欢吗？
"Like a bird, she lived her life, graceful and composed. Now her beak parts slightly with a sigh, as soft as falling feathers." Like it?
收起你的虚饰吧，歌唱需要的，只有「真挚」。
Drop the sanctimonious mask. Singing only needs one thing, and that's "sincerity."
哥哥，<color=#dbc291ff>生来拥有翅膀的鸟儿，飞上天际时不需要理由。</color>
My brother... <color=#dbc291ff>Birds born with wings need no reason to soar into the sky.</color>
而被迫{RUBY_B#无法醒来}「坠落于地」{RUBY_E#}的，也不需要高高在上的同情。
And those forced to {RUBY_B#unable to wake up}"fall back to earth"{RUBY_E#} don't need anyone's condescending sympathy.
天空与大地，是彼此的「证明」与「向往」——
The sky and earth are each other's "proof" and "aspiration"...
{RUBY_B#醒来的人们}飞翔的鸟儿{RUBY_E#}低头俯视，会发现坠落之后，生命也仍有希望持续。
When {RUBY_B#the waking ones}a soaring bird{RUBY_E#} looks down below, it discovers that even after falling, life still holds hope to continue.
{RUBY_B#沉睡的人们}坠落的鸟儿{RUBY_E#}抬头仰望，会发现再度飞翔的可能，仍然存在于这世界上。
And when {RUBY_B#the sleeping ones}a fallen bird{RUBY_E#} looks up to the sky, it discovers that the possibility of soaring once again still exists in this world.
或许他们永远不会理解彼此，但人们需要的从来不是理解，而是在他人选择的生存方式面前，多一点点体谅，必要时，也伸出援手——

Perhaps they'll never truly understand each other, but what people need isn't understanding. It's showing a little more compassion for the way others choose to live, and when necessary, extending a helping hand...
<color=#dbc291ff>即使你成为了唯一的星，阻止所有人飞上天际——他们也会因你的光芒，产生向往，奋力拍打自己的翅膀，无论是否曾在坠落时受伤。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>Even if you become the only star and prevent everyone from soaring into the sky... they will still be inspired by your radiance, flap their wings with all their might, regardless of whether they've been hurt in their fall.</color>
所以，「秩序」的美梦终将破灭。三重面相的神明啊…若我踏上了「同谐」的道路，请伸出援手，庇护信奉你的人们。
Thus, the Order's sweet dream will eventually fall. O, Triple-Faced God... If I manage to step onto the Path of Harmony, then please extend your hand and shelter those who believe in you.
而如果，我是注定坠亡的鸟儿，无法再次歌唱——<color=#dbc291ff>我摔落于地面的声音，或许会是我最后的「同谐」乐章，但却绝不会成为这个世界的绝响！</color>

And if I am a bird destined to fall, doomed to never again sing... <color=#dbc291ff>Then, while the sound of me hitting the ground may be my last note for the Harmony, it will never be this world's swansong!</color>
以{RUBY_B#逐梦者}美梦{RUBY_E#}的名义，谐乐大典，就此开幕！
In the name of the {RUBY_B#dreamchasers}sweet dream{RUBY_E#}, the Charmony Festival... Now begins!
就算想，一切也都为时已晚。
Even if I do, it's too late.
可是，你在唱的，是妈妈唱过的歌……
But you're singing the song Mom used to sing...
因为，<color=#dbc291ff>哪怕一切为时已晚，我们还是能去唱…自己能唱的歌。</color>
Because... <color=#dbc291ff>Even if it's too late, we still have the choice to sing whatever we can.</color>
与此同时：故事的起点 亦是 最后的舞台
At the same time: The beginning of the story, and also, the final stage
欢迎来到「存在的地平线」……
这里是{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}的万千表征之一，但同样，也是清醒之人告别「虚无」的出口。
This place is one of the thousands of manifestations belonging to {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}the sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#}, and it's also an exit out of the Nihility for the awake ones.
因此，我们就在这作最后的道别吧。
Let's bid our final farewells here.
记住自己的名字，我会在尽头等你。
Remember your name. I'll be waiting for you at the end.
不是，我看过「剧本」的，你问我？
Hey, I've read the "script"! Why are you asking me?
Then do your best to not fail.
只要你别怕睡着，就一定能醒。
As long as you're not afraid to fall asleep, you'll definitely wake up.
还不到留愿望的时候帕！
It's not the time to leave your final words yet!
You need to believe in us too.
开拓之旅不会就此结束。
The trailblazing expedition won't end here.
是啊，生命因何而沉睡…我们仍未知晓这一问的答案，却已然要从这场梦中清醒。
Why does life slumber...? We don't know the answer yet, but we're about to awaken from this dream.
又或者，这就是答案本身。
Or perhaps, such is the answer itself.
是最先从美梦中挣脱的人们——沉眠无相者瞥见了他们的愿望。
It's the people who first broke free from the sweet dream. The sleeping and shapeless caught a glimpse of their desires.
正因怀抱这些愿望，他们才有能力做梦。正因从未实现过这些愿望，他们才有能力醒来。
It was because they held onto these desires that they could dream. It was because these desires were never fulfilled that they could wake up.
So, after a wish comes true...
我想…并不尽然。我情愿人们能够幸福，但我沾染过太多的无…有时也不禁这样想——
I think... that's not entirely true. I wish people could find happiness, but I've been tainted by too much nihilism... Sometimes I can't help but think...
<color=#dbc291ff>「虚无」是骄傲而又可怕的梦。招致它的，不是得到，也不是失去，而是道路的断绝，甚至…欲望的丧失。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>That the Nihility is a proud and terrifying dream. It's brought forth not by gain or loss, but by the severing of roads, or even... the loss of desire itself.</color>
实现心愿，当然能够带来生存的喜悦。但若是此后，再也没有新的愿望，浮现在人们的心间……
Fulfilling a wish can certainly make people feel the joy of being alive, but if no new wishes ever surfaced again in people's hearts...
That's what the Order's sweet dream is all about.
是啊…「虚无」这道影子的背后，也一定存在着世间最猛烈的光源。
Indeed... Behind the shadow of the Nihility, there must exist the most blazing source of light in the world.
正如每一个迈向死亡的生命都在热烈地生长，向着「虚无」的尽头……
Just as every life that edges closer to death fervently approaches the end of the Nihility...
We must pursue that primordial light.
临行前，你愿意告诉我…你的愿望吗？
Before you go... Would you tell me your wish?
然后拼命让它们不被夺走…
Then fight tooth and nail to keep it from being taken away...
哪怕一切终会离我而去…
Even if I lose everything at the end...
我也会义无反顾地开拓下去。
I will continue to trailblaze without hesitation.
我很高兴。答案并不重要，重要的是你已作出决定。
I'm glad. The answer itself doesn't matter. What matters is that you've made a decision.
只剩一个「名字」…一个我「本是」，现在却渴望「成为」的人。
Only a "name" remains... A person that I "was," and now want to "become."
<color=#dbc291ff>她是行于「终末」的猎手，为了反抗命运，注定舍弃自己的愿望。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>She is a hunter who treads upon the Finality, destined to sacrifice her own wishes to defy destiny.</color>
但…无论你和她行于怎样的道路，{RUBY_B#虚无}死亡{RUBY_E#}总是注定的终局，与最后的重逢。
But no matter which path you and she walk... {RUBY_B#Nihility}Death{RUBY_E#} will always be the destined finale and the last reunion.
准备好了吗？不久前，她也曾来到过这里…借此，你可以见证她的「决意」。
Are you ready? She, too, was here not long ago... You can witness her "resolve" through this.
见证那一点萤火，如何挣脱「虚无」的引力。
...Witness how that tiny spark of bug light broke free from the pull of the Nihility.
Who were you in the past?
这里的景象…我…死去了吗？真正地……
This scenery... am I... dead? Really... dead...?
还差一线，迈过此处，你可以真正拥抱死亡。或者，你也可以就此回头。
Death is one step away from here. Step over this place, and you will truly embrace death. Or... you can turn back.
告诉我，过去，{RUBY_B#我}你{RUBY_E#}是什么人？
Tell me, {RUBY_B#who am I}who were you{RUBY_E#} in the past?
Then, who will you become in the future?
那么，继续向前走吧，死去对你来说更加合适。
Well then, keep walking forward. Death would suit you better.
绝不，我拼尽全力走到了今天，而这一切，还没有结束。即使一切烧绝烬尽，我也不会放弃！
Never. I've fought tooth and nail to get where I am today, and this isn't over yet. Even if everything burns to ashes, I won't give up!
你应该知道，那是不可能实现的愿望。
You should know that's a wish that can never come true.
<color=#dbc291ff>即使在「最后的美梦」中，你也没能成为普通的少女。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You couldn't become an ordinary girl even in "The Last Sweet Dream."</color>
涉入家族的阴谋，直面迷因的锋刃，携着能窥视未来的「剧本」，独自一人，挑战复生的寰宇蝗灾。

Entangled in The Family's conspiracy, facing the memetic entities' blades head-on, while challenging the resurrected Swarm Disaster alone, armed only with the "script" that can peer into the future...
That's more than enough cards stacked against you.
难道你认为，和{NICKNAME}度过的时光，足以说明什么吗？
Do you really think that the time you spent with {NICKNAME} proved anything?
对于一个普通的少女，平凡的幸福不该仅仅是偶然。
For an ordinary girl, simple happiness shouldn't just be a matter of chance.
可谁说…<color=#dbc291ff>这一切，不是一个普通少女的作为？</color>
But who's to say... <color=#dbc291ff>all of this isn't what an ordinary girl would do?</color>
梦主或许没有说错，<color=#dbc291ff>所有我们抛在身后的过去，早已决定了我们的未来</color>。
Perhaps the Dreammaster was right. <color=#dbc291ff>All the past we've left behind has already determined our future</color>.
我至今为止的经历，以后，还是会让我在面对危险时，选择踏入其中。
All my experiences so far will still make me choose to step into danger when I face it in the future.
倒也怪我，总是说着什么，想过普通的生活…好像塑造了我的过去，对我来说是沉重的负担一样。
I guess it's my fault too, always talking about wanting a normal life... As if the past that shaped me is some heavy burden weighing me down.
无论格拉默铁骑的身份，还是失熵症…都不仅仅是伤痕而已。正是这样的过去…<color=#dbc291ff>教会我珍惜，催促我找寻，让我懂得，如何去爱</color>。

Being a Glamoth's Iron Cavalry and having Entropy Loss Syndrome are more than just scars... <color=#dbc291ff>They are a past that taught me to cherish, urged me to seek, and showed me how to love</color>.
你刚才所说的一切，的确很不同寻常啦，但我相信……
All the things you listed are quite extraordinary indeed, but I believe...
<color=#dbc291ff>任何一个平凡的少女，面对我所面对的这一切，也会做出一样的选择。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Any ordinary girl would make the same choice I did... When faced with everything I have faced.</color>
在面对黑暗的时刻，平凡人从来不需要感到卑微——毕竟，他们总是发现，自己早已是如此崇高与光明。
In the darkest moments, ordinary people never need to feel small. After all, they always discover that they've already become something noble and bright.
<color=#dbc291ff>是啊，我改变不了结果，甚至也改变不了过程……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Indeed. I can't change the outcome or even the process...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>但我可以决定，应该如何看待我的命运。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>But I can decide how to view my destiny.</color>
比起能够改变结果，这只是程度更深的自欺欺人。
This is just an even deeper form of self-deception compared to actually changing the outcome.
对大多数人来说，自由意志原本就是自欺欺人。但只要我没有要求别人这样做，我就不会为此感到羞愧。
Free will is mere self-deception for most people anyway. But as long as I'm not asking others to do the same, there's no shame in it for me.
<color=#dbc291ff>生命因何而沉睡，每个人都拥有不同的答案。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Everyone has their own answer as to why life slumbers.</color>
可有些人永远无法找到。
Some will never find their answer.
但也没有任何人，可以剥夺他们继续寻找的机会。
But no one can take away their chance to keep looking for the answer.
<color=#dbc291ff>我仍然不会放弃，也不会指责放弃的人——我要做的，只是把选择的权利，重新交给他们，也重新交给自己。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I won't give up, nor will I blame those who do. All I need to do is return their right to make that choice... and return that right to myself as well.</color>
所以，我会离开这里，和你一起。
So, I will leave this place, together with you.
即使拥抱曾经的力量，会让我更快死去。
...Even if embracing my former strength means speeding towards my death.
我赋予自己的名字，是「流萤」。以前我还以为，是我觉得自己和萤火虫很像，只是转瞬即逝的微光……
The name I gave myself is "Firefly." I used to think I was similar to a firefly, just a fleeting glimmer of light...
可后来我才发现，哪有人会给自己起一个不吉利的名字呀？
But later, I realized no one would give themselves an unlucky name.
其实，原因是我觉得萤火虫很美。后来有人告诉我，那只是因为我的眼睛机能不够，否则就会发现，它们其实一点也不漂亮。

It was also because I thought fireflies were beautiful. Later, someone told me that my eyes don't actually work very well. Otherwise, I would have figured out that those insects aren't beautiful at all.
<color=#dbc291ff>美也好，爱也好，我们的所有感受，来源都是我们生来的「缺陷」，而每个人都因此与众不同。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Beauty... Love... All our feelings stem from the "flaws" we were born with, and that's what makes each of us unique.</color>
可是，我仍然会去喜欢类似的小东西。
Yet I can't help but love these little things.
就算我很怕冷，总是受不了夜风，我也还是会去看星星。
Even though I'm sensitive to cold and can't stand the night wind, I still go stargazing.
就算做蛋糕真的很麻烦，我也还是会去尝试，因为我喜欢把它送给重要的人们，看着他们微笑。
Even though baking cakes is really troublesome, I'll still keep trying, because I love giving them to people who matter to me and seeing those people smile.
我喜欢去到处找可爱的裙子，不是为了向别人展示，是因为那会让我自己的心情很好。
I love going around looking for cute dresses, not to show off to others, but because it makes me feel good.
所以，我不会再介意任何缺陷，不怕再添任何伤痕，我会拼尽全力，找到所爱之物，不让它们被命运夺走。所以……
So, I won't mind any flaws anymore. I won't fear any new scars. I'll give it my all to find what I love, and I won't let destiny take them away. So...
飞蛾扑火，不是渴望光芒。
Moths don't fly to flames because they yearn for light.
<color=#dbc291ff>是要穿过火焰，点燃自己，发出最热烈的光。</color>我的命运不会坠入黑暗，我会自己……
<color=#dbc291ff>It's about going through the flames, igniting yourself, and burning with the most intense light.</color> My destiny won't fall into darkness. I will...
只要钟表还在转动，死若有时——
As long as the clock keeps ticking, death comes for us all eventually...
我的世界总是会被烧成一片焦土啊，那就烧吧。
If my world always ends up being burned to ashes... Then let it burn.
<color=#dbc291ff>只要我能一直燃烧下去，我所在的地方，就是「烈火」，而非「灰烬」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>As long as I can keep burning, then wherever I am will be "Flames," not "Ashes."</color>
其实，我曾经很羡慕你。即便生为一场灾难，内心也不会因此感到痛苦。
Actually, I used to envy you. You wouldn't feel pain even though you were born to bring disaster.
But you should be envious of me now.
我不愿面对死亡，也不想再继续战斗。但在命运面前……
I'm unwilling to face death, nor do I want to keep fighting. But when faced with destiny...
活着…就是想象未来的自己，可命运从未公平。
To live... Is to imagine a future version of yourself, but fate is never fair.
人们此刻的选择，几乎完全由自己的过去所决定。但无论现在怎样奋力前行，也未必能迎来想象中的明天。
The choices people make are almost completely dictated by their past. No matter how much they try to move forward, there's no guarantee they'll see the future they've imagined.
就像所有命途一样，<color=#dbc291ff>无论你是否承认，「虚无」都已「存在」，而一切存在，也都无法彻底摆脱虚无。</color>
It's the same for every Path. <color=#dbc291ff>The Nihility already "exists" whether you admit it or not, and nothing can ever completely escape from nihility.</color>
大多命途会使人认为，这世界是美好的——只要你愿意「相信」，就能因相信本身得到力量。
Most Paths make people believe that this world is good. That as long as you are willing to "believe," you would gain power because of your belief.
「虚无」并非如此，它荒谬而广大，捕获那些不愿盲信，却又无力与其抗争的人。
But that does not apply to the Nihility. The Nihility is absurd and vast, capturing those who were unwilling to blindly believe yet are powerless to fight back.
它与美好断然无关…相信也好，盲信也罢，人们从「信念」中获得力量，应当发自内心，而不是被迫低头。
It has nothing to do with good... Be it willing or blind, the way people obtain strength from "faith" should come from within, not from being forced to bow their heads.
{NICKNAME}，这将是艰苦的一程，你还是愿意再次，再次走上起点吗？
This will be a tough journey, {NICKNAME}. Are you still willing to return to the starting point once again?
I will always believe in tomorrow.
I will end this long night.
如此，你们一定能在阳光下相聚。
In this way, you will reunite in the warmth of the sunlight.
愿死亡仍未结束她的「最后一梦」。
May death yet end her "Last Dream."
愿你能引领人们，{RUBY_B#开拓}归还{RUBY_E#}清醒的{RUBY_B#明天}世界{RUBY_E#}。
May you guide people {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}back{RUBY_E#} to the waking {RUBY_B#tomorrow}world{RUBY_E#}.
只愿除了记忆…人们还能拥有彼此。
If only people could have each other beyond just memories.
我想要这世界上的一切，又或者，找到唯一能取悦我的存在。
I want everything this world has to offer, or perhaps I want to find the one existence that can truly please me.
但愿死去后，能再见到她。她会因此知道，我也只是人而已…而人最终都能幸福。
I hope that I'll see her again after I die. Then she'll know that I, too, am only human... And all humans will find happiness in the end.
希望所有人总能和家人团聚，有炖菜吃，一直大笑。
I hope everyone can always reunite with their family, enjoy home-cooked stew, and keep on laughing.
终有一日，活着的人都能知道：该如何思考，才能自己创造幸福。
One day, those who live will all come to understand how they need to think to create their own happiness.
愿人们彼此拥抱，无论与谁相逢，都愿意献上最真诚的赞美！
May people embrace each other, and offer their most sincere compliments to whoever they meet!
我们的愿望，就交到你手里了。请让它们迎来，今后每一天的日出。
Our hopes and dreams are in your hands now. Please guide them to witness every sunrise that is yet to come.
如果你就是梦主的答案，那么，就请你代替他，倾听我的回答——
If you are the Dreammaster's answer, then listen to my reply in his stead...
人们怀抱希望，不是因为未曾直面注定的死亡。
People hold onto hope not because they have never faced inevitable death.
正因我们注定死去，才会怀抱「想要改变」的希望。
It's precisely because we're destined to die that we hold onto the hope of "wanting to change something."
此处再无神明，造就乐园的，乃是「人之君王」！
No more gods will ever stand here again. This paradise shall be forged by the "King of Humankind"!
他正在创造一条前所未见的命途……
He's forging a Path that's never been observed before...
「秩序」终有瑕缺，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
The Order is ultimately flawed. By this decree, it shall be ended!
「记忆」须臾即灭，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
The Remembrance is fleeting and impermanent. By this decree, it shall be ended!
休想！拉扎莉娜献出生命，才守护了美梦的过去！
No way! Razalina gave her life to protect the sweet dream's past!
「巡猎」徒增苦厄，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
The Hunt brings only futile misery. By this decree, it shall be ended!
但铁尔南的子弹，仍在守护着美梦的今天。
But Tiernan's bullets still protect the sweet dream's present.
「虚无」寸光无余，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
The Nihility leaves no light unextinguished. By this decree, it shall be ended!
可钟表匠的意志，永远不会消磨殆尽。
But the will of the Watchmaker will never be worn away.
「开拓」知其不可，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
The Trailblaze knows it attempts the impossible. By this decree, it shall be ended!
即便如此，米哈伊尔也相信着明天。
Even so, Mikhail still believed in tomorrow.
现在，该成为新的「钟表匠」了。
Now, it's time to become the new "Watchmaker."
静止永远无法带来幸福。走吧，为十二时刻，安上罗盘的指针——
Standing still never brings happiness. Come on. Let's set the compass needle for the Twelve Hours...
唯有开拓前路，我们才能转动时间，予其意义。
Only by blazing a trail forward can we set time in motion and give it meaning.
美梦结束之后，明天才会到来。人们会继续向前，看到许许多多崭新的事物。
Only after the sweet dream ends will tomorrow come. People will keep moving forward, discovering countless new wonders.
在明天，人们会知道：<color=#dbc291ff>世界仍会迎来无数的美好，值得为之而战！</color>
Tomorrow, people will know that <color=#dbc291ff>the world will still welcome countless marvels worth fighting for!</color>
而止步不前的美梦，无法囚禁我们的愿望——
A stagnant sweet dream can't imprison our desires...
我以完美无缺的乐章号令——再创乐园！
With this perfect melody I command — recreate paradise anew!
约阿希姆•诺基安维塔宁
流萤，萨姆，一位平凡的少女
拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔
May This Journey Lead Us Starward
星期日先生，你也该从梦中醒来了。匹诺康尼的未来，不会属于「秩序」…而是将由人的意志决定！
Mr. Sunday, it's time for you to wake up from your dream. The future of Penacony won't belong to the Order... but will be determined by human will!
The divine power of Ena actually...
何妨，本就并非我意，我等便以人之姿，辨明「终论」！
So be it! It wasn't my intention anyway. Let us discern in human form the "Final Conclusion"!
神力辟世，神力仁爱？诸神，今时此地，尔等只需静听——
Did the gods create this world? Do the gods love all beings? O gods, you only need to hold your tongue here and silently harken...
<color=#dbc291ff>万物生长，自然而然。行至尽头——人世，亦应托于人手！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>All life shall grow as nature intended and reach its end. This mortal world... should rest in mortal hands!</color>
醒来吧，这场梦该结束了。
Wake up. It's time for this dream to end.
It's not over yet. What happened next?
命运不允许我给出回答。而真正的结局…太过悲伤，我更希望你忘记它。
Destiny won't let me give you the answer, and the true ending... is too sad. I'd rather you forget about it.
I will carry even sorrow with me.
那么，我必须坦诚自己的最后一个谎言。
Well then, I must come clean about my final lie.
<color=#dbc291ff>我没有给你看过任何人的记忆，包括我自己。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I never showed you anyone's memories, not even my own.</color>
你看到的，都是我机缘巧合得到的「剧本」，它记载了确切发生过的一切——而借助它的刺激，你竟真正以自己的视角走入回忆，将一切重新记起。

All you've seen is a "script" I came across by chance. It recorded everything that had happened, and using its stimulation, you actually managed to enter the memories from your own perspective and remember everything anew.
代表你是不同的，唯一的，你做到了从未有人做过的事。
It means you're different, unique... You've done something no one has ever done before.
即使记忆已被焚烧殆尽，你却能再度将其回忆起来，重新珍藏于心。
Even though your memories were cremated to ashes, you were able to recall them once more, treasuring them once again in your heart.
星核猎手说，你是能转动时间，予其意义的人；你也是能够拨转命运，成全缺憾的人。
The Stellaron Hunters say you are the one who can turn the wheels of time and give it meaning, that you are the one who can alter destiny and make whole what is incomplete.
来吧，我想给你看些东西。
Come. I want to show you something.
这是我承诺给你的…关于「终末」的真相。
This is what I promised to give you... The truth about the Finality.
它并非艾利欧，而是「末王」的一缕神躯。
This cat is not Elio, but a strand of Terminus's divine corpus.
我也未曾见证过，这是星核猎手为我讲述的情景。当末王再度登神之时，祂将现出千手的神相，如此宣告——
The Stellaron Hunters described this scene to me, something I've never seen myself: When Terminus ascends to godhood once more, THEY will manifest their thousand-armed divine form, and proclaim...
<color=#dbc291ff>「现在我成为了{RUBY_B#时间}终末{RUBY_E#}，高举时轮，毁灭世界。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Now I am become {RUBY_B#time}Finality{RUBY_E#}, lifting the wheel of time, the destroyer of worlds."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>此后，「末王」化身为漆黑的群猫，其中蕴含着全部的神力。它们将从世界的尽头出发，逆时而行，直至宇宙诞生的刹那。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>Then, Terminus turned into a pack of black cats, distributing every ounce of THEIR divine power between those creatures. The cats shall depart from the end of the world, going against the river of time, till the moment of the universe's birth.</color>
而你所见到的，就是其中一只。艾利欧是更加特殊的存在，只有星核猎手知道他的真面目。
What you see is one of those cats. As for Elio, he is an even more special existence. Only the Stellaron Hunters know his true identity.
What connection do I have with the cat?
你还尚未回忆起的结局，它会告诉你真相——但你必须做好准备。
It will tell you the truth regarding the ending you haven't yet remembered... but you must be prepared.
<color=#dbc291ff>事实上，神主日陨落后，直到离开匹诺康尼，流萤都没有去见过任何人，包括你。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>What really happened is that Firefly didn't meet with anyone between the fall of The Great Septimus and when she left Penacony... Not even you.</color>
她知道「第三次死亡」会是多么悲惨，只敢远远地看着你，并在即将消散之时，独自躲了起来。
She knew how tragic her "third death" would be, so she only dared to watch you from afar and hid on her lonesome when she was about to fade away.
但悲伤的记忆也同样珍贵——<color=#dbc291ff>你若能坦然地接受分别，就能拥有创造重逢的力量。</color>
But even sad memories are precious. <color=#dbc291ff>If you can accept farewells with grace, then you'll gain the strength to create reunions.</color>
人们送别故人，要趁着他们仍能听见时，尽早哭泣——这样他们才能知道，自己被多少人爱着。
When you bid farewell to loved ones, you should cry while they can still hear you. That's the only way they'll know just how many people love them.
I will find everything that was lost.
I will prove that they existed.
知道吗？我常常在想，自己此刻的所作所为，会否是「命运」无常的恩赐，我没有决定过什么，只是被它随意摆弄着。
You know, I often wonder if everything I'm doing right now is just a whimsical gift from "destiny." That I haven't really decided anything, but merely being tossed around at its mercy.
但此时此刻，我不在乎，<color=#dbc291ff>因为我的欣喜是真实的，我的悲伤是真实的。</color>
But right now? I don't care. <color=#dbc291ff>Because my joy is real. My sorrow is real.</color>
你也将会一样。记住，<color=#dbc291ff>若你有着非要弥补不可的遗憾，便在心底倾尽全力去呐喊，传至时间的尽头，让将要启程的「末王」听见。</color>

And you will be the same. Remember, <color=#dbc291ff>if you have regrets that must be mended, then shout with all your might from the depths of your heart. Let it be passed to the end of time and make Terminus, who is about to set off, hear your call.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>你能看见这只黑猫，说明「末王」正在与你擦肩而过。其中一只的力量无法改变太多事，但你的过去，却是末王的未来。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>The fact that you can see this black cat means Terminus is in the process of passing by you. The power of only one black cat cannot change much, but your past is Terminus's future.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>它若是记住你的声音，决定在自己的未来改变些什么，你的过去也将随之改变。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>If it remembers your voice and decides to change something in its own future, your past will change accordingly.</color>
或许，正因世界注定「破碎」，一位平凡的少女，才能得到她渴求的花束。
Perhaps it is because the world is destined to "shatter" that an ordinary girl can obtain the bouquet she yearns for.
去吧，亲手将那花束送出，让所有人不再遗憾。
Go forth and deliver that bouquet with your own hands, so that no one will be left with regrets.
但愿我们仍能重逢，{NICKNAME}…唯一能够取悦我的人啊。
I hope we'll meet again. {NICKNAME}... the only one who could ever please me.
父亲啊…毁灭绝非壮烈的一瞬，命运与记忆亦然。
Father... Destruction is not just a single glorious moment, and the same applies to destiny and memories.
「用漫天大火焚烧冬日的旷野，才能让那些毁不掉的事物重现。」
"Only by enkindling the winter wilderness with flames that cross the sky can we make the indestructible manifest once more."
「这是耕种者再造世界的经验，也是绘世者的空空妙手。」
"This is the experience from cultivators who had remade the world, and the wondrous creations from those who painted the world."
「他们坐在余烬中画下晨星，最为知晓：极度饥饿之时，群星才会旋转。」
"Sitting among the embers, they drew the morning star, knowing best: That only in times of extreme hunger do the stars begin to turn."
<color=#ff3a3e>生命因何而沉睡？你{RUBY_B#已然}终将{RUBY_E#}找到，属于你自己的答案。</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>Why does life slumber? You {RUBY_B#already found}will eventually{RUBY_E#} find your own answer.</color>
自大的赌徒，我已经看穿了你的伎俩。
You arrogant gambler, I've already seen through your tricks.
Oh? Do tell me what you've figured out.
驾驶风帆穿越风暴的时候，醉鬼总会祈求命运的仁慈。
When sailing through storms, drunkards always beg for mercy from destiny.
都死了，命运最喜欢看他们触礁，愚人就该有愚人的下场。
So they all died. Destiny loves to watch them crash onto the reefs. A fool deserves a fool's end.
话里有话啊，教授…我可没那么有学问。
I feel like I need to read between the lines here, professor... But you know I'm not that well-read.
你根本不是好运，是你不当醉鬼，时刻清醒。
You're not lucky at all. You chose to forever remain sober, never becoming a drunkard.
哈——那就赌一把好了，走，今天正适合多喝几杯。等我真醉了，你就知道自己错得离谱。
Ha! Let's make an actual bet then! It's the perfect day for a few drinks. Once I'm actually drunk, you'll see just how wrong you are.
<color=#dbc291ff>但我也不在乎结果如何——在这世上，还有什么比「可能性」更宝贵？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>But I don't even care about the outcome... In this world, what could be more precious than "possibilities"?</color>
所以…你们还是不欢迎我的加入？
So... you still don't want me to join?
<color=#dbc291ff>加入星核猎手的所有可能里，你最终都会选择背叛。以「须臾」之名，成为毁灭「记忆」的绝灭大君。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>In all possible futures where you join the Stellaron Hunters, you will ultimately choose betrayal. You shall become a Lord Ravager named "Ephemera," poised to destroy the Remembrance.</color>
——艾利欧的原话，也是给你的报酬。
...Those were Elio's exact words and your payment.
一切结束之后，我们想让你烧掉一些{NICKNAME}的记忆。
After everything is over, we want you to burn some of {NICKNAME}'s memories.
<color=#dbc291ff>{F#她}{M#他}不能带着这些记忆前往下一站，这会让{F#她}{M#他}太早招来「毁灭」的注意，死在那里。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>{F#She}{M#He} can't head to the next stop with these memories. It would draw the Destruction's attention to {F#her}{M#him} too early, and {F#she}{M#he}'d die there.</color>
我可以这样做，但迟早有一天，我会重新还给{F#她}{M#他}——以我自己的方式。
I can do that, but I'll give the memories back to {M#him}{F#her} sooner or later... in my own way.
Whether you try to stop me or not.
…没人会，「剧本」已经写下了那一天。
...No one will stop you. It is already written in the "script."
<color=#dbc291ff>那会是一个新的起点，「四末」会因此汇向「毁灭」，而银河会携起手，将其跨越。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>It will be a new beginning. The "Four Apocalypses" will converge towards the Destruction because of it, while the cosmos will join hands to overcome that annihilation.</color>
是啊，就像砂金先生那时一样，你拔刀的那一刻，虚无浸染了梦境。
Yes, just like with Mr. Aventurine back then. Nihility infected the Dreamscape the moment you drew your blade.
还好这是梦境的世界，康士坦丝将所有的「无」承接到了自己身上，全部烧却了。
Thankfully, this is the world within the dreamscape. Constance took all the "naught" upon herself and burned it away completely.
或许她…很长时间都无法完全恢复。
Perhaps... she won't be able to fully recover for a long time.
不，她现在还有其他要紧事，所以才拜托我来见你——她很想向你道谢。
Don't be. She's got other pressing matters right now. That's why she asked me to meet you... She really wants to thank you.
她背叛过太多人，每一刻都面临着寻仇者的杀机，她曾乐于在死亡中起舞……
She's betrayed too many people, facing death threats from avengers at every moment. She used to delight in dancing with death...
<color=#dbc291ff>可在烧却「虚无」的那一刻，她说自己正在绽放，第一次…品味到活着的喜悦。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>But at the moment she burned away the Nihility, she said she was blooming. She said that, for the first time... she felt the joy of being alive.</color>
如此说来…人们都觉得大丽花的花语是「背叛」，可最初发现它的那颗星球上，那里的人们认为，<color=#dbc291ff>大丽花象征着「生机与繁荣」。</color>

Come to think of it... People all believe that the dahlia's floriography means "betrayal," but on the planet where it was first discovered, the locals saw it as <color=#dbc291ff>a symbol of "life and prosperity."</color>
创造一条前所未有的命途，真够惊人的。
Creating a brand-new Path... That's truly astonishing.
那么，作为他的妹妹，你应该猜得到吧？倘若他真能做到，那会是一条怎样的命途？
You must have some ideas as his sister, right? If he really managed to do it, what kind of Path would that be?
我想…那是一场「开拓」之间的对决吧。
I think... It must've been a battle between different kinds of the Trailblaze.
只是哥哥他…得出了一个错误的答案，<color=#dbc291ff>他有着「开拓」的初心，走上的道路却名为「统治」，名为「征服」。</color>

However, my brother came to the wrong conclusion... <color=#dbc291ff>His original aspiration was similar to the Trailblaze, yet the road he walked was one named the "domination"... or the "conquest."</color>
就算一个人的愿望，是希望所有人都能幸福，那也是一个自私的愿望。
Even if someone wishes for everyone's happiness, that's still a selfish wish.
<color=#dbc291ff>总有人不希望「被拯救」，他们想要「自己拯救自己」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>There will always be those who don't want to "be saved," who want to "save themselves."</color>
你同样认为…世上不应该存在「神」？
Do you also think... that there shouldn't be any "god" in this world?
不，哪怕是全无作为的神，至少也能让许多人寄托心灵，得到安慰。
No. Even a god who does nothing can at least give people something to believe in and find comfort in.
<color=#dbc291ff>但这个世界上，一定不再需要人的君王。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>But this world definitely no longer needs a king of humankind.</color>
正因如此，我相信哥哥总有一天，也能想清楚这一切。他犯下过错误，已被制止。我不希望他在监牢中度过余生，<color=#dbc291ff>我想让他…也得到自己拯救自己的机会。</color>

That's why I believe my brother will come to understand all of this one day as well. He made mistakes, but he was stopped. I don't want him to spend the rest of his life in prison. <color=#dbc291ff>I want him to... also have a chance to save himself.</color>
No wonder you came looking for me.
嗯，我想和你做一笔交易。然后…我们来谈谈吧——在公司面前，匹诺康尼将会处于何种位置。
Yes. I want to make a deal with you, and after that... we'll talk about what position Penacony will hold before the IPC.
可是…流萤呢？似乎哪里都没见到过她……
But... where's Firefly? I haven't seen her anywhere...
I'm here to see your dream through with you.
{NICKNAME}? How did you know I was here...
I've been waiting for you to come find me.
抱歉，我不是故意想躲着你。
Sorry. I wasn't trying to avoid you.
但我有自己的理由，可以就让我自己留在这吗？
But I have my own reasons. Can you just let me stay here by myself?
不，我知道这是一个约定。
No. I know this was a promise.
好，我们就在这里告别吧。
Alright. Let's say our goodbyes here.
谢谢你，我们一定能够再见的。
Thank you. I'm sure we'll meet again.
其实，还有一些关于你的事，我总觉得自己应该告诉你。
Actually, there are some things about you I feel I should tell you.
但我不想让你惹上麻烦，抱歉。
But I don't want to get you into trouble. Sorry.
No. I must keep my promise.
你注意到，她会时不时将余光投向你。
You notice that she glances over at you once in a while.
No. I must keep my promise.
你不禁思索，她的拒绝，真的像是表面上那样决绝吗？
You can't help but wonder... Was her refusal really as determined as she made it appear?
No. I must keep my promise.
我相信，有一天你会自己找到这来的，不够好奇，就不可能成为无名客。
I believe that one day you'll find your way here on your own. After all, you can't become one of the Nameless without enough curiosity.
你有资格知道这一切。而到了那时，你已经拥有了面对未来的勇气，而潜在的危险也早已过去。
You deserve to know it all. And by then, you'll have the courage to face the future, and the potential dangers will be long gone.
听着…<color=#dbc291ff>你是注定{RUBY_B#跨越}带来{RUBY_E#}「终末」的人。</color>
Listen... <color=#dbc291ff>you are the one who is destined to {RUBY_B#transcend}bring about{RUBY_E#} the Finality.</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>只有你能知道，只有你能决定。这片银河，的确不是只为你而存在，也不是只在你的注视下流淌…但它永远等待着你的{RUBY_B#超越}拯救{RUBY_E#}。</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>Only you can know it and only you can decide. This cosmos certainly doesn't exist solely for you, nor does it flow only under your gaze... But it's forever waiting for you {RUBY_B#to surpass}to save{RUBY_E#} it.</color>
你怎么会知道「约定」？我明明没有说过……
How did you know about "the promise"? I never mentioned it...
也许不仅奇妙，还很温柔吧。
Maybe it's not just mysterious, but also gentle.
好像我还没提到过？来这里之前，我在手账里记录下了所有要做的事——我待在这里，是想完成里面的最后一个心愿。
I don't think I've mentioned it, but I wrote down everything I wanted to do in my journal before coming here. I'm staying here because I want to fulfill the last wish written in it.
不过，我跟在你身后，偷偷看了你很久，还是不想打扰你。我希望你的梦…能笑着开始，也能笑着醒来。
I've been quietly following you and watching you from afar for a while, but I still didn't want to disturb you. I hope your dreams... begin with a smile and end with one too.
Where do you want to go now?
当然是去看烟花，据说，匹诺康尼有一艘很大的飞艇，在那里看到的烟花，非常值得打卡。
To see the fireworks, of course. I heard there's this huge airship in Penacony where you can get an absolutely photo-worthy view of the fireworks.
确实是很合适的地方…{NICKNAME}，你眼光很好呢。
It really is the perfect spot... {NICKNAME}, you've got great taste.
我善于寻找美好的存在。
I have a knack for finding beautiful things.
You don't get it. I've got a quest marker.
无论如何，谢谢。好像还没开始，我们先坐一会儿吧。
Either way, thank you. Looks like it hasn't started yet. Let's sit for a while.
所有人在这种时候，是不是都说不出话？
I wonder whether everyone feels speechless at times like this.
Can't think of what to say?
也许都不是。我倒是听说过一个说法，一直都很喜欢。
Maybe it's neither. There's a saying that I always liked.
对于想要见到的人，人们总是在见面前，不断想象那时的情景，想象自己在见面时说出的话，能让对方露出笑容。
When it comes to someone we want to meet, we always imagine the scene before it happens, imagine the words we'll say that would make them smile.
慢慢地，所有想说的话，还没有相见之前，就已经说完了。
Slowly but surely, all the things we want to say would have already been said before we even met the person.
<color=#dbc291ff>而在真正重逢的那一刻，你会发现，对方比你的一切想象还要美好——可一时之间，你又想不出怎么夸奖对方了。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>And when we finally meet again, we realize they're even more beautiful than anything we could have imagined... Yet at that moment, we find ourselves at a loss for words to express just how amazing they really are.</color>
我想知道，你和我过去的故事。
I want to know our story from the past.
Why do you care so much about me?
…抱歉，我不能说。艾利欧告诉我，那会导致很可怕的未来，我仅仅是多说几句，就会让你在下一站死去。
...I'm sorry, but I can't tell you. Elio told me that it would lead to a terrible future. If I say even a few words more, you'll die at the next stop.
我能够告诉你的，只有我们重逢的原因。
All I can tell you is why our paths crossed again.
<color=#dbc291ff>很久以前，你答应过我：如果我能做梦，你会让它成为一个美好的白日梦。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Long ago, you promised me that if I could dream, then you would make it a beautiful daydream.</color>
我还算你认识的那个人吗？
Am I... still the person you once knew?
<color=#dbc291ff>重要的不是他们变成什么样子，而是你仍然对他们抱有同一份真实的感情。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>What matters isn't how they've changed, but that you still hold those same genuine feelings for them.</color>
的确，曾让少女万分珍重的，若非失却，就是已然改换了面貌。可她的微笑并未褪去，如同她在面对命运时一般——
Indeed, what the girl once cherished dearly was her appearance that, if not lost, had changed. Yet, her smile never faded, just like when she faced destiny...
是啊，其实…「剧本」里说的三次死亡，我还有一次没有经历。
Yeah. Actually... I still haven't experienced one of the three deaths written in the "script."
...So that's why you've been keeping to yourself?
我也是在太一之梦消散后，才刚刚意识到。之前是我误会了，被「死亡」送入流梦礁，根本不能算是一次死亡，那未免太轻松了。
I only realized it after Ena's Dream dissipated. I've made a mistake. Being sent to the Dreamflux Reef by "Death" could hardly be called a death at all. That would've been way too easy.
<color=#dbc291ff>真正的三次死亡，第一次…我早就知道真相。我没有做梦的机能，醒来后，就再也无法入梦。也就是说，梦中的我将会彻底不复存在。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>As for the true three deaths, the first one... I've known its true form for a long time. I can't dream. After I woke up, I would never dream again. In other words, the me that exists in this dream would completely cease to exist.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>第二次，是寰宇蝗灾杀死了我，我启用了自己真正的力量，死而复生。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The second time, I was killed by the Swarm Disaster. I activated my true power and came back from death.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>但那力量，必然将导致第三次——我的症状会不可抑制地加快，失熵而死。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>But that power would inevitably lead me to the third death... My symptoms would accelerate uncontrollably until I die of entropy loss.</color>
我们来到匹诺康尼时，梦境就已经开始与现实融合了。我以为自己在做梦，但同时，也行走于清醒的现实——这一样会让失熵症继续恶化。

The dreamscape had already started merging with reality when we arrived in Penacony. I thought I was dreaming, but I was actually also living in waking reality. It was causing my Entropy Loss Syndrome to worsen.
不过你别担心，我问过银狼了，现实里不会这么严重，就先不聊这些了。
But don't worry. I asked Silver Wolf about it, and she said things won't get that serious in real life. Let's not talk about this anymore.
我就怕你露出悲伤的表情——这是我们最美好的白日梦，我们要笑着把它做完。
I just don't want to see you looking sad. This is our most beautiful daydream, and we should see it through with smiles on our faces.
毕竟，我们永远不会知道，从哪一瞬间起，我们就用完了…与某个人在这片银河间所有地方共有的…所有时间。
After all... we never know when we will use up all the moments we have with someone across all space and time.
对了，{NICKNAME}…你可不可以闭上眼睛？
Hey, {NICKNAME}... could you close your eyes?
如果是唯一一次做梦，我希望…你能看到最好的我。
If this is my only chance to dream, then I want you... to see the best version of me.
在快要结束的时候，就让我稍微完美主义一下下吧。
As we near the end, let me indulge in a bit of perfectionism.
像我以前常常做的那样，闭上眼睛，去想象我们待在一起的景象…<color=#dbc291ff>就算看不见我，但你还是可以知道，我们的距离从未遥远过。</color>
Just like what I used to do, let's close our eyes and imagine ourselves being together... <color=#dbc291ff>Even if you can't see me, you'll still know that we've never been far apart.</color>
不会的，只要我能做到，就永远不会。
I won't. I promise to stay as long as I can.
嗯…我想想…该从哪里开始呢……
Hmm... let me think... where should we start...
对啦，当然要从「开始的地方」开始。
Right. We should start "where everything began," of course.
就在黄金的时刻，你来救我的时候——
Right at that Golden Hour, when you came to save me...
不过，也可以假设我们素不相识，只是偶然在那里相遇。
That being said, we could also pretend we're strangers who just happened to meet there.
我嘛…是一个来黄金时刻旅行的学生，最好零花钱能稍稍多一点…然后我出现在那里时，打扮得也要精致一点。
Me... I'm a student traveling to the Golden Hour, and it'd be nice if I had a bit more pocket money... Oh, and when I show up there, I should dress up a little fancier.
你…你也是学生！但却是从好远好远的一颗星球上来到这里，完全不熟悉环境。
And you... You're a student too! But you came here from a really, really distant planet, completely unfamiliar with your surroundings.
然后，就跳出来几个好凶好凶的流氓，想要欺负你。
Then, a bunch of mean-looking thugs jumped out, trying to pick on you.
而那时候，我会挺身而出——对，这一次，让我来拯救你。
When that happens, I'll step up to the plate. Yeah! Let me be the one to save you this time.
我们打不过的，还是一起跑吧。
We can't beat them. Let's run away together.
别管我，不想让你因我受伤。
Don't worry about me. I don't want you getting hurt because of me.
Why don't we team up and fight together?
没关系，我就是要那样做。
No worries. That's exactly what I'm going to do.
<color=#dbc291ff>结果并不重要，甚至过程也不重要。重要的是：我们怎样参与这趟旅程，又如何去看待它。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The result doesn't matter, and even the process isn't important. What matters is how we take part in this journey and how we choose to view it.</color>
所以，{NICKNAME}，再答应我一个愿望……
So, {NICKNAME}, grant me one more wish...
还记得吗？在对抗「太一之梦」的时候，我抱着你飞上天空。那时，我不知道自己还能否醒来，但我却很开心。
Remember how I held you and flew into the sky when we fought against Ena's Dream? Back then, I wasn't sure if I would ever wake up again, but I was happy.
<color=#dbc291ff>因为，我们又能肩并肩，去对抗某些我们认为「不对」的东西，并且，能为对方不顾一切。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>We were standing shoulder to shoulder once again, fighting against things we believed were "wrong," and we'd do anything for each other.</color>
不过，我还是有一点小小的私心——我相信你不会忘记这一幕，但如果回想起来，我想让它轻松一点。
Still, I have a tiny, selfish wish. I know you won't forget this moment, but when you look back on it, I want it to feel lighter.
也许没有什么敌人，一切只是场恶作剧。而我抱着你飞上天空时，天空中不是可怕的虫群，而是…我没能看到的烟花。

Maybe there were no enemies at all. It was all just a prank. And when I carried you up into the heavens, what we saw there wasn't the terrifying Swarm, but rather... the fireworks that I never got to see.
You'll be able to see the fireworks.
我会像你想要的那样，记住你。
I'll remember you just the way you want me to.
You've already seen it, you dummy!
{NICKNAME}…艾利欧说，我们注定走向不同的终末，不可能拥有未来。
{NICKNAME}... Elio said we're destined to head to different finalities, that we can't have a future.
所以你说，你会给我一个，比任何结局都美好的白日梦。
That's why you told me that you'll give me a daydream more beautiful than any ending could ever be.
我很期待…但是，我们难道真的就不能，一起跨过那个结局吗？
I'm looking forward to it, but... can we really... not step over that ending together?
我不害怕死…但不要让我独自一人死去……
I'm not scared of death... but please, don't let me die alone...
他们都说…<color=#dbc291ff>你是注定{RUBY_B#跨越}带来{RUBY_E#}「终末」的人。</color>
They say... <color=#dbc291ff>you're destined to {RUBY_B#transcend}bring about{RUBY_E#} the Finality.</color>
但相信你会在的…一定会……
But I believe you'll be there... You definitely will...
<color=#ff3a3e>只有你能知道，只有你能决定。这片银河，的确不是只为你而存在，也不是只在你的注视下流淌…但它永远等待着你的{RUBY_B#超越}拯救{RUBY_E#}。</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>Only you can know it and only you can decide. This cosmos certainly doesn't exist solely for you, nor does it flow only under your gaze... But it's forever waiting for you {RUBY_B#to surpass}to save{RUBY_E#} it.</color>
「罹患失熵症的人，物理结构会陷入不可逆的慢性解离，慢慢消失。你依旧能跑、能跳、能和他人交流。一切看起来都那么正常，只不过你总是比别人慢一点点……」

"Those afflicted with the Entropy Loss Syndrome will experience an irreversible chronic dissolution of their physical form, gradually fading away. You can still run, jump, and talk with others. Everything seems normal, except you're always just a little slower than everyone else..."
「直到自己和整个世界的轮廓都变得模糊不清。你分不清现实和梦境，因为它们变得同样破碎。」
"Until the outlines of yourself and the entire world blur into obscurity. You can no longer distinguish reality from dreams, for both have become equally fractured."
她就要走到失熵的尽头，思维已然先一步支离破碎。
She is nearing the end stage of the Entropy Loss, her mind already splintered first.
而在她逐渐忘记一切时，关于你的故事，是直到最后才消失的部分。
And as she gradually forgot everything, the story of you was the last to fade.
就算如此，你也是到最后，才会忘记我……
Even so, I'll still be the last thing you forget...
解离尚未结束。而眼下的这个瞬间，她的脑海中就只剩下「一个名字」，和「一个心愿」。
The dissolution is not yet over. And in this very instant, her mind holds only "one name" and "one wish."
(No. While she might still be able to see it...)
握着她的手，完成她的愿望。
Hold her hand and fulfill her wish.
<color=#dbc291ff>结果并不重要，甚至过程也不重要。重要的是：我们怎样参与这趟旅程，又如何去看待它。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The result doesn't matter, and even the process isn't important. What matters is how we take part in this journey and how we choose to view it.</color>
I'll do everything I promised you.
然而流萤的目光再也没有移动过——她眼中的神采，已然完全消失了。
However, Firefly's eyes never move again. Every spark of life in her eyes has already gone.
Am I... still one step too late...
为时已晚——你情愿用她想要的方式将她记住，在你的脑海里，结局会是美好的。
It is too late. You would rather remember her in the way she wished, and in your mind, the ending would be a happy one.
但她回想今天，总会发觉一处遗憾，永远无法弥补。
But when she looks back on this day, she will always discover one regret that can never be mended.
人群喧闹起来，烟火将要开始了——
The crowd buzzes with excitement and the fireworks are about to light up the sky...
But Firefly can't see it anymore...
And a song comes on the wind...
「♪因为她永远不在了～♪♪～她就会更清晰吗？」
"♪ Will she be clearer~ ♪♪~ because she is gone forever?"
「♪你送给我的花束～♪♪～它们花瓣凋落时的声音，能让我一直醒着吗？」
"♪ The bouquet you gave me~ ♪♪~ can the sound of its petals falling keep me awake always?"
我能够拨转命运，成全缺憾。世界给我们的命运，立下一个终点，那它至少，要补偿给流萤…她想要的花束。
I can change the course of destiny and make up for what's missing. If the world has set an endpoint for our destiny, then at the very least... it owes Firefly the bouquet she wanted.
你感到耳边的声音开始渐渐模糊，消去——
The voice at your ear blurs, then fades into silence...
你回忆起记忆中的烟花，流萤接住正从空中坠落的你，带你飞上天际。在那时，她曾说过的话，给故事留下了完美的注脚——属于她，也属于夜空下的所有人。

You recall the fireworks in your memory, where Firefly caught you as you fell from the sky and carried you up into the heavens. At that moment, the words she spoke left a perfect footnote for the story, one belonging to her, and to everyone under the night sky.
而你知道，如今这已是不复存在的注脚。
And you know that this footnote no longer exists.
「终末」的力量正在拨转时间，而少女最后的遗憾近在眼前。「一个美好的白日梦」——诺言兑现的时刻到了。你能，你会，你必将…使其实现。

The power of Finality is turning back time, and the girl's final regret is within sight. "A beautiful daydream..." The moment to fulfill that promise has come. You can, you will, you must... make it a reality.
那么，去把遗忘的一切，重新找回来吧。
Then, let's go reclaim everything that was forgotten.
对了，康士坦丝的秘密据点，是不是还能在匹诺康尼找到来着？
Oh right. Wasn't Constance's secret stronghold still somewhere in Penacony?
Right now? Talk about being impulsive!
Are you sure you wish to wake up from your dream?
There are still things to do.
(Now that everyone's here, I should go join them.)
（帕姆出现了，要开航线会议了吧？）
各位乘客请稍候，航线会议马上开始。
Please stand by, passengers. The navigation meeting will be starting soon!
她说自己只是个搭车客，不该干涉航路去向，会在派对车厢等待结果。

不用担心，对星期日而言，一处意料之外的目的地会是个不错的起点。
Don't worry about him. An unexpected destination could be a great starting point for Sunday.
呵呵，不知他听到这句话，是该高兴还是该失落呢。
I can't decide if he'll be happy or disappointed to hear that.
Send him back to the IPC, then!
那的确意料之外，还是算了吧。
That's unexpected, alright... but let's not do that.
He's pretty laid-back about this, huh.
你会用这个词形容他，倒是在我的意料之外了。
Laid-back? That's... not exactly a word I associate with him.
Let the control freak lose all control!
那的确意料之外，还是算了吧。
That's unexpected, alright... but let's not do that.
He's pretty laid-back about this, huh.
你会用这个词形容他，倒是在我的意料之外了。
Laid-back? That's... not exactly a word I associate with him.
Let's start voting on our destination.
既然大家都准备好了，我先列下几个选项：首先是<color=#dbc291ff>「海洋星球」露莎卡</color>。
Since everyone's here, Pom-Pom will start presenting our options. First up is <color=#dbc291ff>the oceanic planet of Lushaka</color>.
那里是米哈伊尔先生的故乡。露莎卡曾受星核影响，全球海平面上升，不知现在变成什么样了。
Mr. Mikhail's homeworld. Lushaka was hit by rising sea levels after the Stellaron Disaster, though I'm not sure how things are on the planet now.
然后是<color=#dbc291ff>「玛瑙世界」梅露丝坦因</color>。
Next, we have <color=#dbc291ff>Melustanin, the Agate World</color>.
「纯美」伊德莉拉的飞升之地，永存不灭之美的世界。据说那里是星核之灾的原爆点之一，多半不怎么安全。
That's where Idrila the Beauty ascended, a world of undying allure. It's also said to be one of the initial sites of the Stellaron Disaster. Probably not the safest choice.
考虑到{RUBY_B#开拓力}列车燃料{RUBY_E#}问题，这趟出行最好计划得周密些。
Given the {RUBY_B#Trailblaze Power}Express' fuel{RUBY_E#} situation, it's worth us thinking through our options carefully.
最后，也是最大胆的选项——<color=#dbc291ff>「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」</color>。
And finally, the most adventurous option: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land, Amphoreus</color>.
阿基维利也没去过的世界，智库里一点资料都没有…但如果这趟「开拓」成功，燃料问题就解决了！
A planet not recorded in the data bank and a world even Akivili has never set foot on... But if this trailblazing expedition works out, it could solve our fuel problem!
The Express can soon achieve perpetual motion?
没那么简单，但至少短期内，列车长不用再为行程延误发愁了。
It's not that simple. But we can save Pom-Pom from worrying about service delays, at least for a foreseeable period of time.
情况特殊，感觉也没得选。
We don't really have a choice in a time like this, do we?
No one wants to go to Edo Star?
那里前不久刚遭遇反物质军团袭击。根据公司说法，敌人已经被击退了，但江户星暂时关闭了通行权。没什么我们能做的事。

They suffered an ambush by the Antimatter Legion some time ago. According to the IPC, the enemy was repelled, but Edo Star placed their planet on temporary lockdown. I'm afraid there's nothing we can do there.
No one wants to go to a Washtopia?
哎呀别捣乱了，列车干净得很，不用做大扫除啦。
Geez, stop messing around. We don't need a scrub. The Express is already spotlessly clean.
果然比起其他选项，翁法罗斯还是多了个非去不可的理由啊……

而且，那是一个完全未知的世界哎，还有什么比它更适合「开拓」？

我的看法也一样。虽说前路未卜，但另外两个站点也谈不上多么安全。既然都要冒险，不如大胆一点。

——当然，我的答案也是翁法罗斯。

看来列车长预先准备的投票方案，已经不需要了帕。

那我正式宣布：下一站——翁法罗斯！

好诶！那就等列车长的跃迁通知啦。

本姑娘先回房间一趟，给相机清点储存空间！这回要美美拍照。

也把这个「好消息」带给黑天鹅小姐吧。

An opportunity hard to come by?
当然。星穹列车一直沿着阿基维利开辟的银轨行驶，正常情况下，是没有办法前往「开拓」认知外的世界的。
Absolutely. The Astral Express has always traveled along the silver rail laid down by Akivili. We don't normally get to venture into a world beyond the knowledge of the Trailblaze.
Hah! So I'm better than an Aeon!
那可是阿基维利，祂的每一站都是人类未曾抵达的世界。列车一直沿着祂开辟的银轨行驶，正常情况下，是没有办法前往「开拓」认知外的世界的。

This is Akivili we're talking about. In the first instance, every one of THEIR stops was a world no human had ever set foot on. The Astral Express has always traveled along the silver rail laid down by Akivili, so we don't normally get to venture into a world beyond the knowledge of the Trailblaze.
但这一次，或许我们有机会在星图上留下一个全新的站点，我也有些摩拳擦掌了。
But this time, we might just get the chance to add a brand-new stop to the astral charts. I don't mind telling you — I'm a little excited.
未知的世界意味着未知的挑战，我也有些跃跃欲试了。
An unknown world brings unknown challenges. Exciting stuff.
呵呵，{NICKNAME}，这是你第一次探索星图外的世界吧？
Ah, {NICKNAME}. This is your first time exploring beyond the astral charts, isn't it?

毕竟就算是星图上标注的世界，也会发生日新月异的变化。

也许帕姆不是？况且，就算是星图上标注的世界，也会发生日新月异的变化。
Maybe not for Pom-Pom. And worlds that have been mapped on the astral charts also present new surprises from time to time.
Are credits going to be useless there?
竟然在想这么细节的事？也许你得先考虑下语言问题？
That's quite the detail to fixate on. Perhaps you should be worrying about language barriers instead?
别担心。以防万一，我还留了个「后备方案」。先卖个关子，等需要时再揭秘吧。

别担心。以防万一，我还留了个「后备方案」。先卖个关子，等需要时再揭秘吧。
But we'll be fine. Let's just say I have a backup plan. I'll reveal it when the time comes.
这次的目的地，我提供不了什么信息。如果好奇，你可以询问那位忆者。
I can't provide many details about our destination this time. You can ask the Memokeeper if you want to know more.
怎么突然问这个，你很紧张么？别担心，相信列车组。
Why do you ask that? Are you feeling nervous yourself? It'll be fine. Just trust the Crew.

嗯，想来是个大工程，这次我会一起下车。
Mhm, I suppose there's a lot to do. I'll disembark with all of you this time.
列车头一回迎来这么多客人，有些不习惯。你先去派对车厢吧。待会儿见。

你先去派对车厢吧。待会儿见。

哎，你来得正好！我刚才打开相机，不知不觉就看起了以前的照片。

我问你哦，一段旅途从开始到结束，你最喜欢哪个时候？

旅程伊始，面对未知的时候…
The start of a journey, when we dive into the unknown.
那等到了翁法罗斯，咱们一落地就去拍两张吧！
Then let's go snap some photos as soon as we arrive in Amphoreus!
旅程中途，有所收获的时候…
The middle of the journey, when some gains are made.
那你可得多提醒我，随时准备好按下快门！
Then you're going to have to give me a nudge whenever there's something worth snapping!
旅程尾声，想要纪念的时候…
The end of the journey, when we wanna commemorate the adventure.
咱也是。这次翁法罗斯之旅，可要留下一张大家都满意的合照！
Me too! This time in Amphoreus let's make sure we get a group photo that everyone loves!
哎呀！不能光顾着聊天了，我还得多准备几块电池，万一落在了特别原始的地方呢？
Anyway, enough chitchat! I better pack some extra batteries in case we end up somewhere without power!
不闲聊啦，你也快去收拾收拾吧。
Enough chitchat. You should get packing, too!
看样子，下一站已经决定了？
Looks like you've decided on your next stop?
踏上远行的人，需要的只是「出发」而已。
Those who embark on a long journey simply need to "set off."
我很期待接下来的旅程。
I look forward to the journey ahead.
你来啦。听说各位无名客选择了翁法罗斯，十分明智的决定。
Ah, you're here. I hear the Nameless are going to Amphoreus. A very wise decision.
Who did you hear that from?
我可是忆者。记忆是不会说谎的。
I am a Memokeeper, after all. Memories don't lie.
你为什么要去翁法罗斯？
Why do you want to go to Amphoreus?
忆庭为何需要星穹列车的帮助？
Why is the Garden turning to us for help?
确切地说，这是我个人的请求。
Truth be told, it's more of a personal request.
你是否听过这么一种说法：「忆者穿行诸界，只为搜集一切珍贵的记忆」。
"Memokeepers traverse the worlds only to collect precious memories." Have you heard that before?
打捞湮没无闻的「记忆」是我的职责，而忆庭之镜映照出的翁法罗斯…就像橱窗中的珍宝，闪闪发光，也难以触及。
It's my duty to salvage unknown memories, and the Amphoreus that has been revealed by the Garden's mirror is like a treasure inside a display case — dazzling yet out of reach.
我需要一枚能钉破玻璃的尖钉，也就是各位。只有「开拓」能深入翁法罗斯，穿过层层迷雾，令世界的「记忆」重现天日。

I need a sharp nail to break through that glass, and that's where you come in. Only through trailblazing can we reach the heart of Amphoreus, cut through the thick mist, and bring the world's "memories" back to light.
你不会让我失望的，对吗？
I trust you won't disappoint me?
你不会让我失望的，对吗？
I trust you won't disappoint me?
Pack up and get ready to warp.
Chat with the others some more.
你思考再三，准备不充分等于充分不准备！索性把行李丢到一边吧……
After much deliberation, you realize that insufficient preparation is as good as no preparation! Might as well toss your luggage aside...
算了，准备总比不准备好，形式主义也有其必要。
Never mind. Having some preparation is better than none. Even formalities have their place.
（时间差不多咯。去找个位子，看看跃迁风光吧。）
(Looks like it's about time. I should go find a spot to take in the views during the warp.)
各位乘客请注意——列车即将跃迁——请坐稳扶好帕——！
Attention, passengers. The Express is about to make the jump. Please be seated and hold on!
看吧，这就是那个与世隔绝，只能被忆庭之镜映照出的世界……
Here it is — the isolated world that can only be seen through the Garden's mirror...
无人知晓，这是你们将要揭示的答案。
No one knows. That's what you're about to find out.
How did it suddenly just appear?
我施展了一点小魔术，让你们也能看清它的样貌。
I used a little magic so all of you can also see what it looks like.
Woah. It's in the shape of an "8"!
正如各位所见，翁法罗斯被一团混沌的物质包裹着，难以被外部观测。普通的星际旅行无法意识到它的存在，更遑论经过和到达。
