As you can see, Amphoreus is surrounded by a mass of chaotic matter that conceals it from the outside world — nearly. Conventional interstellar travel can't detect its presence, let alone pass by or land on the planet.
但忆庭窥见了这里，一并发现的，还有其中变幻莫测的命途行迹。
Yet the Garden, caught a glimpse of this place, and along with it, discovered ever-shifting Traces.
「三重命途交织缠绕着翁法罗斯，共同谱写世界的命运」——按照你的说法，普通的命途行者不会在镜中留下痕迹，所以……
"Three Paths interweave and fetter Amphoreus, co-authoring the fate of the world." Ordinary Pathstriders aren't known to leave traces in the mirror, so if what you said is true...
在这遗世独立的星系，诞生过至少三位堪比「令使」的存在。
Then this isolated star system must be home to at least three beings comparable to Emanators.
甚至，可能是星神本人垂迹。
I would even go as far as to say Aeons THEMSELVES.
如此人杰地灵的世界，在寰宇间却寂寂无名。确实有些奇怪。
For a world to have nurtured such marvels yet still remain unheard of throughout the cosmos? Now, that is hard to fathom.
先前，我们已经知道了这三重命途的其中一重是「智识」……
We already know one of the three Paths to be the Erudition...
而第二重——不必向各位隐瞒，就在刚才，你们已亲眼见证了它，是「记忆」。
I can reveal the second. In fact, you've all seen it just now. It's the Remembrance.
难怪忆庭的使者能揭开它的面纱啊。那，最后一重呢？
I see. Then it makes sense that a messenger of the Garden would be capable of unveiling Amphoreus for us. What about the final Path?
很遗憾，命运吝啬于展现它的底色，我也不知道第三重命途是什么。
Unfortunately, fate is keeping the third Path a mystery. I don't know what it is, either.
它潜藏在「智识」和「记忆」的光芒下，与二者分庭抗礼。是「均衡」？「神秘」？还是「不朽」？我没有头绪。

Hidden beneath the brilliance of Erudition and Remembrance, yet possessing enough power to rival the other two Paths. It could be the Equilibrium, the Enigmata, or perhaps the Permanence? I have no clue at all.
这条缠绕翁法罗斯的白色光带，也许就是三重命途彼此交织的结果。也只有各位「开拓」的行者能深入漩涡中心，看清它的容貌。

This white ribbon of light encircling Amphoreus might very well be a product of the three interwoven Paths. Only when Pathstriders of the Trailblaze enter the center of the vortex will its true nature be revealed.
话虽如此，情报还是太少了。
Still, we know far too little about the planet.
更实际的问题是，现在没法进行降落选址。等待我们的可能是大海、没有氧气的真空带、甚至火山岩浆……
What's more pressing is finding a suitable landing site. We could end up over an ocean, in a vacuum without oxygen, or worse yet, in the middle of a lava field...
终于知道了智库的重要性。
Now I see why the data bank's important.
是啊。不过，总得面对智库记录外的世界的。
It is. Still, encountering worlds that exist which are not recorded in the data bank is unavoidable.
不用担心，我的命比较硬！
Have no fear, resilient little me will volunteer!
知道你不畏生死，但别冲动，大伙都挺珍惜你的。
I know you're fearless even in the face of death, but don't act recklessly. Everyone values you.
We're turning back! Next stop: Lushaka!
这就推翻了之前所有的结论，还不至于。
Throwing in the towel already? I don't think we're at that point yet.
看来有人已经准备好下车，跃跃欲试了。
Looks like someone is all set and itching to get off the train.
...Wait, I think we might be missing someone.
我也想说，吐槽的人没了。
Yeah, I was wondering where that chatterbox had gone.
谁？列车组四个人都在啊。
Really? Who? All four of us are here.
Very funny... But seriously, where's March 7th?
记得出发前，她说要鼓捣相机就回了房间。之后一直没见她出来。
She said something about her camera before going back to her room. I haven't seen her since the warp.
奇怪。按理说，小三月应该是最兴奋的那个，怎么今天一反常态？去她房间看看吧。
That's not like March. She's usually the most excited about expeditions. Let's drop by her room.
我有种…奇怪的预感。各位先去吧，我稍后就来。
Something feels... off. Please, all of you go ahead without me. I'll join you later.
如果需要帮助，请随时叫我。我会尽到一位乘客的义务。
Let me know if there's anything I can assist with. I'll do whatever I can.
抱歉，不知怎的…跃迁结束后，就使不上力了……
Sorry, guys. I don't know what's wrong... I just feel really weak after the warp...
Did you come down with something?
不会吧，美少女怎么会生病呢……
I doubt it...? Pretty girls aren't supposed to get sick...
才没有…我跃迁的次数比你多多了……
Of course not! I've been through way more jumps than you ever have!
我都这样了…你就别吓人了……
Have a heart, will you? Stop scaring me...
黑天鹅小姐，能麻烦你探查一下房间里的「记忆」吗？
Miss Black Swan, could you take a look at the memories in this room?
黑天鹅将额头抵在三月七的脑袋上，像是在感受她的体温……
Black Swan presses her forehead against March 7th's head, as if feeling the latter's body temperature...
…从三月七的记忆来看，她突然变得十分虚弱，像是被什么东西压住了身体，变化发生在一瞬间，应该不是病理因素。
...I'm seeing March 7th hit by a sudden bout of weakness in her memories, as if something was weighing on her. The onset of it far too quick to be any kind of sickness.
或许是外部环境的影响？
Perhaps it's the effect of some external stimulus?
哎哟！怎么人全来了，早知道先把房间收拾一遍了……
Ahh, why is everyone here!? I should've cleaned my room...
星期日自幼在忆质充盈的星系长大，擅长精神治疗，我请他也来做些诊断。
I invited Sunday to help with the diagnosis. He grew up in a star system rich in memoria. When it comes to mental healing, he's quite the specialist.
列位去过匹诺康尼，应当知晓在跃迁至阿斯德纳时，一些人会陷入联觉梦境。
You've all been to Penacony before. I presume you are aware of how some might find themselves in a Synesthesia Dreamscape after warping to Asdana.
我想此刻也是同理。三月小姐受到了某种来自外部的影响，可能是来自命途、星神…或是翁法罗斯本身。
I'm guessing this is something similar. Miss March appears to be affected by a certain external stimulus, perhaps a Path, an Aeon, or even... Amphoreus itself.
I agree. That's likely the case.
为什么只有她受到了影响？
Why is she the only one affected?
具体不得而知，可能只是时间早晚。
There's no way to tell at this point. It could just be a matter of time before everyone feels unwell.
不过，在查明原因前，我建议三月七小姐不要贸然接近翁法罗斯。
Before we identify the cause, my suggestion is for Miss March to avoid venturing anywhere near Amphoreus.
没事的，姬子，我很乖的。大家先出发吧，等我恢复了，立刻就追上你们……
It's okay, Himeko. I'll be good on my own. Go ahead, guys! I'll catch up once I feel better...
{NICKNAME}，这个给你，把我的相机带上！说好落地要拍照的，这下只能拜托你啦……
Here, {NICKNAME}. Take my camera along! I was planning to take photos when we got there, but looks like you'll have to help me with that now...
Heh, I know I can always count on you.
别，我不要留下你一个人…
Nooo, how could I leave you by yourself...?
哇，怎么还演上煽情戏了…多大点事，别怕。
Haha, what's with the melodramatic turn... I'll be fine.
别——头发都没梳呢。省着点电吧……
No—! Not when my hair's messy. And don't drain the camera's battery now...
各位，让三月七好好休息吧。我们去外面说话。
Why don't we take our discussion outside so March 7th can rest?
去吧去吧。别担心，下次见面，咱就变回那个活蹦乱跳的美少女了。记得多拍些照片啊，我会检查作业的！

Yeah, you guys go on ahead. Don't worry about me! I'll be back to being my hyperactive and adorable self by the next time you see me. Now don't forget about those photos, okay? I'll be checking the camera!
对啦，有句话忘说了。看着以前的照片，咱忽然意识到一件事。无论是雅利洛-VI、仙舟还是匹诺康尼……
Oh, I almost forgot. I was looking at the photos from before when I realized something. When we were on Jarilo-VI, the Xianzhou, and Penacony...
咱们遇见的第一个当地人，肯定藏着不得了的大秘密！
The first local we met in each of those worlds all harbored their own deep secret! I'm sure it'll be the same on Amphoreus.
这次本姑娘没法跟着，你们可千万要留心啊……
I can't join you guys this time, but make sure to always look out for one another, okay...?
你觉得翁法罗斯会和三月七的过去有关吗？
Do you think March 7th's past could be connected to Amphoreus?
不至于这么巧，我没见到任何和「六相冰」有关的线索。更有可能是翁法罗斯的某种力量率先在她身上显现了。
No, that'd be too much of a coincidence. I haven't seen anything related to Six-Phased Ice yet. It's more likely that some kind of energy on Amphoreus affected her before any of us.
{NICKNAME}，这趟「开拓」之旅，我想交给你和丹恒打头阵，可以吗？
{NICKNAME}, I want you and Dan Heng to take the lead in this trailblazing expedition. Are you up for it?
经历了匹诺康尼之行，{NICKNAME}也是成熟的无名客了。
I see our adventure in Penacony has helped {NICKNAME} grow into an experienced Nameless.
Pretty sure we're going to need more help...
放心吧，通常都能在当地找到值得信赖的伙伴。
Not to worry, we have a knack for finding trustworthy friends wherever we go.
What about the rest of you?
翁法罗斯这一站意义特殊，车上的每位乘客都不可或缺。开荒世界的工作交给年轻人正合适，相信你和丹恒能成为彼此的照应。

Amphoreus is a crucial stop, so everyone on the Express has been roped in to help in some way or another. Venturing into the unknown world is a task perfect for you youngsters. I'm sure you'll both have each other's backs.
看来我们得留下来处理些大人的事务了。
So we're... staying behind to take care of the grownup stuff?
别心急，瓦尔特，会有你活跃的机会的。
Chin up, Welt. You'll get your chance out in the field.
三月七也需要有人照顾，我来搭把手吧。
Someone should be taking care of March 7th, too. I can do that.
我也没有异议，悉听各位的安排。
I'm fine with any arrangement you have for me.
看来是达成共识了，那你们两人跟我来观景车厢吧。
Great, sounds like we're all good! Come with me to the Parlor Car then, you two.
以防万一，我在出发前准备了一个「后备方案」，没想到这么快就到了揭秘的时候。
I prepared a backup plan before our departure, but I didn't count on having to reveal it so soon.
地面小分队的成员到齐了，让列车长宣布「后备方案」吧。
Now that our ground exploration team is assembled, I'll let the conductor reveal our backup plan.
嗯，此行凶险，列车长和领航员为你们准备了一份特别的「开拓」礼物——
Yes. Seeing how this is going to be a perilous expedition, Pom-Pom and the Navigator have come together to prepare a special trailblazing gift for you!
Can I have the Party Car instead?
翁法罗斯不在星际和平通信的服务范围内，缺乏远程联络的手段。
Amphoreus is outside the Interastral Peace Communications' coverage zone, so there's no chance of remote communication when you're there.
为了给你们最大限度的支援，我们计划将星穹列车的一节车厢分离出去，当作降落舱使用，落地后也能充当安全屋。
Uncoupling and using one of the Express's cars as your landing capsule is the best way we can ease your exploration. It can also be your safe house once you're on Amphoreus.
放心，车厢上有独立的推进器，一定能把你们送进翁法罗斯，找个安全的地点着陆。
The car you're getting has its own thrusters, so just buckle up, and It'll take you into Amphoreus and land you somewhere safe.
这列车是否有些太好用了？
The Express is more multipurpose than I thought...
这是紧急情况下的备案，可不要觉得列车能随便当积木拆哦！
Only in extenuating circumstances~! Don't go thinking you can detach cars from the Express every which way, alright!
Woohoo, a powerful engine to send cars blasting off in space!
不可以！这是紧急情况下的备案，可不要觉得列车能随便当积木拆！
Oh, no you don't! Only in extenuating circumstances! Don't go thinking you can detach cars from the Express every which way, alright!
I'll make sure to keep an eye on {M#him.}{F#her.}
准备好了就出发吧，期待各位的好消息帕。
Get going whenever you're ready. Pom-Pom can't wait to hear about your exciting discoveries!
降落用的车厢已经准备好了。两位「开拓」小先锋，准备好面对真正的未知了吗？
The landing car is ready. My dear trailblazing vanguards, are you all set to dive into the unknown?
Go ahead and journey into The Eternal Land!
还要做点心理建设？别太久哦。
Oh? Need to psyche yourself up? Don't keep us waiting too long.
几束薄冰将昏迷的三月七锁在床上，原本温馨的房间如今透着一股凄冷。
A number of thin sheets of ice have shackled the unconscious March 7th to her bed. The once warm bedroom is now permeated with a bitter cold.
冰中的少女恬静无瑕…一如她曾在太空中遗世漂泊的模样。
The young girl lays silent and flawless in the ice... Just as she did back when she was drifting through space.
少女蜷在剔透的冰层中，紧阖双眼、一语不发。
Curled up in the clear ice, the young girl remains silent with her eyes fixed shut.
虽然这些冰层并不冻手，但平时活泼雀跃的少女陷入静默，却格外叫人心生悲凉。
Although the ice is not cold to the touch, there is something particularly saddening about seeing a young girl who is normally so full of life fall into complete silence.
瓦尔特•杨与星期日似乎在讨论三月七的症状、筹划下一步安排，还是不要打扰他们了。
Welt Yang and Sunday seem to be discussing March 7th's symptoms and planning their next steps. It's best not to bother them.
翁法罗斯之外，银河中某个熟悉的角落……
Outside Amphoreus, in a familiar corner of the Cosmos...
真是一段■■■的冒险啊——请在■■■处插入任意你觉得合适的形容词！
Ah, an utterly ■■■ adventure! Feel free to replace ■■■ with whatever description you see fit!
你肯定也跟我一样好奇吧：那么，接下来会发生什么？
I bet you're as curious as I am. So! What's going to happen next?
别着急，因为…就算着急也没用嘛。不如先跟我来，让我给你讲讲发生在银河另一端的故事……
Heh, keep it together. All that excitement isn't going to get you anywhere, you know. Why don't you follow me into another tale on the other side of the cosmos...?
看呐，这里是哪？是黑塔空间站——天才的营地，科学的摇篮。
Ta-da! Recognize this place? Herta Space Station — the base of a genius and the cradle of science.
瞧瞧这些黑塔人偶，做工多么精致？我可不止一次听说，有些人在背后暗暗地夸赞：「她真好看」……
Look at these puppets! Aren't they dearly exquisite? Let's just say I've already heard many others secretly gushing, "She looks so pretty" on more than one occasion...
不过要我说，她们对于黑塔女士美貌的还原，连十分之一…啊不，连百分之一都谈不上。这可不是恭维，我只是在陈述客观事实……
If you ask me though, they barely did justice to Madam Herta's beauty! Maybe just <unbreak>10%</unbreak>... no, not even 1% of the real deal! Now I'm no fawner here, just stating an objective fact...
还记得这一幕吗？多么让人精神振奋的画面！尊贵的天才俱乐部#83，黑塔女士，正在向伟大的博识尊发问，想要从祂身上求得「神性」的奥秘！

Remember this scene? Gah, it evoked so much emotion in me! The esteemed Madam Herta, Genius Society #83, asking the great Nous a question! An attempt to gain a peek into the divinities' mysteries through THEM!
书接上回，足以改写银河历史的天才传奇就从这里开……
Alright, so continuing from where we left off last time, this is where everything would begin for the genius smart enough to rewrite the history of the entire cos—
…我说，第四面镜——你在跟谁说话？
...Tsk, Fourth Mirror. Who exactly are you talking to?
呃…我这不是想给咱们的出场增加点仪式感嘛，黑塔女士。
Wh—Why, I was just ramping it up for our grand appearance, Madam Herta.
…有那种东西才怪吧？！我要是真跟机器头说上话了倒还好，但现在的问题是…祂根本没有反应！
...But what are the odds of that happening!? Sure, slightly plausible if I did manage to talk to Droidhead, but guess what's the problem...? THEY have no reaction whatsoever!
呃…可是黑塔女士，您看这里…只从这画面上看，您明明都已经站在博识尊面前了啊？
Err... But look at this, Madam Herta... You're standing before Nous here! Right there.
哦，那个啊？只是个全息投影而已，又不可能真把机器头本尊召唤到这里。
Oh, that? That's a hologram. What? I can't possibly summon the real Droidhead here, can I?
…原来你只是在对着个投影念台词啊？！
...You mean to say you've just been reciting your lines before a hologram!?
这叫仪式感，你不是最看重这个了吗？
Yeah, creating dramatic value. Isn't that what you're most obsessed with?
不说这些没用的了。你可知道，要给博识尊发送一段信息是多不容易的事，我可是下了血本——
Moving on. Don't try, but you wouldn't even begin to imagine how difficult it is to send a message to Nous. And I went all out for it...
——为了给「谒见系统」供能，我必须调用整个空间站的能源，让它进入静默，事后再重启。这一来一回，你知道背后的成本有多高吗？

Powering the Audience System alone required me to reconfigure the energy supply of the entire space station! I had to switch it to Hibernate mode before rebooting everything. Do you have any idea how much that costs?
…钱的事不归我管。你不如去问艾丝妲。
...I'm not in charge of finance. Go pose that to Asta instead.
我可是黑塔本塔，「智识」的令使，货真价实的天才——控制成本？这种事太庸俗。
I am Herta herself, the Emanator of Erudition and a true-blue genius. Why would I be holding the purse strings? That menial task is beneath me.
说得太对了，黑塔女士！对于您这样的天才，公司就该无条件地提供一切资源，放任您在自己感兴趣的课题上肆意挥霍！
You're absolutely right, Madam Herta! The IPC should really be providing a genius like you with all that you require, so you can freely dive into any research that tickles your fancy!
既然如此，黑塔本塔，「智识」的令使，货真价实的天才…您现在打算怎么办？
With that said, Herta herself, Emanator of Erudition, and true-blue genius... What do you plan to do now?
还能怎么办？当然是查出「谒见系统」的故障，然后把它给解决了。
What else can I do? Identify what's malfunctioning within the Audience System and fix it, of course.
呃…恕我直言，黑塔女士，您擅长的领域的确很多。但您确定「动手能力」还是自己的强项之一吗？
Um... Don't take offense to my candid words, Madam Herta. You may be proficient in many aspects, but... is hands-on work really one of your strong suits?
换作是我，我会建议您联系斯蒂芬……
Um... I humbly suggest for you to contact Stephen instead...
联系他，和他讲我砸重金只为往机器头脑袋里塞一句话，结果把一切都搞砸了？
Contact him and expose how I shelled out a bomb to send a message to Droidhead, only to screw up everything else?
Mm, alright, alright. I get it...
看吧，那就是「谒见系统」的终端。走，跟我一起去检查一下。
There. That's the Audience System's terminal. Come, walk with me. We'll check what's wrong with it.
遵命，女士！噢，可惜我不会走，只会飘……
Aye-aye, ma'am! Oh, but I can't walk. I can only float...
你今天的俏皮话好像格外多啊？
What's with your witty remarks today?
唔…这就是「谒见系统」？看起来跟模拟宇宙没什么区别嘛。
Hmm... This is the Audience System? It looks just like the Simulated Universe.
你说的没错。二者用的是同一套底层逻辑，本质上是一回事。
Keen observation. They share the same fundamental logic, and are pretty much identical in that regard.
噢，懂了。这就叫「有效借鉴」吧？嘿嘿……
Ahh, I see. We call this... referencing, and not appropriation, right? Heh...
你要是再贫嘴，我保证，我助手的名字就要变成「第五面镜」了。
One more stupid remark from you and you can watch Fifth Mirror reference your role, because I'm going to be dropping you as my assistant.
说正事，「谒见系统」被我划分成了三个扇区：「能源区」、「算力区」、还有「通信区」。每个扇区各自独立，只有系统启动时才会通过「智识」的命途串联起来。

Focus now. The Audience System is divided into three zones: Energy Supply, Computing, and Communications. Each zone operates independently, and will only be integrated via the Path of Erudition when the system is booted.
想跟机器头说上一句话可不容易。如此缜密的系统，平时想要测试或是定期维护也是难上加难，出点小问题也正常。

Sending a message to Droidhead involves more intricacies than you can imagine. If routine trials and maintenance on such an elaborately sophisticated system are already as bad as squaring circles, then it's no surprise for glitches like this to crop up.
原来如此。那黑塔女士，经过你的专业判断——是哪个扇区出故障了？
I see. So, Madam Herta, can you use your professional judgment to tell which zone the glitch is in?
简单，当然是三个全都出问题了。
没什么大不了的，只需要一点小小的技术性调整。
No sweat. They'll be up and running again after some simple technical tweaking.
三个扇区是独立分开的，所以排查问题也得一个一个来。你要是准备好了，我们就先去「能源区」检查下情况。
The three zones are compartmentalized, so we're going to have to troubleshoot them one at a time. Let's start with the Energy Supply Zone. Get ready, and then we'll go over.
我可是面镜子，黑塔女士！只要镜子里的您准备好了，那我就准备好了。
I'm just a mirror, Madam Herta! If you're ready, then your reflection in me will also be ready to go.
咯咯咯…这「能源区」…怎么这么冷啊？咯咯咯…我的镜面，都快要结霜了！
Brr... Why is this Energy Supply Zone... so cold? Brr... I—I'm already frosting up!
你以为呢？整个黑塔空间站的能源都被我转化成了虚数态，蓄存在这个扇区。要是不配置点超低温环境，空间站早就被炸上天了。

Hmph, why else? I've converted the energy core that supplies all of Herta Space Station into Imaginary state and stored it in this zone. If not for the ultra-low temperature here, the space station would have long blasted off into the sky.
咯咯咯…但是…我们本来不就…在天上吗？
Brrr... But... aren't we already... in the sky?
…作为一面镜子，你的幽默感是不是有点过剩了？
...You're just a mirror. I don't need you to take on comic relief too.
那些家伙是哪来的？坏死数据？活性化的系统锈斑？不应该啊…总不能是军团又打过来了吧？
Where did those things come from? Corrupted data? Reanimated systemic rust? No, not likely... It can't be the Legion's second ambush, right...?
不管了，反正都得清理干净。跟紧我，可别轻易碎了！
Meh, whatever. We have to get rid of them anyway. Alright, stay close and try to avoid shattering to pieces!
那个啊，应该就是个普通的忆泡吧？没什么特别的，其它舱段里也到处都是。
Mm, looks like one of those Memory Bubbles. It's not worth that much attention. You'll find many more in the other zones.
这…这是什么？！哪来这么多恶心虫子？
Wh—What in the...!? How did all these disgusting bugs get in here?
要想见到机器头，算力至少得匹配上。每秒执行的浮点运算达不到个几万垓次，祂压根就感受不到你的存在。

We're going to need out-of-this-world computing capability if we hope to meet Droidhead. If we can't churn out calculations faster than a yottaFLOPS computer, then we can forget about having THEM notice our existence.
但算力太高也有坏处，就是会引来这群「算力蜇虫」——「繁育」子嗣中的一支，也不知道是怎么进化出来的。
But computers with too high a computing capability tend to attract Computing Stings like them. No one knows how these creatures evolved from their progenitor — the Propagation.
生命，很神奇吧？不过还是比不上一面会说话的镜子，哈。
Ah, the mysteries of life. Hah! But even so, they can't compare to a talking mirror~
顺带一提，黑塔女士——你既然有算力如此强大的超级计算机，那它平时到底在…呃…算些什么？
A question on the side, Madam Herta: You have these powerful supercomputers and all, so... um, what are they normally programmed to calculate?
这重要吗？我只需要让它运转起来，能引起机器头的注意就行了。
Is that important? All that matters is that they work and are able to attract Droidhead's attention.
唉…有空的话，您还是跟艾丝妲小姐聊聊吧。
*sigh* ...I suggest meeting Miss Asta for a chat when you have time.
There's a Memory Bubble here too...
Why are you so interested in it?
好吧，我就是觉得有点…诡异？
Okay, I'll admit it. I find them somewhat... creepy?
救命！虫子的体液，崩到我的镜面上了！
Ew, yuck! Help me! Goo from those bugs got onto my reflective surface!
自己的事情自己做，用手擦掉不就行了？
Clean up after yourself. Can't you just wipe it off with your hands?
解决了烦人的虫子，「算力区」也算打扫干净了。
With those annoying bugs squashed, we're done fixing the Computing Zone too.
计算机很快就能恢复运转，距离谒见机器头就只差最后一步。
These computers will get up to speed soon. Now we're just one final step away from requesting an audience with Droidhead.
最后一个扇区…是叫「通信区」来着？
Our last stop is the... Communications Zone?
你记得还挺清楚嘛。走吧，去看看那边出了什么状况。
Oh? You have a good memory. Let's go see what's wrong in that zone.
这…这是？黑塔女士，没想到连这里都有你的人偶。
Wh—What's all this? I didn't think your puppets would be in here too, Madam Herta.
「通信区」，顾名思义，就是负责建立空间站与机器头之间沟通桥梁的扇区。
Unsurprisingly, the Communications Zone is where a bridge for communication will be formed between Droidhead and the space station.
将「智识」的命途能量集中于一处，然后向星神发射一条「纽带」——等于从背后拍了拍某人的肩膀，他的反应肯定是回头看你一眼。
Aggregating the Path Energy of the Erudition, then firing a "bond" at the Aeon. This is as good as tapping someone on the shoulder, who's sure to turn back to look at you.
但这项工作可不简单，且不说前置准备有多麻烦，机器头的一瞥…稍有不慎就可能毁掉整个空间站。
Alas, our work is never this simple. Putting aside all that onerous legwork, a single glance from Droidhead... could vaporize the entire space station if we're ill-prepared.
噢…所以让空间站进入静默是一种保护手段，避免让设备运转过载甚至报废？
I see... So letting the space station go into hibernation is a protective measure of sorts? To prevent it from slipping into operational overload and turning into a scrap world?
Hm, very perceptive for a mirror.
耳濡目染，耳濡目染——虽然我既没耳朵也没眼睛，哈！
Mirror see (and hear), mirror do! Though I neither have eyes nor ears, haha!
这片扇区…好像还挺正常的？这些人偶也都在运作，没看出有什么故障……
This zone... seems to be functioning fine? These puppets are doing their job, and I don't see any obvious malfunction...
Things may look fine only on the surface.
让我看看，这个人偶…应该是#2757。
Let me take a look. This puppet... should be #2757.
这、这你是怎么认出来的？！
嘘！别打岔，我在检查人偶的状态。#2757……
Shh! Don't distract me when I'm checking the puppet's parameters. #2757...
「人格映射模块」…已关闭。奇怪，这项参数应该是默认打开的才对吧？
The "Replica Personality Module"... is off. That can't be. This parameter is set to be enabled by default.
「蛮不讲理模块」…也关闭了？这个更不合理，我前几天才检查过一遍，确保所有人偶都开着它……
And the "Utterly Absurd Module"... has also been disabled? Something's definitely wrong here. I checked a couple days ago to make sure every puppet has it switched on...
不是，为什么还有这种预设啊？！
No, wait. Why do you even have such presets!?
Drats. Come and help me, mirror...
哎呀，可真是千钧一发…所以说，为什么这里会出现「记忆」的迷因？
Egads, what a close shave... But why are these Remembrance memes even showing up here?
可不止这一个。看那边——#7631，#10136…都是一样的问题。
That's not the only one. Look at them. #7631 and #10136... are affected too.
就不能远程把它们的参数调回来吗？
Can't you do a factory reset on them?
很遗憾，不能。因为「拒绝配合模块」已经被勾选上了——连我也绕不过它的权限，嘻嘻。
Sorry to disappoint. The "Absolutely Not Module" has been enabled, so not even I get to bypass its permissions. Whoopsie.
…您到底是出于什么心理设计的这些玩意？
...What were you really trying to achieve with these creations?
当时就是设计着玩而已。
Just some toys to amuse myself with.
寻找污染源头的事可以晚点再说。既然我本人已经到场，也就不需要这些人偶了。来吧，把残次品统统送进维修厂！
Finding the source of the corruption can wait. These puppets no longer have use now that I'm here. Take them all out! Defective goods ought to be sent back to the repair center!
为了空间站考虑，我建议您下手别太重……
I... urge you to go easy on them, for the sake of the space station...
这么深入的地方，居然也有忆泡？
A Memory Bubble tucked away this far in?
Heh... I think I know what this is about now. This is interesting.
谜底可以留到晚点再揭晓…先解决有故障的人偶吧？
But we can leave that for later... Let's take care of the malfunctioning puppets first.
Ah, #0988. The pride of my creations!
在它之前的人偶全都一模一样，千篇一律，无聊得很。我记得很清楚，从#0988开始，我会随机往人偶里塞一些小惊喜……

Puppets before her were all as dull as brick walls, mundane and uninspired. I distinctly recall #0988 being the first puppet I imbued with... a magical surprise. Some other puppets that came later also got to enjoy similar privileges.
...Good to know, but did anyone ask!?
别怕，镜子——你要记住，天才的宿命，就是要一刻不停地解开出现在眼前的难题。
Fear not, mirror. You have to remember that being a genius means you're destined to solve challenge after challenge. There's no time for rest.
...C—Can I just be on the sidelines this time? Pretty please!?
Phew, that was close... I almost shattered...
别夸大其词，应付这种对手，让我动一个脑细胞都算是高看它了。
Don't be melodramatic. Working even a single brain cell of mine to take out foes like her is an outright waste of my smarts.
所以，现在三个扇区的麻烦都解决了？这是不是就表示……
I take it we've taken care of the problems in all three zones? Does that mean...?
在那之前，咱们还得先解决一件小事。
Not yet. There's something else we need to deal with.
从刚才开始，我们身后好像就一直跟着条小尾巴呢……
It seems we've had a little tagalong all this while...
您的观察真是细致入微，黑塔女士。需要我们帮忙吗？
You've got quite the sharp eye, Madam Herta. Would you like us to help?
好啊，把大家都叫出来吧，第四面镜——
Sure, go ahead and summon the whole team, Fourth Mirror.
我们要做的事如此重要，可不能被一个小小的窃贼给钻了空子啊。
Considering the gravity of our endeavor, we can't allow a little thief to spoil the show.
「记忆」的寄生虫，你该不会真的以为，这套拙劣的伪装能骗过天才的眼睛吧？
Hmph, parasite of the Remembrance. Do you truly think your atrocious disguise can outwit the keen sight of a genius like myself?
Once you're reflected in my mirrors...
Oh dear, oh dear. This is bad...
留得青山在，不愁没柴烧…先逃回忆域，以后的事再说！
Right, stay alive and again I can strive... Retreat into the Memory Zone for now, I can always regroup and try again!
哎，看来有些人没有用心听呢。
我已经说过了吧？就凭你这点本事…也想逃出我的掌心？
Didn't hear me, did you? With those petty tricks of yours... do you actually think you can slip away right under my nose?
黑塔…黑塔大人！你、你想做什么……
Herta... Madam Herta, wait! Wh—What do you want with me...?
我…我全都告诉你！忆庭的秘密，他们在觊觎的东西…我全都愿意说出来！请饶、饶了我吧……
I... I'll spill it all! The Garden's secrets and what they're after... everything! P—Please just spare me...
哎呀，这么紧急的关头，你能想到的救命说辞就只有这么几句？这可不行。
Well, is that all you've got to say while your life is at stake? That's hardly worth anything.
需要再提醒你一下吗？我是天才俱乐部#83黑塔，解开虚数流溢之谜的学者，虚数坍缩武器的执钥人…你觉得，我需要从你身上获得任何答案吗？

Need a little refresher? I am Herta, Genius Society #83, the one to unravel the mystery behind the imaginary leakage phenomenon, and keyholder of the Imaginary Implosion Pulse... Do you honestly believe I'd seek any counsel from you?
嘘，别出声。这可是我的高光时刻，你只要乖乖听着就行了。
Hush now, keep quiet. This is my moment to shine, so just listen.
你潜入这里，无非就是为了窃取<color=#dbc291ff>博识尊的记忆</color>，不是么？
You crept in here to steal <color=#dbc291ff>Nous' memories</color>, didn't you?
把我宝贵的「谒见系统」搞得一团糟，也是为了把我本人引来这里，为你们带路……
And messing with my precious Audience System is just a ruse to lure me here so I can lead you to THEM...
真可惜，你只差一点就能完成任务，回去交差了……
What a shame. You're only a step away from completing the mission assigned to you...
…开玩笑的，你从头到尾都没有一丝机会，嘻嘻。
...As if. Truth is, you never stood a chance from the get-go, teehee!
别看只有第四面镜跟在我身边，它的兄弟姐妹们早就把你的行踪一览无余了。让我想想…该怎么惩罚一个胆大包天的窃贼呢？

Think I only have Fourth Mirror following me around? Then you've let your guard down, because her siblings have long been watching your every move. Now, let me think... What kind of punishment should I subject a brazen thief like you to?
噢，我有主意了！忆庭的人都很喜欢镜子，对吧？那我干脆就成人之美，让你多跟镜子做做伴吧？
Ooh, I know! You Garden folk have a fondness for mirrors, huh... How about letting you enjoy some quality time with your favorite object — a mirror?
惩罚的时长…也不该太严苛，就取<color=#dbc291ff>百分之一的人生吧？</color>这点时间，足够你好好反省了。
As for the length of your punishment... Let's keep it mildly punitive. <color=#dbc291ff>How about a hundredth of a lifetime?</color> That should be enough for some serious self-reflection.
别怕，就算被藏进了镜子里，你还是能为这个世界做出贡献的。你身上那点微薄的命途能量，说不定就能帮我引来机器头的注意呢？
Aww, cheer up. You can still do your part for this world while trapped in a mirror. For all you know, your weak Path Energy could just help me get Droidhead looking this way.
啊，忘记说了。刚刚提到的<color=#dbc291ff>百分之一</color>……
Ah, I should make myself clear. When I said <color=#dbc291ff>a hundredth of a lifetime</color>...
哈…一身轻松，总算把问题连根拔起了。
Ahh, at long last... We can finally be at ease now that we've nipped those problems in the bud.
别发出奇怪的动静啊，显得我精神不太正常似的。让那小贼先好好睡一觉吧，晚点再决定该怎么处置她。
Cut that out! Those weird noises make me seem like I've got a few screws loose. Put that little thief to sleep for now. We can decide her fate later.
哎呀，可爱又可敬的黑塔女士，您的心肠什么时候变得这么软了？
Oh, sweet and venerable Madam Herta, when did your heart turn this tender?
「谒见系统」已经重启。总算到了这个时候……
The Audience System has been rebooted. This is finally it...
机器头，我费了这么大功夫只为来到你的面前，可不许无视我啊。
After all that I've done to reach you, Droidhead... You'd better not snub me.
（命途狭间…不是由模拟宇宙构建出来的虚拟情景，而是真实的、可以触及的……）
(The Path Space... This isn't a figment of the Simulated Universe, but a perfectly tangible and accessible space...)
（现在不是感伤的时候。机器头…你会回应我吗？）
(Right. Now's not the time to wallow in nostalgia. Droidhead... Will you answer me?)
黑塔女士…我们在狭间内捕捉到了一些「声音」。
Madam Herta... We picked up some voices from the space.
这声音是…二进制运算？难道是机器头？
Is this... binary arithmetic? Could it be Droidhead?
不对，二进制运算里怎么会出现「2」？
Wait, there shouldn't be a "2" in binary arithmetic!
Is this some kind of prank...?
黑塔女士！那些声音，又出现了！
Madam Herta! We're hearing those voices again!
What now? What should we do!?
你冷静点，第二面镜。它又说了什么，再放给我听听。
Keep your cool, Second Mirror. What did they say this time? Play it again for me.
Wait a minute. This door... isn't locked?
不对，这根本不是什么命途之声…到底怎么回事？
No, this isn't the Voice of the Path at all...! What in the world is going on?
咦嘻嘻嘻…黑塔女士，外面的家伙…好像在说些很有趣的话哦？
Hyuk hyuk hyuk... Madam Herta, those lads outside... seem to be discussing something interesting...
您要不要也来听听？嘻嘻嘻……
Wanna listen in on them? Hyuk hyuk hyuk...
第三面镜，你能不能收一收那让人起鸡皮疙瘩的笑声？
Third Mirror! Stop that nightmarish cackle. It's giving me goosebumps.
你刚才提到了「外面的家伙」？难道是……
Wait, did you say "those lads outside"? Could it be...
欸嘿嘿…女士，要不您自己听？
Eheheh... Why don't you listen for yourself?
…不对劲，肯定是有人闯进实验室了！
...This isn't right. I'm sure we've got intruders in the lab!
要叫醒她么，瓦尔特先生？
Should we rouse her, Mr. Yang?
嗯，就这么做吧。虽然有些无礼，但我们的确在赶时间。
...Let's do it. I'm not sure she'll be happy about it, but we have no time to waste.
...Wait! S—Stop whatever you're about to do...
不行，不行，绝对不行！不管你们是谁，别在这个时候打断我！
No, don't even think about it! Whoever you are, you'd better not interrupt me right now!
我得继续前进…几步，只差几步我就能见到机器头了！
I must continue forward... Just a few more steps and I'll be able to see Droidhead!
出什么问题了，黑塔女士？
No, it's nothing. I was just thinking...
呃，黑塔女士…从狭间外面传进来的声音，您最好听听……
Um, Madam Herta... I think you'll want to listen to the voices from beyond this space...
能麻烦你吗，星期日先生？
I'll leave it to you then, Mr. Sunday.
Wait... What are they up to?
无理取闹，想靠这种小伎俩影响我？门都没有！
Ridiculous! Hoping to stop me with such cheap parlor tricks? Not a chance!
她靠着潜意识就轻易化解了「同调」…不愧是令使。
She easily dispelled the Resonance with her subconscious mind... as expected of an Emanator.
Is there something else we can try?
哈哈！不自量力的家伙，还以为自己有能力打断黑塔女士的实验？
Bahaha! Presumptuous fellows. Who are you to interrupt Madam Herta's experiment?
别理他们，我们接着去见博识尊吧！
Let's ignore them and keep going. We haven't seen Nous yet!
…还是算了，镜子，我们先离开这里吧。
出去？您、您的意思是…要在这个时候中断谒见实验？
Leave? S—Surely you're not suggesting... we stop the Audience Experiment right now?
这太疯狂了，女士！我们费了那么大力气才来到这里，只差一步就能接触到星神本尊了…重启一次「谒见系统」的成本有多高，您也知道！

That's beyond all reason, ma'am! We went through so much just to get here! Now we're just one step away from making contact with the Aeon THEMSELF... Please, you know how insanely costly it is to reboot the Audience System!
但要是我不管那两个入侵者，继续往前…等机器头向空间站投下目光，那一瞬间的能量保准会把他们烧成焦炭。

But if I were to ignore those two intruders and continue onward... When Droidhead casts THEIR gaze upon the space station, the blast of energy generated in that instant is sure to burn them to a crisp.
实验还有机会做第二次，人没了可就再没办法复活了。
Experiments can always be repeated, but humans cannot be brought back to life.
呜呜…博爱又温柔的黑塔女士！本镜可真是跟对了主人啊……
*sob* Oh Madam Herta, so selfless and kind! I am truly... truly a lucky mirror to have found the best... best possible master...
给我停下，不许用那么恶心的腔调说话！
Enough. Don't use that nauseatingly fawning tone on me!
哎…看来这次也要半途而废了。
...Looks like I'll have to abort this prematurely again.
机器头——我会回来的，你给我等着……
But mark my words, Droidhead: I will be back for you...
我的计划，全毁在你们手上了！
My plan is ruined! And it's all thanks to you!
很抱歉，黑塔女士…我们并不知道您另有安排。
My sincerest apologies, Madam Herta... We weren't aware this was a part of your plan.
我们抵达空间站时，只发现这里漆黑一片，我和星期日都以为出现了什么紧急情况。我们一路下行寻找事故根源，没想到会在此处碰到您…的正身。

The space station was in complete darkness when we arrived, so Sunday and I assumed something bad had happened. We continued further into the space station, hoping to find the cause of the blackout... and that's when we chanced upon your... actual self.
好吧，好吧…怎么说我也是个讲道理的人，这件事是怪不到你们身上。
Alright, fine... I am a person of reason, after all. You're not to blame for this.
星穹列车的杨先生我有印象，你旁边这位是……
I am familiar with Mr. Yang of the Astral Express, but the one next to you...
…看来黑塔女士对银河间的新闻不太敏感。
...Looks like Madam Herta doesn't pay much attention to cosmic news.
请原谅，情急之下我竟忘记了最基本的礼仪——我叫星期日，只是一个普通的搭车客。
Please pardon my manners. It is unbecoming of me to forget the most basic of courtesies amid all that has happened... My name is Sunday, and I'm just a passenger of the Express.
一个默默无闻的旅人…却是「同谐」的命途行者？哼，谁信啊。
And this unremarkable passenger... happens to be a Harmony Pathstrider? Hmph, do you take me for a child?
所以，我猜两位大驾光临，肯定不是为了观光吧？
In any case, I don't suppose you came all the way here just to check on how the space station is doing?
虽然眼下的情境与我们设想中大有出入…但无论如何，空间站没事就好。
Well, we were worried for a moment there... but it's good to know the space station isn't in any kind of trouble.
黑塔女士，<color=#dbc291ff>我们是为「翁法罗斯」而来。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>We're here because of Amphoreus</color>, Madam Herta.
Hm. Why does that not surprise me?
没有，我都和姬子说了，这事怪得很。机器头曾经向那么多世界投去过目光…它们全都刻在我的脑子里，怎么可能有漏网之鱼？

No, I've told Himeko everything I know. Nothing about the world sounds right. Droidhead has cast THEIR gaze upon numerous worlds in the past... and every one of them is etched in my mind. So how could I possibly not know about it?
要么就是你们被忆庭的人忽悠了。总之，我先用模拟宇宙检索了这四个字，虽然已经筛选掉了一眼无关的结果……
Perhaps those Garden folks lied to you. Anyhow, I've looked up the name Amphoreus in the Simulated Universe. Though clearly irrelevant results have already been filtered out...
但依旧剩下一份天文数字的清单——什么「『翁法罗斯神王队』下一赛季将使用王者巴维鲁取代队徽」——希望能帮上各位的忙吧。

There's still an unbelievably long list of generated results. Something about how the Divine Amphoreus team will swap out their current crest emblem for one in King Baviru's likeness in the next season. I hope that can be of some help to you.
...We may as well take a look at it.
不过我还是好奇，星穹列车不是早就出发了么？那世界真有这么神奇，至于让你们特地折返一趟？
I still don't get it, though. Didn't the Astral Express already depart some time ago? Is that world so incredibly spectacular that it warrants this return trip?
因为…我们陷入了进退两难的境地。
Well, that's because... we're caught between a rock and a hard place.
尤其是在亲眼见证后，如果翁法罗斯真的与星神、命途，乃至「智识」密切相关，我们需要天才的智慧。
If Amphoreus is indeed inextricably entwined with Aeons, Paths, and even the Erudition, we're going to need the wisdom of a genius to help us. Especially now that we've seen the planet for ourselves.
你口中的「进退两难」——要不展开说说吧，杨先生？
Elaborate a little on this "rock and a hard place" you're caught between?
<color=#dbc291ff>对我们而言十分重要的两位同伴，在进入翁法罗斯后便杳无音讯。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>We've lost all contact with two indispensable companions since they entered Amphoreus.</color>
此外…还有另一位同伴，<color=#dbc291ff>身上出现了我们难以解释的可怕症状。</color>
And that's not all... One of our other companions is <color=#dbc291ff>suffering from a serious and inexplicable affliction.</color>
数个系统时前，星穹列车上……
Some system hours ago, aboard the Astral Express...
帕姆，你的「员工餐」准备好了吗？
Pom-Pom, have you prepared our meals already?
当然，已经准备好了帕！三月乘客身体不适，我特地准备了容易消化的列车长定制菜单。
Of course, the food's ready! March isn't feeling well, so Pom-Pom has specially prepared the conductor's special bland meal that'll be easy on her stomach.
姬子，能麻烦你给她送去吗？
Can you bring it to her, Himeko?
Gladly. Why don't we also get her a—
不行不行，不可以给病号喝咖啡帕！
Nuh-uh! No coffee when she's already feeling unwell!
咯咯咯…不愧是黑塔女士，这些家伙根本不是对手！
Brrr... Aaaaand Madam Herta never fails to impress! Those things are no match for you!
这下清净了！收拾收拾，去下一个扇区吧。
Now that this place is cleaned up, let's set everything in order and move on to the next zone.
这些家伙…是「记忆」的模因残渣吧？
These are... memetic remnants of the Remembrance?
就是它们污染、篡改了人偶的设置吗？
So they were the ones that corrupted and tampered with the settings of my puppets?
虽然已经彻底报废了，不过脑袋倒还完整？
They're completely battered, save for... their heads?
打人不打脸，对人偶也是一个道理~
Never strike someone in the face — the same goes for puppets.
更深处好像还有人偶的信号，咱们去看看。
I'm picking up signals from more puppets somewhere farther in. Let's go take a look.
（说起来，印象里小三月从来都没有生过病。）
(Now that I think about it, I don't think March has ever fallen sick before.)
(What is different about this time, though...?)
使用三月七的相机拍摄吧！
Let's use March 7th's camera to take photographs!
Take a photograph of the giant sphere in the distance
Take a photograph of the gate on the opposite cliff
Take a photograph of Kremnos Arena
Take a photograph of the twelve constellations
丹恒靠坐在废墟的角落，生死未卜。
Dan Heng is slumped in the corner of the wreckage, his well-being uncertain.
Dan Heng, time to get up.
That was one stylish landing, bro.
该给第三代转世起名了…
Time to come up with a name for the next reincarnation...
等等——你看到丹恒的胸膛在一起一伏，证明他的生命体征尚未薄落。
Wait— you see Dan Heng's chest rising and falling, proof that life still lingers within him.
…纹丝不动，看来你得想点别的法子。
...He doesn't even twitch. Looks like you gotta try some new ideas.
你想起自己和丹恒、三月七初遇的情景……
You recall the moment you first met Dan Heng and March 7th...
怎么会产生这种想法？你害怕了，恨不得扇一巴掌让自己清醒点！
How can such a thought even cross your mind? You're scared... You feel like slapping yourself to snap out of it!
…不过，也不一定要扇自己？你再次看向丹恒。
But, come to think of it, you don't necessarily need to slap yourself, right? You take another glance at Dan Heng.
好像有谁在你耳边大声喊：大胆动手吧！真是恶魔般的靡靡之音。你犹豫再三，终于俯下身……
It's as if someone is shouting in your ear: "JUST DO IT!" It's veritably the whispers of the devil. After much hesitation, you finally lean down and...
你内心冒出了「给他来一下」的冲动，没有理由，没有恩怨，有些想法的涌现就是如此突然。
You suddenly felt the urge to "slap him" for no reason — There are no grudges. Some thoughts just spontaneously appear like that.
Uh, pardon me for... not keeping you safe.
Ugh... How long were we out for?
车厢被击中后，你失去了意识，我把你抬出来后也昏过去了。幸好有车厢保护，否则我们都要粉身碎骨。
You passed out when our car got hit. I blacked out too, but not before dragging you out. It's a good thing we were in the car, or we would've been crushed to pieces.
…先试试能不能联系上列车吧。
...We should try making contact with the Express.
果然失败了…这下只能靠你我了。
I guessed as much... It's no longer working. Looks like it's just the two of us out here now.
得先找个安全的地方当根据地。从四周的建筑，还有这尊雕像来看，翁法罗斯肯定存在文明……
Let's find someplace safe to set up a base of operations first. This statue and the buildings we've seen so far point to a civilization here on Amphoreus...
坏消息是，他们可能对外来者怀有敌意。
We can only hope they're not hostile toward outsiders.
It's dangerous here. We should leave.
Are we back to being fugitives again...?
Who cares? We're only here to trailblaze.
…有人在附近？小心点，拿起武器。
...Someone's here? Ready your weapon and stay alert.
Let's find out what's behind that gate.
消失了…完全不给我们摸清状况的机会。你看清那生物的模样了吗？
It's gone... That happened too fast for us to make any sense of it. Did you see what the creature looked like?
不像是智库中记载的任何一个物种，这也是理所当然，翁法罗斯对于我们是彻彻底底的「未知」。
It's unlike any of the known species in our data bank. But I guess that's to be expected. We know nothing about Amphoreus, after all.
哪怕是雅利洛-Ⅵ，列车在抵达前也对它的历史和地貌有所了解。但翁法罗斯…黑天鹅口中的几句描述，就是我们对它全部的认知。

Back when we were trailblazing into Jarilo-VI, we knew its history and terrain even before arriving on the planet. But with Amphoreus... All we have is whatever little Black Swan told us about the world.
但这次「开拓」容不得闪失。
But we can't afford to screw up this trailblazing expedition.
下一步该怎么做，找当地人？
What should we do now? Find a local?
恐怕要做好最坏的准备，先不谈语言问题，刚才的袭击…那一击威力相当不俗，很难想象一处与世隔绝的边星竟拥有这种武器技术。

I'm afraid we must plan for the worst. Putting a potential language barrier aside, that was a powerful attack on us just now... It's hard to imagine a planet as far out and isolated as this having the expertise to create such sophisticated weaponry.
Is it any match for my baseball bat?
Is it any match for your dragon transmutation?
都说不准，切忌盲目乐观。摸索着前进吧。
I can't tell for sure. But let's not get our hopes up too high. We can learn and observe as we move.
这附近不像有人居住的样子，刚才的奇妙生物也不见了。不过……
Well, it looks like no one lives in this area, and that strange creature from before is nowhere to be seen. But...
巨构建筑随处可见，当地不仅工程技术发达，还有着某种普世信仰。可惜距离太远，看不清细节。

Judging from the prevalence of these colossal structures, this civilization has more than just great engineers and architects. The structures also indicate a universal belief system. If only it were closer, I'd be able to make out the details.
…要帮拍些照片的话，现在应该正合适。
...If you want to take some photos, now would be the perfect time.
远方的巨型球体屹立于天地间，它顶端的天空被撕开…不，更像是它自愿打开了一道圆形的裂口，裂口内的漩涡翻涌倒转，云层周期性地映出金黄色的流光。

A giant sphere stands between heaven and earth in the distance. At its top, the sky appears torn open — or rather, it seems to have willingly opened a circular rift. Inside, a swirling vortex churns, and the clouds periodically reflect a golden glow.
如果三月七此时在你身旁，她一定用少女的脑回路为眼前的景观找到奇妙且跳脱的譬喻。可惜，现在只能由你来代行团队摄影师的职责了。

If March 7th were here, she'd definitely use her girlish imagination to come up with some whimsical and creative metaphors for the scenery. Unfortunately, it's up to you to take on the team's photographer duties now.
断崖对岸，宏伟的宫殿大门缄口不言，不愿透露一丝藏在身后的历史和秘密。
Across the cliff, the grand palace gates remain silent, unwilling to reveal any of the history and secrets hidden behind it.
门径之内会是怎样一番景象？你不禁开始放任自己遐想：惨烈的杀戮，喧嚣的盛筵，无底的黑渊……
What could lie within the gate? You can't help but let your imagination run wild: Bloody carnage, chaotic banquets, bottomless abyss...
然后你回过神来，似乎听到一个调皮的声音在耳边轻语——
Then you regain focus, hearing a playful voice softly whisper in your ear—
Hellooo~! Snap out of it and click the shutter already!
（还不错，这几张照片值得摆在照片墙最前边。）
(These turned out great. Heh, they deserve the most prominent spot on the photo wall.)
它们刚才是在这个位置吗？
Were they at this location before?
这些家伙没有气息…是无机生命？
看来不打算放我们离开，身后是死路和悬崖，只能应战了。
Looks like they want to keep us here. With a dead end and a cliff edge behind us, there's no other way out. We're going to have to fight them.
You can't say it's trailblazing until...
——从挥出第一棒才算正式开始！
...you land a hit with your bat!
别误会，这是为了大家的安全。
I bear no harm. I just want everyone to be safe.
Hey, I can understand what he's saying...?
在重渊这种地方，手持武器就是一种挑衅。这些士兵都是「纷争」泰坦的爪牙，对外敌向来是赶尽杀绝的。
Roaming around a place like the Abyss with weapons in tow is a show of provocation. Those soldiers are minions of the Strife Titan. They're not known to stop until all invaders fall under their feet.
如果你们继续挥剑，不但自己会沦为猎物……
If you continue brandishing your weapons, you won't only be putting yourselves in the crossfire...
还会将它们的悬锋引到无辜者头上。
Their looming blades will come down on the heads of the innocent.
你大可言语相告，而不是用如此极端的方式。
A civil approach gets your message across all the same.
两位突然出现，是敌是友犹未可知。况且你们即便手无寸铁，也身怀不容小觑的力量……
It's difficult to tell if you're friend or foe when you appear out of thin air. Even without your weapons, a great power still lurks within you...
没准身处险境的反而是我呢？可不敢懈怠啊。
I could be putting myself in harm's way for all I know. I'd be unwise not to take precautions.
那么，能否请你们表明来意，从天而降的客人？
So, care to share the reason for dropping in on us? Hmm? Visitors from above?
小——白——！你又乱来！跑那么快，还擅自惹事？
Phai—non—! Look what you did again! Taking off only to get yourself into trouble?
啊！怎么还把人家的武器弄坏了！完了完了，这是和陌生人打交道的礼节吗？
Agh, you even ruined his weapon! Now you've really gone and done it! This is no way to be treating strangers.
我只是想用最稳妥的方式解决问题。
I was just trying to fix our problem in the safest way possible.
一点都不稳妥——两位陌生的朋友，请放松放松再放松。大家都是人类，没必要弄得剑拔弩张。
How is this safe!? Hello, friendly strangers! Let's all simmer down and cool our jets. We're all humans here. No need for things to get so heated.
小白担心你们是天上来的坏人，但*我们*觉得两位没有恶意。啊，得先做个自我介绍——*我们*是雅努萨波利斯的缇宝，这位是…小白，快道歉！

Snowy's just worried you're baddies from above, but we know you two are nothing of the sort! Oh right, you don't know us yet. We are Tribbie from Janusopolis, and this is... Snowy! Hurry up and apologize to them!
既然缇宝老师都这么说…抱歉，二位降落在危险地带，登场方式又如此特殊，是我警惕心过重了。
Alright, if you say so, Tribbie... I apologize for my earlier behavior. I was overly wary because both of you landed in this tumultuous region, it put me on high alert.
也可以理解。我们来自天外，是降落在这个世界的「开拓者」。
I understand. We're Trailblazers from beyond the sky.
他们都看见了，没必要隐瞒。如果真是袭击我们的人，不会说这么多话。
There is no point concealing anything. They saw everything. If they wanted us dead, they wouldn't be standing around talking to us.
...Not from above the sky but beyond it...?
哇，这下更不得了啦…两位朋友，幸好你们遇见的是*我们*。
Wow, that's something else altogether... You're lucky you met us, then.
意思是我们不会伤害二位，但换作别人就未必了。你们很幸运。
She means you're lucky because we won't hurt you, but the same can't be said for others.
…借一步说话吧，野外实在不安全。你们也看见了，就在神殿里还有不少难民未能脱困。
...Let's talk somewhere else. You've seen it first-hand. It isn't safe out here. As you saw, there are still many refugees who haven't been freed in the temple.
我们是来营救并护送他们前往「圣城」奥赫玛的。这也是为什么我要求二位止戈，并反复确认你们并无恶意的原因。如有意外，他们绝无反抗之力。

We're here to rescue and escort them to the holy city, Okhema. They're the reason I had to be absolutely sure you were not here with ill intent, and why I wanted you to put away your weapons. If something were to occur, they would have no way of protecting themselves.
我是哀丽秘榭的白厄。先前有所冒犯，请接受我的致歉。
I'm Phainon from Aedes Elysiae. Sorry if I offended you just now.
我还是喜欢你桀骜不驯的样子。
Meh, I preferred it when you were being combative.
明明差一点就能开打了。
Tsk, a little longer and I would've shown you what I can really do.
如此一来，我们也算是不打不相识。给，这是你的武器。
Friction really does spark friendships, huh? Here, you can have your weapon back.
很响亮的名字，但我猜这是个外号吧？初次见面，是不是报上真名更好？
That sounds mighty impressive, but I'm guessing it's a nickname? We're meeting each other for the first time, so shouldn't you tell me your actual name?
如此一来，我们也算是不打不相识。给，这是你的武器。
Friction really does spark friendships, huh? Here, you can have your weapon back.
我是失去了球棒的银河球棒侠。
I'm the Galactic Baseballer who's missing a baseball bat.
球棒？啊，是说这柄神兵利器吗…抱歉，可以用它交换你的名字吗？
Baseball bat? Oh, you mean this marvel of a weapon...? Sorry, but why don't you tell me your name in return for your weapon?
如此一来，我们也算是不打不相识。
Friction really does spark friendships, huh?
还有你的长枪，放心吧，定性为小白全责，一定让他帮你修好！
And here's your spear. Don't worry, this is entirely on Snowy. I'll make sure he fixes it for you!
哈哈，这下又得破费请哈托努斯喝几杯了。
Ahaha... It seems I'll have to treat Chartonus to a couple of drinks again.
我们初来乍到，心中仍有许多疑团。二位若能保障我们的安全，结伴同行自然是更好的选择。
We've just arrived and still have many questions. If you two can ensure our safety, traveling together would certainly be the best choice.
{M#没人觉得我俩像兄弟吗？}{F#怎么感觉你和我有点像…}
{M#Does no one else think we look like brothers?}{F#Why do I feel like you and I are kind of alike...}
还真有点？缘分啊——如此一来，我们也算是不打不相识。给，这是你的武器。
Well how about that? Perhaps it's fate! Friction really does spark friendships, huh? Here, you can have your weapon back.
How do you view the situation?
There's more to this Phainon than meets the eye.
同感。能在瞬息间将你缴械，甚至一击斫断这柄长枪，此人绝非等闲之辈。
I agree. To disarm you in a flash and even snap my spear... He's no ordinary person.
心思也很缜密，对话过程中始终保持着距离。我尝试套取「翁法罗斯」的情报，他俩一唱一和都糊弄过去了。
He was also quite cautious, keeping his distance throughout the conversation. I tried probing for more information on Amphoreus, but they both casually glossed over it.
但反过来说，这意味着他们没有轻易拿下你我的把握。极端情况下，武力仍是我们的底牌。
Conversely, I believe this indicates he doesn't believe he can easily subdue us. If things take a turn for the worse, our best bet is still going to be resolution by force.
他们出现的时机太巧了。
这也是一大疑点，那根将车厢摧毁的长矛显然是人造物。
Yes, the timing is suspect, too. The spear that destroyed our car is definitely man-made.
我怀疑过他们在刻意制造偶遇，但这些难民…怎么看都不像是演的。暂时只能认为，他们和袭击者不是一股势力。
I suspected they might have staged the encounter, but these refugees... they're clearly not pretending. For now, it's reasonable to assume they're not on the same side as the attackers.
语言居然互通，不奇怪吗？
How is it even remotely possible that we share a common language?
我也在分析各种可能，但…还没想通。或许这里和雅利洛-Ⅵ一样，在很久以前接入过银轨？可如果是这样，智库里不可能没有记录……

I've been trying to come up with possible theories for that, though the answer still eludes me. Perhaps like Jarilo-VI, Amphoreus was served by the silver rail eons ago? But the data bank would at least have some record on the planet if it were true...
而且，那女孩一直以「我们」自称，也很奇怪。我不觉得只是某种口癖。
The way the girl uses "we" and "us" to refer to herself is unusual, too. I doubt it's just a habit of speech.
但在其他疑团面前，语言互通反倒是最不重要的一点了。先上路吧，希望问题能迎刃——咳…水到渠成。
But compared with our other suspicions, sharing a common language is the least of our concerns right now. As the saying goes, let's get moving like a blade through... You get the point.
枪断了固然可惜，却换来了有价值的信息：翁法罗斯的锻兵技术能和造出这柄击云的技艺一较高下。
Though losing the spear is unfortunate, we gained some important insight: Amphoreus' weapon-forging skills are on par with the craftsmanship that forged Cloud-Piercer.
看来这个世界不像我们猜测的那般民智未开，兴许在他们口中的「圣城」，还能有更多意想不到的发现吧。
Looks like this world is nowhere near as primitive as we had first thought. Perhaps they have more to surprise us with at this "holy city" they mentioned.
嗯？神殿里似乎有些争吵？进去看看吧，记得表现得友善些。
Is someone arguing in the temple? Let's take a look, and remember... keep it friendly.
维尔图斯，谁要你通知黄金裔来带我们去什么圣城了？我们是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的祭司，生来便如无足之鸟，如何能忍受困居一处？

Virtus! You acted on your own to ask the Chrysos Heirs for help!? To bring us into their so-called holy city, no less! We are priests of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, born as footless birds — how could we possibly endure being confined to one place?
诺杜斯先生，有太多同伴死在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的士兵手里了，我只想大家能安顿下来，睡个好觉。
We've lost far too many to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s forces, Mr. Noldus! I only want for everyone to settle down somewhere safe, and to be able to sleep soundly.
失去信仰，失去一切。你真以为奥赫玛容得下我们？末世将近，身在何处都是朝不保夕！
Lose your faith, and you lose everything. Do you seriously think you can seek shelter in Okhema? Nowhere is safe with the end times looming!
多说无益，要走，你们就走吧，但剩下的人会留在神殿里，接受万径之门，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的庇佑。
I've said my piece. Leave, if that's what you want. Everyone else is staying in this temple, where we enjoy the protection of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus, the Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}.
这位老人家，请你不要冲动——
Don't make this decision in haste, sir—
黄金裔大人，感谢你们的照拂，但请允许人们为自己选择命运。
I appreciate the concern, esteemed Chrysos Heir. But please respect that we have the right to choose our own fate.
抱歉，黄金裔大人，让您见笑了。请问这两位是…？
I'm sorry you had to see that, esteemed Chrysos Heir. Hmm? These two with you are...?
他们也从远方来，是将要前往圣城的旅人。我记得你叫…维尔图斯？叫我白厄就好，刚才发生了什么？
Travelers from afar. They're also headed for the holy city. If memory serves me right, you are... Virtus? Please, you may call me Phainon. What was that just now?
白厄大人能记得我的名字，不胜荣幸。我们是雅努萨波利斯的祭司，家乡被「纷争」泰坦的军队摧毁，一路辗转流离至此。
It's an honor you remember me, Phainon. We are priests from Janusopolis. Armies of the Strife Titan destroyed our home, forcing us to flee across many lands until we arrived here.
前些天，我又目睹同伴死在那些怪物手下，实在崩溃了…就向奥赫玛做出祈祷。本以为回应没这么快，时间足够我说服诺杜斯先生，没想到各位来得如此迅速……

A few days ago, I watched another companion fall to those monsters, and I was shattered... I offered a prayer to Okhema, thinking the answer would take time, at least enough for me to convince Mr. Noldus. I didn't expect your arrival to be so swift...
Every place has their fair share of troubles.
打的车到了，人还没出门？
Your ride is here. Why isn't everyone out yet?
那位老人刚才提到了「末世」，还说翁法罗斯哪里都不安全。请问这是……
The elder spoke of the "end times" just now and claimed that no place in Amphoreus is safe. What did he mean by that...?
这位先生，您竟然不知道吗？这分明是家喻户晓的预言——
Excuse me, sir? Everyone knows about the prophecy. How is it that you—
维尔图斯，当务之急是把诺杜斯先生劝回来，重渊处处是凶恶的敌人，他们没有自保能力，随时可能身处险境。

Virtus, right now we must focus on convincing Mr. Noldus to return. The Abyss is swarming with fierce enemies, and they have no way to defend themselves, leaving them vulnerable to all kinds of danger.
两位朋友，我有个不情之请，二位身手不凡，可否劳烦你们走一遭，追回诺杜斯先生？
My friends, I have a rather bold request. The two of you are quite capable — might I trouble you to fetch Mr. Noldus?
缇宝老师会和二位同行，解答你们的所有疑虑。
Tribbie will join you. She can also answer any questions you may have.
Please give us a moment to discuss it.
刚才白厄阻止我向难民问话，又说那女孩会解答我们的疑问。意思很明显了。
Phainon interrupted me as I was trying to gather information from that refugee, and now he's saying the girl will answer our questions. His intent is obvious.
He's hiding something from the refugees?
在他看来，更需要提防的是让其他人发现你我对这个世界一无所知。他想隐瞒「天外来客」的事。
I believe he thinks it's worse for others to find out we know nothing about this world. He wants to hide the fact that we're visitors from beyond the sky.
目前我们与本地人颇有隔阂，不如先顺着白厄的想法。私下独处时，也探探那位名叫缇宝的女孩态度如何吧。
There's a rift between us and the locals, so let's play along with Phainon for now. We can also learn what Tribbie thinks when we're alone with her.
我们决定了。既然要与各位同行，理应在力所能及的范围内帮忙。
Alright, we'll go. If we're to be companions on this journey, it's only right that we offer assistance where possible.
两位朋友真是义薄云天！我会留在此地保护维尔图斯他们，你们速去速回。
You two are truly honorable! I'll stay behind to guard Virtus and the rest. Go quickly and come back safe.
不必担心，我留下来保护附近的人，几位速去速回。
Don't worry about me. I'll stay behind to protect those in the area. Please make haste.
两位朋友，我猜你们心里有好多疑问，对不对？
I'm sure you two have a ton of questions, don't you?
为什么要单独聊天，当然是因为越安静的地方越适合交流啦。
As for why we should speak in private, that's because quiet places are better suited for communicating with one another.
But the road ahead is... cut off.
Are you going to carry and fly us across?
You're not about to ask me to jump down, right...?
Dan Heng is finally going to be able to jump?
嘿，看这反应，你们果然没骗人，真的是初来乍到的旅人啊。那接下来可千万别眨眼——
Heh. Judging by your reactions, you weren't lying about being newly arrived travelers. In that case, don't blink, or you'll miss the next part.
还有，小白哪有胆子安排*我们*呀，反过来还差不多呢。
Also, Snowy wouldn't dare make plans for us. It's more like the other way around!
好啦！安静一下，现在*我们*要召唤「神迹」了……
Alright! Silence, please. We are about to summon a miracle...
「翻越{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的万千门径，我等谦恭之裔矜立于祇前，接受天秤的审判。」
"We, thy humble descendants, doth surmount the myriad of passages of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} to stand before thee and receive the scales of judgment."
「无私的裁决者{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}，请以律法之名，宣我等无罪；称量悬于现世的果实，换取残留于旧日的甜美。」
"O, selfless arbiter {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, declare us innocent in the name of the law. Weigh the fruits of the present in exchange for the sweetness of the past."
「我呼唤你，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，揭开记忆的帷幕——」
"We summon thee, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, to lift thy curtain of memory..."
呀！怕什么来什么，这下没法悠闲说话了……
Just what I was afraid of. So much for a peaceful chat...
朋友们，历史课只能一会儿再上了，先帮帮诺杜斯先生！
The history lesson will have to wait, my friends. We must help Mr. Noldus!
呼…感谢三位的救命之恩。
Whew... Thank you. The three of you saved our lives.
诺杜斯先生，维尔图斯说的没错呀，你们在这儿可危险了，还是跟*我们*一起回奥赫玛吧。
Mr. Noldus, Virtus was right. It's too dangerous for all of you to be here. Please come back to Okhema with us.
孩子，我想我表达得很清楚了，祭司们宁可死在追逐信仰的道路上，也不愿在异邦他乡苟活。
I believe I've made my stance clear, my child. Us priests would rather die in the pursuit of faith than live in a foreign land.
It looks to me like you still prefer living...
Don't lie to yourself, old man...
先生，*我们*无比理解你对泰坦的信仰。也许在你看来，庇佑圣城的{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>负世之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>刻法勒</color>{RUBY_E#}是异邦的神明。
Sir, we deeply understand your faith in the Titans. Perhaps in your eyes, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, the protector of the holy city, is but a god from a foreign land.
但*我们*以万径之门，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的名义向你起誓，只要黄金裔一日尚存，奥赫玛就会保护每一位泰坦的子民，*我们*不分彼此。

But we swear to you in the name of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus,{RUBY_E#} the Gate of Infinity that so long as the Chrysos Heirs live, Okhema will protect all followers of the Titans. We are one and the same.
以{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的名义起誓？你是谁……
You swear in the name of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}? Who are you...
什么，竟然是大祭司大人？！
您怎么变成了这幅孩童模样？不对，我一介部族祭司，竟在您面前妄言信仰，真是不识好歹！请您恕罪……
Why do you look like a child? No, to think that I, a mere tribal priest, dared lecture you on faith. How ludicrous! Please forgive my transgressions...
诺杜斯，*我们*不愿强迫你。但你也要为部族的同胞们多考虑。
Noldus, we do not wish to force you, but please think of the people in your tribe.
年轻人相信你，就像你相信*我*。如果你不愿离去，他们也会一直留在这神殿中，变成{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}矛下的亡魂。
The young place their trust in you just as you place your trust in us. If you stay, they will remain here too, doomed to fall under {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s spear.
…如果这是您的「神谕」，我没有不听从的道理。
If that is "divine will," then I have no reason to disobey.
大祭司大人，请再一次…带领我们启翅远行吧。
High priest, please guide us once again as we spread our wings on this long journey.
诺杜斯先生，您平安无事就好。
Mr. Noldus, I'm glad you're all right.
维尔图斯，我依然不认同你的做法。但罢了，就让我们给予黄金裔足够的信任吧。
Virtus, I still disagree with your methods, but it doesn't matter now. Let us place our trust in the Chrysos Heirs.
接应我们的大地兽商队还没到，大家先待在安全处歇息一会儿吧。
The dromas caravan that's supposed to meet us isn't here yet, so let's all rest where it's safe for a while.
可惜，我们的疑问仍没得到解答，反而变得更多了。既然风波已经平息，可否请两位拨冗解惑？
Regrettably, our questions are still unanswered, and now we have even more. Now that things have calmed down, perhaps you two can find the time to answer a few of them?
Of course. Please come this way.
看来二位已经觉察了我们的苦衷，感谢理解。作为回报，想知道什么就尽管问吧。
I see you've both been made aware of our troubles. I'm grateful for your understanding, so in return, please ask me anything you wish to know.
What is this "end times" people spoke of?
就是字面意思，末日来临前的挣扎时代。
Just as the word implies, it's the time of strife before the world meets its end.
The darn Finality is still after me...
Is this the sequel to Belobog?
你是说，你们的文明面临着末日？
Are you saying your civilization is coming to an end?
确切地说，是整个世界将要终结。
To be precise, it's the whole world that's coming to an end.
翁法罗斯的旧神，人类曾经的信仰，如今的敌人。
The ancient gods of Amphoreus, once worshiped by humanity, they now stand as their foes.
预言中，流淌着黄金血的救世之人。
The prophetic Deliverers, with golden blood coursing through their veins.
What is the miracle performed earlier?
是「命运三泰坦」的馈赠。在它们的赐福下，祭司能唤醒旧日的重影，改变现实。
It's a gift from the Three Titans of Fate. With their blessings, priests can awaken shadows of the past to alter reality.
你说的也太轻巧了，别把神迹当成能随意使用的工具！
You're putting it too lightly. Don't make miracles sound like a tool you can simply use at will.
That's all the questions I have for now.
抱歉，可能我不是特别擅长讲故事吧。
I'm sorry. I guess I'm not good at telling stories.
但枯燥又冗长的讲解也不好。让我想想……
Yet, a tedious and overly long explanation isn't ideal either. Let me think...
对了！维尔图斯他们是雅努萨波利斯的祭司，里拉琴一定弹得很好，不如为两位朋友弹奏一曲。
Right! Virtus and the others are priests from Janusopolis. They should be adept at playing the lyre. How about playing a song for our two friends?
在翁法罗斯，自古流传着这样一首诗歌……
There's a ballad that's been passed down in Amphoreus since ancient times...
「神明眷顾沃土，遍地欣欣如火。十二星宿如目，巨人举杯对酌。」
"Happiness abound in this lush land by gods chosen. Giants raised their glasses in a toast beheld by the twelve constellations."
「三者开辟天地，三者编织命运。三者捏塑生命，三者引渡灾祸。」
"Three carved the heavens and the earth, three wove the threads of fate. Three molded life with their hands, and three guided calamity's gate."
「它们说：世界太过沉寂。只愿见，生灵欢笑不息。」
"They declared the world too unstirring, hence wished endless laughter upon the living."
「于是便有了我、你，编织言语和歌谣，诞下爱情与知己。」
"Thus you and I were created, with words and song to weave, and love and intimacy to give."
「自此，创生已毕。谁来背负灵魂的重，换取世人步伐之轻？」
"Thus, creation was complete, who then will bear the weight of humanity's souls, to lighten the steps of the living as a whole?"
「伟岸的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，全知的父，它身躯伟岸，却甘将眼睑垂低。」
"O great {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, all-knowing father of stature so tall, yet low does their gaze willingly fall."
「黎明的光沉负于肩，金色的血落向大地——」
"With light of dawn heavy upon their shoulders, golden ichor spills unto the land..."
「——汇作一条滚烫的河，流遍世间英雄末裔……」
"...forming the boiling river that flows through the legacies of heroes who take their stand..."
哈哈哈，别紧张！是我们的救兵来了。大家起身吧！
Hahaha! Don't worry. That's just our rescue. Time to get up, everyone!
这些温吞的大家伙叫「大地兽」，是人类忠实的伙伴。前往圣城的山路崎岖，得拜托它们了。
These large mild-mannered creatures are called dromas. They're humanity's most loyal companions. We'll be relying on them to get us through the rugged mountain roads on the way to the holy city.
大地兽性格温驯，哪怕第一次骑乘也能轻松驾驭。来试试吧，记得握紧缰绳。
Dromas are very docile, even first-time riders can steer them easily. Here, give it a try. Remember to hold the reins tight.
你看见大地兽四肢突出的白色甲壳，打算把它当作脚蹬……
You see all the white shells jutting out from the dromas' limbs and plan to use them as footholds...
…大地兽发出不满的叫声，轻轻一晃就把你甩开了数米远。
The dromas lets out a dissatisfied growl and easily tosses you several meters away.
This is your idea of docile!?
Why you! It's a good thing I managed to dodge quickly.
忘说了，千万别碰白色的石脊。「大地」泰坦赐福它们的时候，把坏脾气全都塞进这些硬块里了。
I forgot to mention. Don't touch their white stone humps. When the Earth Titan blessed these creatures, it's said they also stuffed their ill tempers into these humps.
各位，刚才的里拉琴，奏得还行吧？我们流亡多日，许久没碰过乐器，兴许手艺生疏，献丑了。

Everyone, how did you find our lyre performance earlier? We've been in exile for many days and haven't touched our instruments in a long time. I fear our skills have grown rusty, and we've made a spectacle of ourselves.
哪里哪里，先生演奏得非常好！
No, not at all! Your performance was wonderful, sir!
我们很久没有像刚才那样围坐在一起，纵情吟唱古老歌谣了，感谢各位让我重新回忆起和平辉煌的年代。现在想想，是我之前过于偏执了。

It's been a long time since we sat together like that and sang ancient ballads to our heart's content. I'm grateful to all of you for reminding me of those glorious and peaceful times. Looking back now, I admit I was too stubborn.
也许各位真能从末日手中解救翁法罗斯。就像今日，四位英雄拯救了我们的生命和信仰。
Perhaps you really can save Amphoreus from its doom, just like how the four of you heroes saved our very lives and faith today.
He even included the two of us!
虽然没明白，但展开还不坏。
I don't really get it, but at least things unfolded quite nicely.
痛苦是有害的，苦难并不能使信仰变得高尚。将大家从苦难中解放出来，正是我们这些黄金裔与生俱来的职责。
Suffering's bad for your health, and it won't help your faith much, either. That's why it's our inherent duty as Chrysos Heirs to free everyone from suffering.
也是如今唯一的人类城邦，<color=#dbc291ff>「圣城」奥赫玛</color>存在的意义。
It's also the reason for the <color=#dbc291ff>holy city Okhema</color>'s existence — the only human city left in our present day.
哎呀，别把气氛弄得这么沉重嘛。总之，{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}圣城{RUBY_E#}是绝对安全的，到那里就没事啦。
Hey now, don't be so serious. You're bringing the mood down. Anyway, in short, {RUBY_B#Okhema}the holy city{RUBY_E#} is absolutely safe. Everything will be fine once we get there.
大伙儿都坐稳了吗？那我们就出发吧——目的地，奥赫玛！
Is everyone properly seated? Then we're off! Next stop: Okhema!
你终于有惊无险地骑上了大地兽。
You finally manage to ride the dromas safely.
Hold on. It opened on its own?
Why is it so dark? Is it nighttime already...?
又来了，是它做的？这种现象…难以解释。
There it is again. Is it doing all of this? This phenomenon... is hard to explain.
Hmm, now that's one monumental city gate.
压迫感十足，又相当古旧…是当地的某种文化建筑吗？
Imposing and somewhat archaic... Could it be a cultural site?
还有那座城门，也记录下来吧。
Don't forget the city gate, too.
No, I will never agree to that...
两位朋友！千万别离*我们*太远哦。
My two friends, don't stray too far away from us!
You both have impressive fighting skills!
如果武器还在就更好了。
It would be better if I still had my weapon.
怎、怎么会…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祷言失效了吗？
H—How is that possible... Did {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} prayer fail?
别慌张！跟在那位大人身边就不会有事。
Stop panicking! As long as we're with them, we'll be fine.
这种日子什么时候是个头……
When will days like these finally come to an end...
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}啊，若您还在世……
{RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, if only you were still here with us...
再坚持一会儿，马上就能离开了
Hang on, you'll be able to leave soon
一动不动的人形雕像，不知道有没有危险，还是别太靠近了。
A humanoid statue that does not move. You can't tell whether it's dangerous. Best not to get too close.
姿势莫名幽默的人形雕像，不知道有没有危险，还是别太靠近了。
A humanoid statue with a rather comical pose. You can't tell whether it's dangerous. Best not to get too close.
动作张扬的人形雕像，不知道有没有危险，还是别太靠近了。
A humanoid statue with a flamboyant pose. You can't tell whether it's dangerous. Best not to get too close.
是眼花了吗，你总觉得它们的位置变了。还是别太靠近了。
Are your eyes playing tricks on you? You keep thinking that their positions have changed. Best not to get too close.
愿雅努斯揭示我们的路径。
这样的日子什么时候是个头……
命运会将我们带往何处啊……
Rest up. There will be a way out of this.
雅努斯…会为我们指示未来吗？
Will Janus... show us the future?
We can finally get out of here!
希望奥赫玛是个安全的地方。
Hopefully, Okhema is a safe place.
尊神啊，请善待我等的命运……
O gods, please have mercy on our destiny...
大地兽的脊背如同摇篮，你逐渐睡去，而商队经过一段时间的跋涉也即将抵达奥赫玛……
The back of a dromas is like a cradle. You gradually fall asleep, and the caravan will arrive at Okhema after some travel time...
很神奇吧！来到这里，就能安静说话了……
Amazing, isn't it? Now that we're here, we can speak in peace...
咦，怎么感觉安静过头了？
Huh? But why does it feel a little too quiet?
二位如此勇武，莫非是异邦的黄金裔？
You both fought so bravely. Are you Chrysos Heirs from a foreign land?
求求你们，救救奥赫玛吧，疯王{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}回来了，看哪，混乱、纷争，到处都是……
Please, I beg of you! Save Okhema! The mad king {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has returned! Look! There's strife and conflict everywhere...
冷静些。这里交给我们，你快去避难。
Stay calm and leave this to us. You must hurry and find shelter.
谢谢，谢谢…二位的同袍正在城中战斗，命运会指引你们相聚。
Thank you, thank you... Your comrades are fighting inside the city. Fate will guide you to them.
还以为圣城是座坚固的庇护所，没想到这么不太平。我们就留在战场搭把手吧。
I expected the holy city to be a strong sanctuary, but things are less peaceful than I thought. Let's stay here and lend our support on the battlefield.
Do you still have your broken spear?
都是些小卒，云吟术足以应付。
They're just minions. My cloudhymn magic will be sufficient.
他把我们当成黄金裔了。
He thought we were Chrysos Heirs.
「预言中的救世之人」…看来白厄他们深受民众信赖。
"The Deliverers mentioned in the prophecy"... It seems the people have a lot of faith in Phainon and the others.
这尼卡多利不会和「毁灭」有关吧…
Do you think this Nikador is related to the Destruction?
我不这么认为，这些眷属和反物质军团的差别挺明显的。
I don't think so. These Titankin have obvious differences to the Antimatter Legion.
当务之急，先和白厄汇合。
Our priority now is to find Phainon.
主干道被堵住了！缇宝老师……
The main road's been blocked off! Tribbie...
不慌不慌，交给*我们*吧——「我呼唤你，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}！」
Don't panic. Leave this to us! "I summon thee, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}!"
"—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"
"...Lift the curtain and stir up ripples of past reverie!"
二位…抱歉，又把你们卷进来了。
It's you two... I'm sorry we got you involved again.
没想到{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}会在这时候率领军队，突袭圣城…它向来是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的死敌，如今竟疯溃得像匹恶兽。

I never expected {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} to lead an army and launch a surprise attack on the holy city at a time like this... They and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} have always been mortal enemies, but now they've gone mad like a vicious beast.
We took care of some enemies.
感激不尽。幸亏奥赫玛也不是毫无准备，神谕早已警示我们。这是天灾，但并非死劫。
You have my gratitude. Thankfully, Okhema is not completely unprepared. The prophecy had warned us about this. This is a catastrophe, but it's not the end.
不必惊慌，奥赫玛也不是毫无准备，神谕早已警示我们。这是天灾，但并非死劫。
There's no need to panic. Okhema is not completely unprepared. The prophecy had warned us about this. This is a catastrophe, but it's not the end.
诺杜斯先生他们已经去避难了。后面交给*我们*，你们也快和市民一同撤离吧！
Mr. Noldus and the others have gone to seek shelter. Leave the rest to us. You should evacuate along with the citizens.
{F#她}{M#他}的意思是，我们可以帮忙。
What {F#she}{M#he} meant to say is: We can help.
我不怀疑两位的身手，只是……
I don't doubt your skills but...
好吧，但请不要离开我身边。那些渣滓奈何不了你们，但我们的同伴，那些以「黄金裔」为名的人们……
Very well, but please remain by my side. These pests can't hurt you, but our companions, those known as the "Chrysos Heirs"...
他们的攻击可不分敌我。
Their attacks do not discriminate between friend and foe.
你们在做什么？这里不安全，快去避难吧。
What are you doing? It's not safe here. Seek shelter, quickly!
No, no, no, it's very safe here.
预言已然昭示，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的威光将照拂一切……
The prophecy has already revealed that the light of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} will shine upon all...
看吧！没有人会死去，英雄们会守护这座城邦！
Watch! No one will die. The heroes will protect the city!
由他们去吧。就像诺杜斯先生崇敬{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}一样，在摇摇欲坠的末世，信仰已是一些人生命的全部。
Leave them be. Just as Mr. Noldus reveres {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, faith is all some people have left in a world teetering on the brink of collapse.
而不辜负他们的信任，就是我等黄金裔的职责——「纷争」的爪牙，休想伤及民众分毫！
To honor their faith is the sacred duty of the Chrysos Heirs— Minions of Strife, you shall not harm these people!
真是尸横遍野，正门前不该有这么多敌人的。负责守城的人去哪了？
Bodies everywhere. How could so many enemies have made it to the front gates? Where were the city guards?
*我们*是缇宝——不对，现在哪是自我介绍的时候！
We are Tribbie— Wait, no, now is not the time for introductions!
…翁法罗斯的惊喜越来越多了。
小白！小敌跟大部队打了几十个来回，一路从天上打到了城里！你快去帮帮他呀！
Snowy, De has been trading blows with the main forces for what feels like forever, from the skies to the city! Hurry up and assist him!
我就知道…那家伙杀心一起就不顾一切。三位老师，安置市民的工作拜托你们了。
I knew it... He gets reckless once he gets the urge to kill. I'm relying on you three to handle the task of getting the citizens to safety.
放心吧！有我们在呢，只要用「百界门」，啪的一下就能把大伙儿送去翁法罗斯最安全的地方——
Don't worry! With us here, we can just use the Century Gate to whoosh the people to the safest place in Amphoreus—
——别闹了，赶紧救人吧！哪里都行，快把大家送去安全的地方！
Stop messing around and help the people! Anywhere is fine, just send them to somewhere safe!
放心吧，虽然有些孩童心性，但缇宝老师在黄金裔中也称得上资历深厚，更是奥赫玛的支柱之一。她们值得信赖。
Don't worry. Although they are a little childish, the trio are experienced Chrysos Heirs and one of the pillars of Okhema. Therefore, they can definitely be trusted.
Well, let's keep on moving then.
对哦，那还要我们做什么？
Right, then what do you even need us for?
白、白厄阁下！你终于来了，快救救大工匠，他被敌人围住了——
L—Lord Phainon! You're finally here. Quick, save the Grand Craftsman! He's surrounded by enemies—
至于你，万敌…如果我没记错，你的责任应当是保护市民吧？
As for you, Mydei... If I'm not mistaken, shouldn't your responsibility be protecting the citizens?
什么意思，你想说这里哪个不算市民？
What is that supposed to mean? Who are you implying isn't a citizen here?
这儿的人名一个赛一个奇怪。
The names of the people here keep getting stranger and stranger.
答非所问。阿格莱雅叫我们庇护民众，你只作耳旁风么？
Don't evade the question. Aglaea told us to protect the citizens. Are you ignoring what she said?
是你漏了半句，「保护市民，扫清外敌」——她的原话。解决掉{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，圣城危机自可迎刃而解。

It is you who forget the second half of her words. Her original words were, "Protect the citizens and eliminate the invaders." The crisis in the holy city will be resolved once we've eliminated {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.
话又说回来，既然你压根没把那边两位当作「市民」……
Speaking of which, since you've never considered the pair over there to be "citizens"...
那他们似乎也符合「外敌」的定义。
They seem to fit the definition of "invaders."
{RUBY_B#缇宁，缇宝，缇安}雅努斯的三位祭司{RUBY_E#}，同面同心，耳目相连。你们的一举一动早已暴露在奥赫玛人的视线下。

{RUBY_B#Trinnon, Tribbie, Trianne}The three priests of Janus{RUBY_E#} share the same appearance and mind, and their senses are also interlinked. The Okhemans have long been aware of your presence and what you have been doing.
看着还挺信任他？劝你们三思。
You trust him that much? I suggest you think twice.
这种火烧眉毛的时刻挑衅盟友，你把自己当什么了？
Provoking your allies at such a critical juncture. Whose side are you on?
自打相识起，我就告诉过你们，无论过往抑或未来，悬锋人都不可能同意与你们握手言和……
From the moment we first met, I already told you that regardless of whether it's in the past or in the future, the people of Kremnos will never agree to make peace with the likes of you...
——我，万敌，身为悬锋的继业者，无法在这种问题上独断专行。况且到了这份上，我更有必要提醒各位*贵客*，你们的东道主可谈不上精于待客之道。

As the successor of Kremnos, I, Mydei, am not able to act independently on such matters. Furthermore, things have escalated to a point where I must warn you, esteemed guests, that your host is anything but proficient in the ways of hospitality.
够了…内讧的时候，现在不是。疯王没有溃退…必须阻止它，黄金裔……
Enough... The time for internal strife, now is not. Still on the offense, the mad king is and must be stopped by the Chrysos Heirs...
我没忘正事，退下吧。前方有我足矣。
I have not forgotten about what needs to be done. Stand down. I'm more than capable of taking care of what's ahead by myself.
至于你…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}就在云石天宫，阿格莱雅让我别再插手。尽管去吧…「救世主」。
As for you... {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} is in the Marmoreal Palace. Aglaea told me to stay out of it. So, go ahead... "Deliverer."
I don't need you to tell me that.
怎么了，外邦人，畏惧{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}天谴之矛{RUBY_E#}的怒火，还是想跟我练练手？
What is it, outsider? Do you fear the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}'s raging flames? Or perhaps you'd care to spar with me?
别和万敌较真，因为他真的不开玩笑。
Avoid getting too serious with Mydei, because he means every word he says.
这倒是句实话，信也无妨。
That is true. Of this, you can be assured.
抱歉，我们的动作还是太慢了。
I'm sorry, we were not quick enough.
为时不晚。交给我们。动身吧，白厄。
It's not too late. Leave it to us. Go, Phainon.
好在无人伤亡。希望万敌只是嘴上说说，他是无可挑剔的战士，但如果铁了心要我行我素…恐怕没人能阻止他，就算是我。

Thankfully, no one was hurt. I hope that Mydei doesn't act on his words. After all, he's an exemplary fighter, if he's dead set on doing things his way... I fear not a soul could prevent it, not even myself.
看不到居民，已经疏散了吗？
I don't see any more residents. Have they been evacuated?
是的。缇宝老师的动作很快。
这里是云石市集，圣城重要的聚居地和生活场所。如果强行突围，一定会造成不必要的损失……
This is Marmoreal Market, the most important residential and living area in the holy city. Pushing through by force would undoubtedly result in needless casualties...
白厄阁下。还有…两位客人。
Lord Phainon. And... the two guests.
听见你的脚步声时，我还以为自己的英雄史诗尚未开启，就要被死神写下「终章」二字了……
When I heard your footsteps, I thought Death was already writing my final chapter before my heroic journey had even begun...
一段史诗如果在开篇就戛然而止，也许会令人惊叹不已。
An abrupt ending to an epic that has barely begun might also amaze the people.
但今天，白厄阁下…奥赫玛需要你。
But today, Lord Phainon... Okhema needs you.
连圣城的「入殓师」都这么说，看来我是能活过这一战了？
Well, if the "mortician" of the holy city says I'm needed, then it sounds like I'm gonna live through this mess.
嗯…这不由我决定，我能做的只是摒除障碍，领你去往{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的降临之所。
Well... that isn't for me to decide. All I can do is clear the obstacles and guide you to the place of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s descent.
两位客人，也请一起来，跟在我身后……
Dear guests, if you would, I'd like you to please follow me...
And kindly keep five paces distance.
遐蝶散发出的阴冷气息令你感到不妙，冥冥之中，似乎有一大片黑暗将要把你吞没……
The chilling aura emanating from Castorice fills you with unease. In the depths of your mind, it feels as though an overwhelming darkness is about to engulf you...
现在不是冒险的时候。也许你该遵从她的建议，保持安全距离。
Now isn't the time to take risks. Maybe you should have followed her advice and kept a safe distance.
血污的气息…你是，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}灰黯之手{RUBY_E#}的指侍？
The scent of blood... Are you an attendant of the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}?
尽可掩饰，逃避。你分明来自，死者的世界。
You can try to avoid and hide it, but you obviously came from the world of the dead.
奥赫玛，黄金裔，一群懦夫。忠诚和荣耀，铸就我们。欺瞒和软弱，捏成你们。
Okhema, Chrysos Heirs — what cowards. We live by loyalty and glory, while you live by weakness and deceit.
幸好你不是我的历史老师，沉沦于疯狂的家伙，说出来的话能有几分可信？
I'm so glad that you're not my history teacher. How much can we trust the words of someone who has sunk so deep into madness?
但如果是忠诚和荣耀驱使你站在这里——那就拔出武器，我会赐你一个战士的结局。
However, if you're standing here out of loyalty and glory, then I shall draw my blade and grant you a warrior's end.
…阿格莱雅大人说过，你的时间十分宝贵，不应被无谓的冲突烦扰。
Lady Aglaea once said that your time is extremely valuable and shouldn't be wasted on unnecessary conflict.
I have the power to lay them to rest.
这也是我想说的，犯不着在这些小卒身上使用你的力量。
I was about to say the same. It's pointless to waste your strength on these pawns.
Let's go. It's time to face Strife.
…你们要化作鸟儿，飞入最后的战场。
...You must turn into birds and fly toward the final battlefield.
遐蝶小姐，不和我们一起吗？
Miss Castorice, why aren't you joining us?
我得留在这里，确保这些士兵不会破坏城市。
I must stay here and ensure that these soldiers do not destroy the city.
虽然信仰对大多数人更重要…但也有许多市民更在意身外之物。
Although faith is more important to the vast majority, there are still quite a number of citizens who care more about their worldly possessions.
请放心，市民已经疏散了，附近的生灵…只有你们三位。
There is no need for worry. The citizens have already been evacuated and the only living things in the vicinity... are the three of you.
不会有人被波及，这也是阿格莱雅大人的指示。
As Lady Aglaea instructed, no civilians will be affected by this.
那就回头再见了，遐蝶小姐。
Well then, I'll see you later, Miss Castorice.
这里交给遐蝶小姐，我们赶紧动身吧。
We'll leave this place to Miss Castorice then. Let's get a move on.
远方就是云石天宫，天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…就在那里。
Marmoreal Palace, the Lance of Fury, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... They're all there, in the distance.
Dan Heng, is that your stomach growling?
骇人的战吼。那就是泰坦？
What a horrifying battle cry. Is that a Titan?
那声战吼曾荡平战场，摧枯拉朽，将我的敌军和战友同时劈倒在地，人们脆弱得就像烈风下的芦苇。
That battle cry once crushed all in its path. It knocked down foes and allies alike, leaving people as fragile as reeds in a gale.
而那时的我，四肢震颤、兵戈脱手，耳边只余狂躁又可耻的心跳……
My limbs trembled uncontrollably as my weapon clattered to the ground. I could hear nothing but the frenzied and shameful beating of my own heart...
恐惧，这就是「纷争」泰坦受人敬仰的原因。若有勇士直面它的恐怖仍能迈出步伐，此后便再无试炼可动摇他手中的武器。
Fear, this is why the Strife Titan is revered. If a warrior can face this terror and still step forward, no trial thereafter can shake the weapon in their hand.
二位，若想退后，这是最后的机会了。
You two, if you wish to retreat, this is your final chance to do so.
没事，我都死过好几回了。
It's fine. I've already died a number of times before.
没事，他都死过好几回了。
It's fine. He's already died a number of times before.
看来两位确实遍历百险。
Looks like the both of you have indeed braved many dangers.
我们对泰坦的洗礼并无兴趣。向陌生的世界施以援手，只是身为「开拓者」的职责。
We have no interest in the Titan rites. As Trailblazers, lending a helping hand to unfamiliar worlds is simply our duty.
「开拓」…有意思。在你们的世界，想必那也是一尊受万人景仰的泰坦吧。
Trailblazing... What an interesting concept. Surely, on your worlds, there must also be a Titan which is revered by the masses?
无需再确认两位的决心了。我们即将与「纷争」的化身兵戎相见，可悬锋恫吓之下，你们的意志反而愈发耀眼。
There's no need to further confirm your resolve. We shall soon cross swords with the embodiment of Strife. And yet, faced against this menacing threat, your resolve only gleams more intensely.
出发吧。在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}尚未沉默的年代，无人能当它的敌手。而今，将由我等接过神明的职责，庇佑翁法罗斯众生——

Let's get going. In the era when {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} had not yet fallen silent, none could stand as their equal. Today, we inherit the duty of the gods, safeguarding the inhabitants of Amphoreus.
Stand with me and become heroes!
奥赫玛的两位新盟友，欢迎来到翁法罗斯。
New allies of Okhema, welcome to Amphoreus.
这场迎宾宴会算不上馨雅，但却帮助我们消除了疑虑。从现在起，你们便是圣城的贵客，黄金裔的上宾。

While this welcome banquet is far from elegant, it has helped to remove any misgivings that we had. From this moment forth, you shall be treated as distinguished guests of the holy city and of the Chrysos Heirs.
Is somewhat unfocused. Could it be that...
好奇这双眼眸吗？我并非双目失明，相反，能看见的远比常人更多。
Curious about my eyesight? Well, I'm not blind. On the contrary, I can see much more than the typical person.
淌着黄金血的人，总有异于凡众之处，在我身上便是「感官」。无需再借由光明丈量世界，风儿会顺着金线为我捎来讯息，将千丝万缕送往指尖。

Those with golden blood always have something extraordinary about them. For me, it's perception. I don't need light to measure the world — the wind carries messages along golden threads, delivering countless sensations to my fingertips.
就像此时此刻，两位的美德化作一股暖流，取悦了我的肌肤。
Just like how at this present moment, the virtues possessed by the both of you have turned into a warm current that pleases my skin.
的确，和星期日不分高下。
Indeed, her manner of speaking is comparable to Sunday's.
都说了我是个{F#暖女}{M#暖男}。
See, I told you that I'm a heartwarming {F#girl}{M#guy} deep down.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的分身……
Could it be that my trial has not arrived yet?
沿着命运的一缕游丝，你落下了开篇的第一笔，感觉如何？
By following the threads of fate, you have begun to write the opening chapter of your story. How do you feel?
实话说，不怎么样，我还以为会更困难些。
Truth be told, I don't feel any different. I anticipated a greater challenge.
缇安老师尾随那些逃亡的士兵去了，这也是计划的一部分吗？
When Trianne followed those escaped soldiers, was that part of the plan too?
自然。我们对这场袭击早有预知，也不打算浪费一个绝好的机会。
Naturally. We have long foreseen this attack and didn't intend to waste such a golden opportunity.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}堕入疯狂后，它的堡垒便消失在了迷雾中，无人知晓其所在。但如今，它一反常态，主动向奥赫玛发起攻势……

After {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} succumbed to madness, their fortress disappeared into the fog, with no one being able to ascertain its location anymore. However, now that they have acted out of character and attacked Okhema of their own accord...
那圣城也将掘出它的藏身之处，吹响反攻的号角。
Then, the holy city shall also uncover their hiding place and sound the horn of retaliation.
