我答应过他们，在时局安定后，要为我们的盟友解答翁法罗斯的一切。
I gave my word that after the situation stabilized, I would reveal all about Amphoreus to our allies.
但奥赫玛刚刚脱离一场劫难，还有许多惊魂未定的民众需要安抚。阿格莱雅，能请你代劳吗？
However, given that Okhema has just barely survived a calamity, and there are still many shaken citizens who need comfort... Aglaea, would you mind taking care of this in my stead?
两位贵客为圣城尽心尽力，我自然会招待好他们。
Distinguished guests, since you have spared no effort in aiding the holy city, I will naturally take care of you as well.
那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。
I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance.
两位，等听烦了故事就来云石市集找我吧。无论如何，我欠你们一次款待。
You two can find me at Marmoreal Market after you've grown tired of listening to her tales. In any case, I owe you my hospitality.
Now then, where should we begin?
这叫安全？！跟缇宝说的完全不一样啊！
You call this safe!? It's not how Tribbie described it at all!
是在重渊遇见的敌人…看来这场袭击也是「纷争」泰坦的手笔。
These are the enemies we met in the Abyss. It seems this attack is also the work of the Strife Titan.
全世之座，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，请结束您长久以来的沉默，给予人类庇护吧……
O {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Throne of Worlds, please end your long silence and grant humanity protection...
解决掉主干道的敌人，剩下的交给圣城卫士，他们都是训练有素的精英。
Eliminate the enemies on the main road and leave the rest to the holy city's guards. They are all trained and experienced elites.
白厄阁下！刻法勒祝福你！
Lord Phainon! May Kephale bless you!
不要妄动，优先保护市民！
Don't be rash! Protect the citizens first!
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，请回应吧……
缇宁大人的预言示现了……
The prophecy of Lady Trinnon has come true...
我诅咒你，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}！
等待阿格莱雅大人的命令！
Don't panic. Retreat according to the plan.
We mustn't cause more trouble for the heroes.
尽是些小打小闹。还不如你我死斗一场，余波就能震碎它们。
Mere child's play. A true fight between us would shatter them with the aftershocks alone.
住口，万敌！你想让圣城毁于一旦吗？
Enough, Mydei. Are you trying to destroy the holy city?
那是你的同伴？似乎不怎么友善。
Is he your companion? You two don't seem to be on friendly terms.
这就是黄金裔，世人眼中的英雄，却也是身负缺陷的凡人。
Well, that's the Chrysos Heirs. Revered as heroes by the masses, but still imperfect mortals at their core.
在死亡面前，纷争也会产生犹疑。我…是「死亡」的影子。
In the face of death, Strife will also cause hesitation to arise. I... am the shadow of death.
嗯…也有只凭气息难以压制的敌人。
Hmm... There are also some enemies who are difficult to subdue by presence alone.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}将死寂作为他骄伉的战鼓，这片水幕之后…就是战场。
Deathly silence is the proud resonance of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s war drums. Behind this watery veil... awaits the arena of conflict.
谁在哭喊？头好疼，要被撕裂了……
Who's wailing? My head feels as though it's being ripped apart...
坚持住！回想你的信仰，珍视的一切——如果做不到，就想象死亡吧，那反而能让你活下来！
Stay strong! Recall your convictions and everything you hold dear... If you can't do that, then think of death, for doing so might actually keep you alive!
小心！它的样子和我记忆中不同。
Careful! They look different from what I remember.
站在我身边，我会抵御它的怒火！
To me! I shall withstand their wrath!
我来熄灭你的火种，泰坦！
I shall extinguish your Coreflame, Titan!
没完没了地爬出来，该如何脱身……
They just keep on coming, how do we break free from this...?
各位！后方已经安全了，请快去避难！
Everyone! The rear is safe, go, take shelter!
No need to fear... No need to cower...
预言中的英雄会扫清命运的阴影，刻法勒的光辉会永远庇护奥赫玛……
The hero from the prophecy will sweep away the shadows of fate, and Kephale's light will always protect Okhema...
It's the smell of the River of Souls...
A death without glory is no...
阿格莱雅女士，可以稍等片刻吗？
Lady Aglaea, could you give us some time?
既然风波已经平息，我们想先完成一项使命：在此地留下「开拓」的信标。
We'd like to get back to our mission now that the situation has calmed down. We want to lay down a beacon of the Trailblaze here.
我向你保证，这不会带来任何负面的后果——请把它当作一种旅程的仪式。
I can assure you that this will not bring any repercussions to Okhema. Think of it as a ceremony when traveling to someplace new.
这样翁法罗斯也有「界域定锚」了——「开拓」的又一大步。
With this Space Anchor on Amphoreus, we've taken yet another giant step on the Path of Trailblaze.
Our boarding passes are appreciating in value!
再来几个，也许就能联系上列车了。
A few more, and maybe we can reconnect with the Express!
...I'm going to assume you meant Akivili.
真是奇妙的启程礼。我对二位的来由越发好奇了。
What an interesting way to mark the start of your journey. I grow more and more curious about your cause.
但此刻，请允许我先尽到主人的礼仪…接下来的对话会有些漫长，两位贵客，我们找个适合聆听的地方。
But, please, let me first properly extend my hospitality to you... The conversation we must have will likely be quite lengthy, so why don't we go somewhere more suitable for that?
This is a good place for our chat.
两位初来乍到，想必对人们口中的泰坦、黄金裔、神谕都满心疑虑。在回答具体的问题前，我想先向二位展现翁法罗斯的历史。

Both of you are new here, so it's only natural to be confused about the prophecy, Titans, and Chrysos Heirs that have been mentioned in passing. But I'd like you to learn about Amphoreus' history before I tell you more.
浴场的精灵正在跃动，这汪灵水是「海洋」泰坦的馈赠，它会带两位回到久远的过去。现在，请浸入浴池，聆听温暖的池水娓娓道来。

The bath sprites are excited to begin. This bath contains spirit water that has been blessed by the Ocean Titan. It can guide you back into the distant past. Go ahead, step in and listen to what the comforting ripples have to say.
Do we really have to get into the water?
请放心，如有必要…我会移开视线。
If it'll make you feel better... I can avert my gaze.
Listen to the bath sprite's tale
沉静…感触远比字句更加真诚，也更善于解惑。闭上双眼，让暖流拥抱你，用肌肤聆听海的故事。

Quiet your thoughts... Feelings are far more honest than words and can better satisfy your curiosity. Close your eyes and feel the warm ripples of water embrace you. Feel the delivery of this account from the seas.
灵水会为你诠释，<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的前世今生。</color>
The spirit water shall show you <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus' distant and recent past</color>.
「好啦！坐好坐好，翁法罗斯的历史课要继续啦！」
"Okie doke, make yourself comfortable~ Time for a history class on Amphoreus!"
"Amphoreus started off as a ball of chaos!"
「然后，三位命运泰坦编织了世界法则；三位支柱泰坦创造了大地、海洋和天空；三位创生泰坦捏造了生命、你、我——」

"The three Fate Titans wrote laws to govern the world, another three Foundation Titans created the earth, ocean, and skies, and a different three Creation Titans designed and gave life to human beings — like you and me."
「——最后，三个坏蛋泰坦降临到世上，引发了恐怖的灾难！」
"But three baddie Titans soon snuck in, bringing a terrible horrible disaster with them!"
「泰坦们就震怒了，谁也不让谁，它们的子民也开始敌视对方、打打杀杀。」
"So, the Titans got angry, and no one was willing to give in. Their followers then decided to do the same, fighting and killing each other."
「这场神战持续了好久好久，给天上地上所有的生灵带去了不幸。直到有一天——发生了一件不得了的大事！」
"Everyone fought for a really, really long time, disturbing and hurting all people living in the world. Until one day — something big happened!"
Yours truly descended upon your world!
「还没到你呢！课堂上禁止抢话！」
"It's not your turn! No interrupting me in class!"
「一道神谕出现了！它突然降临在翁法罗斯——」
"A prophecy appeared on Amphoreus! Something no one saw coming!"
「那三相的神谕说，只有一个办法可以结束这场战争——」
"The tripartite prophecy says there is only one way to stop this war."
「那就是召集一群强大的英雄，强大到能够挑战十二位泰坦，重新点亮它们的「火种」。这样一来，神的愤怒就会平息，世界就能回归和平。」
"Assemble a band of heroes powerful enough to take on the twelve Titans and reignite their Coreflames. Only then will their divine wrath abate, and peace return to the world."
「而这群英雄拥有一个共同的名字，还记得他们叫什么吗？没错——就是<color=#dbc291ff>黄金裔</color>！」
"We know this band of heroes by a certain name~ Any guesses? That's right! <color=#dbc291ff>The Chrysos Heirs</color>!"
「所以，大家明白了嘛？一定要吃饱喝好、坚持锻炼，这样长大后才有可能成为大英雄，为翁法罗斯献出自己的力量——」
"So, here's the takeaway: Eat well and train well, so you can grow up into a powerful hero and do your part for Amphoreus!"
嗯？这次…又发生什么了吗？
它好像把我当成小孩了…
They're treating me like a child...
感觉童话里有点粉饰的成分。
Sounds like they might have glossed over some things.
这样啊…看来你是个很复杂的人呢，有些纯真，又有些敏锐。
Is that so... Looks like you're a bit hard to please. Trusting and perceptive at the same time.
翁法罗斯面临的困境不小啊。
Amphoreus seems to be going through a rough patch.
Rough patch... That's a mild way to put it.
泰坦…黄金裔…我还是不太明白。
I still don't get what's going on with the Titans and Chrysos Heirs...
看来我们习以为常的所有，在你眼中皆是混沌。想要捋顺世界的丝线，也许还得我亲自解答。
I suppose the things that are common knowledge to us are just a garbled mess to you. If we want to straighten out the threads of this world, perhaps I should explain things to you myself.
你们真的对天外一无所知？
Do you really know nothing about what's beyond the sky?
你的问句中夹杂着悲悯。内心深处，你或许已在宣判我们弱小无助。
I seem to hear a note of pity in that question. Perhaps you find us to be weak and defenseless.
So, what do we do now?
二位已经对翁法罗斯的历史有了基本的了解，接下来，我们就进入正题吧。请随我来。
We can move on to the problem at hand, now that both of you have some understanding of Amphoreus' history. Come with me.
自此向上是议院赠予黄金裔的浴池。原本除了我的同袍，他人严禁踏足。
The way up from here leads to a bath that the Council granted exclusively to the Chrysos Heirs. The bath is strictly off limits to anyone other than the Heirs.
二位是来自天外的贵客，我愿为你们破例，但一次携两人前往…还是有违传统。
I'm willing to make an exception, considering you're guests from beyond the sky. But if I were to bring both of you in at once... I'd be blatantly disrespecting our traditions.
这或许就是「英雄的特权」吧。
It's probably more of a "hero's privilege."
看来在奥赫玛，英雄和平民的地位并不对等。
Seems like prophesied heroes and civilians aren't treated equally in Okhema.
不要紧，{NICKNAME}，你先上去吧。我在这里等你。
Why don't you go up with her, {NICKNAME}? I don't mind waiting for you here.
你有一位温润知礼的伙伴。请来吧，贵客。
You have a very considerate partner. Follow me, then.
不要紧，{NICKNAME}，你先上去吧。我在这里等你。
Why don't you go up with her, {NICKNAME}? I don't mind waiting for you here.
请坐吧，{NICKNAME}。找一个舒适的姿态，然后闭上双眼。
Take a seat, {NICKNAME}. Make yourself comfortable, then close your eyes.
Why do I have a bad feeling about this...
这不是强迫，但…人们沐浴水中，本就是为了「坦诚相见」。你愿意相信我吗？
I won't force you, but... people hope to regard one another with bare honesty when they enter a bath. Are you willing to trust me?
…谢谢。然后，请往左侧挪动些，这样会更温暖。
...Thank you. You can also move a little to your left. The water is warmer there.
(Follow her suggestion and move a little to your left.)
你向左侧移动了下身子。真是神奇，仅仅挪动几公分的距离，周身的水流却明显变得更加温暖了。
You move to the left. How wondrous — You've only moved a few centimeters, but the water around you has become distinctly warmer.
「我凭什么相信你呢？」这话第一时间自你的内心萌生。但无论如何，你和丹恒需要跟本地人搞好关系，完成「开拓」之旅。
"Why should I trust you?" That was your immediate response. However, you and Dan Heng need to build good relationships with the locals to complete your trailblazing journey.
「至少现在先配合一下，争取她的信任吧」——你如此说服自己。
"At least cooperate for now and try to earn her trust," you persuade yourself.
你向左侧移动了下身子。真是神奇，仅仅挪动几公分的距离，周身的水流却明显变得更加温暖了。
You move to the left. How wondrous — You've only moved a few centimeters, but the water around you has become distinctly warmer.
现在，请把左手放到桌台上，抬起小臂，手掌向前，五指微微张开……
Now place your left hand onto the bench. Lift your arm up with your palm facing forward, and part your fingers slightly...
呵…我终于明白了，你并非怀疑我，只是想展露自己叛逆的一面。
...I understand now. You do not really distrust me, you just wish to show your rebellious side.
你感到脸颊一热，随即切换了手。
You feel your cheeks warm up and quickly switch hands.
就是这样，很不错。补上迟来的自我介绍吧，我是「金织」阿格莱雅，奥赫玛的改衣师，翁法罗斯的「黄金裔」之一。承蒙同袍信任，我暂时主持着黄金裔的行动。

Yes, you're doing great. Alright, it's about time I formally introduce myself: I am Aglaea the Goldweaver, dressmaster of Okhema and one of the Chrysos Heirs of Amphoreus. The trust placed in me is how I came to lead the Chrysos Heirs in our mission today.
虽说我的本职是织造华服，但私人时间，我最钟爱的却是这座浴场。归根结底，衣物是一种隔阂，掩藏起人的身躯和内心……
My duty may be to weave lavish robes, but I most enjoy coming to these baths in my personal time. Garments are shields after all, hiding both our bodies and what we truly think...
但在这里，我们尽可放下掩饰，流水会拉近你我的距离。
This place though, is where we can drop our cloaks of pretense, for the waters shall bring us closer together.
You can open your eyes now, {NICKNAME}.
Look, we are joined together now.
Wha... Is this some kind of ritual?
You're not wrong to think of it that way.
Wha... Is this some kind of trap?
陷阱？当然不是。请把它当作一种交流的仪式。
Trap? Hardly. Think of it as a ritual that allows us to communicate.
{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的金线缠绕着你我，它能察觉到最细微的动摇，如此一来，我们便不能对彼此撒谎。
The golden threads of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} entwine us, capable of sensing even the slightest quiver. We are bound to speak the truth to each other this way.
接下来，我会告诉你此世的真相。相应的，我需要你回以一个小小的承诺。
You will learn the truth about this world from me, and in return, I ask for you to promise me something.
完成这一步交换，我才能允诺你们在翁法罗斯的旅程一帆风顺。
Fulfill this pact between us, and you can expect your journey on Amphoreus to be free of troubles.
感觉到了吗？金线起了波痕。它告诉我，你对奥赫玛的真诚尚存一丝怀疑，我必须消除这份顾虑。
Did you feel that? The golden threads are rippling. They reveal the distrust you still have for Okhema, and I take it upon myself to dispel these concerns.
方才，浴场精灵为你讲述了翁法罗斯的传说，但它们不愿揭示传说之下的残酷。
You learned the legends of Amphoreus from those bath sprites a while ago, but that was a sanitized version that spared you from the harsh and bitter realities of our history.
——曾经统治世界的泰坦众神，如今已成为腐蚀翁法罗斯的病因。某种<color=#dbc291ff>不可知的力量</color>改变了它们中的多数，招引来愤怒和疯狂。

The pantheon of Titans that once ruled our world has become the very affliction that eats away at Amphoreus. <color=#dbc291ff>An unfathomable power</color> changed something within most of these Titans, inducing their rage and madness.
而今，黑潮席卷全世，大地沉入永夜，唯有奥赫玛在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑下，保有最后一丝光明。

Amphoreus has since fallen into eternal night, the black tide engulfing our world. Okhema is now the only city to still receive light, and we owe it to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection.
集结于此的黄金裔是世人唯一的希望。人们奉我们为英雄、守护者、救世主……
The Chrysos Heirs gathered here are Amphoreus' only hope. People hail us as heroes, as protectors, and as deliverers...
…期盼我们击落众神，夺取火种，将神的权柄从王座上拉下，收敛于人类手中。
...They are counting on us to vanquish the Titans, reclaim their Coreflames, topple them from their thrones, and take their authority for ourselves.
当所有的火种被集齐，创世的奇迹便会显现，破碎的世界将重获新生。
It is only upon reclaiming all Coreflames that the miracle of genesis can reveal itself, granting a new lease on life to this broken world.
这便是翁法罗斯的逐火之旅——「<color=#dbc291ff>一众英雄踏上弑神的旅途，摘得十二枚火种，实现再创世的伟业。</color>」
This is Amphoreus' Flame-Chase Journey — "<color=#dbc291ff>a band of heroes dedicated to slaying the gods and reclaiming the twelve Coreflames for the world to start over anew.</color>"
我们身陷末世，还需指引万千民众行向山顶。奥赫玛亟需更多盟友，成为我们坚实的助力。
With the end times before us, we are expected to lead all of our people toward the summit. Okhema needs as many allies as possible, to aid us in the upcoming battles.
也许，你们就是黄金裔在等待的「援军」。
The two of you may be just the "reinforcements" that the Chrysos Heirs have been waiting for.
You think too highly of us...
可能我将希望放错了地方。但为了翁法罗斯，我愿意一试。
If I'm putting my hopes in the wrong place, so be it. But for Amphoreus, I am willing to take the chance.
拯救世界是我们的专长。
Saving the world is what we do best.
你一定亲身经历过许多奇迹，才能毫无动摇地说出这句话。
You must have been blessed by many miracles to say that with such unwavering confidence.
或许是我有些心急…为了翁法罗斯，我愿意一试。
I may be getting ahead of myself, but for Amphoreus, I am willing to take a chance on you.
我已对你袒露了心声。接下来，只想请你做出一句承诺。
I have laid my heart bare, and in return, I just want you to make a single promise.
请答应我：无论如何，<color=#dbc291ff>不要向市民透露「天外之界」的存在</color>。
Promise me to <color=#dbc291ff>never tell the people of Okhema about the worlds beyond the sky</color>, no matter what may happen.
很好。请见谅，奥赫玛的时间已经不多，我不想给予人们虚假的希望…世人曾被它深深伤害。
I'm glad to hear that. Please understand, Okhema is approaching its end, and I do not wish to give my people false hope... Not when we've been badly scarred by it before.
因为奥赫玛的时间已经不多，我不想给予人们虚假的希望…世人曾被它深深伤害。
Okhema is approaching its end. I do not wish to give my people false hope... Not when we've been badly scarred by it before.
I have to, for the sake of the Trailblaze.
如此一来，约定便完成了。谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. The agreement between us is now complete.
如果这场仪式令你感到不快，我向你致歉。但请理解…我不得不这么做。
I apologize if this ritual upset you, but I hope you understand... I had no other choice.
虽然很想听你说说自己的故事，不过现在…我已占用了你太久时间，丹恒先生似乎有些心急了，他的焦虑扰乱了水流。
As much as I am interested to hear your story, I'm afraid I've already taken up too much of your time... Mr. Dan Heng's worrying has created ripples in the water.
和他一同参观下「圣城」吧，看看人们是如何在困境中谋生的。晚些时候，我会为两位贵客准备好见面礼。
Why don't the both of you tour our "holy city"? See how our people make ends meet in this difficult time. I will have your welcome gifts ready later today.
和丹恒先生一同参观下「圣城」吧，看看人们是如何在困境中谋生的。晚些时候，我会为两位贵客准备好见面礼。
Why don't you and Mr. Dan Heng tour our "holy city"? See how our people make ends meet in this difficult time. I will have your welcome gifts ready later today.
总算回来了，她都和你说了什么？
You're finally back. What did she say to you?
将从阿格莱雅那里获得的信息，以及与她达成的约定转述给了丹恒……
Relay the information obtained from Aglaea and the agreement reached with her to Dan Heng...
没想到她唯一的顾虑，是担心我们向民众散布星际旅行的传闻。这倒和白厄在重渊的反应如出一辙。
Promise not to tell her people about our interstellar voyages... I didn't expect that to be her only concern. Though this is consistent with how Phainon was acting when we were at the Abyss.
这个世界的确有些奇怪。封闭如雅利洛-Ⅵ，当地人也对太空有着基本的认识，甚至知道命途和星神。
Something is definitely off about this world. Even on a planet as isolated as Jarilo-VI, the people still had an understanding of space, and even Paths and Aeons.
但在翁法罗斯，天空更像是…一座监牢，就连谈论天外都成了一种禁忌。明明有着如此先进的技术……
The sky above Amphoreus, though, is more like... a prison. They clearly have advanced technology, so who could imagine that even discussing what's beyond the sky would be taboo?
还记得那团遮蔽世界的混沌物质吗？我总有种预感，翁法罗斯是被人为封锁的。神话中的那些泰坦，也可能和某位星神有所关联。

Do you remember the mass of chaotic matter concealing Amphoreus from the rest of the universe? I can't help thinking that someone is intentionally keeping Amphoreus hidden. Their Titans could also be related to some Aeon.
This is indeed a foggy situation.
I can't stop thinking about your broken spear...
白厄的意思是他会搞定。要是遇见了，就问问他吧。
Phainon promised to fix it. We can ask him about it when we see him.
先照阿格莱雅说的，四下看看吧。我们参与了圣城保卫战，趁着人们的印象分还在，可以向他们了解些信息。
Let's explore the city like Aglaea suggested. We helped defend the place, after all. This is a good chance to fish around for information while they still have a good impression of us.
顺道，也多拍几张照片留作记录。
We can also take some photos for our records.
Excuse me... Do you need help?
你们是？这身奇妙的衣服，还有没听过的口音……
You are...? What strange clothing and accent you have...
喔！你们就是白厄阁下从边疆带来的战士吧？
Oh! Are you the warriors that followed Lord Phainon back from the frontier?
看来白厄也在帮阿格莱雅保守秘密，这是黄金裔的共识。
Looks like Phainon is helping Aglaea keep that secret, too. There must be some kind of understanding among the Chrysos Heirs.
看来白厄也在保守秘密。
Looks like Phainon is helping Aglaea keep that secret, too.
嗯，这大概是黄金裔的共识。
Yes, there must be some kind of understanding among the Chrysos Heirs.
比起这个，沟通之谜才是更大的问题。
That's nowhere near as puzzling as how we have a common tongue.
太好了…听说两位身手不凡，和黄金裔一样神通广大，能请你们帮个忙，把这根石柱复原吗？
Thank goodness... I hear you're both exceptional warriors as masterful as the Chrysos Heirs. Could you help us restore this column here?
这倒霉日子，又是被{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的喽啰入侵，又是被倒下的石柱挡在家门口…真是没法过了。
Nothing has been going right these days. First those minions of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} attack, and now this column collapses right outside our home... Can we really keep going?
复原？只靠人力，这得修上两三天吧。
Restore it...? With just human effort, that's going to take a couple of days, at least.
Not with human effort, of course, silly!
缇宝大人！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}在上，这样就不用劳烦二位英雄了。
High Priest Tribbie! O {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} on high, our prayers are heard! We won't need to trouble you any further, kind warriors.
原来如此，他以为我们也会召唤「神迹」。
Oh... He thought we could summon miracles.
之前是有种奇怪的感觉…
I did feel something strange in me...
咦，你是说刚到奥赫玛那会儿吗？这么一说，*我们*当时也觉得有点奇怪。
Eh? When we all arrived in Okhema? Come to think of it, we felt something a bit odd, too.
翻越雅努斯的万千门径…
Surmount the myriad passages of Janus...
咦，你怎么也念上啦？说起来，刚到奥赫玛那会儿，你是不是也这么做了？
Eh? You can recite this, too? Wait, did you also chant this when we arrived in Okhema?
莫非，你也有学习<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯祷言</color>的资质？
Maybe... you also have the ability to learn <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx's prayers</color>, too?
完全不哦！祭司可是很常见的，只是天赋有高有低。
Not at all! We have lots of priests here, but some are more gifted than others.
这样吧，不如两位也来尝试一下——让缇宝老师来看看你们悟性如何！
Why don't you both try chanting? Tribbie will see if you get it!
哇…{NICKNAME}真是天赋异禀，一教就会！
Wow... {NICKNAME} got it on the first try! You're a natural!
奇迹…活生生的奇迹！传出去，快把这故事讲给那吟游诗人听：边疆的英雄来到奥赫玛，在此建立起丰功伟业……
A miracle... A miracle fresh from the oven! Go, bring word to the bard: Frontier heroes grace Okhema, feats abound right here...
They also teach journalism here in Amphoreus?
I don't seem to be cut out for this.
没关系，这也是常有的事，说明你更适合当一名战士。
That's okay, there are many others like you. It just means you're meant to be a warrior!
说起来，你们和阿雅聊过了吧，感觉如何？
Ooh, you met Agy, right? How did your chat go?
我已经摸清了你们的底细…
I now know all there is to know about you...
Alrighty, as long as things are going well!
认真地讲，*我们*都觉得两位降临在…咳咳，来到奥赫玛绝非偶然。上手就能和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}共鸣的祭司，缇宝老师也是第一次见。
You know, we are pretty certain there's more to your sudden... arrival to Okhema. And Tribbie has never seen a priest achieve resonance with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} on their first try.
学会了它，你们在翁法罗斯就能畅行无阻啦。嗯，基本上吧。
But with this, you should be able to clear any obstacle when traveling around Amphoreus... Um, most of the time, at least.
啊对了，差点忘记正事…*我们*来找两位，是想确认你们有没有<color=#dbc291ff>传信石版</color>。没了它，在奥赫玛可是寸步难行。
Oh, right... We came by to check if you have teleslates with you. It'll be a lot easier to get around Okhema with them.
(pull out your phone) You mean this device?
就是它！果然，天外…两位的城邦也有雅努萨波利斯的祭司嘛！
Yeah! We knew it, there are also Janusopolis priests beyond the sk — um, beyond Okhema... like the city you're from!
让我看看…外形不太一样，但功能倒是差不多，也许能通过共鸣…嗯……
Let's see... This looks different, but it works more or less the same. Hmm, maybe a little resonance will do the trick...
大功告成！以后*我们*就能通过石版联络对方啦。不过仅限于奥赫玛城中哦，离开了阿雅编织的金线，传信就不起效果了。
All set! Now we can contact one another with our teleslates. Only in Okhema though. Messages won't send once you're outside Agy's web of golden threads.
嘿嘿，你该不会把*我们*当成什么都不懂的原始人了吧？
Hah, did you think we were some backwater people who don't understand anything?
两位也可随意使用自己带来的货币，{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的天秤会衡量万物的价值，不用担心身无分文，没法在圣城生活。
You can also use any currency you have on you. {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton's{RUBY_E#} scales will determine the value of all items, so there's no need to worry about being penniless in the holy city!
Won't that mess up the economy?
别担心，就你们二位不会有什么影响。但如果元老会的议员问起…还是要替*我们*保密哦！
Not if it's just the two of you. But if any of the Council Elders happen to ask... it's our little secret~!
Oh, so we have to pay for our own food and accommodation...
哦？原来你一直是这么打算的啊…
Titans are really capable of anything...
那我先去处理别的事啦。回头见哦，祝你们玩得开心。
Okay, time to get back to work. Have fun exploring the city! We'll see you two later!
...The list of inexplicable things only gets longer.
那儿的视角似乎不错，能拍到整个城区。我们也找路上去吧。
That should be a good vantage point to photograph the city. Let's find a way up.
视野极佳，还能望见那尊泰坦，把这一幕记录下来吧。
An excellent lookout over the city. We can even see that Titan statue. Let's get a photo of this view.
What are you two doing up here?
二位是守护了圣城的英雄吧，我达米亚诺斯看见了你们英勇的身影。
I know you. You're the heroes who helped defend our city, right? I, Damionis, saw your valiant figures in the battle.
你好。我们是…来自远方城邦的士兵。
Nice to meet you. We're... soldiers from a faraway city.
我们初来奥赫玛，希望能留下些纪念，所以来到视野宽阔的地方…嗯，制作…不对，捕捉？总之，想留住这片风景。
It's our first time in Okhema, so we thought we'd find a nice vantage point to... uh, create...? No, capture...? I mean, to remember this city and its sights by.
Oh... You mean to say "take a photo," don't you?
(Try hard to hold back your laughter)
Ahem, yes. I meant to say that.
哈哈！那二位算是找对人了，不才达米亚诺斯，对旅行和留影颇有研究——毕竟我的身份，就是圣城家喻户晓的探险家！
Aha! You met the right person! The name's Damionis, and I may have some humble insight on travel and photography... After all, everyone in this holy city knows me as the explorer!
来，把你们的<color=#dbc291ff>留影石机</color>交给我吧。
…我也不想再推敲他们给事物命名的规律了。
...I'm not even going to bother guessing their logic for naming things.
你将三月七的照相机交给了达米亚诺斯……
You give March 7th's camera to Damionis...
喔，是没见过的机型，但难不倒我。是这里吧？还有这里…哈！轻轻松松，我已经完全理解了……
Oh, this is an entirely foreign make. But that's not going to stop me! I'm guessing this here... and that... Hah! Easy-peasy, I know how to use this now.
What is it? Cat got your tongue?
Didn't you say you knew how to use it?
…没事！来吧两位，请站好，然后看向我！
...It's no biggie! Okay, strike your poses and look this way!
And... we're done! Here, have a look!
A greater aperture and a shallower depth of field would work better.
Can you also apply some filters?
Heh, as long as you're happy with the photos.
话说回来，其实我有件事想请教二位英雄，没想到正巧遇上，那我可直接问了……
Say, I've been wanting to ask you guys something. I didn't think I'd actually get the chance but...
你们，其实不是从异邦来的吧？
You're... You're not really from another city, are you?
I don't think I understand your question.
小道消息已经传开了，有刚进城的难民说——你们是来自「天外」的人，是白厄阁下在路边捡到的。
I've heard some things here and there. Refugees that just came into the city are saying that the people Lord Phainon picked up are from beyond the sky.
Pfft, did he really pick us up?
恐怕要让你失望了，先生，谣言只是谣言。
Sorry to disappoint you, sir. I'm afraid those rumors are just rumors.
我们来自「塔拉萨波利斯」，一个人烟稀少的边陲村落。为前来圣城，我们经历了重重险阻，有幸在重渊与白厄阁下结识，才抵达这里。

We're from Thalassopolis, a sparsely populated frontier village. Our journey to the holy city was fraught with challenges but thankfully, we were able to make our way here after meeting Phainon at the Abyss.
唉，这样啊…我还以为终于能证明「天外之界」的存在了呢。
Oh, is that so... I... I'd thought that I had finally found proof that a world beyond the sky exists.
哈哈，无妨！无论如何，感谢你们出手相助，塔拉萨波利斯的战士。
Haha, it doesn't matter! At any rate, thanks for your help, warriors of Thalassopolis.
That was close, but I have a bad feeling about this.
That was a good story, Dan Heng.
I don't think that we managed to fool him.
I don't think that we managed to fool him...
毕竟「塔拉萨波利斯」只是我临场编造的，如果他真是探险家，又对翁法罗斯的地理了如指掌，恐怕我们早就被看穿了。
After all, Thalassopolis was something I came up with on the fly. If he's truly an explorer familiar with the geography of Amphoreus, I'm afraid that he'll have already seen through our lies.
所幸没留下什么证据。不过…就算星空在翁法罗斯是一种禁忌，果然还是会有人对它报以憧憬。
Fortunately, there's no evidence. But... seems like even though the starry sky is taboo on Amphoreus, there are people who still yearn for it.
Looks like we have to be even more cautious.
…昔日的影子，你还没有走出。黄金裔。
...Out of the shadow of the past, you've not stepped, Chrysos Heir.
火种之重，若想承受…必须埋葬过去，悬置痛苦。
The weight of the Coreflame, if you wish to bear... You must bury the past, suspend the pain.
我尽力吧，哈托努斯。你明知我做不到，又何必一直提它呢？
I'll try my best, Chartonus. But why keep mentioning it if you already know I can't do it?
{NICKNAME}，丹恒！回来得比想象中快嘛，还以为阿格莱雅会多留你们一会儿。
{NICKNAME}, Dan Heng! You're back much quicker than I imagined. I thought that Aglaea would keep you for a bit longer.
给，先前说好的「赔偿」。我委托圣城最负盛名的大工匠修好了你的长枪。
Here you go. This is the compensation I previously mentioned. I asked the most famous Grand Craftsman in the holy city to repair your spear.
初次见面时有所冒犯，再次向两位致歉。
Once again, let me offer my sincere apologies for any offense I caused during our first meeting.
单从外表完全看不出损坏过的痕迹，厉害。
Judging solely from its exterior, I cannot see any signs of damage. It's truly incredible.
造出这柄枪的人也是位赫赫有名的工匠吧，天外有天，我完全无法想象一个翁法罗斯之外的世界。
The one who crafted this spear must also be a renowned master. I guess there's always someone greater out there. Although I still can't imagine a world outside Amphoreus.
…也不尽然，或许只是在遇见你们之前，我从来没有认真考虑过这事。
...Or perhaps I've just never given it much thought until I met you two.
降临在翁法罗斯的「三相神谕」，还有黄金裔肩负的使命，你们应该已经听说了吧。对于我们，追逐预言就是旅途的目的，思忖太多并无意义。

You've probably now heard about the tripartite prophecy that descended upon Amphoreus and the mission of the Chrysos Heirs. For us, pursuing the prophecy is the purpose of our journey. Therefore, thinking too much about other things is unnecessary.
And who was it exactly that issued the prophecy?
神谕之所以是神谕，正因它是以「奇迹」的形式降临。无人知晓它究竟代表了谁的意志。
It's considered a prophecy because it manifested as a miracle, though its origin or whose will it represents remains unknown.
也有一种说法，它是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}长眠前的低吟，是天父将自己的神血洒向大地，从此，世间开始诞生黄金裔…当然，这只是诸多民间传说中的一种。

There's another theory that it is the whispers of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} before their eternal slumber. It was the sky father who scattered their divine blood all over the land that gave rise to the Chrysos Heirs... Of course, this is just one of many popular folktales.
请别把它当成不可理喻的迷信，世人都经历了从怀疑到笃信的转变，而且那转变来得并不容易，许多人都为之付出了代价。

Please don't simply dismiss it as silly superstition. The people of this world have already experienced the transition from skepticism to firm belief, and this transition wasn't easy to achieve. Many have paid the price.
阿格莱雅传达给我们的，更多是一种集体的使命。但你作为个人，白厄，又在其中扮演了什么角色？
What Aglaea conveyed to us was more of a collective mission. As an individual, what role do you play in all of this, Phainon?
我吗？我还在寻找那个答案。
Me? I'm still seeking that answer myself.
但如果诸神眷顾，<color=#dbc291ff>属于我的火种</color>应该已经不远了。
But if the gods favor me, I believe that <color=#dbc291ff>my Coreflame</color> won't be far.
是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}。
我是一名士兵，从小就被教导如何战斗。从被预言选中的那一天起，我便把{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}视作自己的终点。
I'm a soldier who was taught how to fight at a young age. From the day I was selected by the prophecy, I've regarded {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}the Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} as my goal.
总有一天，我会折断它的长矛，摘下「纷争」的火种。
One day, I'll break the lance and take the Coreflame of Strife.
…不过，一直讨论这么苦大仇深的话题也属实扫兴。好像还是我起的头，真难为情。
...But discussing such a bitter topic is a bummer. I'm embarrassed since I think I'm the one who brought it up.
对了，缇宝老师说你们也用石版，不如咱们交换个联络符吧？还有这些谢礼，也请一并收下。
Oh right, Tribbie mentioned that you two also use teleslates. Why don't we exchange contacts? Please also accept these gifts as a token of my appreciation.
趁着天色正好，两位不如多走走看看吧。不打扰你们，回头见了。
Since the weather is great, why don't you two look around some more? I won't take up more of your time. See you later.
你的枪，并不严重，损伤。已经完成了，修复。
Your spear, not too serious, the damage. Has been completed, the repair.
Ah... It's our two distinguished guests.
欢迎来到大地兽的居所…虽然这么说，但我也只是刚好路过。
Welcome to the dwelling of the dromases... Well, I'm also just passing by.
The air here isn't too fresh...
会吗？我觉得很甜蜜…是生命的香气。
Really? I find it rather sweet... It's the fragrance of life.
嗯。我喜欢这里的气息。很甜蜜…有生命的香气。
Yes. I enjoy the air here. It's rather sweet... Full of the fragrance of life.
说起来，遐蝶小姐也是黄金裔吗？
Speaking of which, is Miss Castorice also a Chrysos Heir?
…抱歉，如果你不想聊这个话题，我会就此打住。
...My apologies. If you don't wish to talk about this topic, I'll stop myself here.
Should I show off my dance moves?
...No, thank you. Unless you wish to make things worse.
(point at the dromas) Let's liven up the atmosphere!
…它好像听懂了，只是懒得理你。
...It seems to have understood you, but it's choosing to ignore you.
呀，看来这孩子有些饿了。
两位来得正巧，要试试给大地兽喂食吗？
Since you are here, do you two want to try feeding the dromases?
初次喂食，只拿一小块就好。
Since it's your first time feeding, just a small piece will do.
当然可以。但味道很苦，也不容易消化。
Of course, but it's very bitter and hard to digest.
…她认真的语气当场打消了你狂野的点子。
...Her serious tone immediately quashes your wild idea.
你轻轻地从容器中拿起一块红土，大地兽用殷切的眼神观察着你的一举一动…可别搞砸了。
You gently pick up a piece of red clay from the container, while the dromas watches your every move intently... Don't mess it up.
大地兽发出迟缓但愉悦的叫声，显然，它在期待着你这位新人饲养员的表现。
The dromas lets out a slow but joyful sound, clearly anticipating your performance as its new caretaker.
要让它如此轻易就得到想要的东西吗？还是……
Should it get what it wants so easily, or...?
将红土饲料喂给大地兽。
Offer the redsoil feed to the dromas.
当着大地兽的面吃掉饲料。
Eat the feed in front of the dromas.
你直勾勾地盯着手中的红色土块，然后又抬头确认了一下大地兽的眼神。
You stare intently at the red clay in your hand, then look up to check the dromas' expression.
你看到了疑惑…犹豫…好像还有一丝隐匿的挑衅。大家伙俯视着你，仿佛在说：「你有胆吗，小家伙？」
You see confusion... hesitation... and perhaps a hint of hidden defiance. The big guy looks down at you, as if to say, "Do you have the guts, little one?"
你从小到大——虽然也算不上多久的时间——还从来没有被一只动物看扁过。现在，恐怕只有一个办法可以保住你的尊严……
You've never been underestimated by an animal in your life — though your life hasn't been that long. Now, there's probably only one way to save your dignity...
你一口咬掉了红色立方体的一角。在你身边，亲眼目睹这一幕发生的两名观众发出了难以置信的声音。
You take a bite from the red cube. Next to you, the two spectators who witness this gasp in disbelief.
遐蝶没有骗你，这红土块的味道确实相当…苦涩。这种苦涩不同于任何烈性药物，它直击你心灵的绵软之处，令你开始质疑「开拓」的意义。

Castorice wasn't lying. The taste of this red clay is truly... bitter. It's a bitterness unlike any medicine. It strikes the softest part of your soul, making you question the very meaning of "Trailblazing."
出乎你的意料，它并不坚硬，但这未必是一件好事——咀嚼了几下之后，带有粘性的红土碎末全都糊在了你的牙齿上，无论如何用舌头搜刮都无法将它清理干净。

Surprisingly, it isn't hard, but that's not necessarily a good thing. After chewing it a few times, the sticky flecks of redsoil stain your teeth. No matter how you use your tongue, you can't get rid of it.
你将净水含在口中，奋力洗刷口腔内残留的黏土，但这份苦涩却难以被轻易冲漱……
You hold the clean water in your mouth, trying hard to rinse away the remaining clay, but the bitterness lingers stubbornly...
大地兽发出了嘲弄的叫声。这下你不仅收获了它的嘲笑，而且还得继续担起投喂它的职责……
The dromas lets out a mocking cry. Now, you've not only earned its ridicule, but also the ongoing duty of feeding it...
看来发生了些意外呢。没关系，饲料还有很多…再去拿一块吧。
That was a little unexpected. Don't worry. There's a lot more feed over there. Just go get another piece.
Offer the feed to Dan Heng.
该死，他什么时候学会的读心术？
Darn it, when did he learn to read minds?
眼前的大家伙发出了满意的叫声。
The big guy in front lets out a satisfied sound.
你不知道它是如何嚼碎并消化这些土块的——但在它们眼里，这些硬邦邦的红土一定和刚刚煎好的、滋滋冒油的肉排一样鲜美。
You don't know how it chews and digests these clumps of clay — but to them, these hard red clays must be as delicious as a freshly sizzling steak.
它好像很开心。或许…你可以试着摸摸它？
It looks very happy. Perhaps... you could try petting it?
Gently pat it on the head.
Rub its neck with some strength.
看来它很喜欢这样。你和大地兽很投缘呢。
It seems to enjoy it a lot. You get along very well with the dromas.
Don't you want to try petting it as well?
我吗？我就不必了，没关系……
遐蝶小姐是有什么顾虑么？我们初来乍到，希望能用实际行动拉近与各位的距离。
Miss Castorice, are you concerned about something? Since we've just arrived in this area, we hope to build closer relationships with everyone through our actions.
两位误会了。你们出手帮助奥赫玛，已经充分表达了善意。我只是……
Please don't misunderstand. When you helped Okhema, you already showed ample goodwill. It's just that I...
…不怎么擅长「接触」而已。无论是和人，还是和这些孩子。
...am not too good with social "contact." Regardless of whether it's with people or with these children.
So, please don't take it to heart.
…好。{NICKNAME}，也拍张大地兽的照片吧。这种神奇的生物别处不多见。
...Alright. {NICKNAME}, take a photo of the dromas as well. It's rare to encounter such an amazing creature.
两位是想和这孩子合影吗？那样的话，我或许能帮上忙。
Would you two like a photo with this child? In that case, I might be able to help.
Yes, it is an interest of mine.
You don't have to force yourself.
不是勉强。留影算是我的兴趣。
That's not it. Photography is an interest of mine.
Alright then. Thanks for your help.
不麻烦。请把留影石机放在地上。
No problem. Please place the photostone on the ground.
Can't I just hand it to you?
你将三月七的相机放在了地上，遐蝶弯腰将它拾起……
You put March 7th's camera on the ground, and Castorice bends down to pick it up...
很漂亮的颜色呢，感觉…非常可爱。
What beautiful colors. It's... very cute.
光圈、感光度、还有预设的滤镜…虽然外观不同，但实际构造是一样的。没问题。
The aperture, exposure index, and preset filter... Although it looks different on the outside, it actually has the same internal structure. There won't be any issues.
这样就好啦。希望二位喜欢。
And we're done. I hope that you like it.
遐蝶轻轻地把相机放在地上，你俯身将其捡起。
Castorice gently places the camera on the ground, and you bend down to pick it up.
这…你太谦虚了，遐蝶小姐。简直无可挑剔。
This... You're too humble, Miss Castorice. It's perfect.
This is the difference between hobbyists and professionals...
March is probably the only one on the same level...
…只是，用黑白滤镜是有什么考量吗？
...But, what's the reason behind using the black and white filter?
啊…抱歉，只是个人爱好，我喜欢黑白的照片。如果两位介意，我再重拍一张。
Ah... My apologies, it's just personal preference. I like black and white photos. If it bothers you, I can take another photo.
That won't be necessary. This is fine.
I'm glad that I could help.
那我先失陪了。两位请继续和大地兽玩耍吧。
Then, I'll take my leave now. Please continue playing with the dromases.
该说是寡言少语吗？也不对，只是有些捉摸不透。
You could say she's not very talkative? No, that's not it, she's just a little elusive.
该说是寡言少语吗？也不对，只是有些捉摸不透。
You could say she's not very talkative? No, that's not it, she's just a little elusive.
「剧本」里还安排了摄影师平替？
There's even a stand-in photographer in the "script"?
…这话听着像星核猎手的台词。
...Why are you speaking like a Stellaron Hunter all of a sudden?
那位遐蝶小姐，该说是寡言少语吗？也不对，只是有些捉摸不透。
You could say Miss Castorice is not very talkative? No, that's not it, she's just a little elusive.
先前遇见时也是，她似乎很避讳和人产生肢体接触……
Even when we came across her previously, she avoided having physical contact with others...
这些黄金裔个个都性格迥异，相较之下，白厄大抵是最正常的那个了。
These Chrysos Heirs all have wildly different personalities. In comparison, Phainon seems like the most normal one.
要回云石天宫么？还是在下边多逛一会儿，你来决定吧。
Should we return to Marmoreal Palace? Or do you want to wander around for a bit more?
壁画以简约而细腻的雕工记载了{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}创生、奥赫玛建城的故事。
The murals record in simple and delicate carvings the stories of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} creating life and building Okhema.
在壁画中，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}背负着庞大的黎明机器，它的身上流着金色的神血，自左胸一直垂落至大地，向四面八方淌去。

In the murals, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} bears the enormous Dawn Device on their back. Golden divine blood courses across their body, flowing to the ground from the left-hand side of their chest and spreading in all directions.
在它的脚下，沐浴金血的人类们合力修建起一座宏伟的城邦。这就是奥赫玛，翁法罗斯文明的发源地。
At their feet, the humans bathed in the golden blood work together to create a great city. This city is Okhema, the origin of Amphoreus civilization.
…昼与夜的争忿，诞出全知巨人。双足丈量世界，背脊担负晨昏。
...The strife of day and night birthed the all-knowing giant. Their feet measure the earth and their back carries the dawn and dusk.
它以夜作帷，一路长梦至醒，方知：我之无缺啊，是为创生而生。
With the night as their curtain, they dreamt until they awoke. Only then did they realize: My perfection was born for creation.
以新土抟我形貌，以硕果赋予智慧。以蝶翎点亮情思，以金血浇铸命运。
Craft my likeness with fresh earth, and grant my intellect with your fruits. Illuminate my emotions with the wings of a butterfly and forge my fate with golden blood.
完美的神造出最初之人，最初之人砌成最初之城。
The perfect gods created the very first humans, and the first humans created the first city.
奥赫玛唷！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}全世之座{RUBY_E#}足下，金血溯流之始。
Okhema! Standing at the foot of the {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Throne of Worlds{RUBY_E#}, your golden blood can be traced back to the very beginning.
纵然黑潮淹没旧土，圣城终能渡往新世……
Though the black tide devours the ancient lands, the holy city will cross over to a new world...
老人家，您这东西是新的！而且是纯新，毫无争议的新。
Ma'am, this item of yours is new! Completely new! There's no doubt about it.
不、不可能！这可是我祖上传下来的宝贝…西塔罗斯呢？让他来给我看看！
T—That's impossible! This is an heirloom that's been passed down by my ancestors... Where's Theodoros? Get him over here to take a look!
哎，我做古宝鉴定的经验虽然远不及先生，但这点自信还是有的。您要是信不过我，可以再拿它去别家看看。
Although I'm not as experienced at doing appraisals as he is, I'm very confident about this. If you don't trust me, you can take it elsewhere for a second opinion.
或者，我可以现场给您烧一下——您只要闻着味道就能分辨出来了！
Or, I can burn it for you? You'll be able to tell once you smell it!
不，不行！不许烧我的传家宝贝！
N—No way! You can't burn my family heirloom!
没想到白厄还有这种爱好……
I never thought that Phainon had such a hobby...
他遇到的人好像很难缠，还是先别打扰了。
He seems to be dealing with someone difficult right now. Let's leave him to it.
他遇到的人好像很难缠，还是先别打扰了。
He seems to be dealing with someone difficult right now. Let's leave him to it.
就是那个——<color=#dbc291ff>「粉霞天女」</color>——热烈程度还在一路飙升呢！我看你不在里边，先进来吧，不然人要坐满了。
The one about the <color=#dbc291ff>Rosy Celestial Maiden</color>. Its getting more popular by the minute! I don't see you in there yet. Hurry up! It's filling up quickly.
I'm starting to get a little curious too.
总有种微妙的预感，不会是我想的那样吧…过去看一眼。
I have a strange feeling about this. I hope that it's not what I think it is... Let's go take a look.
两位，打扰了。我们不是故意偷听，但你们方才提到的辩论场…我们也想了解一下。
Excuse me, we accidentally overheard something about a forum just now... We would like to find out more.
嗯？你们这身打扮，到底是……
我们是异邦来的战士，此前参与了奥赫玛保卫战。
We're warriors from a foreign land who assisted in the defense of Okhema.
原来是两位勇士，失敬失敬！没想到你们也会对社会逸闻感兴趣，当然没问题。
Ah, brave warriors, pardon me! I didn't expect you to be interested in such social affairs, but sure thing.
请两位拿出石版，我来教你们连入奥赫玛的<color=#dbc291ff>万帷网</color>。
Please take out your teleslate. I'll help you connect to Okhema's <color=#dbc291ff>World Wound Web</color>.
Oh, it's actually an online discussion forum!
Got it! Please take a look!
那个给我们拍照的达米亚诺斯…一定是他。他当时点开了相册，看见了三月七以前拍的照片。
That Damionis guy who took a photo for us... It must be him! He must have opened the album and saw the photos that March 7th previously took.
March 7th has now become a celestial maiden.
会场里有一百多个人，虽然目前没人相信达米亚诺斯，但我们不知道他接下来会做什么。一旦事情失去控制，后果难以想象。

There are more than a hundred people in here. Although no one believes what Damionis is saying now, we don't know what he'll do next. If the situation gets out of control, the consequences might be disastrous.
I hope that the Chrysos Heirs are too busy to surf the web.
社交平台，人类最大的敌人…
快！在事态发酵前，必须找到本人。
Quick! We have to find Damionis before things get worse.
粉霞天女，喔…你是来自天上的恩赐，太阳的女儿~
Oh, Rosy Celestial Maiden... You truly are a gift from the heavens, a daughter of the sun!
{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}也无法囚禁你。你会温柔地凿开天空吗？只为把我们带离这黑暗长夜……
Even {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} cannot restrain you. Will you gently carve open the sky? If only to lead us out of this long dark night...
谁？不，我不在乎什么达米亚诺斯。现在……
Who? No. I do not care about any Damionis. Right now...
…我心里只有美丽的幻想和诗歌！喔，粉霞天女，奥赫玛的明光……
...I only have beautiful fantasies and poems in my heart! Oh, Rosy Celestial Maiden, the light of Okhema...
粉霞天女，只从这字里行间，我便能想象你的美貌！你定然是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的化身，令我深陷池沼，难以自拔……

Rosy Celestial Maiden, just from this name alone am I able to imagine your beauty! You must be the incarnation of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}. You cause me to sink deeper and deeper, unable to get a hold of myself...
美丽的天女，我该如何才能赢得你的芳心？
Oh, beautiful celestial maiden, how can I ever win your affection?
零食，毛绒玩具，可爱的衣服。
With snacks, plushies, and cute clothes.
... Is March 7th really that simple in your eyes?
打咩阿斯？阿米诺斯？不，我不知道你在说什么，朋友……
Dameas? Aminos? No, I don't know what you're talking about, friend...
现在，我心中只有粉霞天女！
Right now, I only have the Rosy Celestial Maiden in my heart!
不知道他喝了什么，该有人来劝劝他了。
Wonder what he drank. Someone should come calm him down.
诸位公民，请停止传播来历不明的形象！
Dear citizens, please stop spreading images of unknown origins!
你们还未清醒吗？粉霞天女是被编造的谎言，是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的恶作剧。我们应当追随阿格莱雅女士的领导，而非沉浸在消磨意志的幻想里……

Please wake up! The Rosy Celestial Maiden is a lie crafted by {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} as a prank. We should follow the lead of Lady Aglaea and not subject ourselves to such mind-numbing fantasies...
达米亚诺斯？那个自命不凡的探险家？
Damionis? That explorer who thinks very highly of himself?
我听过这个名字，但从未见过其人。只听他人评价，他必定是个十足的疯——
I've heard of him but have never met him in person. Others have said that he's completely crazy—
<size=28>Rosy Celestial Maiden! A world beyond the sky!</size>
Citizen! Calm down. Don't do anything foolish!
这里可是生命花园，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}「裂分之枝」{RUBY_E#}的圣地！你要亵渎神明吗？
This is the Garden of Life, the holy ground of the {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Bough of Rift{RUBY_E#}! Are you trying to defile the gods?
亵渎？你们大错特错！睿智的{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}会为我感到骄傲的，看着吧！
Defile the gods? No, you guys are completely wrong! The wise {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} will be proud of me. Just watch!
他到底想干嘛？我们走近些看看。
What is he trying to do? Let's get closer and take a look.
{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}承诺的智慧理应平等地属于每一个人。
The wisdom of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} should be shared equally by all.
我，探险家达米亚诺斯，今天便要插上羽翼，触摸天空——向所有人证明天外之界的存在！
I, Explorer Damionis, shall put on these wings today and touch the sky — proving to everyone that a world beyond the sky exists!
That's right — right here, right now!
这就是个大号的「飞天坛递」，你是在自寻死路！
That is a giant Flying Amphora. You're going to fall to your death!
呵，尽情释放你们的讥讽吧。我会以实践为盾，折断你们质疑的矛！
Heh, ridicule me all you want. I shall prove myself and remove all doubts!
I think he's going to die.
Do you think he will succeed?
We can't stand by and watch him die. Let's go.
二位是…阿格莱雅大人的贵客？
You two are... the distinguished guests of Lady Aglaea?
达米亚诺斯先生，请你冷静下来，不要冲动。
Mr. Damionis, please calm down. Don't act rashly.
…两位朋友，你们不愿透露实情，背后一定有自己的苦衷，我不会刁难。
...My dear friends, I know that you must have your own reasons to hide the truth. I shall not make things difficult for you.
但谢谢你们，为我展示了天外的画卷。此刻，我就要去完成这项震古烁今的伟大事业——达米亚诺斯决不食言！
But thank you for showing me the image from beyond the sky. Now, I shall embark on this earthshaking undertaking — Damionis always follows through on his words!
We believe you, we really do!
省去挽留的言辞吧，我去意已决。
Save your words of persuasion. I've made up my mind.
安抚不起作用，必须换个策略谈判了。
Since appeasing him did not work, it's time for a change in strategy.
哈哈，语气出卖了你，朋友！我明白，你想用尽一切办法挽留我——
Haha, my friend, your tone has betrayed you! I understand that you're trying to persuade me to stay...
哈哈，想激怒我，用情绪淹没使命？可惜我看穿了你的用意，你想用尽一切办法挽留我——
Haha, trying to enrage me in hopes that my emotions will overwhelm my mission? It's... It's a pity that I've seen through your intentions. You're... You're trying to persuade me to stay...
既聪明又愚蠢，形容的就是这种人吧？
A clever fool. That's how to describe people like him, right?
我都快被他的执着打动了……
I'm almost moved by his persistence...
不必再多费口舌了——{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}，接下我的怒火吧！
Save your words. {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}, feel my wrath!
Dan Heng, what should we do!?
这是一条生命！没办法了，告诉他吧……
It's a human life after all! There's no choice. Let's just tell him...
A world beyond the sky really exists!
所以…我是对的？你们真的…来自天外？
So... I was right? You really are from... beyond the sky?
…我们有约定在身，不能向你道出真相。
...We are bound by a pact. I cannot reveal the truth to you.
约定？啊，怪不得他叫你们「阿格莱雅的贵客」……
A pact? Ah, so that's why he called you "distinguished guests of Aglaea"...
——达米亚诺斯！跟我们回去接受审讯吧！
Damionis! We're taking you in for an interrogation!
This is not going to go well.
他知道了不该知道的事，只能交由阿格莱雅大人裁断了。
He learned something that he should never have learned. We can only hand him over to Lady Aglaea for judgment.
比起他的安危，二位还是先考虑下流言的影响吧。虽然没人相信达米亚诺斯口中的天外之界，但粉霞天女已经传得到处都是了。

Instead of worrying about his safety, perhaps you guys should worry about the impact of the rumors. Although no one believes what Damionis said about a world beyond the sky, the Rosy Celestial Maiden has already spread everywhere.
...We're sorry for the trouble that we caused.
没关系，眼下只有一个办法：你们可以去找<color=#dbc291ff>真言狮口</color>，给它讲些更有趣的传闻，兴许可以盖过这波浪潮。

It's alright. I think there's only one thing you can do right now. Go to <color=#dbc291ff>Verax Leo</color> and share something even more interesting with him. That way, there's a chance that you can cover up the rumors.
至于这里发生的事…我们不会告诉他人的。快去吧，两位英雄。
As for what happened earlier... We won't tell anyone else about it. So, go now, brave heroes.
Use the clockwork tricks on him!
想用匹诺康尼的剑斩翁法罗斯的官？哈，你想多了。
You think you can use a Penaconian key to open an Amphorean lock? Ha, that's wishful thinking!
这是什么？看上去像是匹诺康尼的服装店里才会有的人台。
What's this? It looks like one of those mannequins in the clothing stores of Penacony.
上面还有一只…蝴蝶？是装饰物吗？
There's also a... butterfly? Is that a fashion accessory?
下次再见到这些「若虫」，就把它们收集起来吧…说不定能借助它们进一步了解翁法罗斯。
We should catch these nymphs the next time we encounter them... Perhaps they can help us better understand Amphoreus.
哎呀，这不是缇宁女士吗？真罕见，您居然会离开智慧花园。
Gosh, isn't this Lady Trinnon? How rare that you would leave the Garden of Wisdom.
Yeah... I came out to clear my mind.
那您可来对地方了！看，我这儿刚进了些小零食，都是您和您的姐妹们最喜欢的口味！
Then you've come to the right place! Look at all these snacks that I've just gotten. They are all flavors that you and your sisters love!
缇安大人最爱的酸瓜糖，缇宝大人最爱的黄油饼干，还有您最中意的葡萄叶包饭，应有尽有呀！
Lady Trianne's favorite sour melon candies, Lady Tribbie's favorite butter cookies, and your favorite stuffed grape leaves. We have everything!
还没解决粉霞天女的问题…先避开黄金裔吧。
Since we haven't solved the Rosy Celestial Maiden problem yet... Let's avoid the Chrysos Heirs for now.
还没解决粉霞天女的问题…先避开黄金裔吧。
Since we haven't solved the Rosy Celestial Maiden problem yet... Let's avoid the Chrysos Heirs for now.
两位阁下，黎明、清晨、正午好！
Dear customers, good early morning, late morning, noon!
要来看看我手里的商品吗？瞧瞧，刚好有一幅热乎的画作——《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》！
Would you like to check out my merch? Look, I have this very popular artwork — {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden!
这些画家的速度真是惊人…和外面没什么不同。
The speed of the artists here is just as astonishing as everywhere else...
这和三月七有半点关系吗…
Is this even remotely related to March 7th...
把名字改成《三月梦中的自己》…好像也不是不行。
It'll probably work if we change the title to How March Sees Herself in Her Dreams...
What do you think? Are you interested?
成交！从现在开始，这幅《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》就是您的私人收藏了！
Deal! Now, this {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden is yours!
不过，瞧您这么喜欢，不如再看看我手上另一幅作品？它的名字叫《白厄与黑厄》——
However, since you like this so much, would you like to take a look at another piece that I have? It's titled Phainon and Pie-non.
好吧。要是您改主意了，随时找我哈。
Alright, feel free to look for me at anytime if you change your mind.
如何？您打算购入《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》了吗？
So, have you decided to purchase {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden?
成交！从现在开始，这幅《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》就是您的私人收藏了！
Deal! Now, this {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden is yours!
不过，瞧您这么喜欢，不如再看看我手上另一幅作品？它的名字叫《白厄与黑厄》——
However, since you like this so much, would you like to take a look at another piece that I have? It's titled Phainon and Pie-non.
好吧。要是您改主意了，随时找我哈。
Alright, feel free to look for me at anytime if you change your mind.
Rosy Celestial Maiden merch! Come get them right here!
The water in this bath... is very cold.
什么人会喜欢泡冷水澡？
Is there anyone who is fond of cold water baths?
Do you want to go in?
比起热水浴，持明更爱清凉的水流。这是一种…天性。
Well, actually... the Vidyadhara prefer cooler waters over hot baths. It's our... nature.
有机会你也可以试试，但不是现在，先去找真言狮口吧。
You can try it out when you get the chance, but now is not the time. Let's go look for Verax Leo first.
这是什么装饰物？面具吗？
What kind of decoration is this? A mask?
感觉这副山羊面具藏着什么玄机…碰一下试试吧。
It feels like this ram mask is hiding something... Let's try touching it.
这就是真言狮口？居然真的是个狮子…的脑袋？
This is Verax Leo? It really is a lion's... head?
怎么看都只是一尊雕像，该怎么和它交流？
No matter how I look at it, it just looks like any other statue. How do we even interact with it?
Whack it with the baseball bat.
就算只是个装饰品，破坏公物也是要赔偿的。
Even if it's just a decoration, we will still have to pay if we damage public property.
它的嘴张着，也许可以把手伸进去试试？
Since its mouth is open, perhaps we can try putting our hands in it?
(Put your hand into the lion's mouth)
(Put your hand into the lion's mouth)
吼吼吼！瞧啊，瞧瞧这是谁来拜访本狮了！
Roarrr! Look who came to visit this mighty lion!
这不是奥赫玛的新朋友，两位远道而来的勇士吗？幸会幸会，吼吼吼！
Aren't you Okhema's two new friends? The brave warriors from a faraway place? It's an honor to meet you, roarrr!
It seems like you're very well-informed.
没人告诉你们吗？本狮可是奥赫玛的千里眼、顺风耳，街头巷尾流传之事，全都逃不过本狮的视听。
Didn't anyone tell you? I'm the far-seeing eye and all-hearing ear of Okhema. I see and hear every single thing that happens in the streets and alleys of this place.
我们想请你帮个忙。眼下，名为「粉霞天女」的流言正在圣城广为流传……
We would like to request your help. Currently, rumors regarding the Rosy Celestial Maiden have spread throughout the holy city...
吼吼吼！勇士，这我恐怕爱莫能助啊。
Roarrr! Brave warriors, I'm afraid that I won't be able to help with that.
流言？我看未必，只要公民们喜欢，真假又有何妨？但二位勇士如此忌讳，背后…莫不是有别的原因？说来听听？

Rumors? Hah! As long as the citizens like it, who cares about whether it's true or not? However, the way you two are trying to stop it from spreading further... Could there be some other reason? How about sharing it with me?
你这狮子怎么吃的是瓜呢？
Why are you so interested in the tea?
别被它骗了——这狮子最爱的，就是七嘴八舌的热度。
Don't be fooled by it. This lion loves engaging in gossip and rumors.
就像前几日，有人诋毁我族的荣耀时，你的态度也是放任，不是么？
A few days ago, when people were besmirching my tribe's honor, didn't you also turn a blind eye?
哦、哦吼、吼吼！这不、这不是万敌阁下嘛！您、您最近可还好啊？
O—Oh, roarrr! Isn't this Lord Mydei! H—How have you been lately?
长了张狮子的脸，却软弱得像只丧魂的鬣狗。
The face of a lion but the courage of a soulless hyena.
你跟你的兄弟，为了消遣无所不用其极，连捏造历史这种卑劣的行径都听之任之，毫无底线。
You and your brothers will do anything for the sake of entertainment, even encouraging despicable acts such as fabricating history. There's no limit to how low you would stoop.
怎、怎么能说是捏造呢？那顶多就是一些…呃…加工！艺术加工！
H—How can you call that a fabrication? At most, it's just a little... umm... reinterpretation! Artistic reinterpretation!
Don't shut it, my hand is still inside!
照他们俩说的做，否则…我就徒手将你碾成铁粉。
Do as they say. Otherwise... I'll turn you into iron dust with my bare hands.
哦吼！我、我知道了，本狮这就去想办法！
Roar! Y—You got it. I'll fix that right now!
我向各位大人保证，现在开始——你们再也听不见「粉霞天女」这四个字！
I assure all of you that from now on, you'll no longer hear the words "Rosy Celestial Maiden"!
在真言狮口的「配合」下，流言逐渐平息了……
With the "cooperation" of the Verax Leo, the rumors gradually die down...
别误会，我只是看那狮头不爽。
Don't misunderstand, I'm just annoyed at that lion head.
以及，白厄似乎很看重你们。要是就这么不明不白地被*清理*了…他那玻璃般脆弱的心脏可受不了。
Also, Phainon seems to think highly of you guys. If you were to be disposed of for such a trivial reason, his weak and fragile heart might not be able to bear it.
自求多福吧，异邦人。祈祷这出闹剧还没传到阿格莱雅耳中。
Pray for the best, outsider. Pray that this farce has not reached the ears of Aglaea.
那位衣着奔放的黄金裔，性格也有些古怪。
That boldly dressed Chrysos Heir also has an eccentric personality.
但无论如何，此事算是告一段落了。做好心理准备，去赴约吧。
Regardless, this matter has come to an end. Let's prepare ourselves and head to our appointment.
你们两个，到底干嘛去啦？*我们*在这等了好久，翅膀都扇不动啦。
Where have the two of you been? We've been waiting here for quite some time. Even our wings are tired.
遇上了一些麻烦，好在解决了。
We encountered some trouble, but thankfully everything has been resolved.
Tribbie, do you surf the web?
消息很灵通嘛，连万帷网都知道了？年轻人就是有活力！不过今天忙成这样，*我们*哪有空啊。
Wow, you guys are well-informed. You even know about the World Wound Web? Young people sure are full of energy! But it's been such a busy day, where would we find the time to surf the web?
这样就好。上网…不是什么好习惯。
That's good. Surfing the web... isn't a good habit to have.
Ahem... It's nothing, don't worry about it.
说什么怪话哪…走吧，但愿阿雅别等得不耐烦了。
What a strange thing to say... Anyway, let's go. I hope Agy isn't annoyed from waiting too long.
看——万径之门！很显眼吧，*我们*就是在那儿相遇的。
Look — the Gate of Infinity! It's very eye-catching, isn't it? That's where we met.
翁法罗斯的地貌十分壮丽，这里过去一定是个如仙境般美丽的世界。
The landscape of Amphoreus is breathtaking. In the past, this place must have been a beautiful paradise.
没办法呀。往日无法重现，但*我们*可以追随着神谕向前。
Ah well, the past cannot be recreated. All we can do is follow the prophecy and move forward.
往日无法重现？可你分明展现过{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神迹。
The past cannot be recreated? But you clearly showed us {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} Miracle before.
这是两个概念。*我们*只是通过祈祷分得{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}「永夜之帷」{RUBY_E#}的力量，从「过往」中打捞必要之物，化为己用。并不是时间倒流哦。

Those are two different concepts. We can draw upon the power of the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}"Veil of Evernight"{RUBY_E#} through prayer and then salvage necessary items from the past for our own use. It isn't actually reversing time.
尽管如此，也和我们熟知的物理法则背道而驰。
Even so, it still goes against the laws of physics that we know of.
Is that even surprising, considering that there are also gods in this world?
即便是「神」也要遵循世界的底层规则，我还在尝试理解翁法罗斯的。
Even gods have to obey the underlying laws of the world. I'm still trying to understand Amphoreus's laws.
I've been meaning to ask that for a while now...
万事万物都要遵循世界的底层规则，我还在尝试理解翁法罗斯的。
All things have to obey the underlying laws of the world. I'm still trying to understand Amphoreus's laws.
现在先不拍照了。去见阿格莱雅吧。
We'll take photos later. Let's go and meet Aglaea now.
辛苦了。缇安有消息了吗？
Thanks for your hard work. Is there any news from Trianne?
还没呢，但*我们*摸清了那些逃兵的去向。要不了多久，就能追踪到<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>的方位了。
Not yet. But we've already figured out where the deserters are headed to. With a little more time, we'll be able to track down the location of Castrum Kremnos.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，也是它如今的居所，一座隐于迷雾的移动城邦。
{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory and their current abode — it's a moving city-state enveloped in fog.
Mydei has mentioned this place before.
Oh... He's that candid with the two of you?
悬锋城是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，也是它如今的居所，一座隐于迷雾的移动城邦。
Castrum Kremnos, both {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory and their current abode, is a moving city-state enveloped in fog.
原来击退泰坦那时，缇安女士是去追踪敌人了。
So, back when the Titan was repelled, Lady Trianne was off chasing the enemy.
暂且放下严肃的话题吧。介意给我和两位贵宾留点空间吗，缇宝？
Let's talk about something less serious for now. Would you mind giving the three of us some space, Tribbie?
当然。希望你们喜欢这份礼物，嘿嘿。
Of course. Hope you like this gift, heheh.
正如缇宝所说，两位为保卫圣城贡献了许多力量。为此，我想赠予你们一份谢礼。
As Tribbie mentioned, the both of you spared no effort in protecting the holy city. I would like to present you with a gift in recognition of that.
欢迎来到你们的<color=#dbc291ff>私人浴宫</color>。
的确。空间够大，装潢也很华丽。
Indeed. It's spacious, and the decor is quite impressive.
It's even better than the Penaconian hotel rooms.
很难横向对比，但…空间更大，装潢也很华丽。
While it's hard to compare them directly, this place... is indeed more spacious, and the decor is quite impressive.
I don't want to go back to the Astral Express anymore.
空间够大，装潢也很华丽。
This place is indeed spacious, and the decor is quite impressive.
两位满意就再好不过。先花些时间，熟悉房间的环境吧。
I'm glad that you're satisfied with the arrangements. Here, take some time and get to know your surroundings.
房间内的躺椅看上去是如此地舒适诱人，你担心自己一旦躺上去便会彻底失去「开拓」的动力。
The lounge chair in the room looks so comfy and enticing. You're worried that you'll completely lose the motivation to Trailblaze if you lie on it.
仔细想想，时至如今，你经历的所有波折和苦难——它们有那么值得么？躺在这里，迎来永恒的舒适酣睡，也许那才是你该有的归宿……
Think about it. All the twists and turns and hardships you've been through... are they worth it? Lying here and welcoming an eternal, comfy slumber... Maybe that's where you belong...
我知道你在想什么，别被一张躺椅诱惑了。
I know what you're thinking. Don't be tempted by a mere lounge chair.
Aren't you going to test the water's temperature?
Do you like it, Cold Dragon Young?
丹恒伸出两根手指，探了探浴池的水温。
Dan Heng dips two fingers into the bath to check the water temperature.
「太好了」——你在心中默念，并努力不让他看出自己的幸灾乐祸。
"Great," you think silently in your mind, trying hard not to let him see your schadenfreude.
你倚在阳台的石栏边眺望远方，翁法罗斯层叠的山峦被雾气遮蔽，轮廓若隐若现，如同一组在缓慢匍匐与站立之间转变姿态的石之巨人。

You lean against the stone railing of the balcony, gazing into the distance. The mist-shrouded mountains of Amphoreus appear as vague outlines, like stone giants slowly shifting between crouching and standing.
不知从何处传来了吟游诗人的歌声。你听不清歌谣的辞藻，却依旧从旋律中读到了一丝对往昔的追忆与怀念。
From somewhere, a bard's song drifts through the air. Though the words are unclear, the melody still conveys a tinge of nostalgia and longing for the past.
你同意丹恒的说法，非常同意。
You agree with Dan Heng, very much so.
这是…水盆？看着像是某种仪式用具。
Is this... a basin? It looks like something used for rituals.
好像在什么电影里见过。
I feel like I've seen it in a movie before.
它并非寻常的盥洗盆，而是黄金裔持有的祭仪器皿，现在由我赠予二位。
It's not your average washbasin. This ceremonial vessel belonged to the Chrysos Heirs and is now my gift to the both of you.
翁法罗斯的历史，还有「圣城」奥赫玛，你们已有所见闻。而现在…对于黄金裔的旅途，我想带两位亲眼见证。
You have learned, to some extent, about the history of Amphoreus and of the holy city Okhema. Now... I wish for both of you to witness the journey of the Chrysos Heirs for yourselves.
What do you mean by... witness?
上古畴昔，满溢之杯，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}用波涛藏匿起世界的起点。
In ancient times, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, the Chalice of Plenty, concealed the beginning of the world amidst billowing waves.
古老的「海洋」祭司发现了那里，他们用灵水修建障壁，避免其遭受外物的侵扰，但同时也留下了一条通路。

When the ancient Ocean Priests discovered that place, they used spirit water to build a barrier in order to prevent the site from being disturbed by external forces. However, they also left behind a passageway.
那便是你们面前的祭仪水盆。消解旁支杂念，以盆中灵水敷面，再次睁开双眼时，你们便能见证……

That passageway is none other than the ceremonial basin in front of you. Clear yourselves of all distracting thoughts and wash your faces with the spirit water inside the basin. When you next open your eyes, you shall witness for yourselves...
<color=#dbc291ff>「创世涡心」</color>——寄宿十二泰坦原初神性的伟大圣所，亦是神谕中，创世奇迹降临的应允之地。
The <color=#dbc291ff>Vortex of Genesis</color>: A great sanctuary that houses the original divinity of the twelve Titans. It's also the place where the prophesized Miracle of Genesis will occur.
I can't wait to see it...
作为最初的尝试，我来带领你们下潜吧。
For your first time, I shall personally guide you into the depths.
合上双目，屏住呼吸；隔断听觉，令我的耳语充盈世界。
Close your eyes and hold your breath. Sever all other sounds and let my whispers fill your ears.
掬一捧清水，将手掌悬于胸前，感受流水从指缝间轻柔流走……
Take a handful of the pristine water, lift your palms in front of your chest, and feel the water gently flow away through your fingers...
沉下去，再做一次。让灵水浸没你的手腕。熟悉它的温度、触感……
Sink deeper and do this once more. Submerge your wrists in the spirit water. Familiarize yourself with its temperature, its touch...
分开十指，现在低下头，去找寻你的掌心。感受灵水沿着你的脸颊逆流而上，浸润五官……
Spread your fingers, then lower your head and search for the palms of your hands. Feel the spirit water flow against your face, until all of your senses are submerged...
达米亚诺斯若有所思地离开了。
离开之前，去看看不知为何聚在一起的市民们吧。
Before you leave, take a moment to visit the citizens who have somehow managed to gather together.
将红土饲料喂给大地兽
Feed the dromas with Redsoil feed
粉霞天女，奥赫玛的明光……
美丽的天女，我多想一睹芳容……
My radiant maiden, how I wish to witness your beauty...
The maiden talk is just a lie!
天外之界？这是可以说的吗？
A world beyond the sky? Can you even speak of that?
要我说，准是艾格勒的女儿。
Rosy Celestial Maiden? Is she famous?
粉霞天女与阿格莱雅大人孰美？
Rosy Celestial Maiden and Lady Aglaea, who is more beautiful?
可惜，没来得及进辩论场。
Unfortunately, it didn't make it into the Forum.
粉霞天女，是哪个城邦的？
Which city is Rosy Celestial Maiden from?
达米亚诺斯的话还没说完就被守卫拽走了。
Damionis was dragged away by the guards before he could finish his sentence.
缇宝开启「百界门」，将你们送至命运重渊。
Tribbie opened the Century Gate and sent all of you to the Abyss of Fate.
先看看能不能直接前进吧。
Let's see if we can move straight ahead first.
这个砝码似乎被泰坦施加了祝福，无法使用变手抓取。
This weight seems to be blessed by the Titan and cannot be grabbed using a magic hand.
你花费了些功夫，将砝码放回了原位。
It takes you some effort to put the weights back in place.
此处正是列车车厢坠毁之地，你至今心有余悸。如今想来，应当是尼卡多利的长矛击落了车厢。不知道把车厢打捞起来修理修理，还能不能让它重新驰往天际。

This is the site where the coach crashed, and even now, the memory of the incident fills you with unease. Thinking back, it was likely Nikador's spear that brought the car down. You can't help but wonder — if the wreckage was salvaged and repaired, could the car once again take to the skies?
留在这段记忆的时间已经所剩无几…要把道别的机会留给卡芙卡吗？
There is very little time left to stay in this memory... Do you want to leave the chance of bidding goodbye to Kafka?
留在这段记忆的时间已经所剩无几…要把道别的机会留给流萤吗？
There is very little time left to stay in this memory... Do you want to leave the chance of bidding goodbye to Firefly?
Need time to think about it.
接受{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的邀请，进入你的「过去」
Accept {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s invitation and enter your "past"
任务完成，缇宝应你们的呼唤而来，将你们带回了奥赫玛。
As the mission has been completed, Tribbie arrives per your summons and brings you back to Okhema.
缇宝再次开启「百界门」，与白厄、丹恒一同驰援悬锋城。
Tribbie opens the Century Gate once more, rushing to the rescue of Castrum Kremnos with Phainon and Dan Heng.
时间紧迫，先看看能不能直接前进吧。
Time is running out. Check if you can directly move straight ahead.
你们三人赶赴悬锋城，来到斗技场的中央
The three of you rush into Castrum Kremnos and arrive at the arena
A Scroll Dropped by an Unknown Person
先借用扎格列斯之手尝试通过{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的考验吧。
Firstly, try to pass {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s trial with the Hand of Zagreus.
砝码似乎被泰坦施加了祝福，无法使用扎格列斯之手抓取。
It seems that the weights have been blessed by the Titans and cannot be seized by the Hand of Zagreus.
现在不需要替换配重物了，想想别的办法吧。
There's no need to replace the weights now. Try thinking of a different approach.
此地名为云石天宫，是奥赫玛的公共浴场。换作平时，气氛会更熙攘些。
We're here at Marmoreal Palace, Okhema's public baths. Normally, this place would be much livelier.
抱歉，前方暂时不便通行。
I'm sorry, this route is not open yet.
It's this way. Come with me.
回头看看吧，从这里望去，可以看见整座奥赫玛。
Turn around and look. We can see the entire city of Okhema from here.
市民们都回来了，还真迅速。
That's fast. The citizens are already back in the city.
他们聚在那儿在做什么？
Come on... Put in more strength!
怎么偏偏倒在家门口啊……
Why did it have to fall right in front of our home...
Maybe someone should go fetch a priest?
A miracle... A miracle fresh from the oven!
传出去，快把这故事讲给那吟游诗人听：
Go, bring word to the bard.
边疆的英雄来到奥赫玛，在此建立起丰功伟业……
Frontier heroes grace Okhema, feats abound right here...
刚才被打断了，继续探索城镇吧。
Right, we were going to explore the city before we got distracted.
If only I had a pair of wings...
I'd conquer the skies for sure!
那位是…先前遇见的女士。
Hey, that's... the lady we encountered previously.
它们的饲料很干净，是干燥的红土。边上就有一些。
Their feed is dry redsoil and it's very clean. There is some over there.
There are so many people all of a sudden...
偏偏这种时候，四周打听下？
At a time like this... Why not ask around?
<size=28>Stop chasing after me! Don't come any closer!</size>
达米亚诺斯，果然是他！我们快追上去。
It's really Damionis! Let's give chase.
他往生命花园跑了，快追！
He's running toward the Garden of Life. Give chase!
<size=28>我是达米亚诺斯！我会向所有人证明！</size>
<size=28>I'm Damionis! And I will prove it to everyone!</size>
Can't a guy run his business in peace?
Barged into the Chrysos Heirs' baths?
He was just shouting about... the Rosy Celestial Maiden?
Maybe we should go home to stay safe...
I want to become a celestial maiden one day!
这下难办了，在被阿格莱雅知道前…尽力弥补吧。
This is going to be difficult. Let's try to salvage the situation before Aglaea finds out...
真言狮口…应该就在附近。
Rosy Celestial Maiden merch! Come get them right here!
如果还是被问起，我们就如实承认。
If they ask us about it, we should just come clean with everything.
毕竟我们也救下了一位公民的性命。
After all, we still saved a citizen's life.
两位，这边这边！等你们好久啦。
Hey, over here! We've been waiting for quite some time.
对了，从这儿能远眺重渊。如果要拍照，是个不错的地点。
Oh right, you can see the Abyss from here. It's quite a nice place for a photo.
若要留在奥赫玛，两位自然需要一处落脚之地。
If you are to stay in Okhema, you'll need a place to rest.
这份礼物可以解决你们的困扰。
This gift will address your troubles.
差不多了么？最后，还有一件特别的赠礼。
Finished exploring? I still have one last special gift for you.
这边，我会亲自为二位说明。
Come this way, I'll explain it to you.
Not yet, I want to explore the place a little more.
As you wish. I will wait for you here.
这不是玩笑，而是一场审讯。
This is no laughing matter. It's an interrogation.
两位在城中游荡时，有人始终在留意你们的行动。很遗憾…你们背弃了诺言。
While the both of you were roaming the city, someone was paying attention to your every move. Unfortunately... you have broken your promises.
你果然已经知道了…但我们是为了救人。
So, you are indeed aware of our transgression... However, we only did so to save a life.
圣城的命运如细丝般脆弱。为剪除祸端，我必须审慎。
The holy city's fate is as fragile as thread. I must exercise prudence in order to eliminate sources of potential disaster.
我会再给两位一次机会，重新缝补信任的裂帛。金线会替我做出裁决，坦诚则生…欺瞒则亡。
I will grant the both of you another chance to mend our broken trust. The golden thread shall judge on my behalf. If you're truthful, you will live, else... you will perish.
遐蝶会是你们的行刑人。
阿格莱雅女士，我们因疏漏大意打破了约定，这点无法否认。但你从未说明泄露「天外之界」可能导致的恶果。
Lady Aglaea, it is undeniable that we broke our agreement out of carelessness. However, you never explained to us how revealing that a world beyond the sky exists would lead to dire consequences.
我想知道，我们究竟犯下了多大的罪行？
What I want to know is, exactly how grave a crime have we committed?
合理的诉求。未能及时向你们道出全部，是我的过失。
A reasonable request. It is indeed my oversight for failing to tell you everything in time.
翁法罗斯从不缺少向往天外的人。曾有一邦僭主穷尽举国之力修建「天舟」，意欲突破苍穹、企及星空……

There have always been people in Amphoreus who looked beyond the skies. Indeed, there used to be a tyrant nation that spared no expense in constructing "skyships," with the desire to break through the blue sky and reach the stars...
但在天舟启航的瞬间，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的神罚降临了。一整座城邦，连同所有的臣民，于刹那间灰飞烟灭。

However, {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} divine punishment fell the instant the fleet of skyships took flight. An entire city-state, along with all of its subjects, was reduced to ash in that moment.
翁法罗斯并非不愿行向群星，只是妄图触犯天穹者，无不触怒神明，令生灵的大地燃烧，凡人的国度殒灭，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}只是其中一例。

It's not that Amphoreus is unwilling to head toward the stars. Yet, anyone who even thinks about breaching the firmament would undoubtedly infuriate the gods, causing this land of the living to burn and an entire nation of mortals to perish. The {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} is only one example of this.
那是绝不可以踏足的禁地。
This is forbidden territory which can never be ventured into.
难道闭目塞听就是对的？
So you're saying that it's better to pretend it doesn't exist instead?
人们总会向往天空，你阻止不了。
Humanity has always longed for the sky... and this is something that you cannot prevent.
我们对翁法罗斯没有恶意…
We mean no harm toward Amphoreus...
神罚没有公正可言，而我身为奥赫玛的守护者，同样身不由己。
Divine punishment has never been fair. As Okhema's guardian, I must do the same.
这就是受泰坦支配的世界，必须由黄金裔颠覆的世界。
This is a world dominated by Titans. And that order can only be toppled by the Chrysos Heirs.
对此，我能做的事也只有一件，那就是确保二位…绝无二心。
Therefore, the only thing that I can do right now is to ensure that the both of you remain... devoted.
我将以「四问」考验你们。昧心的回答会令金线震颤，真诚的回应则平静无波。
I shall ask you four questions. Dishonest answers will cause the golden thread to vibrate, while truthful responses will not affect the thread.
而金线颤动的次数…便是行刑人将要前进的步数。
The number of times that the thread trembles... is the number of steps forward that the executioner will take.
四问过后，若她没有走到你们背后，便算两位通过了考验。反之，你们的旅途只能止步于此了。
If she isn't standing right behind you after all four questions have been asked and answered, the both of you will have passed this test. If she is... your journey will end here.
只是在温柔的花乡中睡去，没有一丝痛苦…我保证。
You'll fall asleep amid the warm embrace of flowers and feel no pain... That I can guarantee.
There's no need for such guarantees!
是不是有两次撒谎机会？
Does this mean that we can lie up to two times?
若你将生命视作儿戏，悉听尊便。
If you treat your lives as mere trifles, then you may do as you wish.
无论她怎么说，{NICKNAME}，我们只要无愧于心就好。
Regardless of what she says, {NICKNAME}, we'll be fine as long as our consciences are clear.
Well then, let us begin. Question One.
异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你们为何来到翁法罗斯？</color>
Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>why have you come to Amphoreus?</color>
为了解决这个世界的困扰。
To solve the problems plaguing this world.
金色的丝线微微地颤动。
半分诚实，半分掩饰。但规则没有妥协的余地。记作一步。
A half-truth that still conceals some facts. Yet, the rules leave no room for compromise. A step will be recorded.
为了我们的旅程能够继续。
To allow our journey to continue.
The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.
A truthful response. A step will not be recorded.
为了把这里搅个天翻地覆！
To turn this place upside down!
金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
玩笑并不能掩藏你的真心。机会稍纵即逝，你已经浪费了一次。
Jokes cannot conceal your true intentions. Opportunities are fleeting and you've just wasted one.
异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你们因何对奥赫玛伸出援手？</color>
Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>why did you lend your aid to Okhema?</color>
出于勇气，无私，侠义之心！
Because of our courageous spirit and selfless hearts!
金色的丝线微微地颤动。
勇气有余，但失之纯粹…记作一步。
A response that is certainly full of spirit, but lacking in sincerity... A step will be recorded.
我后悔了，压根就不该出手！
I regret what we did. We shouldn't have aided Okhema at all!
金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
愤怒吞没了你。记作一步。
You've let your anger consume you. A step will be recorded.
为了我们的旅程能够继续。
To allow our journey to continue.
The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.
No fluctuations detected. A step will not be recorded.
异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>倘若形势剧变，你是否可能将刀尖对准奥赫玛，还有它的公民？</color>
Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>if the current situation changed dramatically, could you eventually point your blades at Okhema and its citizens?</color>
The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.
不加修饰的回答，你没有顾忌它可能招致的对立或猜疑。此步不记。
A response that lacks embellishment. You have no misgivings about the friction or suspicion that your answer might cause. A step will not be recorded.
金色的丝线微微地颤动。
你想送出一个正面的承诺，却无法呈上与之匹配的决心…记作一步。
Although you attempted to make a promise, your resolve didn't match your response... A step will be recorded.
I use a baseball bat, not a blade.
金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
想凭油嘴滑舌将自己送上末路？我可以满足，记作一步。
Trying to hasten your demise by being glib with your response? I can certainly satisfy your desire. A step will be recorded.
异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你体内有一股汹涌澎湃的未知力量…你是否愿意用它来协助黄金裔弑神？</color>
Outlander, <color=#dbc291ff>an unknown but surging power exists within your body... Are you willing to use it to aid the Chrysos Heirs in slaying the gods?</color>
Wait, you can even detect that?
金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
用问题回答问题，强烈的怀疑、抗拒…记作一步。
Response to a question with another question indicates intense suspicion and resistance... A step will be recorded.
I am not willing, and I cannot agree to your request.
The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.
如此坚定…更令我好奇，你身体里究竟藏着什么秘密？此步不记。
Such determination... It makes me wonder what secrets are hidden within you. A step will not be recorded.
那可是毁灭的祸种，小心反噬。
It's one of the Destruction's seeds of disaster. Be careful, it might backfire.
金色的丝线微微地颤动。
愤怒，威胁…但又带着一丝不确定。你也不了解自己的身体。此步暂且不记。
An angry threat... but one laced with uncertainty. You don't understand the power within your body either. A step will not be recorded this time.
All four questions have been asked and answered.
你们凭借真诚赢得了第二次机会。
You have earned a second chance with your honesty.
两位可以继续留在奥赫玛，公民仍会视你们为贵宾。但你们必须保证，今日的荒谬一幕不会再次上演。
Both of you may continue to stay in Okhema, and its citizens will continue to view you as distinguished guests. However, you must promise that today's farce will not occur again.
这话由遭受审讯的人来说更合适吧。
I think it's more appropriate for us to say that last part.
经历了这一遭，你凭什么觉得我们还会帮助你们？
You seriously still expect us to help you after what we just went through?
无论你们作何选择，黄金裔都会继续奔赴神谕中的宿命。
Regardless of your choice, the Chrysos Heirs will continue to follow the path in the prophecy.
二位也许是降临在翁法罗斯的一道希望。但在一切得到证明前…你们不能变成翁法罗斯的一道威胁。
You may be a ray of hope that fell onto Amphoreus. However, until all has been proven, you cannot be allowed to pose a threat to Amphoreus.
留下来，你会继续监视我们？
If we stay, will you continue to monitor us?
黄金裔都像你这么多疑吗？
Are all Chrysos Heirs as paranoid as you?
为了圣城，我愿拾起世间所有被人嫌恶的特质，用尽冰冷但有效的手腕。
For the holy city, I am willing to bear all the traits that others despise and use every heartless yet effective trick in the book.
恕我们无法在如此高压下继续合作。
Forgive us, but I'm afraid our cooperation cannot continue under these conditions.
如果不能赢得诸位——不，如果无法赢得你的信任，阿格莱雅女士——我们会自觉离开。翁法罗斯并不是无名客唯一的选择。
If we cannot gain people's — no, if we cannot gain your trust, Lady Aglaea — we'll depart. Amphoreus isn't the only option for the Nameless.
不必让彼此都落得不体面的收场。
Things don't have to end on a sour note between us.
Hold on! Please wait a moment...
阿格莱雅，作为第一个遇见他们的人——有关两位的去留，我也想提供一些看法。
Aglaea, as the first person to encounter them... I have some thoughts I would like to share regarding whether they can stay.
在重渊与他们初遇时，我同样怀有戒心，回圣城的路上始终没有放下防备。
When I first met them in the Abyss, I was wary of them as well and never let my guard down throughout our journey back to the holy city.
但保卫奥赫玛一役，我们并肩经历了许多场战斗。决死时刻的眼神不会骗人，我能从他们的眼中找到信念，也愿意将后背交给他们。

However, during the battle to defend Okhema, we fought side by side numerous times. The look in someone's eyes in moments of life-and-death never lies, and I was able to detect the conviction in their eyes back then. That's why I was willing to put my life in their hands.
请你相信一名战士的直觉。
眼下奥赫玛正需要援手，我不想就这样失去两位盟友。
At present, Okhema is desperate for aid, and I am loath to lose two allies just like that.
遐蝶小姐也是这么想的，对吧？
Isn't this what Miss Castorice believes as well?
我更愿意把「死亡」视作宁静的告别，而非刑罚。
I'm more willing to view "death" as a peaceful farewell than a punishment.
竟有两位黄金裔愿意为你们作担保，呵…看来是我独断孤行了。
So, two Chrysos Heirs are willing to vouch for you. Hah... It seems my actions were too high-handed.
白厄，你会尽到东道主的义务，照看好我们的客人吗？
Phainon, will you fulfill your duty as host and look after our distinguished guests?
我不擅长繁文缛节，但一定尽力而为。
While I'm not good at formalities, I'll do my best.
蝶…下一次，我希望你能直抒胸襟。
Cas... Next time, I hope you will express your thoughts openly.
创世涡心迎来了新的访客。既然你们如此信任这两位异乡人，就好好为他们讲述藏在涡心中的奥秘吧。
Now, it's time to welcome the newcomers to the Vortex of Genesis. As you both have chosen to trust these outlanders, ensure they are adequately informed about the mysteries concealed within.
All four questions have been asked and answered.
金丝揭露了你们的动摇。很遗憾，两位没能通过考验。
The golden thread has exposed your hesitations. Regrettably, the both of you have failed the test.
二位可能是降临在翁法罗斯的一道希望，但也可能…是翁法罗斯的一道威胁。我别无选择，只能为你们关上命运的门扉。
While you may be a ray of hope that fell onto Amphoreus, you may also be... a threat to Amphoreus. You leave me no choice but to shut the doors of your fates.
以一场私刑决定我们的生死，不可理喻……
Determining our fates with extrajudicial execution... How unreasonable.
过河拆桥？亏我还帮了你们。
Talk about burning bridges! After all we've done to help you.
Justice, fairness, impartiality, where art thou?
这里…大概没人能听到我们的呼救。
I don't think anybody will be able to hear our cries... given where we are right now.
为了圣城，我愿拾起世间所有被人嫌恶的特质，用尽冰冷但有效的手腕。
For the holy city, I am willing to bear all the traits that others despise and use every heartless yet effective trick in the book.
遐蝶。为我们的客人呈上仁慈的送别。
Castorice, please give our guests a merciful farewell.
Wait! Please, just give me one more chance...
遐蝶将她纤白的食指搭在了你的脉搏处。
Castorice places her slender, pale finger over your pulse.
一丝凉意穿透了你的肌肤，紧接着渗入了你的经脉。
A chill seeps through your skin, then immediately spreads into your veins.
遐蝶搭上了她的第二根手指…然后是第三根，直到她的半只手掌轻柔地握住了你的左腕。
Castorice adds a second finger... then a third, until half her palm gently envelops your left wrist.
视线逐渐模糊下去，取代冰冷现实的是一片紫色的海洋…她口中的花乡……
Your vision blurs, and cold reality fades into a purple ocean — her promised land of flowers.
…你正在迎接属于自己的甜蜜死亡。
...you are currently welcoming your own sweet demise.
…等一下！故事可不该结束得如此匆忙啊。
...Wait! This story can't end just like that.
当然不是，朋友，你还好好地活着。
Not quite, Friend. You're still alive and kicking.
你们来到翁法罗斯才多久？无情如{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，也不会这么仓促结束一段旅程吧？
You've been on Amphoreus for such a short time. Even someone as ruthless as {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} wouldn't end a journey so hurriedly.
阿格莱雅，作为第一个遇见他们的本地人——有关两位的去留，我也想提供一些看法。
Aglaea, as the first local to encounter them... I have some thoughts I would like to share regarding their fates.
在重渊与他们初遇时，我同样怀有戒心，回圣城的路上始终没有放下防备。
When I first met them in the Abyss, I was wary of them as well and never let my guard down throughout our journey back to the holy city.
但保卫奥赫玛一役，我们并肩经历了许多场战斗。决死时刻的眼神不会骗人，我能从他们的眼中找到信念，也愿意将后背交给他们。

However, during the battle to defend Okhema, we fought side by side numerous times. The look in someone's eyes in moments of life-and-death never lies, and I was able to detect the conviction in their eyes back then. That's why I was willing to put my life in their hands.
请你相信一名战士的直觉。
眼下奥赫玛正需要援手，我不想就这样失去两位盟友。
At present, Okhema is desperate for aid, and I am loath to lose two allies just like that.
遐蝶小姐也是这么想的，对吧？
Isn't this what Miss Castorice believes as well?
我更愿意把「死亡」视作宁静的告别，而非刑罚。
I'm more willing to view "death" as a peaceful farewell than a punishment.
竟有两位黄金裔愿意为你们作担保，呵…看来是我独断孤行了。
So, two Chrysos Heirs are willing to vouch for you. Hah... It seems my actions were too high-handed.
白厄，你会尽到东道主的义务，照看好我们的客人吗？
Phainon, will you fulfill your duty as host and look after our distinguished guests?
我不擅长繁文缛节，但一定尽力而为。
While I'm not good at formalities, I'll do my best.
蝶…下一次，我希望你能直抒胸襟。
Cas... Next time, I hope you will express your thoughts openly.
创世涡心迎来了新的访客。既然你们如此信任这两位异乡人，就好好为他们讲述藏在涡心中的奥秘吧。
Now, it's time to welcome the newcomers to the Vortex of Genesis. As you both have chosen to trust these outlanders, ensure they are adequately informed about the mysteries concealed within.
不——经历了这一遭，你凭什么觉得我们还会帮助这里？
