Hold on, you seriously still expect us to help you after what we just went through?
恕我们无法在如此高压下继续合作。如果不能赢得诸位——不，如果无法赢得你的信任，阿格莱雅女士——我们会自觉离开。翁法罗斯并不是无名客唯一的选择。

Forgive us, but I'm afraid our cooperation cannot continue under these conditions. If we cannot gain people's — no, if we cannot gain your trust, Lady Aglaea — we'll depart. Amphoreus isn't the only option for the Nameless.
不必让彼此都落得不体面的收场。
Things don't have to end on a sour note between us.
无论你们作何选择，黄金裔都会继续奔赴神谕中的宿命。
Regardless of your choice, the Chrysos Heirs will continue to follow the path in the prophecy.
白厄说服了我网开一面。至于二位的去留，就由你们自己决定吧。
Phainon's words have convinced me to make an exception for you. Whether you stay or go after this is for you to decide.
一阵无名之花的暗香涌入了你的鼻腔…余韵如此甜美，令你逐渐忘却了呼吸的意义。
A subtle fragrance of an unnamed flower fills your senses, its sweetness making you forget the need to breathe.
…站在这里，我以黄金裔的尊严起誓，你们的生命并未受到威胁。在审讯开始前，遐蝶小姐就把消息传达给了我，希望我能阻止阿格莱雅。
...I swear by the honor of the Chrysos Heirs here that your lives were never in danger. Before the interrogation started, Miss Castorice already sent a message to me, hoping that I would stop Aglaea.
能令阿格莱雅大人动摇的人很少，白厄阁下是之一。
Only a select few can sway Lady Aglaea, and Lord Phainon is one of them.
阿格莱雅她…为了奥赫玛，她的心早就结成了冰。
Aglaea... She has long sealed her heart in ice, for Okhema's sake.
也许这就是「半神」？立于凡人中间，却又离人们很远。
Maybe this is the price of being a demigod? Standing among mortals, yet still so far from them.
啊…又多了一件需要解释的事。别担心，翁法罗斯最深的秘密都藏在这儿了。
Ah... one more thing to explain. Let's not worry about that for now. You'll soon find out that Amphoreus' deepest secrets are all hidden here.
总之，先抬头看吧：那是创世涡心的<color=#dbc291ff>星宫十二相</color>，它记录着黄金裔的逐火之旅。

Well, first, kindly look upward. What you see right now is the <color=#dbc291ff>Astral Zodiac</color> of the Vortex of Genesis, divided into twelve parts that record the Flame-Chase Journey of the Chrysos Heirs.
十二张虚位的图腾，对应翁法罗斯的十二尊泰坦。而每一座被点亮的星宿，都代表一颗被人类归于原位的火种。
The twelve vacant signs symbolize the twelve Titans of Amphoreus, while each illuminated constellation represents one Coreflame that mankind has restored to its rightful place.
归位的火种…有六颗，你们的征途已经走过了半程？
There are... six restored Coreflames. You're already halfway through your journey?
这是前人用巨大的牺牲换来的。黄金裔的脚步一度遭遇巨大的阻碍，在很长一段时间里毫无进展……
The generations before us paid a heavy price for that. The journey of the Chrysos Heirs once faced immense hurdles and made no progress for a very long time...
是阿格莱雅和缇宝老师再度召集起世界上的黄金裔，重启了神谕中的征程。
It was Aglaea and Tribbie who rallied the Chrysos Heirs from all over the world once again, leading us to re-embark on this prophesized journey.
她们两位，也是如今圣城中唯二的「半神」。
And they are the only two demigods in the holy city.
Shouldn't it be the only four?
虽然缇宝、缇安、缇宁老师是三个人，但以神格来算——还是一位吧！
While Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon are three individuals, I suppose they are considered one single divine essence.
So, what exactly is a demigod?
当然，我还没忘记这个话题。
Worry not, I haven't forgotten about that.
过去，泰坦是世界的支柱。而黄金裔从神谕中得到的启示，是要击碎这十二根基柱，重构世界的秩序。
In the past, the Titans were the pillars of the world. Yet, the prophecy's revelation is that these twelve pillars must be shattered and the world's order reconstructed.
难题就在这里。<color=#dbc291ff>当旧日的神明倒下后，需要有人来暂时扛起断裂的支柱，填补神职空缺，直到创世奇迹降临。</color>
But here's the problem: <color=#dbc291ff>After the fall of the old gods, someone must hold up the broken pillars and fill the vacant seats until the coming of the Miracle of Genesis.</color>
否则，世界在神谕应验前就会彻底坍塌，变成一片废墟。
Otherwise, the entire world will collapse before the prophecy comes true.
阿格莱雅和缇宝老师已经埋葬了自己的神明。<color=#dbc291ff>现在的她们，是人也是神，更是翁法罗斯命运的背负者。</color>
Aglaea and Tribbie have already laid their own gods to rest, <color=#dbc291ff>making them now both human and divine, as well as the bearers of Amphoreus' fate.</color>
Will you also become a demigod?
记得你在追逐「纷争」泰坦…
You mentioned pursuing the Strife Titan...
原来「属于你的火种」是这个意思。
So, that's what you meant by "your Coreflame."
击落泰坦、回收火种、填补神职——这就是我等黄金裔的使命。我正行在她们二位走过的路上。
Bringing down the Titans, retrieving the Coreflames, and filling the vacant seats... This is the mission of the Chrysos Heirs, and I'm following in the footsteps of those two.
对于这十二位泰坦…无论怎么描述，都不如亲耳聆听星宿中的私语更直观。
When it comes to the twelve Titans... no words can describe them more vividly than the whispers within the constellations.
二位，不妨上前几步，亲自试试？
Why not step forward and listen to them for yourselves?
……白昼寂静无声，黑暗已经登场……
...The day is silent, and darkness has taken the stage...
……火焰节节攀升，鼓点如雨骤降……
...Flames rise higher, and drums fall like rain...
……战士浸染金血，战袍织作残章……
...Warriors soaked in golden blood, their cloaks tattered...
……青铜为尔华盖，黄铜为余悲响……
...Bronze shields you, and brass echoes my sorrow...
只要凑近一些，侧耳倾听，就能捕获虚空中响起的只言片语。
Move closer, listen carefully, and you may just catch the whispers echoing in the void.
不妨先从天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的声音开始吧？
How about you start with the Lance of Fury, the voice of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?
黄金裔、半神…神谕中书写的，真的是翁法罗斯唯一的命运吗？
Chrysos Heirs, demigods... Is what's written in the prophecy truly Amphoreus' only possible fate?
抱歉，我只是在自言自语…两位英雄，请上前聆听泰坦之声吧。
Sorry, I was just thinking out loud... Please, step closer and listen to the voices of the Titans.
第一次听见泰坦之声时，我还是个只知挥剑的孩子，全然不知生命的意义为何物。
The first time I heard the voices of the Titans, I was just a boy playing with swords, oblivious to the meaning of life.
同样地，我至今不知道神谕为何会选中自己，但我得感谢它…若非踏上这段旅程，我大概已经变成战场上的孤魂野鬼了吧？
To this day, I still don't know why the prophecy chose me, but I'm grateful for it... Without this journey, I might've already become a wandering soul on the battlefield.
说回你们，我想郑重地发出邀请，希望两位能加入黄金裔的阵营，助我们一同讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，从「纷争」的泰坦手中夺得火种。

Alright, that's enough of my story. I want to extend a heartfelt invitation to you: Join the Chrysos Heirs, and aid us in hunting down {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and retrieving the Coreflame from the Titan of Strife.
如果二位心中还有疑问，我会尽全力解答。
If you still harbor doubts, I'll do my best to provide you with answers.
黄金裔是怎么被选中的？
How are the Chrysos Heirs chosen?
…很遗憾，人们至今没能弄清神谕的规则。
...Unfortunately, the workings of the prophecy still remain a mystery to us all.
唯一可信的推测是…<color=#dbc291ff>它更青睐那些身陷极端境遇的人，会在他们眼前降下奇迹。</color>
The only reliable speculation is that... <color=#dbc291ff>it favors those caught in dire circumstances and bestows miracles upon them.</color>
世界上的其他黄金裔呢？
Where are the other Chrysos Heirs in the world?
相传，第一位黄金裔诞生在千年以前。自那之后，神选者就开始在世间行走。
Legend has it that the first Chrysos Heir was born millennia ago. Since then, the chosen ones began to walk this earth.
然后便是「黄金战争」…那场战役背靠神明，却让凡人流尽了鲜血，众多英雄在此期间陨落。
Then came the Chrysos War... A conflict backed by the gods, yet one that brought much bloodshed and claimed many heroes.
到了我出生的年代，相较一段历史，黄金裔的故事已经更接近传说。如果世上还有其他受神谕召唤的人…命运会把他领到我们面前的。

By the time of my birth, the tales of the Chrysos Heirs had become more like legends than historical accounts. If there are others called forth by the prophecy... I trust that fate will guide them to us.
讨伐尼卡多利的计划是？
How do you plan to fight Nikador?
勇气和决心都已具备，只等缇安老师找到悬锋城的所在，我们就踏上征程。
Armed with courage and unwavering resolve, our quest will begin as soon as Trianne locates Castrum Kremnos.
当然，此行注定是一场撼天动地的死斗…做好心理准备。
Without a doubt, it will be a momentous battle to the death... Prepare yourselves.
I've got it all figured out.
前路艰险，我不会强迫你们。但如果二位决定留下，我——哀丽秘榭的白厄，定会努力修补你们和黄金裔之间的嫌隙，不遗余力。

The path ahead is bound to be perilous, and I won't impose my will upon you. Yet, if you choose to stay, I, Phainon from Aedes Elysiae, will spare no effort to bridge the gap between you and the Chrysos Heirs.
阿格莱雅大人心中的坚冰恐怕难以消融……
Thawing the ice in Lady Aglaea's heart won't be easy...
But I will do my best as well.
...{NICKNAME}, I'll leave the final decision to you.
我相信白厄，但更相信你的决断。
I trust Phainon, but I trust your judgment more.
You're letting me make the decision? Seriously?
在这种事上，我更信任你的判断。
I trust your judgment more on matters like this.
太好了，你们果真是翁法罗斯的希望。
That's wonderful to hear. You truly are the hope of Amphoreus.
我一直坚信，黄金裔的旅途绝非寥寥数人的史诗，我们必须团结一切潜在的盟友——尤其是二位这样的英豪。
I've always believed that the journey of the Chrysos Heirs is not meant to be the saga of a select few, and that we must unite all potential allies, especially heroic figures like you.
讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，只要能获得成功…想必阿格莱雅也不会再质疑什么了。
Once we triumph in the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... that should dispel Aglaea's doubts.
白厄阁下…我们的客人似乎有些疲惫。让他们先回浴宫休息片刻吧？
Lord Phainon... Our guests seem quite weary. Should we have them return to the bath chamber for some rest?
…啊，是我有些兴奋了，抱歉，你们在翁法罗斯的第一天已经够漫长了。
Ah, my apologies. I got a bit carried away. It's been a long first day for you here on Amphoreus.
想离开涡心的话，只要再重复一遍灵水盆前的仪式就好。
To leave the Vortex, simply repeat the same ritual in front of the spirit basin.
请一定要在浴宫中好好休息。等两位蓄满精力，相信缇安老师也带着悬锋城的消息归来了。
Be sure to rest well in the bath chamber. I trust that Trianne will have returned with news about Castrum Kremnos by the time the two of you are fully recharged.
唔…就此为止？确定要这么做吗？
So... you'll end things here? Are you sure about that?
开玩笑的，开拓之旅得继续下去。
Just kidding. We have to press on in our trailblazing expedition.
太好了，你们果真是翁法罗斯的希望。
That's wonderful to hear. You truly are the hope of Amphoreus.
我一直坚信，黄金裔的旅途绝非寥寥数人的史诗，我们必须团结一切潜在的盟友——尤其是二位这样的英豪。
I've always believed that the journey of the Chrysos Heirs is not meant to be the saga of a select few, and that we must unite all potential allies, especially heroic figures like you.
讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，只要能获得成功…想必阿格莱雅也不会再质疑什么了。
Once we triumph in the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... that should dispel Aglaea's doubts.
白厄阁下…我们的客人似乎有些疲惫。让他们先回浴宫休息片刻吧？
Lord Phainon... Our guests seem quite weary. Should we have them return to the bath chamber for some rest?
…啊，是我有些兴奋了，抱歉，你们在翁法罗斯的第一天已经够漫长了。
Ah, my apologies. I got a bit carried away. It's been a long first day for you here on Amphoreus.
想离开涡心的话，只要再重复一遍灵水盆前的仪式就好。
To leave the Vortex, simply repeat the same ritual in front of the spirit basin.
请一定要在浴宫中好好休息。等两位蓄满精力，相信缇安老师也带着悬锋城的消息归来了。
Be sure to rest well in the bath chamber. I trust that Trianne will have returned with news about Castrum Kremnos by the time the two of you are fully recharged.
I'm tired. I just want to go.
…我明白了。回头想想，两位一直出于无私和善意帮助奥赫玛，我们却总是以怀疑和胁迫回应，的确不公平。
...I understand. Now that I think back on it, you both have selflessly helped Okhema, while we have met your good will with doubt and intimidation. It's indeed not fair.
早些时候，你们对我的苦衷施以理解，现在该我做一样的事了。
You showed empathy toward my struggle earlier, and now it's my turn to return that kindness.
黄金裔的旅程…果然很孤独啊。
The journey of the Chrysos Heirs... truly is a lonely one.
走吧，丹恒，{NICKNAME}。我会带人护送两位回到你们坠落的地方。
Let's go, Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}. I'll escort you back to where you landed.
我知道，重逢是种奢望。至少我们能让告别不那么草率。
I know that a reunion in the future is wishful thinking, but at the very least, we can bid each other a proper farewell.
在白厄和一众圣城卫士的护送下，你和丹恒回到了重渊的坠毁点，合力打捞起了列车车厢。
Escorted by Phainon and the holy city guards, you and Dan Heng return to the crash site in the Abyss. Together, you salvage the Express' coach car.
在一名长成智械模样的奥赫玛公民的协助下，你们驶离了翁法罗斯，没有遭受那所谓「天外诅咒」的谴罚。
With the assistance of an Okhema citizen resembling an Intellitron, you depart Amphoreus without suffering the so-called "curse from beyond the sky."
返回星穹列车后，你们发现黑天鹅已经悄悄离开。三月七的病情加重了，没有人知道她的症状是因何导致的。
After returning to the Astral Express, you discover Black Swan has already left without telling anyone. March 7th's condition has gotten worse, but no one seems to know what the cause is.
尽管燃料告急，但你们还是完成了最后一次跃迁，寄希望于下一个目的地能解决你们手头的一切烦忧。
Despite a fuel shortage, you complete a final warp jump, putting your hopes in the next location and how it might resolve all your worries.
至于「永恒之地」翁法罗斯的命运，以及它终将为银河带来的剧变…至少在你的有生之年内，这一切都与你无关了。
As for the fate of Amphoreus, the Eternal Land, and the dramatic changes it will bring to the Cosmos... It has nothing to do with you, at least in your lifetime.
真没想到，这一天过得这么戏剧性。
Well, that was a lot of drama for one day.
走吧。有了白厄的担保，至少可以放下心来先休息了。
Let's go. With Phainon's guarantee, we can at least take a moment to rest without any worries.
I kind of feel like we might've forgotten something...
喔…给三月拍照。差点就忘了，幸好你还记得这事。
Oh... We need to take a photo for March. Good thing you still remembered that.
该给三月七拍张这儿的照片。
We've got to take a photo of this place for March 7th.
…差点就忘了，幸好你还记得这事。
...I almost forgot. Good thing you still remembered that.
把创世涡心的奇景记录下来吧。
Let's capture the spectacle of the Vortex of Genesis.
十二尊泰坦的图腾，犹如十二双居高临下的眼目，监视着这个由它们创造、支撑与毁灭的世界。
The totems of the Twelve Titans stand like twelve pairs of watchful, imperious eyes, overseeing the world they forged, nurtured, and ultimately brought to ruin.
待到十二颗星宿全部被点亮之时，黄金裔们口中的「奇迹」便会被点亮——至少他们的神谕中是如此书写的。
When the twelve constellations align and shine, the "miracle" that the Chrysos Heirs speak of will illuminate — or so their prophecies claim.
想离开涡心的话，只要再重复一遍灵水盆前的仪式就好。请好好休息。
To leave the Vortex, simply repeat the same ritual in front of the spirit basin. Rest well, you two.
抱歉，希望你们…能原谅我先前的行为。
I'm sorry. I hope... you can forgive me for my actions earlier.
我不想让阿格莱雅女士察觉到异样，只能配合她的行动。
I had to follow Lady Aglaea's instructions to avoid arousing her suspicion.
Why did she choose you to be the executioner?
...But I should not come near you.
Because I... am the shadow of "death."
对不起，这个话题有些沉重，我不想展开。请两位听从白厄阁下的建议，尽早回浴宫休息吧。
I'm sorry, but I prefer not to delve into such a heavy topic at the moment. Please follow Lord Phainon's suggestion and return to the bath chamber for some rest.
如果你们还想聆听世界的声音，也可以在涡心多停留片刻。
If you're interested in hearing more of the world's voices, feel free to prolong your stay in the Vortex.
怎么了，我脸上有什么东西吗？
What? Do I have something on my face?
...more than you did in the entire three worlds before this.
没办法，爱说话的人不在，总得有人负责开口。
Well, since the talkative one isn't around, someone has to take her place.
但我也累了。所以，复盘的环节尽量简短点吧。
But it's been a long day for me too, so let's get through the review quickly.
体感上，我们用大约二十个系统时就摸清了翁法罗斯的现状，还和本地人建立了联系，这是个不错的开始。
By estimation, it took us about twenty system hours to figure out the current conditions on Amphoreus and build connections with the locals. A pretty good start.
不过，我总觉得水面下还隐藏了什么…就连黄金裔内部，也不是我们想象的那么团结。
But I feel that there's more to everything than meets the eye... Even the Chrysos Heirs themselves aren't as unified as we imagined.
Is it too late to bail out now?
阿格莱雅说的话，你先别放在心上。她这一通发难有些突然，背后可能另有原因。
Don't take Aglaea's words to heart right now. Her verbal attack on us was quite sudden. There might be a reason behind it.
We're still looking at things through a clouded lens.
阿格莱雅这一通发难也有些突然，背后可能另有原因。
Aglaea's verbal attack on us was also quite sudden. There might be a reason behind it.
没想到阿格莱雅那么无情…
Wasn't expecting Aglaea to be that ruthless...
但我感觉她这一通发难有些突然，背后可能另有原因。
Her verbal attack on us seemed quite sudden. There might be a reason behind it.
疑团重重，只能全力应对了。
With all these doubts in our minds, we can only just do our best.
毕竟「开拓」没有标准答案，除了全身心投入到这个世界的循环当中，一步一步脚踏实地，似乎也没有别的办法。
There's no "right" answer to the Trailblaze, after all. All we can do is dive into this world and take things one step at a time.
虽然还有不少疑问，但大脑已经困乏到难以思考了…白厄说得没错，先休息吧，把问题留给明天。
Plenty of questions are still up in the air, but my brain is too tired to handle them... Phainon's right. Let's call it a day and save them for tomorrow.
...Agy, this campaign is going to turn out fine, right?
勿要犹疑，吾师。你是为黄金裔解读神谕之人，你言行中的踟蹰会令众人动摇。
Do not harbor doubt, teacher. As the interpreter of the prophecy for the Chrysos Heirs, any uncertainty in your words may undermine people's resolve.
知道啦知道啦，但眼下不是只有你和*我们*嘛……
Alright, alright, but it's just you and us here...
还有…阿雅，其实我想问的是，刚才在涡心，你不会真想把丹恒和{NICKNAME}给……
By the way... Agy, I was actually wondering, when you were in the Vortex earlier with Dan Heng and {NICKNAME}, were you actually going to...
为什么明知故问？如果你断定我有杀意，一定会出手阻止的。
Why even bother to ask? If you were truly convinced of my intent to harm them, you would have intervened.
被你看穿啦。*我们*只是想知道…阿雅，你心里到底是怎么想的？
You sure don't miss a thing. We are just curious... What is really going through your head, Agy?
…我原本的计划是以「流放」作为威胁，考验那二人的意志和决心。
...Initially, my plan was to use the threat of "banishment" to test their resolve and perseverance.
但我察觉到了遐蝶的不安。她信任他们，还私下联络了白厄，以为我不知情……
But I noticed a sense of unease in Castorice. She trusted in them and even reached out to Phainon in secret, believing I was unaware...
所以将计就计，我索性将「流放」改成了「处刑」，用最极端的情境测量那两人的意志。
Therefore, I took advantage of the situation and changed the threat from "banishment" to "execution," to see if the two could remain firm under the most extreme pressure.
同时，也能促成他们与白厄、遐蝶间更为笃深的关系。
Simultaneously, it might also strengthen their bonds with Phainon and Castorice.
…为了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，必须做到这种程度吗？
...Do you have to go to such lengths for the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?
可这么一来，想让他们再信任你就难上加难了……
That's going to make it a lot tougher for you to gain their trust...
你我终有一日要退出这舞台，翁法罗斯的命运将被移交至他人之手…<color=#dbc291ff>那是你看到的未来，不是吗？</color>
You and I will eventually step off the stage and leave Amphoreus' fate in the hands of others... <color=#dbc291ff>That's the future you foresee, isn't it?</color>
那救世的神谕浑浊不清。它撺掇我们挑战众神，却从未告知预言中的「明天」是何模样。
The prophecy of deliverance is nothing if not ambiguous. It urges us to defy the gods yet refrains from providing a clear glimpse of what lies ahead.
当下，人们愿意相信神谕，才团结在黄金裔周围。但有朝一日，倘若世人的信念发生动摇…一切都会崩塌。
Right now, it is people's faith in the prophecy that unites them around the Chrysos Heirs. Should a time come when their faith is shaken... all will crumble.
所以，我们必须做好准备。你我身着褴褛又何妨？专心为「救世主」编织战衣便好。
Hence, we must be prepared. When our task is to craft the armor for the Deliverer, what harm is there if you and I don humble attire?
你一直说不相信人类的无私，可你自己快要变成活生生的反例了。
You keep saying that you don't believe in humanity's altruism, but your actions are a counterexample.
也许，是因为「人」的部分正在离我而去。
Perhaps it's because my "humanity" is distancing itself from me.
又一个没有尽头的黎明，白昼何光，永夜何长。
Another never-ending dawn. How bright is the day, and how long is the night.
金线今天格外平静，天、地与海洋都屏住了呼吸，是在为一位泰坦注定的亡逝哀悼吗……
The golden thread hangs unusually silent today, as if the heavens, earth, and ocean are all holding their breath. Could they be mourning the impending downfall of a Titan...
真想沐浴一刻啊…你会陪我同去吗？
Unwinding in a bath sounds appealing now... Would you care to join me?
走吧，阿雅。都几百年啦，*我们*什么时候拒绝过你的邀请？
Let's go, Agy. When have we ever been able to say no in all these hundreds of years?
...Calm down. Calm down. This time. Next time?
...Who? Who is? You... I... Who am I?
...Ron? Stella? Who? You... I... Who am I?
Oh, shut it! Someone's trying to sleep here!
...Sleep? Here? There? You... I... Who am I?
（脑海中有个声音，感觉持续了一晚上……）
(Feels like there's been a voice talking in my head all night...)
(I should probably mention this to Dan Heng.)
I slept in pretty late. It's so bright outside!
你忘了么？从抵达圣城开始，天空就一直这么明亮。
Did you already forget? The sky has been this bright since we arrived at the holy city.
Have you been up for a while?
有一阵了。外面太亮，我睡不沉…从抵达圣城开始，天空就一直这么明亮。
Yes, I wake up easily when it's too bright outside... The sky has been like this since we arrived at the holy city.
There was this voice in my dream...
声音？又是星核之声吗，还是……
A voice? The Voice of the Stellaron again or...
像是动物的叫声，但能听懂。
It sounded like an animal, but somehow, I could understand it.
听不清，它说的话像是谜语。
I couldn't really make it out. It was like it was speaking in riddles.
从某种意义上说，混乱才是梦的本质。
In a way, chaos is the nature of dreams.
It was... pretty cute, unlike the Stellaron.
看来不是噩梦。但小心了，那也可能是蛊惑你的手段。
So, it wasn't a nightmare. But be careful, that might be its means of luring you in.
还是尽量记下能回想起的内容吧。说不定这场怪梦也和这个世界的规则有关。
Keep a note of whatever you can remember. This strange dream might be connected to the rules of this world.
你睡着的时候，我思考了一些问题，眼下最麻烦的，果然还是翁法罗斯人对天外世界的态度。短期内，我们恐怕没办法联络上列车了。

While you were asleep, I did some thinking. I believe the most pressing concern is still how the people of Amphoreus view what's beyond the sky. Unfortunately, contacting the Express might not be feasible for a while.
如果我们尝试飞出翁法罗斯…
If we try to fly out of Amphoreus...
...Will we also incur the wrath of the gods?
是的。最坏情况下，翁法罗斯的入口是道单向门，只能进不能出。
Yes. In the worst case, the entrance to Amphoreus is a one-way door, letting people in but not out.
哼…真打算将命运交给两个陌生人，不知是疯狂还是愚蠢。
Hmph... Entrusting our fates to two strangers, is this madness or folly?
说不定两者兼有呢。万敌，你也该多交几个朋友了。
Maybe both. You should really make more friends, Mydei.
缇安捎回了信息：多年以来，我们首次驱散了包围悬锋城的迷雾，确定了它的位置。
Trianne has returned with news: For the first time in many years, we have dispersed the fog around Castrum Kremnos and verified its location.
黄金裔等待已久的时刻终于到来。前路已经明朗：战胜狂暴的「天谴之矛」{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，将「纷争」的火种带回奥赫玛，为神谕中的奇迹添薪。

The awaited moment has finally arrived for the Chrysos Heirs. Our path forward is now clear: Vanquish {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the violent Lance of Fury, and bring the Coreflame of Strife back to Okhema to fuel the prophesized miracle.
使命艰巨，我必须聆听所有人的声音，决定出征的人选。
This is an arduous mission, and I must heed the voices of all to determine the best candidates for this campaign.
若诸位心中已有提议，现在便是宣明的时刻。
Should you harbor any thoughts, this is the moment to bring them forth.
我，哀丽秘榭的白厄，愿前往讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}。
I, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, wish to join the crusade against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.
此外，我还想推举两位来自异邦的勇士——他们同我一起面对过{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的半身，我对他们的勇武没有丝毫怀疑。
Furthermore, I recommend the two warriors from foreign lands. They have fought alongside me against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s double, and I have full faith in their bravery.
That sounds really dangerous. Is it too late to back out?
只在浴宫里躺着可算不上「开拓」。
Lounging in a bath chamber isn't exactly trailblazing.
Guess we have no choice but to give it our all.
还没习惯吗？这是「开拓」的宿命。
Are you still not used to it? This is the destiny of a Trailblazer.
我，悬锋城的万敌，愿意前往。
I, Mydei from Castrum Kremnos, volunteer to join.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}已受岁月腐蚀，失去骄傲。但它的力量依旧强大，若想摘得胜利，唯有全军出动。
{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has become corrupted over the years, their pride waning, but their might endures. Victory only lies in assembling a full-fledged army.
…我也愿意陪同前往。引渡将死的灵魂，为各位纾解重压……
...I'm willing to join as well, to help guide departing souls and ease everyone's burdens...
我赞同你的观点。纵使神性已经流逝殆尽，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}仍是不可轻视的大敌。
I concur with your opinion. Though their divinity has faded, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} remains a formidable adversary.
但我不能将诸位的性命尽数押在一场战役上。
Yet, I cannot jeopardize all of your lives in one single battle.
如今，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}不知去向，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}仍在觊觎大地；而{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，虽然还未流露出对人类的敌意，但同样不容小觑。

As we speak, the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#} remains missing, the {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} is still coveting our land, and {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} present significant threats, despite their lack of overt hostility toward humanity.
即便圣城有两位半神驻守，这赌注也太过激进。因此……
Even with two demigods protecting the holy city, the risk is too great. Hence...
遐蝶，你要留在城中。前线并非你的归宿，战场应当被交还给纯粹的战士。
Castorice, you must remain here. Your place is not on the front lines, and the battlefield is best left to the warriors.
至于这两位异乡的勇士…挑选一位与你同行吧，白厄。将两位贵客一并推上前线，不是主人应有的作为。
As for the two foreign warriors... Select one to accompany you, Phainon. Placing both esteemed guests on the front line would not be proper.
{NICKNAME}擅长使用多种武器，那把炎枪不止一次化解了敌人的攻势。而我和万敌都更擅长进攻，如果仅从作战角度考虑……

{NICKNAME} excels in wielding a range of weapons, and {M#his}{F#her} flaming lance has quelled the enemy's advances multiple times. Mydei and I are both better at offense, so from a tactical standpoint...
{NICKNAME}, would you be willing to fight alongside us?
I might not be tanky enough, though.
有他们两人在，应该能速战速决。
With those two, the battle should end quickly.
可以试试让丹恒出肉装…
We could try letting Dan Heng tank...
你在说什么…不是开玩笑的时候。
What are you talking about? Now's not the time for jokes.
只要{NICKNAME}没有异议…阿格莱雅，就把狩猎泰坦的使命交给我们三人吧。
If {NICKNAME} has no objections... Aglaea, the three of us will take on the mission to hunt down the Titan.
…悬锋城是你的故乡，迈德漠斯，你的族人曾是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的子民——但你选择了依归奥赫玛，为神谕奉献己身。
Mydeimos, Castrum Kremnos was your home. Your people were once {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} followers, yet you've chosen to turn to Okhema and dedicate yourself to the prophecy.
你会否向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神躯发誓，将黄金裔的使命视作至高的职责？
Do you swear upon {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s body to make this mission of the Chrysos Heirs your foremost duty?
自{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}屈服于疯狂，它便不再是我族的神祇。
When {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} succumbed to madness, they stopped being a god to my people.
我会以人之怒火，剥夺神的权柄。至于火种，还有那即将空缺的神位……
I will use my wrath as a human to strip that god of their authority. As for the Coreflame and that soon-to-be-vacant divine throne...
那若是你渴求之物，就拿去吧。我对取代神明毫无兴趣。
If that is the object you desire, you can have it. I have no interest in becoming a replacement god.
哈…真是大方，但我不喜欢接受施舍。向{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的心脏刺出最后一剑的，一定是我。
Hah! How generous, but I'm not the type to accept charity, so I'll definitely be the one who deals the final blow through {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s heart.
如此一来，远征悬锋城的队伍已经成型。哀丽秘榭的白厄，悬锋城的万敌，还有…来自异乡的{NICKNAME}。
The party that will embark on the expedition to Castrum Kremnos is decided: Phainon from Aedes Elysiae, Mydei from Castrum Kremnos, and... {NICKNAME} from the outlands.
我——奥赫玛的阿格莱雅，黄金裔，承载{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}神权的半神——对你们即将践行的道路施以祝福。
I — Aglaea from Okhema, Chrysos Heir and the demigod who bears {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s divine authority — hereby bless your journey ahead.
缇安会为你们打开通往悬锋城的大门。愿金色的丝线指引你们的征途，亦愿它能带你们找到归家的路。
Trianne will open the gate that will lead you to Castrum Kremnos. May the golden thread guide you on your journey and bring you safely home.
走哇，走哇~风风…旋风…悬锋城！
Blow, wind, blow~! All the way to Castrum Kremnos!
呜呼！小白，小敌…来飞呀，我们一起飞过去！
Woohoo! Snowy, De, let's fly together! All the way across!
我们背后可没长翅膀啊，缇安老师，能麻烦你开一扇门吗？
We don't have wings on our backs, Trianne. Can you open a gate for us?
噢…门，好无聊噢。那好吧，来开门！「百界门」！呼呜——
Oh... A gate. How boring. Alright, let's open a gate! Century Gate! Woo!!
她怎么像个小孩子一样？
Why does she act like a child?
Oh, it's not an actual gate?
哈哈哈，你以为是真正的城门吗？
Hahaha, were you expecting actual city gates?
别看缇安老师贪玩，她可是翁法罗斯技艺最精湛的门匠，创造出的「百界门」万无一失。
It's true Trianne is very playful, but she's the best gatekeeper in Amphoreus. Her Century Gate never fails.
与其担心「门」的问题，不如先想想我们三人要如何对抗千军万马。
Instead of worrying about gates, why don't you take the time to think about how the three of us are supposed to fend off an entire army.
这可不像你啊？万敌的万，难道不是「以一敌万」的万吗？
That's not like you at all, Mydei. Don't tell me you're scared?
好啦！门…门…很快，马上，「百界门」要打开啦！
Alright! Century Gate... is opening... soon! Right now!
小白，小敌，还有…新来的小灰，准备好出发了吗？
Snowy, De, and newbie Little Gray, are you all ready?
Hold on, {NICKNAME}, take this with you.
丹恒将三月七的相机交给了你……
Dan Heng gives March 7th's camera to you...
这趟冒险的景象，也为三月记录下来吧。
Record the sights you see on your adventure for March.
我会拍下决定性的一刻！
I'll capture all the decisive moments!
Keep yourself safe, and work within your capabilities.
Ahem! Stand still and listen up!
我们，雅努萨波利斯的缇宝、缇安、缇宁，黄金裔的信使，承载{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}神权的半神——对你们施以祝福！
We — Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon from Janusopolis, messengers of the Chrysos Heirs and the demigods who bear {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s divine authority — give unto you our blessings!
愿命运向你们展现善意的面容，封锁每条通向死路的歧途……
May fate show you benevolence and seal away all paths that lead to dead ends...
And throw open all gates that lead to victory!
I still need a moment to mentally prepare...
准备，准备！等不及啦，好慢！
Get ready! Get ready! I don't wanna wait! Slowpoke!
抱歉啦，缇安老师。事关重大，再给我们多点耐心吧。
I'm sorry, Trianne. This is a matter of grave importance, so please bear with us.
我打算多花些时间留在这，向缇宝女士讨教翁法罗斯的知识。你负责行动，我负责研究，我们各司其职。
I plan to stay here for a while and learn more about Amphoreus from Lady Tribbie. You'll handle the action, and I'll deal with the research. We each have a role to play.
Shall we have a goodbye hug?
丹恒用沉默拒绝了你的提议。
Dan Heng refuses your proposal with silence.
我会为你祝祷，愿你永远比死亡的追逐行得更快。
I'll pray for you. May your steps be ever quicker than death's relentless pursuit.
神意使然，你终究还是站在了奥赫玛这边。
It is by the will of the gods that you stood on Okhema's side in the end.
I thought you didn't trust me.
你是白厄与万敌的同伴，只要他们愿意向你托付生死，我的信任并不重要。
You are Phainon and Mydei's companion. So long as they're willing to entrust you with their lives, my trust in you doesn't matter.
去吧，和两位黄金裔一起。奥赫玛需要一位真正的战神。疯狂的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，他的统治该被终结了。
Go. Stand with the two Chrysos Heirs. Okhema has need of a true god of war. It's time for the mad god {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} reign to end.
对不住，我应该更早些赶到的。请你们再听我说几句。
Sorry, I should've gotten here earlier. Please hear me out before you make up your mind.
聆听星宿的声音…这也能做到么？
Listening to the voices of the constellations... Is that really possible?
嗯…十二位泰坦的星宿都拍进去了。离开这里吧。
Alright... All the constellations of the twelve Titans are in there. Time to head out.
照白厄说的，去灵水盆前冥想吧。
Let's go meditate in front of the spirit basin like Phainon told us.
没想到，一觉刚醒就要踏上征程了。
I wasn't expecting the expedition to set off after only a night of rest.
先把问题放在一旁，去参加黄金裔的战前动员吧。
Let's set the questions aside for now. The Chrysos Heirs are getting ready to mobilize.
缇宝 缇宁 缇安  ？？  ？？  ？？……
没想到时移世易，连{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的腹地都在溃散边缘了，一个它的眷属都看不见。
Times really have changed. Even {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} own lands are on the verge of collapse. I haven't seen any sign of Titankin.
要是悬锋城还留有昔日兵力，哪怕只剩半成，阿格莱雅也是在让我们送死。
If even half of Castrum Kremnos' old might remains, it would mean that Aglaea sent us to our deaths.
这里是外城廊道，过去由重兵把守，即使你我联手——至多走出三十步距离。
This is the outer city corridor. It used to be heavily guarded by soldiers. Even with the two of us working together, we wouldn't have made it past thirty steps.
What if you added me to the count?
Is seeing all this making you homesick?
是啊，悬锋城曾是每一位战士的向往之地。
Yeah, Kremnos used to be the place every warrior longed for.
…万敌，你会觉得可惜吗？自己没有活在那个强者如云的年代。若非往日的英雄一一凋零，我也不会是你唯一的对手。
Kind of a shame you didn't live in that era full of strong warriors, eh Mydei? If all the heroes of the past hadn't fallen one after another, I wouldn't be the only worthy opponent you have left.
你害怕了？现在逃跑还来得及。
Are you scared? It's still not too late to run.
不，只是想起从前的勇士也是沿着这条廊道，向{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的城池进发，为自己的名字镀上金边。

No, I'm just thinking about the warriors who also braved this very corridor in the past. They all ventured towards the city of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}the Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}, all just to set their names in gold.
即便这座堡垒已然破败，但我们此刻要去做的事也没什么不同。
The fortress may be in ruins now, but what we're about to do is no different from what they were striving for back then.
走吧，夺回「纷争」的火种，或是死在它的悬锋下——
Let's go. We'll take back the Coreflame of Strife or die in Kremnos.
这两种荣耀，我们只能二选其一。
Those are the only two paths to glory we can choose from.
缇安老师，前面危险重重，你留在这里，找个安全的地方躲起来。
Trianne, the road ahead is dangerous. You should stay here and find a safe place to hide.
我们完成使命就会回来，到时再麻烦你使用「百界门」，好吗？
We'll return once we complete our mission. Then we'll have to trouble you to use the Century Gate again, alright?
明白啦。好好躲起来，不让坏人找到！
Got it. Hide so the baddies can't find me!
She still looks and acts just like a child.
为了翁法罗斯，缇安老师也付出了很多代价。
Trianne has sacrificed a lot for Amphoreus.
说起来，你不打算给{NICKNAME}讲讲悬锋城的事吗？不担心我给{F#她}{M#他}灌输些你最痛恨的野史？
By the way, aren't you going to tell {NICKNAME} any stories about Castrum Kremnos? Aren't you worried I'll tell {M#him}{F#her} all the historical myths you despise?
I'd like to see you try.
唉，有时跟你说话真的累……
*sigh* It's exhausting talking to you sometimes...
这画的是俄罗斯方块吗？
悬锋城自古便是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，是信众围绕泰坦建立的军事要塞，也是一座巨大的移动堡垒。
Castrum Kremnos has been {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s territory since ancient times. It's a massive moving fortress that surrounds the Titan, built by their followers.
在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}尚未堕落的年代，悬锋城会随它一同出征，以战养战，是纪律严明、极端尚武的城邦。

In the age before the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} fell from grace, Castrum Kremnos would follow the Lance into battle after battle. It's a city that enforces strict discipline and reveres military might.
这么一对比，我老家的民风可太淳朴了。
Compared to that, the customs of my home feel very unsophisticated.
那里。从那道门走出去，就是卫城。
There. Once we pass through that gate, we'll be in the acropolis.
终于能看见流窜的士兵了。
We'll finally see some soldiers roaming about.
尽是些堕入邪道的小卒，干脆利落地击碎它们就是最大的仁慈。
They're minions who've succumbed to depravity. Smashing them to pieces would be the greatest mercy.
看来阻碍我们的不止有敌人。这桥年久失修，悬锋城的工艺也有不可靠的时候？
It seems enemies aren't the only things stopping us. This bridge has fallen into disrepair. I suppose even Kremnoan craftsmanship can be unreliable sometimes.
让你失望了，外城是由罪犯建造的。
Sorry to disappoint, but the outer city was built by convicts.
哎，难怪这么脆弱，没准是这些人在报复你们呢。
No wonder it's so fragile. Maybe these people were taking their grievances out on you.
无所谓。这里从不以反抗为耻，无论是敌手还是死囚。
Doesn't matter. There's no shame in resistance here, whether it's from an adversary or a convict on death row.
不过，现在它反而拦住了想杀死{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的人。这种时候，就该怀念缇宝老师的力量了。
Except now, it's stopping the people trying to kill {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. It's moments like this that make me miss Tribbie's power.
「学会」和「精通」是两个概念，没有祭司的共鸣力，普通人念上两句祷言就得昏迷不醒。
Learning and mastering are two different concepts. Without a priest's resonance, an ordinary person would fall into a coma after chanting the first few words of the prayer.
Lucky for you, I'm not an ordinary person.
Lucky for you, I'm an expert.
别的不说，施展「神迹」可是很看天赋的。没有祭司的共鸣力，普通人念上两句祷言就得昏迷不醒。
I have to say that the ability to perform miracles is innate. Without a priest's resonance, an ordinary person would fall into a coma after chanting the first few words of the prayer.
既然你自告奋勇，那就麻烦露两手了。
But since you've volunteered, please be my guest.
天才啊，你不说都没人发现。
Genius. We never would have known if you hadn't said anything.
走吧，从断桥那儿可以绕路上去。
Let's go. We can take a detour from the broken bridge.
你还没见过它最壮观的时候。
You haven't seen it at its most magnificent.
过去，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}就是用那柄巨剑摧毁了{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的天上国度，还有一座又一座城邦。
That's the giant sword {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} used to destroy {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} heavenly kingdom long ago, followed by one city-state after another.
它不仅是一柄武器，更是悬锋人的信仰。在战场上英勇牺牲的灵魂，会为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}手中的锋刃淬火，成为神王伟力的一部分。

It's not just a weapon, it's the faith of the Kremnoan people. Souls who died heroically on the battlefield will further temper the blade in {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s hand, becoming a part of the god-king's power.
这就是泰坦的征伐——{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}、它的眷属、还有信仰「纷争」的人们，所向披靡，战无不胜。即便死去，也将拥抱永恒的荣耀。
Such is the Titan's conquest — {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the Titankin, and the people who have faith in Strife sweep away all their enemies. Even in death, they embrace eternal glory.
有点夸张了吧？悬锋城在黄金战争中的失利，我一下能记起来的就有三场。
I think you're exaggerating a little. I can think of at least three losses suffered by Castrum Kremnos in the Chrysos War, just off the top of my head.
败给阴谋和毒计并不可耻。应当为此蒙羞的，是那些孱弱的卑劣之徒。
There's no shame in losing to those who conspire and plot in secret. Those weak and despicable individuals are the ones who should be ashamed.
也对。「宁战死，毋荣归」——悬锋人都是直性子，一生都在奔赴战场，难怪{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}最爱作弄你们。

True. Valorous Death Before Glorious Return. The Kremnoan people have always been straightforward. They spend their whole lives running to the battlefield. No wonder {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} loves teasing you.
多半不是什么好事。说简单点。
Probably nothing good. Keep it simple.
这不止是一次远征，也是一场胜负。既然我们来到这儿了…不来酣畅淋漓地比一场吗？
This isn't just an expedition. It's also a battle to determine a victor. Since we're already here, why don't we have a match and fight to our heart's content?
你和我——重现当初的「悬锋祭典」。
Just you and me. Let's recreate the original Kremnos Festival.
让我见识见识悬锋城最盛大的搏杀竞技项目，也给眼前这场征伐多镀上一层荣耀的金边。<color=#dbc291ff>看看谁能干掉更多发疯的眷属</color>——如何？

Show me what the grandest fighting competition in Castrum Kremnos was like. Let's gild this expedition with another layer of glory and <color=#dbc291ff>compete to see who can kill the most crazed Titankin</color>. How about it?
给{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的最后一击。
The privilege of delivering the final blow to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.
有点意思。我接受你的挑战。
我了解他，这家伙只爱单打独斗。这前面有两条通路，{NICKNAME}就跟我走一边。
I know Mydei. He prefers to fight alone. There are two paths ahead. {NICKNAME} and I will take the same one.
不竞速，只比战利品的数量，计数全凭自觉。放心，被{F#她}{M#他}解决的敌人，我不会算在自己头上的。
We won't compete on who's fastest but on the number of trophies, so we'll each be responsible for our own tally. Don't worry. I won't add {M#his}{F#her} kills to my own count.
Doesn't matter to me even if you do.
你们对这里一无所知，我先让你们十步。
You don't know the lay of the land, so I'll give you a ten-step head start.
哈哈，完全被看扁了啊。但我可不会谦让——{NICKNAME}，我们出发吧！
Haha! He already thinks he's won, but I won't decline the offer either. Let's get going, {NICKNAME}!
Why are you still standing there?
有来有回，十步太多了——先还你一步。
Returning the favor. Ten steps are too many, you can have one back.
总算遇到点像样的抵抗了。
Finally, opponents who look like they can put up a fight.
Let's go! We're going to win this competition!
你和白厄合力打倒了4个泰坦眷属，并从它们身上收集了悬锋徽记……
You and Phainon defeated 4 Titankins together, and you collected Kremnos crests from their bodies...
打倒了两个，不错的开始。
That's two down. Not a bad start.
Not great at math, are you?
那是我俩合力，算到我头上当然要折半，这才叫公平竞争。
We fought them together, so naturally I can only take half the credit. That's what I call fair play.
分散兵力不会更危险吗？
Isn't it more dangerous to split up?
别担心，万敌很强，我也一样。
Don't worry. Mydei is strong, and so am I.
你看见那男人刚才的眼神了吗？他乡愁犯了，不想在旁人面前流露。
Did you see the look in his eyes? He's wracked by homesickness and doesn't want to show it to anyone else.
毕竟对万敌而言，族人和荣誉大于一切。就算破败成这样，能让他自由自在的地方，也只有悬锋城一处了。
Nothing is more important to Mydei than his people and glory. The city may be in ruins, but... Kremnos is still the only place where he can be free.
现在我们把他支开，任他想去哪哭鼻子都没所谓。
Now that we've sent him away, he can go have a good cry wherever he wants.
So, you two are actually really close.
亦敌亦友，一直如此。和他一起行动总能激起我的好胜心。
He's both my friend and my foe. It's always been this way. Working with him always brings out my competitive side.
The way you cared... I'm literally in tears...
我们打认识起就是这样，亦敌亦友。和他一起行动总能激起我的好胜心。
We've been both friends and foes since the day we met. Working with him always brings out my competitive side.
站着不动，是打算投降了？
Why are you just standing there? Giving up already?
你懂什么，我们是在讨论战略！
What do you know? We're talking strategy here!
走吧，{NICKNAME}。虽说不是非要比个高下，但我还是很讨厌输的。
Let's go, {NICKNAME}. The competition might not be the real goal, but I still really hate losing.
咦，你什么时候跑那边去的？
Huh? When did you get over there?
我早就说过，你们对这城中地形一无所知，如何能赢过我？
I told you before that you don't know the lay of the land in this city. That's why you won't beat me.
And just so you know: I'm at six.
嚯，看来你运气挺好，我们这条路就有点疏于防卫了。别急，等过了这座铁链桥，我一下就能追回来。
Wow, seems like luck is on your side. Our path was a little lax on security. Not to worry though, I'll catch up once we cross this iron chain bridge.
前提是你过得去。看见这锁链上的落雷了吗？
Assuming you can get across. Do you see the lightning bolts striking the chain?
不是一般的落雷啊。看来一股脑地冲过去，跟送死没什么差别。
It doesn't look like ordinary lightning, which means mindlessly running across would spell certain death.
这里居然有台「预言算碑」…去看看吧，说不定能派上用场。
There happens to be a Prophecy Tablet here though. Let's go take a look. Maybe it'll help us.
解决落雷的问题前，还是先离那条铁链远点吧。
Best keep a safe distance from that chain until we find a way to get rid of the lightning.
很好，这样就畅通无阻了。
Great. Should be smooth sailing from here.
怎么样，看你一脸没办法的样子，我可要先走一步了？
How's it going? You look stumped. I'll be going on ahead though.
区区闪电，也想拦住悬锋城的战士？
Mere lightning won't stop a warrior of Castrum Kremnos.
嗯…只是些生活杂物，没什么特别的。
Hm... Just regular old bits and pieces. Nothing that stands out.
积了一大层灰，应该很久没人动过了。大概是万敌的族人在离开时留下的吧？
There's a thick layer of dust. Guess no one's been here for a long time. They must have been left behind by Mydei's people when they departed.
你在奥赫玛一定见过，但只靠双眼很难辨别。
You've likely seen them in Okhema, but it's hard to tell just by appearance.
很难想象这里曾有人生活…
It's hard to imagine people used to live here...
这里毕竟是一座战士的城邦，但也有普通的住民。
It was a city of warriors, but ordinary citizens lived here too.
他们的相貌和他人无异，只是拥有一些…不同于我们的传统。
They look the same as anyone else. They just have traditions that are slightly... different from ours.
不如再探探吧。跟你在一起的时候我运气总是特别好，万一能碰到什么英雄的遗宝呢？
Why don't we keep searching? I get especially lucky when I'm with you. Maybe we'll find some hero's lost treasures.
是那种能留声的小玩意，现在的人都不怎么喜欢了。
It's a gadget that records your voice. People don't like this sort of thing nowadays.
{NICKNAME}，这个你拿着吧？摇一摇就有声音，作为收集品还蛮有意思的。
Why don't you hold on to it, {NICKNAME}? It makes a sound when you shake it. Should make for an interesting collectible.
在照片之外，说不定能让你们的旅途更丰富一点？
Give you something to show for your trip, in addition to the photos.
不像堆放在这里的旧物，看着也太新了，是谁留下的？
It doesn't look like the rest of the things that were left behind. It looks kind of new, in fact. Who could have left this here?
我也看不懂上面的符文，大概写的是悬锋城的古语。
I can't read the runes either. It must be written in an ancient language of Castrum Kremnos.
It's time to use the Synesthesia Beacon.
什么意思？行，你来试试吧。
What does that mean? Alright, give it a go.
别怕，隔壁不还有一位专家么？等和万敌合流了，让他看看吧。
Don't worry. We have an expert next door. We can show it to Mydei when we group back up.
但说起这个…我一直很奇怪，你明明来自天外，为什么能理解翁法罗斯的文字和语言？
Though that does remind me: I've been wondering how you can understand the language and writing we use in Amphoreus when you're from beyond the sky.
也许翁法罗斯没那么封闭。
Maybe Amphoreus isn't that isolated after all.
我和丹恒也还没弄清楚。
Dan Heng and I haven't figured that out yet either.
难道翁法罗斯和天外之界的交集远比人们想象更多？但史料里完全没有这部分记载啊。
Did Amphoreus have more dealings with worlds beyond the sky than we thought? But nothing like this was ever recorded in our historical materials.
也许，你们的到来…会颠覆很多事吧。
Maybe your arrival will overturn many things we thought we knew.
先别急着走，{NICKNAME}——我有种直觉，这房间里还藏着什么秘密。
Wait, {NICKNAME}, don't leave yet. My intuition tells me this room is still hiding a secret.
该翻的地方都翻过了，接着前进吧。
Well, we've turned over every nook and cranny. It's time to move on.
等等——那家伙打算做什么，想阻拦我们么？
Wait... What's that creature doing? Is it trying to stop us?
…连自己的同伴都要祸害，毫无荣耀可言。
It even killed its own comrade... They truly have no honor to speak of.
No, that's not going to work.
Sorry, it's because I'm too weak...
不是你的问题。悬锋城毕竟是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，恶劣的环境会阻隔你和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的共鸣。
It's not your fault. Castrum Kremnos is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory, after all. The environment is cutting off your ability to resonate with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.
当然不是。悬锋城毕竟是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，恶劣的环境会阻隔你和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的共鸣。
It really isn't. Castrum Kremnos is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory, after all. The environment is cutting off your ability to resonate with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.
按理来说，这座堡垒中应该有「岁月」祭司专用的仪器…有了，那边。
In principle, there should be an instrument used by Time Priests somewhere in this fortress... Aha, there it is.
我说什么来着？跟你在一起时运气总是不错。这种仪器能稳固祭司和命运三泰坦的联系，来试试吧。
What did I tell you? I get especially lucky when I'm with you. This instrument stabilizes the connection between priests and the Three Titans of Fate. Give it a try.
放心吧，如果你出了什么事——「挚友，我一定会把你最后的话带给丹恒！」
Relax. If something should happen to you, "I'll be sure to pass on your last words to Dan Heng, my friend!"
If something should happen to me...
「挚友，我一定会把你最后的话带给丹恒！」
"I'll be sure to pass on your last words to Dan Heng, my friend!"
Don't worry. You'll be just fine.
果然是中心地带，阵仗不小啊。
This is the center all right. That's a sizable formation.
换句话说，我们有机会超过万敌了。
In other words, this is our chance to overtake Mydei.
Now there's a chance to take the lead!
和我想的一样，你也有颗斗士的心啊，朋友。
My thoughts exactly. You have the heart of a fighter, my friend.
如果记载无误，「天谴之锋」的正下方就是举世闻名的「悬锋斗技场」。我们脚下这条路，或是通向荣耀，或是通向死亡……
If the records are correct, directly beneath the Blade of Fury lies the world-renowned Kremnos Arena. The path before us leads either to glory or to death...
当然，荣耀是我们的，而死亡——献给它们！
Of course, glory is ours, and death is theirs!
「凭着强大的实力和无间的默契，两位角斗士击败了所有的敌手……」
"With their exceptional strength and perfect teamwork, these two gladiators have bested every opponent..."
「…但他们企盼的荣光却没有如期而至。」
"...but the glory they've been striving for has not come as anticipated."
实在扫兴，连一丝泰坦的气息都没有。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}是躲起来了？
How disappointing — no sign of the Titan at all. Is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} hiding somewhere?
铸魂区，它多半守在那里。
They're most likely in the Soul-Forging Zone.
The path is right behind you.
我走另一条路，那里寄生了很多蛀虫。
I'll take the other path. It's crawling with parasites.
这场竞赛，你确实占了不少优势啊。{NICKNAME}，我们走？
You've definitely had the upper hand in this competition. {NICKNAME}, shall we go?
Hold on, this view is incredible...
I want to take a picture for my friend.
哦，这番景象可不多见，值得用留影石机记录下来。请随意。
Well, it's not every day you see a view like this. Go ahead and capture it with the photostone.
她应该对这种景色不感兴趣。
She is likely not interested in such scenery.
I'll take a photo of it then.
风中传来低沉的呢喃。是悠久历史的回响，是神明的挽歌……
A faint murmur rides the wind — a whisper of ancient history, the elegy of God...
照万敌的说法，我们应该继续深入悬锋城，是那个方向。
According to Mydei, we need to go deeper into Castrum Kremnos. It's that way.
不过这也有个出口，不知道通往什么地方……
But there's another exit here. I wonder where it leads.
或许可以用铁球砸碎路障，但愿那边是悬锋城的藏宝室吧，否则可不值当。
Maybe we can use the iron ball to smash through the roadblock. Hopefully, it leads to Castrum Kremnos' treasure vault. Otherwise, it might not be worth the effort.
楼上也有——也可以想办法把它弄下来。
There's one upstairs. Maybe we can figure out a way to get it down.
先走哪条路都行，交给你来定夺吧。
Choose any path you like. It's entirely up to you.
又见面了，现在战况如何？
We meet again! What's your count so far?
那也没差多少，我们还有机会。
That's not too far off. We still stand a chance.
对了，刚才忘了说，前面拿到一块刻着悬锋城古语的石板，待会儿帮忙翻译下？
I just remembered — we came across a slate with inscriptions in an ancient language of Castrum Kremnos. Could you help translate it?
超出你知识范围了？无所不知的野史学家。
Is it beyond your knowledge, amateur historian?
可不是么，只能仰仗你了。
Sadly, yes. You are my only hope now.
你就继续优哉游哉吧，恕不奉陪。
You just keep having fun. I've got better things to do.
看起来像是在制造泰坦眷属，或许这就是「铸魂」的意义？
Looks like they're creating Titankin. Maybe this is what "Soul-Forging" means?
用原石打造出一具躯壳，再注入神明的金血赐予其活力……
Crafting a body from rough stones and then infusing it with a god's golden blood to bring it to life...
难怪悬锋城能连战连捷，借这种方式，士兵简直源源不绝啊。
No wonder Castrum Kremnos keeps winning battle after battle. With this method, they can create as many soldiers as they want...
怎么又让你抢先一步…不过这里还剩下不少敌人啊。怎么，累了？
How did you beat us here again? But there are still plenty of enemies around. What's wrong? Already tired?
留给你们的最后机会，不要也罢。
I gave you two this final chance on purpose. If you're not interested, fine.
那你还真是慷慨。这里是「堆料区」吧，我们离{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}应该很近了？
Well, how generous of you. This is the Stockpiling Zone — we must be getting close to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.
没错。也许等你赶到时，它已经是我手里的尸体了。
That's right. But by the time you arrive, he might already have fallen by my hand.
那是得速战速决，总不能眼睁睁看着你去送死吧？
Then we must act quickly. We can't let you die right before our eyes, can we?
路断了。奇怪，那他是怎么过去的？难道…是那家伙故意设的路障？
The path is cut off. But how did he get through? Did... he set up this roadblock on purpose?
别看他表面老实，其实内心精明得很。
He might look honest, but he's a lot shrewder than he seems.
别看他表面老实，其实内心精明得很。
He might look honest, but he's a lot shrewder than he seems.
冷静些，咱们可没有不死之身啊。
Hold your horses! We're not exactly immortal here.
开个玩笑，还是观察下四周吧……
这东西也许能帮上忙——<color=#dbc291ff>扎格列斯之手</color>的石台，用它填平断裂的通路就行了。
This might come in handy — the stone table for the <color=#dbc291ff>Hand of Zagreus</color>. Let's use it to fill the crack in the path.
简而言之，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}是司掌诡计的泰坦，偷盗、欺诈、背叛，这些令人不齿的词语都和它有关。
Simply put, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} is the Titan of trickery — thievery, deception, and betrayal, these unsavory acts are all tied to them.
那位泰坦已经殒落，但在世界各地留下了「蛊惑之手」。人们也会操作这些巨手来进行搬运，还有…咳，偷窃。
That Titan has fallen, but they left "Bewitching Hands" scattered all over the world. Now, people use these giant hands to move things around — and, well, to steal things, too.
Let's get a move on. I'll stop with the questions.
虽然不认可这种行为。但情况特殊，借用一次吧。
I don't normally approve of this, but given the circumstances, let's use it this one time.
这次也许得用它把障碍吹走。
This time, we might be able to use it to blow away the barrier.
这样就好了吧？但愿别再被莫名其妙的机关挡住去路了。
This should work now. Let's just hope no more strange mechanisms get in our way.
悬锋人用那双如鹰隼般锐利的双眼追踪着你，你很确定他可以坚持一天一夜不眨眼。
The Kremnoan follows you with his eagle-sharp gaze. You're sure he can keep his eyes open day and night without blinking.
抱歉，谁叫有人没把路上的障碍清扫干净呢？
Apologies, but someone forgot to clear out the obstacles along the way.
废话少说，看看你们的结果吧。
Enough chatter. Show me your tally.
万敌展示出他收集的三十枚悬锋城徽记。
Mydei displays the thirty Castrum Kremnos crests in his collection.
与万敌比较了徽记总数……
Compare the total number of crests you obtained with Mydei's...
愿赌服输，最后一击给你了。
Well, I'm a man of my word. You can deliver the final blow.
等等，我又想了想——这赌注还是太大了些。靠一场比试决定荣耀的归属，不是敬神的表现。
Wait... On second thought, the stakes seem a bit too high. Deciding who gets the glory with just one competition might be disrespectful to the gods.
我修改赌注，你只要把收获的战利品分我们一半就行。至于{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…我们会联手将其击败。
Let's change the stakes. You can just share half of your spoils with us. As for {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, we can take them down together.
...The real question is if we can pull it off.
...Looks like I could work on my skills a bit more.
愿赌服输，给{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的最后一击让给你吧。
Well, I'm a man of my word. You can deliver the final blow to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.
如此轻易就让出了最后一剑的荣光，你也配得上战士之名么？
Giving away the glory of delivering the final blow that easily? I thought you were a real warrior.
不愧是悬锋城的「王储」，对这些繁文缛节还真是重视啊。
I guess being the crown prince of Kremnos makes you obsessed with all this ceremonial stuff.
靠一场比试决定荣耀的归属，不是敬神的表现。你我胜负未分，继续吧——
Deciding who gets the glory with just one competition might be disrespectful to the gods. Let us declare no victor and continue on—
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，它的亡魂属于真正的强者。
{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul should be claimed by true warriors.
你这家伙，有时候说话还挺好听的。
Surprisingly, your words can sometimes be music to my ears.
It's a tie. Funny how things work out, huh?
既然如此，给{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的夺命一剑就由我们一起刺出，你说呢？
In that case, how about we deliver the final blow to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} together? What do you say?
既然胜负未分，那就继续吧——
Since there is no victor, let's continue on—
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，它的亡魂属于真正的强者。
{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul should be claimed by true warriors.
哈哈——就这么决定了，我们平分这份荣光。
Haha, it's settled then. Let's divide the glory equally.
气息微弱，但它就在这里。我们与「纷争」的路途，即将交汇。
There's just a faint scent, but I'm certain they're here. We're about to cross paths with Strife.
这个大家伙，莫非是真言狮口？
Wow, look at this big guy. Could this be Verax Leo?
放尊重些。这是「黄金狮首」，别和那些满口流言野史的东西相提并论。
Show some respect. This is Chryseus Leo, not some rumor-spouting gossip-monger.
黄金狮首是悬锋城首屈一指的参谋，它的谏言为我族赢下了诸多战役，化解了无数阴谋。
Chryseus Leo was the top advisor in Castrum Kremnos, whose wise counsel helped my tribe win many battles and thwart numerous schemes.
遗憾，如今它已失语。黄金裔若能借用它的智慧——
Sadly, he has lost his voice now. If only the Chrysos Heirs could benefit from his wisdom—
已经过去许多年了…你还醒着？
After all these years, you're still awake?
我不会…忘记您的声音。我一直…在等待这个时刻。
I could never... forget your voice. I've been waiting for this moment... all along.
说吧，吾师！我会聆听你的教诲。
Please, teacher, share your wise counsel with me!
王储啊…悬锋城已经失去了一切。它的人民…传统…以及最为宝贵之物，荣光。
Crown prince... Castrum Kremnos has lost everything — its people, traditions... and most importantly, its glory.
人民为生存迁徙，传统被时光消磨，但荣光？哪怕隐入浓雾，城墙崩析，悬锋城从未背弃战士的荣耀。为何口出此言？

To survive, our people have migrated, and our traditions have faded with time. But glory? Even though it has vanished into the mist and its walls have crumbled, Castrum Kremnos has never forsaken the glory of its warriors. Why say otherwise?
我们的神明…已经彻底失去理智。它不再是万人敬畏的战争图腾…它已然堕落，正在酝酿着毫无荣光的阴谋……
Our god has completely lost their sanity. No longer a revered symbol of war, they have fallen and are now plotting an evil scheme...
我恳求你，迈德漠斯…终结它漫长的痛苦，让它以战士的身份死去！它必须…带着荣耀……
I urge you, Mydeimos, to put an end to their endless suffering. Allow them to die as a warrior! They must... go with honor...
吾师——回应我！我以王储的名义，命令你……
Teacher, answer me! As your crown prince, I command you—
让它休息吧，它应该已经累了。
Let him rest. He must be exhausted.
…也许只是一头老狮子临终前的谵语，不必放在心上。我们继续赶路……
...Perhaps those were just the delirious words of a dying lion. I shouldn't overthink it. Let's keep going.
等等，这是先前提到的石板，只凭我们无法解读。
Hold on. This is the slate that I mentioned earlier. We couldn't decipher it.
说不定和那头老狮子口中之事有关。
Maybe it's connected to the scheme the old lion mentioned.
不…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}绝对不会……
难怪奥赫玛会遭遇袭击，没想到堕入疯狂的泰坦还能有此算计……
That explains the surprise attack on Okhema. I didn't think that the mad Titan could have orchestrated it...
奥赫玛将要面临灭顶之灾。必须有人回援。
Okhema is on the brink of destruction. Someone needs to go back and rescue them.
不、不对。我们要接着前进，完成我们的使命。
N—No, we need to press on and finish our mission.
你被功名戳瞎双眼了吗？我早就说过，若想摘得胜利，唯有全军出动。
Are you blinded by glory? As I said before, victory only lies in assembling a full-fledged army.
我们距离{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}只有一步之遥，只要战胜了恶念的源头，阴谋自会消散。
We're just one step away from {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. Defeat the source of the evil, and the threat will vanish on its own.
就如同那可怕的一击，你和我也是离弦的箭矢。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}能给奥赫玛带来灭顶之灾，反过来，我们也一样。
Just like that decisive strike, there is no turning back for us. {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} could drive Okhema to the brink of ruin, but we can do the same to them.
而且…我信任阿格莱雅和缇宝老师。奥赫玛有两位半神驻守，还有我们的伙伴，她们能保护好圣城。
Besides, I have faith in Aglaea and Tribbie. With two demigods and our allies watching over Okhema, they should be more than capable of protecting the holy city.
We can't let our efforts go to waste.
…好，相信一次你们的判断。但愿我们不会被推进悔恨的深渊。
...Alright, I'll trust your judgment this time. Let's hope we don't end up in an abyss of regrets.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…你的神躯果然被疯狂之手掏空了么？你已彻底舍弃战士的尊严了么……
{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... Has your divine body truly been hollowed out by the hands of madness? Have you completely forsaken your dignity as a warrior?
温度又升高了，这里还在运作吗？
It's getting even hotter. Is this place still in use?
After we pass through here, we'll reach the Soul-Forging Zone.
燥热不堪。杂念也在脑海里滋生……
The heat is unbearable, and all these thoughts are echoing in my head...
现在想想，我们的确有可能战死在这里，对吗？
On second thought, this could very well be where we meet our end, right?
小心，你的思绪正在被「纷争」腐蚀。
Be careful. Your thoughts are being corrupted by Strife.
你说的没错，继续深入是我的坚持。而且{NICKNAME}也在，我们一定会完成使命，并全身而退。
You're right. It was my decision to keep pushing forward. And with {NICKNAME} here, we're sure to complete our mission and return safely.
就像眼前的道路，尽管残破不堪，但一定会通向终点。
Just like the path ahead, even though it's completely dilapidated, it will still lead us to our final destination.
伟哉，吾主{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}。
All hail {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, my master and guide.
Immortal soul of war, ever by my side.
眷属，我问你——悬锋城是否正准备灭绝奥赫玛？
Titankin, let me ask you this: Is Castrum Kremnos planning to destroy Okhema?
你的沟通技巧还真直白…
You don't beat around the bush, do you?
你有什么妙语？我洗耳恭听。
What do you propose? I'm all ears.
This might be above its pay grade.
伟哉，吾主{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}。
All hail {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, my master and guide.
Immortal soul of war, ever by my side.
的确尚有理智，可惜剩得不多。
It is indeed rational, but just barely.
走吧。或许附近还有能交流的眷属。
Let's keep going. There might be other Titankin nearby we can talk to.
Aren't you going to "take care" of it?
你若是视作威胁，请便——我没有出手的理由。
If you see it as a threat, go ahead. I have no reason to do it.
慢着！别在这里白费力气，还是用点巧劲吧。
Hold your horses! Don't waste your energy here — use your head.
Looks like we'll need to use the hand again.
以永不锈蚀之钢，雕琢永不磨灭之身。
Sculpt an indestructible body with steel that never rusts.
伟哉，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…君临万邦。壮哉，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…举世畏栗。
The all-powerful {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, ruler of all lands. The all-divine {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, bringer of a thousand fears.
进攻奥赫玛的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}只是一具半身。按它的意思，悬锋城中不会还有吧？
The {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} that attacked Okhema was only a double. Considering what the Titankin said, could there be more of them in Castrum Kremnos?
大战之末，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}莫名陷入疯狂，神力不断流失。如今…那位泰坦残存的力量不及过去的十分之一。
By the end of the war, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} had succumbed to madness, and their divine power dwindled. Now, the Titan's remaining strength is less than a tenth of what it once was.
为自己打造半身的确能稳固势力。但相比光荣的死亡，它竟选择了用此种方式苟延残喘…令人唏嘘。
Creating doubles for themself might have stabilized their power, but instead of a glorious death, they chose to drag out their miserable existence. How tragic.
看来它已经彻底失去了战士的尊严。你带领族人离开是正确的决定，万敌。
They seem to have forfeited all their dignity as a warrior. Leading your people away from here was the right choice, Mydei.
我的抉择无需粉饰，救世主。不过是一次放下骄傲的自我流放，不值得被编撰为颂歌。
There's no need to glorify my choice, Deliverer. It was just a self-imposed exile that cost me my pride. Not something worth celebrating in a song.
但若它所言属实，对阵{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}注定是一场苦战。
But if the Titankin's words are true, going up against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} is destined to be a bitter fight.
<color=#dbc291ff>不过说到不死之身，你也是这个领域的专家啊。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Speaking of indestructible bodies, you're quite the expert in that area yourself.</color>
{NICKNAME}，还没和你提起过吧？黄金裔们可是各个身怀绝技。
{NICKNAME}, did I ever tell you? The Chrysos Heirs are all endowed with unique powers.
而传言中，悬锋城那位战无不胜的王储，万敌——他的天赐就是「拒绝死亡」。
Legend has it that Mydei, the invincible crown prince of Kremnos, has a talent for "defying death."
英灵，为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}天谴之矛{RUBY_E#}献上汝之战魂……
Martyrs, consecrate your souls of war for the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}...
成为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的利刃…贯穿敌人的心脏与机核……
You shall become {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s blade... to pierce through the enemy's heart and core...
成为供喂火种的柴薪…将腐烂的世界付之一炬……
You shall be the timber to nourish the Coreflame... to reduce the decayed world to ashes...
"Reduce the decayed world to ashes"? With nefarious schemes?
它们和悬锋城一样，被那疯狂扭曲了。虽然仍记得如何杀戮，但忘却了杀戮背后的意义。
They've been twisted by madness, just like Castrum Kremnos. They remember how to kill, but they've forgotten why.
但我一向觉得，用刀杀人，不比用计谋杀人更高贵。
I've always believed that killing with blades isn't any nobler than killing with subterfuge.
除了使命和生存，没有其它动因能为暴力辩护。
Aside from one's mission and survival, no other reason can justify violence.
这便是你我之间的歧异。于我族眼中，荣光和征服亦是正当的理由。
That's where we differ. For my tribe, glory and conquest are also valid reasons.
但你并非打心底里认同这些，不是么？
But deep down, you don't really agree with that, do you?
嗯？这家伙…刚才是面对着我们的吗？
Hmm? Was it facing us the whole time?
Isn't it kind of cute how slowly it speaks?
为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}天谴之矛{RUBY_E#}……
我已经放弃理解这些家伙的行为逻辑了。简直就是一片混乱。
I've given up on figuring out the logic of these minions. They're just pure chaos.
无妨，你我很快就要给这场疯狂画上句点了。
No matter. You and I will soon bring this madness to a close.
时时刻刻都准备着。背负「纷争」的火种…那是我的夙愿。
Always. Bearing the Coreflame of Strife... has been my deep-seated desire.
我期许的命运…就在这扇门后。
The fate I've been hoping for... lies behind this door.
无用的杂念，无数人因它在战场上丢掉性命。
Useless distractions. Countless lives have been lost on the battlefield because of it.
别忘了，我们会站在此处是因为你的坚持。那就拿出那该死的觉悟。
Remember, you insisted that we come here. Now, show us that cursed resolve!
我该怎么假装这只是一场普通的战斗？
But how can I pretend that this is just an ordinary battle?
我的使命、意义…全都押在这里。你难道忘得了吗？族人的苦难…被侵蚀的故土……
My mission and purpose... all depend on this. Can you forget the suffering of your people and your corroded homeland?
当然不会忘记。但我掌握了一种技巧，你或许无法理解。
Never! But I've learned a method you probably wouldn't understand.
所有的悔恨、愤怒，在这种时刻，我学会了掌控它们，将它们淬炼成一把锋利无比的兵器，为我所用……
All the anger and regret I feel right now, I've learned to control them and hone them into a razor-sharp weapon for my use...
它有个简单的名字：杀意。
It has a simple name: Intent to kill.
但现在，也许我们都该屈从内心的兽性。
But right now, perhaps it's best for us to submit to the beasts inside.
腐朽的神！直面我，迎接你的末日吧！
Corrupted god! Face me and meet your doom!
我是悬锋之子，神谕中的黄金裔。我为你带来了最公平的价码——
I am a son of Kremnos and a Chrysos Heir of the prophecy, and I now offer you the fairest deal—
以我的一千道伤疤和一百条性命，换你在史诗中荣耀的死亡！
I trade a thousand scars and a hundred lives of mine for your glorious death!
战魂正在悬锋城上空聚集…正在涌向「天谴之锋」！
The souls of war are amassing in the skies above Kremnos... surging toward the Blade of Fury!
它根本没想决出胜负，只是在利用一次又一次死亡，为手中的锋刃淬火…哪怕经受百死，也要贯穿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的躯体！

They have no intention of winning the fight. Instead, they're using death after death to temper their blade... Even with a hundred deaths, they've resolved to pierce through {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s body!
毫无荣誉之心…我族的神，你偏偏就堕落到这种地步？
All their honor is gone... How did the god of our tribe fall so low?
救世主，给你个当英雄的机会。
把这片战场交给我。我会拖住这具躯壳，让它无暇挥舞「天谴之锋」。带着消息回去…通知那两位半神。
I'll hold them off here and keep them from wielding the Blade of Fury. You need to head back and notify the two demigods.
你疯了吗，凭一人之力对抗泰坦？那我也要留下。{NICKNAME}，拜托你——
Are you out of your mind, facing the Titan alone? I'm staying too. {NICKNAME}, please—
赶紧滚！非得让我这么说？
Get lost! Do you have to make me say this?
我必须留下，不是为了奥赫玛的安危，而是要和自己的神明做个了结。
I must stay here, not for Okhema's safety, but to settle the score with my god.
就算不死是种诅咒，它也不该被运用得如此卑劣。
Even if immortality is a curse, it shouldn't be used so despicably.
走吧，你的战场另有他处，「救世主」。
Go, Deliverer. Your battlefield lies elsewhere.
...Stay strong. Try not to get killed too many times.
你和我——两个被死亡拒之门外的战士，世间还有比这更加公平的竞技吗？
You and I — two warriors rejected by death. Is there any contest more fair than this?
来！未能成王之王，已失神格之神！我们多么登对，就在这里——
Come forth! The king who has never claimed his throne, against the god who has fallen from grace. How perfectly matched we are!
Let's battle till the world's final breath!
How does it feel to be home again after so long?
Not here. I lived in the inner city.
Oh... As befitting of <color=#dbc291ff>the crown prince of Kremnos</color>.
Amazing! You do have the touch!
又断了…看来泰坦的力量也维持不了这桥的稳定。
And it's broken again... I guess even a Titan's power isn't enough to stabilize this bridge.
就像罪犯的灵魂一样，脆弱不堪。
Just like the soul of a criminal: Fragile.
「天谴之锋」——即便世界已经破碎，它依然高悬于世人头顶。
The Blade of Fury — Even if the world lay shattered, it would still hang high above everyone's heads.
顺利着陆！希望这条路上的敌人对得起咱俩的火力。
Made it! Hopefully the enemies on this side are worthy of our combined might.
沿着铁索走到对面，通往那柄巨剑的道路，就该有这种气魄。
Following an iron chain, onto the path leading to the giant sword on the other side? This is more like it!
Whoa! You're nimbler than I thought!
看好你自己吧，这底下可是无尽深渊。
Worry about yourself. There's an endless abyss below us.
不止命多，而且命大——我都快妒忌你了。
You practically have nine lives and, on top of that, you're lucky? I'm almost jealous.
这一关过得真险…幸好我俩平衡感都还不错。
Whew... That was a close one. Thankfully we both have a remarkable sense of balance.
这里是休息室？有些格格不入啊。
So, this is a lounge? It feels out of place.
过去参与竞技的战士，都是在这儿休整的么？
Maybe this is where all the warriors in the past took their breaks during competitions.
前进的路被铁球挡住了……
The road ahead is blocked by the iron ball...
能再呼唤一次{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}奇迹吗？
Can you call upon {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s Miracle again?
不错，感觉你的状态都不一样了。
Not bad. Something feels different about you already.
Why don't you give it another go?
这动静…咱们再不加把劲，肯定要输给他了。
From the sound of things, we're about to lose if we don't step it up.
小心，距离「天谴之锋」已经很近了……
Careful. We're getting very close to the Blade of Fury...
「迎面走来的是令人闻风丧胆的角斗士组合，黑暗剑士白厄——」
"Approaching now are the duo of gladiators whose names strike terror in all who hear them — the one and only Dark Swordmaster, Phainon!"
「残忍的一击！球棒侠没有给{M#他}{F#她}的敌人留下生路！听到了吗？排山倒海的喝彩声——」
"What a savage hit! The Baseballer shows no mercy to {M#his}{F#her} enemies. Can you hear that? The crowd's roaring in approval!"
"Hmm... This requires a bit of imagination."
你们俩的妄想症吵到我了！
These delusions of yours are seriously getting on my nerves!
「…还要面对场外的噪音干扰，真可怜啊。」
"...must also contend with the noise from outside the arena. How unfortunate!"
There, all done! Let's move on.
Blocked path? That won't stop us!
怎么楼梯口也被堵住了，这是人住的地方吗？
Why's the staircase blocked? Weird to think that people lived here.
漂亮！去收获我们应得的奖励吧，反正悬锋城是没人用得上了。
Well done! Go claim our rewards — no one else in Kremnos will have any use for them anyway.
堕落的泰坦，失心的眷属，荒凉的堡垒……
A fallen Titan, soulless kin, and a desolate fortress...
记忆和现实的矛盾，在各地都成为常态了啊。
This place has fallen pretty far from the way people remember it.
前面又有一幅壁画。凑近些看看？
There's another mural up ahead. Want to take a closer look?
马上就要跟万敌汇合了，<color=#dbc291ff>要不要把这片区域清理干净，多收集些</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋徽记</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>战利品</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>？</color>

We'll be meeting up with Mydei soon. <color=#dbc291ff>Want to clean up this area and increase our</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Kremnos crest</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>trophy</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>count?</color>
Victory or defeat, it all comes down to this, {NICKNAME}.
现在，想办法把断裂的路面铺平。
We need to find a solution to mend the broken path.
这么多石料，不知能打造多少战争机器？
So many stones here. I wonder how many war machines can be built with all this?
但今天过后，它们就只能永远沉睡了。
But after today, they'll be slumbering here forever.
看，有人快等得不耐烦了。
闷热。泰坦的怒火点燃了空气。
The sweltering heat — the Titan's wrath has set the air ablaze.
收起你的剑…它似乎尚有理智。
Put your sword away... It seems to still be rational.
也许我们能得到些蛛丝马迹。
We might be able to get some clues from it.
你的残酷不亚于悬锋城的刽子手。
Your ruthlessness is akin to that of the executioners in Castrum Kremnos.
翻译一下…好吧，我也拿不准这句的意思。
Let me translate that for you... Actually, I'm not sure what it means either.
我们与一位泰坦的殒落如此接近…这感觉很虚幻。
We're so close to the fall of a Titan... It feels unreal.
不必再将它视作神明，你，我，它——只是身陷死斗的战士，仅此而已。
Don't think of them as a god. It's just you, me, and them — warriors in a fight to the death.
那时的压迫感…又回来了。你感受到了吗，{NICKNAME}？
That oppressive feeling from earlier — it's back. Do you feel it, {NICKNAME}?
但那股气焰不再纯粹，它掺杂着血腥味，还有亡灵的哭嚎……
But that bluster is no longer pure. It's mingled with the scent of blood and the cries of lost souls...
万敌，我做不到和你一样……
Mydei, I may not be able to fight like you...
但我会以自己的方式战斗，狩猎神明！
But I will do battle in my own way and bring down this god!
别想再用劣质的半身应付我们——粉碎吧！
Stop hiding behind those pathetic doubles! We'll crush you!
终于愿意现出真身了吗，泰坦？
Finally ready to reveal your true self, Titan?
堕落的神，尝尝人的怒火吧！
Feel the wrath of humanity, corrupted god!
碾碎「纷争」的战甲，摘下它的火种！
Shatter the armor of Strife and strip away the Coreflame!
你与白厄在掩护下撤离、回到奥赫玛……
You and Phainon retreat using the opportunity and return to Okhema...
万敌与尼卡多利的战吼自颓垣之后传出…不要辜负了万敌的搏命鏖战，抓紧时间破解尼卡多利的秘密吧。
Mydei and Nikador's battle cries can be heard from beyond the crumbling walls... Don't let Mydei's desperate struggle be in vain. Hurry up and uncover Nikador's secrets as fast as you can.
此处已被断壁残垣封锁，你们曾与尼卡多利鏖战的那片战场，如今已随慑人的战吼一同成为追忆。
This place has been sealed off by the crumbled walls. The battlefield where you once faced Nikador has now become nothing more than a memory alongside the terrifying howls of battle.
你们那位朋友…是叫「三月」，对吧？
So, that friend of yours... her name is "March"?
「三月七」…亏你还觉得我们的名字奇怪。
March 7th... and you think our names sound strange?
之前在创世涡心，听你们提起过她。
You guys mentioned her in the Vortex of Genesis earlier.
Did we mention her to you before?
之前在创世涡心，听你们提起过她。
You guys mentioned her in the Vortex of Genesis earlier.
其实我一直想说，论名字的奇特程度，这位也不遑多让吧？
I must say, her name is pretty unconventional, wouldn't you agree?
你们一定很珍视和她的关系，才会时刻帮她记录旅行中的点滴。
You must really value your friendship with her to go through all this effort to document the journey for her.
她本来也要来的，但身体抱恙。
She was supposed to be here, but she's not feeling well.
实不相瞒，正是两位对待朋友的态度，让我对你们多信任了几分。
Honestly, seeing how you both look out for your friend has furthered my trust in you.
一个人道德的山尖，往往就是他对待朋友的方式。老师教给我的东西，大多都还回去了，但这一句依旧清晰。
A person's true character often comes to light in their friendships. Most of what my teacher taught me has slipped away, but this sentence is still vivid in my memory.
尤其在这动荡的时代，值得托付后背的同伴…弥足珍贵。
Especially in these tumultuous times, friends who you can trust completely are a rare and precious find.
接着赶路吧，不能让那家伙太得意。那扇紧闭的大门，也许可以用预言算碑打开。
Let's keep going. We can't let Mydeimos get too full of himself. The Prophecy Tablet might be able to unlock that closed gate.
呜…缇安，好累。感觉好晕…小敌他，会安全吗？
Hnngh... Tired... and dizzy... Will De be okay?
没事的…{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}是我见过最强悍的战士。
He'll be fine... {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#} is the fiercest warrior I know.
是万敌生来就背负的赐福，但也是诅咒。那是他身为黄金裔的表征。
Something Mydei was born with. A blessing and a curse — the true mark of a Chrysos Heir.
How long do you think he'll hold out for...?
他一定能坚持到我们返回。
Until our return. I'm sure of it.
是万敌生来就背负的赐福，但也是诅咒。那是他身为黄金裔的表征。
Something Mydei was born with. A blessing and a curse — the true mark of a Chrysos Heir.
缇安老师，请你回去休息吧。也许很快又会需要你的帮助。
Go get some rest, Trianne. We might need your help again before you know it.
好…知道啦。小白，还有小灰…你们也要保重。
Okay... Don't worry about me! Take care of yourselves, too...
走吧，{NICKNAME}…不能再耽搁了，赶紧去找阿格莱雅。
Let's go, {NICKNAME}... It's a race against time. We have to find Aglaea right away.
还好么，没受伤吧？我收到白厄的急报了，情况似乎很不乐观。
Are you okay? Are you injured? Things didn't sound good in Phainon's message.
阿格莱雅——等等，缇宝老师在哪？
我们收到了你的传信，她已经去做相应的准备了。
She began making the necessary preparations the moment we got your message.
城中的公民还和平日一样在寻欢作乐…你认为这算不上一次危机？
The city's citizens are enjoying themselves like it's any other day... Do you not see this as a crisis?
若要以同样的方式应对每桩危机，奥赫玛会终日不得安宁。于无声中抹去威胁，让他们不必活在恐惧的阴霾之下，才是黄金裔的职责。

Okhema would be in constant turmoil if we were to raise the alert each time danger befell us. Silently eliminating threats and sparing them from living under the shadow of fear — that is the duty of the Chrysos Heirs.
关于这点，我和你的看法一直存在分歧…但现在不是争论的时候。
I don't see things that way... but now's not the time for arguments.
天谴之锋已经瞄准了{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的心脏。如果不设法阻止疯狂的泰坦，整座圣城都可能灰飞烟灭。
The Blade of Fury has its aim trained on {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s heart. We need to stop the mad Titan, or the entirety of the holy city could be reduced to ash.
但{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}为自己打造了不灭的躯壳，无法被彻底杀死。万敌正在拖延时间…我们必须珍惜他争取到的每一秒。

But {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has crafted an indestructible body for themself, one that can't be entirely destroyed. Mydei is buying us time... We need to cherish every second he's fought for.
你在迫使自己冷静，这是成长，白厄。
You're willing yourself to stay calm, Phainon. That's commendable progress.
但悬锋城隐入迷雾许久，我们无从得知{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}神躯不灭的奥秘。
Castrum Kremnos has been shrouded in the fog far too long, leaving us unable to discover the mystery behind {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s undying body.
…只有一位泰坦能帮助我们寻得真相。
...We can only hope to learn the truth from one Titan.
白厄阁下，我会和你们一同前去谒见{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。希望它能为我们重现往昔的风景，揭示{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}欺瞒死亡的真相……

Lord Phainon, I will join you in the audience with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. Let's hope they can restore the visions of the past and reveal the truth behind {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s defiance of death.
遐蝶小姐，你也没有头绪吗？
You have no clue either, Miss Castorice?
「纷争」和「死亡」曾形影不离。鼎盛时的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}重视荣耀，绝不会背叛盟友。
Strife and Death used to be inseparable. {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} valued honor in their glory days, so they would never have betrayed their allies back then.
但自它陷入疯狂后，誓约便不复存在。现在看来…为了追求不朽的躯体，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}已经背叛了「死亡」。

But their pact was broken when {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} descended into madness. From what we know so far... in the pursuit of an immortal body, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} betrayed Death.
还有另一件事。悬锋堡的石板上提到了「渗透」……
There's one other thing. We found a slate in Kremnos that mentioned an infiltration...
我和缇宝会竭尽全力守护圣城的公民，各位无需挂虑。
Don't worry about that. Tribbie and I will do our best to protect the people of our holy city.
找到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，用你们所能想到的一切手段揭露疯王的秘密。
Focus on getting to {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and using whatever means possible to learn the mad Titan's secrets.
缇宝已在城外等待，随她前往重渊吧。我会向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祈求诸位的成功。
Tribbie is waiting for you outside the city — go with her to the Abyss. I will pray to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} that you will find success.
缇宝已在城外等待，随她前往重渊吧。我会向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祈求诸位的成功。
Tribbie is waiting for you outside the city — go with her to the Abyss. I will pray to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} that you will find success.
缇宝老师！我们准备好了。
Tribbie! We're ready to set off.
嗯，情况*我们*已经了解了。这次就由*我们*送大家去重渊。
Okay, we've been updated on what has happened. Let us send you into the Abyss this time.
这样没问题吗？以往都是缇安老师……
Are you sure? It's always been Trianne doing this...
悬锋城这两去两回，缇安已经用光了力气，需要些时间恢复。
The two trips to and from Castrum Kremnos have completely drained Trianne. She'll need some time to recover.
不用为*我们*担心，小白…这是为了小敌，也是为了大家。
We can handle this, Snowy... This is as much for De as it is for everyone else.
